**Horrible experience.** This was my first time staying for two weeks, and not once during the entire two weeks did they clean the room. And then they had the audacity to demand 600 THB for cleaning? This is nothing short of a scam. I’ve traveled to many countries around the world, stayed in hostels, and even five-star hotels. Even in expensive countries, I’ve never been asked to pay 600 THB for cleaning. Maybe they’re really desperate for money. If they had cleaned the room even once or twice a week, I wouldn’t have been so furious. But to go two full weeks without a single cleaning is absolutely outrageous. In the U.S., housekeepers earn around 500 THB per hour. Maybe their housekeeping staff is the best in the world—otherwise, I can’t think of any reason why they’d be so neglectful. This is, without a doubt, the most deceitful host I’ve encountered in my travels across 25 countries.

Nous tenons à remercier chaleureusement notre hôte pour son accueil exceptionnel. Toujours attentive et disponible, elle a su rendre notre séjour à l’hôtel particulièrement agréable. I had a great time staying at N’Dee’s condo. Check in was extremely easy. The building is in modern and in a great location. Close to everything,  including public transport. The condo itself is in great condition and was very comfortable, perfect for my two week stay which involved both working remotely (from the condo) and some leisure time in BKK. There were a few minor requests made to N’Dee during my stay and I’m pleased to say, they were met quickly and efficiently and in a very friendly and polite way. Overall I would have no hesitation in recommending the condo to anyone looking to spend some time in Bkk and I would definitely consider staying there again in the future.

The beginning wasn't that perfect due to some misunderstandings between me and the host.And then, everything just went very well . The location is amazing , it's in the centre of Bangkok , so it's very easy to get to some "must see"places and it's also close to the BTS/ pier which is easy to get you to almost anywhere. The apartment is cosy and gets everything you need , Wash machine , microwave , AC , hairdryer and so on. And the last thing I have to say is about the host. She is very helpful and careful, she wrote a lot of details for us to not just get to the apartment , also to get to know where to go in Bangkok and how. And very lucky for us , we had a chance to have dinner with Nhing, and she made our trip even more unforgettable . I highly recommend her apartment and i definitely will book here again if I visit this city again.

Diow's apartment welcomes you home the moment you step through the door. The apartment is unlike any other in its unique design. It accommodates 4-5 adults (1 Queen bed, 1 Single bed & a comfortable pull-out sofa).
The apartment is located on the 27th floor, same level as the swimming pool. On the 36th storey is the viewing deck and a small library/lounge where you can relax.
If hunger calls, the street downstairs offers a decent variety of food options. There are a couple of convenience marts along the same street, within 1-2minute walking distance to each other. The 7-11 is located just next to the apartment complex. A 5 minute walk takes you to a number of massage outlets to choose from.
Location is perfect as it's within walking distance to Terminal 21 mall, Robinson, and Asoke BTS or Sukhumvit MRT.
The host adds personal touches to commemorate the stay - bottled drinking water and soft drinks were provided for us in the refrigerator. Cup noodles were also provided in case one felt hungry in the middle of the night.
I would definitely recommend Diow's apartment for anyone visiting Bangkok.
The location is very convenient in Bangkok and the top floor view is amazing. Miu is responsive and friendly, gives us loads of great recommendations, overall a great experience.

When I arrived, the place was dirty with stained bedsheets used as a curtain and stained pee in the toilet. Like someone left it there for days. When I notified the host about these issues, they did not fix the sanitary issues right away and asked me to wait till the next day. The host asked me to use the shared bathroom when that was not what I payed for. The next day they found out that hot water system in my room does not work at all. This place is more like a hostel. Grab bike will cost you around $5 dollars to go anywhere so location is bad. And to top it off ,  A lot of staring was going on. Not friendly towards black people.

Excellent, very easy.
Good central location off Sukhumvit road close to terminal 21 mall. Decent sized studio room for one or two people. Good communication with host.

beautiful bangkok hide away on the canalfront in a miraculous garden full of beauty & blossom. A little Tiny House full peace & contentment, served by the local warm hospitality of a beautiful daughter & her loving mother. grateful for the nourishing experience of bangkok's tranquility in great hospitality

I wanted to stay for a five-week period, and unfortunately, I had some issues with the accommodation. The apartment did not have proper blinds, which caused me to wake up early each morning, and the air conditioning was insufficient for the warm weather, making it difficult to work and sleep properly.
However, I am very pleased with the way that the host and Airbnb handled the situation. I contacted the host to express my concerns, and he was willing to offer a refund for the remaining days of my stay, which was much appreciated.
Although my experience with the apartment was not ideal, I am grateful for the way that the host handled the situation and worked towards finding a satisfactory solution. I would recommend this host as he demonstrated excellent customer service and a willingness to address any concerns.

I loved staying at Øyvind’s place! It’s a very cozy condo, and compared to others I’ve stayed in around Bangkok, this one really feels like the owner put effort into making it feel like home.
The balcony was a huge plus for me, and like others mentioned, I also loved spending time there just looking at the city - the view is fantastic!
The coffee machine was the perfect addition!
As for the cons, the apartment faces the river, and there are boats with music from time to time, but they’re mostly gone by 10 PM. This might be something to consider for those who go to sleep early, like me.
Overall, I had a great stay and really enjoyed it!
Thank you, Øyvind!

Die Lokation ist fußläufig zur Metrostation. Also alles unter 15 Minuten würde ich noch als fußläufig bezeichnen. Direkt vor der Unterkunft ist ein Supermarkt. Die Lokation war mir persönlich aber zu Stereotypisch Chinatown. Aber dafür kann die Unterkunft nichts. Ich hätte mich besser informieren sollen. Alles in allem kann ich die Unterkunft empfehlen.
非常干净，房间也宽敞舒服，晚上很安静，无人打扰。每个区域都有空调，非常凉快，不会太热。
还可以

No big issues about this area. It was overall a pleasant stay and hassle-free checkin and checkout process. However, the bed is a little hard and there is no hand soap. I don't have any other challenges.
Fantastic spot.

I stayed at fabs hostel for 3 days and i can only recommend this hostel. Its very nice and clean. The outside of the hostel is very cozy. And fab will help you with every Problem you have. For all people who werent in bangkok before this is the best place to go, because fab can tell you everything you need to know about bangkok and will show you the best places this city has.
The hostel is near everything that bangkok has, but still in a very silent neighbourhood.
5 of 5 would stay here again.
I recommend, the host is professional and responsive
The view is worth every single thing
Had a short but sweet stay at this lovely home

总的来说性价比非常一般！
首先优点:小区安全，刷卡才能进。房间干净整洁，布置温馨。
缺点:(1)需要注意的事情太多，泳池需要房东带进门，50泰铢一次，游泳后进去电梯不能滴水否则罚款。(2)阳台也不可以吸烟，只能到楼下后面一小块地方吸烟。
(3)洗发露超级超级差，用完头发涩的梳不开的那种。一定要自己带
(4)寄存行李要收费而且很贵。2见行李4个小时200🐷(落下东西几个小时后询问，发现他们还没打扫房间，在4个小时返回拿行李时并没有告知落下的东西，理由我认为不可信)
收了行李寄存费用，落下东西还没有告知。
(5) 离BTS、机场线 距离较远走路超过1km
总的来说不推荐，性价比不高，不如住酒店！

This condo is in a great location near the BTS and the on-site staff are very friendly. The shower doesn't have any enclosure around it so water tends to go everywhere. While there, we had the main AC replaced, the bedroom AC cleaned and freon charged, and water heater repaired. Everything remains in good condition. The gym and pool (now under maintenance) are good. The gym is minimal but some equipment to workout. Parking is available as well. The host was responsive and helpful despite some early difficulties with maintenance. This is a low-rise condo is a great place and I would consider it again.

Great place next to everything , I like to have a kitchen and washing machine when I travel. Host was very very responsive a big thank you. Super nice pool on the top floor with great views must visit.
P.S. do read up on local laws wrt staying in private residences if you are finicky but had no trouble whatsoever. Will stay again.

If you are reading this right now trying to decide whether or not to rent this condo, I recommend YES!
I've had some great experiences with airbnb, but I'd have to say this one tops them all. Why? First of all, Jeab is such a sweetheart. She is not only a responsible & responsive host, but she goes above and beyond to ensure her guests feel comfortable and at home. Having just moved to Bangkok, I didn't know where to get my ripped skirt fixed and without hesitation she offered to help me take care of it. She's also a wealth of knowledge when it comes to anything having to do with Thailand/ Bangkok... giving tips on just about anything and always offering a helping hand. Top notch genuine care.
Now about the condo. It's the best airbnb place I've ever stayed in. Super clean and like new. Everything about it is convenient and comfortable. I love that it has a washer in the unit on the balcony to do laundry easily. The bedroom is perfect with a vanity desk, large bed with fresh smelling sheets and a functional closet. The kitchen looks modern with a great refrigerator. The shower is quite spacious with a sitting ledge and a rain shower head that I simply loved. The living room has a pull out sofa bed that is great for lying on to watch movies or having a guest.
I could go on and on but I'll stop here. Oh, and you can see the river from the balcony too!
i like the place
All perfect, thank you
Clean, easy check-in process, good value for money. The location is easy to find but alley is a little dark and scary in late night.
First time staying at this suburb. Tony was very responsive and helpful, clear instructions and always reachable. Private, peaceful surroundings, easy to get around with grab.
Very nice place great location
We liked the place very much, it was clean and had everything we needed.
ขอบคุณน้องหงที่พักสะดวกมากๆน้องหงส์น่ารักมากเป็นกันเอง นอนหลับสบายเตียงนอนนุ่มสบายเหมือนอยู่บ้านตัวเองคราวหน้าอยากไปพักอีก
Great location. Everything as described, clean, and convenient.
Wonderful host! Very communicative and helpful. Location of the place is also just right - 5 min to Nana BTS and peaceful. Highly recommended!
Sehr guter Service

Jam and the staff are incredibly kind and welcoming. This is a peaceful, clean and lovely place to stay in an otherwise hectic city! It is within walking distance of sites like the Grand Palace or places like Khaosan road (or the nicer Soi Rambuttri). The taxi to the airport was circa 300baht, but on the way into Bangkok at rush hour, for speed, we'd got the train from the airport to the last stop then a shorter taxi ride  (Bangkok does have terrible traffic). Definitely have the directions in Thai that Jam sends you. The house is located down an alley off the main road so you need to walk the last little bit. But once you're there it's easy to find!
Excellent location with a most helpful host.
在这个房间住过两次，体验都很棒！
Everything was great!
Good value for money & location! It’s only 5 minutes walking to near BTS.
The place just like in the photo, really nice and cozy, nice building, next to the MRT station, Amy was a good host
Quick reply..

Very friendly and hospitalized support we received from Sharon.
Thanks a lot!!!
Eine Ruheoase in stadtnähe. Super pool, super Gastgeberin... man fühlt sich wie auf bali.

L’appartement est loué illégalement : on entre par la porte de derrière, en cachette. À l’arrivée, aucun accueil, aucune explication (ni pour la piscine, ni la salle de sport, ni même comment fermer la porte). Pas d’électricité dans les chambres, TV non fonctionnelle, et une odeur horrible s’est installée. L’hôte a mis 2 jours à venir, et j’ai perdu une journée entière à l’attendre. Il a promis une multiprise, jamais reçue. Résultat : pas de TV du tout. Le ménage laissait à désirer, énormément de poussière, équipement mal entretenu. Et après tout ça, l’hôte me contacte pour des traces de maquillage sur le linge… alors que des frais de ménage sont facturés ! Ce linge est censé être nettoyé entre chaque réservation. Très mauvaise expérience, aucun sens du service. Je ne recommande vraiment pas ce logement.
Awesome place, really clean and fitted with all the amenities one could desire for comfortable stay and more.
房間很乾淨，地點鬧中取靜。住房期間，遇到任何問題房東都會很快速的回覆。

Cindy’s apartment is spacious compared to other apartments in which I have stayed in this area. As the apartment fronts on to an adjacent block you need to open the balcony shutter to make the most of the natural light into the apartment. The bathroom has a bath/shower with high ‘step’ over if you are used to a walk-in shower. The sofa/settee is made up of two individual seats covered in a single cover something you fall into and can struggle to get out of but otherwise comfortable. The electrical equipment in the apartment was new and easy to use. The apartment was clean and the condition of the furniture reasonably good. Any waste needed to be taken outside to bin store as there is no communal waste  bins on each floor. I did not use the pool or gym during my two week stay. The noise from other apartments was not noticed after the first night. Overall I enjoyed my stay in the apartment and my communications with Cindy during my stay were addressed promptly.
The stay was lovely. It was easily accessible for the market and Paul was very helpful and cooperative throughout our stay. Totally recommend the place.
位置一流，楼下地铁公交站，沟通也很顺畅，过个红绿灯就是bigc吃饭也很方便
Good place but a little far from train and bankok heart. Pleasant time away from all noise.
Kanya was lovely and very helpful. She would check up on me and would help me whenever I need. Her place is as described so be prepared. Thank you so much kanya !

Le logement de Jes est parfait ! L’emplacement est proche de pleins de commerce et restaurant local du quartier de chinatown.
Merci Jes et à bientôt :)
Leider waren die Rezensionen nicht realistisch. Die Unterkunft erinnert eher an ein Gefängnis..

Eine sehr stylische Unterkunft, versteckt im Hinterhof. Zwischen tropischen Pflanzen und einem Industrial-mäßigen Gebäude vergisst man zeitweise, mitten im hektischen Bangkok zu sein. Direkt um die Ecke befindet sich China-Town mit vielen Restaurants. Die Gastgeber waren sehr freundlich, das Zimmer ordentlich und sauber, es gibt sogar eine Kunstausstellung und ein Café im Hof. Die perfekte Unterkunft für deinen Städtetrip! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️🖤

Stay in the heart of Bangkok’s vibrant shopping district
just a 10-minute walk from BTS Phrom Phong! Whether you’re heading out for luxury shopping or grabbing a bite at nearby cafes, everything is right at your doorstep. A complimentary free shuttle bus makes getting around even easier.
Perfect for long-term stays, this modern residence offers top-notch amenities, including a stunning sky pool with breathtaking city views, a fully equipped gym, and a relaxing sauna. Please note: facial scan registration is required and very convenient to do to get access

I have stayed at Nanthana's place for a month.  Everything was as depicted in the offer.  It was just perfect!  Nanthana doesn't speak English but it doesn't matter at all because he uses network translation  exceptionnally quickly and efficiently.  I had a few internet connection problems but Nanthana always solved them very quickly and when he couldn't come he sent in his friend who was just as helpful.  He came to pick me up at the airport, and last but not least , when I couldn't manage to get out of the appartment as scheduled he let me stay one extra night for free!  I highly highly recommend Nanthana who is one of the greatest hosts I had , and I have been using airbnb for a long time. Thank you Nanthana!
Great location, right next to Phleong Chit BTS very convenient. I will go back with family.

One of the best places to stay in Thailand. It’s really not that far from the city center because the public transportation is so great! Amazing amenities and super quiet if you’re doing a lot of work. Host is very accommodating and nice

I had a great stay here in Bangkok. The apartment is exactly as described and easy to find, check in, and check out. Communication was pleasant and quick. I recommend this stay to anyone looking for a great place in the area.

Pim's place was in an area which is peaceful. We stayed in the ground floor apartment, and it was perfect for families. The apartment has only one bathroom, but it wasn't a problem for us since we were a family. The place was very clean, and they offered laundry service. Also, when we asked for cleaning, they did it right away.
They were really helpful and even stored our luggage after check-out since our flight was at night. It made our last day much easier, and we really appreciated the extra services they offered.

I recommend this accommodation if you decide to stay in Bangkok. In the center of city, next to the BTS and 20 minutes by foot from Siam Square, the localisation is the convincing point of this appartement. Plus the calm and outer city impression of the alley where it is situated, give you a quiet space to rest after an active day in Bangkok.
The only bad point is that the entry door doesn’t close properly and so make it a bit scary to stay there. However the reactivity of the hote and the presence of a guard 24/7, make us forget this point.
Host was super accommodating and apartment was clean. Easy to get transport around. There’s few local food and cafes around. Nearby a 7/11
Great clean place, convenient and close to many amenities. The host is very responsive and friendly
不错，房间宽敞，客厅有沙发躺着，阳台也不算特别小，健身房泳池没啥人，离机场快线和坐船的码头走路都是13分钟左右。但是离bts站很远。
Will definitely come again !

Yoyo is the friendliest Airbnb host I met so far and he answers incredibly fast. He really went the extra mile to make sure I enjoyed my stay and assisted me immediately when I had questions or needed help. Great guy, very pleasant stay.

Très bon séjour avec un accueil parfait
Les instructions étaient clair et l’hôte est toujours disponible.
Simplement l’étage n’était pas précisé, pour monter les valises avec quelqu’un à mobilité réduite.
Mais dans l’ensemble un très très bon séjour !

merci pour l accueil
tout était parfait
à bientôt
Our room is very clean and has perfect amenities. Mr.Sutatt is very friendly, helpful and good take care of us. The place is not far from BTS Sapantaksin just walk about 10 minutes.
Host is responsive and accommodating. We’re allowed to check in earlier and late check out. We’ll definitely come back to stay at this place in future. Love everything here.
Super locatie en geweldige host!
房东和服务员人都很好，我们当天早上因为飞机早到了，有房客退租了就提前收拾给我入住了，而且还提供洗衣服务，洗干净后也会帮忙折好衣服，太太太棒了！楼下就是711，非常方便！每天都要去喝杯冰饮料！房间很干净很舒服，五🌟入住体验！
Great place
Arial 님이 6일간 내집처럼 편안하게 지낼수있게 도와주고 문제나 궁금한점은 신속히 답변해주셨습니다 역에서 5분내거리라 대중교통도편하고 공항까지 택시도 옆에 고속도로타면 20분도 가능합니다 다음에 또 방문하겠습니다.
Great place to enjoy Bangkok
The room was great, as well as bathroom. Oaklek and Tong was really nice, they provide the breakfast every morning and if we needed something, we can always turn to them.
Very nice and quiet. Close to Grand Palace and the reclining Buddha.
100% would recommend. lovely place to stay, close enough to Khao san road you can walk, but far enough away to have a good night's sleep and relax.
Very nice, quiet, clean one bedroom. Highly recommend for the convenient airport access. It’s a nice, bright cosy apartment, very easy to access and settle in.

宿泊の部屋が沢山あるようで、常にゲストをたくさん迎えていました。皆さん、猫ちゃん達を気に入ってまたリピートしたいと言っていました。私は1階の部屋に宿泊しましたが猫達がいつも集まっている部屋の近くだったので、いつでも可愛がる事ができました。
レビューでも好評の朝食のパンダンワッフルは、お手伝いさん達がパンダンの葉を育てているそうです。正にホームメイドですね。
Rachelのお父様も朝食の時にコーヒーマシンの使い方やワッフルを焼いてくれたりと気にかけてくれていました。
今度また訪れる時は、別のお部屋に泊まってみたいと思います。
역에서 가깝고 편리했습니다.  주변에는 로컬 음식점이 많습니다.

This place is great. The room has an amazing view and is very clean . The staff and hosts were extremely friendly and attentive. They respond very quickly and are so helpful in assuring you the best stay possible. It was great staying right upstairs from such a cool bar with delicious food. Definitely will be staying here again in the future.
Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Lage ist super und alles war sehr sauber. Danke 😊
It very good but hard to find and clean. I asked her I can check in early and she let us check in early very nice.  recommended.
feel good,the house-owner pickup us in the midnight
Good place to discover Bangkok.

Muy buen alojamiento, está en una zona algo sola por la noche pero aún así muy segura y algunos restaurantes al rededor, la ubicación está bastante bien para poder comunicarte con transportes, lo recomiendo sin duda
Amazing stay. Would definitely come back in the future

We loved our stay at Archie and Dao's place! It's in a super cool and friendly local's only (mostly) neighborhood! Easy for us to find w/Grab and Taxis. Archie and Dao provide tons of great local tips! The space is stylish and comfortable! Feel what it's like to be a local in Bangkok, but also be close enough to the sightseeing! Great communication and easy check-in w/the security team. Would stay again!

Thanks to Felix for being a nice host. He was responsive and helpful. The building’s staffs were all accommodating and nice. The place is super! Wake up early in the morning and you’ll see so many food stalls around. 7-11 is also just across just in case you need something. You can never get enough, I can swear by. I can really say this is the heart of Bangkok. You can get around easily.
Staff are welcoming and helpful

The apartment is as described and shown on the pictures. Good sized rooms and a bathroom with bathtub and shower. Also the balcony is bigger than in most modern Bangkok apartment buildings. Everything was perfectly clean when we arrived. The location of the building is a bit more inside the street but supermarkets and restaurants are easy to reach within a few minutes walk. For getting a taxi to the apartment it is best to use Grap App (there is a flyer with a discount code in the lobby).
There was some construction going on at both sides of the building so you could hear it in the room and at the pool but it wasn’t that loud and didn’t bother us too much.
Communication upfront and throughout our stay was always easy with quick replies. Check in and out was easy and quick as well. Overall, we had really good experience and can recommend this apartment and the host!

Great Accommodation right next to Asoke - Very comfortable bed, all amenities were available to make the stay good.
Will be back for future trips to Bangkok!

Dirk is a wonderful host, helpful and nice to chat with.
His apartment has spectacular views over the river and is located in an area with a nice choice of street food. Reaching the centre by Grab or Metro doesn't take long. Not only from the balcony but also from the workplace you can enjoy the view.
A clear recommendation for anyone who wants to spend some time in Bangkok and doesn't need the tourist areas.
非常的好
住地超五星级的家，舒适温馨，干净整洁，视野广阔，曼谷市景一览无余，无论白天还是夜晚都会有不同的景色，让您不虚此行。VITA热情好客，接送机特别准时，详细提供行程及建议，如同老友一般有种一见如故的感觉。
It was a great stay!
Toplage in Silom, Du kannst alles zu Fuß und mit MRT/BTS machen. Wohnung ist perfekt für 2 Personen - ich war alleine da.

에까마이역까지 10분정도 걸리고
너무 더워서 그렇지 걸어다니기 충분합니다
셔틀이 있다고 하는데 시간이 안 맞아 이용은 안해 봤어요
숙소는 사진이랑 똑 같은데 옆방에 누구인지에 따라 소음에 취약할 수 있습니다. 중 국 인 분들이 묵었을때 너무 시끄러웠어요.
그것 빼고는 전체적으로 만족입니다
가성비 숙소입니다^^
nil
房源很漂亮地段也很好，老板很耐心及时解决我的问题和需求，唯一不足的是洗澡水实在是太小了，完全没有办法洗头，只能简单冲一下，它是加热宝出的热水，国内一般用加热宝加热水洗手用，除此之外，都很好

Perfect stay. We will stay again and again. 2 swimming pools and gym. The place was spot on clean and safe. There is a free shuffle bus to the closest metro so was very easy to go around .We loved our stay . Giacomo was responsive and super nice. See you again next time we are in BKK. Guill and Gabri
Everything was wonderful
完美    很棒的房东
It was a bit grim. I’m sure the surroundings are better in Thai prison

Ms Mong was so helpful during our stay. We arrived at 2:30 in the morning and she was up waiting for us. She greeted us with water and an air conditioned home. Each morning she prepared and served our family a Thai breakfast with tea on the garden patio. Each meal was delicious! She also set up taxis for us and answered about 200 questions we had about recommended sites to see around Bangkok. The house was small but it was big enough for 2 adults and 2 pre-teen kids along with luggage. Wifi was good for all four of us to use at the same time also. The location is in a neighborhood right down the street from the Millenium Hilton and a local market, Klongsan Plaza. There are 7-11s everywhere for anything you may need. There are also local food vendors along the street on your way back to Mama Garden. All in all we are extremely happy we chose to stay here. It gave us the local feel of the area and saved us a ton of money on a hotel room.
The place was comfortable and clean. The washer was an added bonus with a drying rack. Everything was great.
nice place but it's location on map showing error so when book ask host to share location. in grab map it's difficult to find

Alex was very helpful, he takes the time to share information about the restaurants and stores around the building, also the free water and soda on my arrival was just perfect. Place was very clean and organized also I love the natural light coming in through the windows.
Nice place , affordable stay ! As in photos , only thing you have to use service lift which stinks sometimes . Otherwise great stay, 2 seven eleven nearby , 1.5 kms to Pratunam
Nice place and very clean. Host very funny and helpful to me. Hope can stay here again next time

Large two bedrooms serviced apartment near to the BTS. It’s such a great sized apartment for us with an active toddler. Very clean in both bathrooms, bedrooms  and living area. Great water pressure in both bathrooms. Suchada and her team were very helpful throughout the stay. The only inconvenient thing was finding a few small cockroaches sometimes in the kitchen behind the bench. Apart from that, everything was great. There’s a gym and a pool in the building.

It was a pleasure to stay with Khomsan. He responded quickly and kindly to every question and also allowed us to check in earlier.
The house is beautifully located on a quiet street in a very busy area, within walking distance of everything you need.
Also, the facility and the rooms were very clean and well maintained.
I can only recommend it and will come here again on my next visit to Bangkok.

This is one of our very favourite Airbnb bookings ever. We felt privileged to stay on one of Bangkok ' s canals in a real local community. No tourists. Lots of delicious street food on the doorstep and a traditional Thai breakfast every morning. Our hosts were so helpful and welcoming. Although not in the main city centre it is easy (and very cheap) to travel there by taxi from the main road at the end of the lane. Many thanks for a wonderful first taste of Thai hospitality. We will be back. Gillian and Euan

Le logement est bien situé et la piscine de l’immeuble est très agréable avec une belle terrasse et très peu de monde.
Le logement contient le stricte nécessaire et est sans âme avec la petite chambre sans fenêtre et la clim excrément bruyante. La grande chambre a un lit extrêmement dur.
Néanmoins, les hôtes n’y été très réactifs à nos demandes (taxi, sur matelas, early Check in payant).
Par contre, je n’ai pas apprécié qu’il ne faille pas dire que nous étions dans un air BNB et qu’on nous propose 100 THB sur Grab pour laisser 5 étoiles.
사진이랑 똑같음 굳~

This place was great, just as on the website. Its well located and quiet. The pool is a plus to cool off after a hot day of touristing in Bangkok. Bee and Pimon were both hugely helpful, and Pimon met us at the condo, helped us get settled, and showed us a fantastic dinner place for our first night. He also met us in the morning and helped us get a cab to the bus station.
We liked the place so much that we're staying again on our way back through Bangkok before we head home.
Clean room, friendly staff
Fantastic place to stay in Chinatown, with the most lovely and helpful staff. The beds are comfortable and feel private. Super quiet too. Would come again!
Pemigar is a very nice and friendly lady. She is very responsive and is patient to answer all our questions. The room was cozy and the its location near Siam is really convenient for travelling.

Very good place to spend long term contract, I was living here for almost 8 months, and my experience was extremely good.
- well located ( close to UTCC and the MRT station )
- in front of 7/11
in front of bus station
- friendly staff
- 300MB+ internet fiber connection
Nick ( the host ) make a great job, and supported me a lot when I needed, I strongly recommend this place :)
we couldnt stay at our first night due to the delay from our airline and the chrck in time from the property owner, we managed to check in the next day
buen lugar. la ubicación está lejos pero hay metro cerca para ir donde quieras. zona tranquila
beautiful Apartment, good Location and very friendly and helpful Host!

Awesome location in Bangkok, just about 5 minutes to the MRT which will take You to the most central parts of Bangkok. Food court 10 steps away from the house. Rooms are very spacious and there was everything we needed during our stay.  John ad Peter respond very quickly to any questions. Highly recommeded!
Host was unresponsive and didn’t communicate well. The room was dirty, and I noticed bugs around the bathroom corners. Would not recommend, even if the price is cheap.
Ravis de notre séjour chez Kk. Hôte très réactif. Logement très bien placé. Piscine au 31 eme étage topissime.
Excellent accommodation from TT and Priscilla. My wife and I loved staying here and can’t wait to return 😁🙏

Penny was an amazing host! She was very helpful and checked in on us to make sure everything was alright.
The location is great, right opposite platinum mall and walking distance the bridge that links to BTS and shopping areas!
Polecam serdecznie ! Czysto, pięknie, świetne wskazówki i porady ❤️ z pewnością wrócimy 😇

The host was incredibly kind, friendly, and polite, and truly went above and beyond to help us whenever we needed anything. The apartment was very clean, well equipped, and comfortable. The location is excellent and very convenient, with easy walking access to the Green Line BTS station. The only minor drawback was some noise from motorcycles on the street below and occasional airplane noise, but overall it was a great stay.
Stayedat Sanctuary House already many times. Everything still same perfect as before. So I think I will not describe all this again and again. Just believe me - it's super. ☺👍
It's a really very nice apartment.
It has all the necessary comforts at the price point. Overall a nice place with a responsive and helpful host. I’d stay here again no question.
Definitely a great location to explore whatever you want in Bangkok!
Responsive host! Nice place near the river for a change.

Questo posto è tutto ciò che fa al caso tuo se cerchi un alloggio comodo alle migliori attrazioni di Bangkok, stando in un quartiere tranquillo e senza turisti.
La nostra host è stata meravigliosa, attenta ai nostri bisogni e sempre gentile con noi.
Consigliamo questo alloggio a Bangkok, noi torneremo sicuramente!
Awesome place. Very nice decorations.

Great stay, would definitely book again!
The host was super helpful and made everything easy. The apartment itself was fantastic.
The building had great facilities, and having a handful of food vendors right in the lobby area — including a restaurant and a small pastry stand — was nice. The gardens were closed for construction during our stay, which was a bit of a shame.
Only real downside is the location — like a lot of condo buildings, it’s a bit removed from the action, with the nearest station about 2 km away. Worth knowing if you’re planning to get around a lot.
But other than that, genuinely great place to stay. It’s on my list for next time for sure.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
We had a delightful stay – cozy, welcoming, and equipped with all amenities. Close to Ekkamai BTS station, it made our stay truly memorable. Thank you!
Sehr gut!
Wonderful apartment, spacious, clean and quiet. The host Kk was very helpful. Would stay again!
Everything is good definitely will be staying here if I come back next time .
干净整洁，闹中取静，性价比高的民宿
房间非常好非常舒适，一切都很干净，我和妈妈阿姨都很满意，入住时候已经有人在别墅等候，帮我们把行李提到我们入住的三楼，真的非常感谢！唯一的缺点就是离市中心有一些远，离机场非常远，但是门口有公交车站也有711.
Loved it! Communication could be better :)
The place is very clean and fresh looking , staff very friendly, we are very close to where we want to go, just 12 minutes away, and so easy to get around, will be back again.
Lek is an awesome host. We had a great time staying here. It was comfortable and very clean.

I only like the washing machine. no powder provided though. I booked for 5 nights but was only given 1 roll of toilet paper. you have to purchase the rest on your own. the door was quite difficult to open. you need to "catch" the feel to unlock it. surasak bts is very far. my local friend asked me if 10min is for running. the surrounding area looks dark and quite smelly.
the owner spoke to us that he will provide us details how to access the gym but didn't get back to us no point keep chasing if he not sincere.
the mini mart does not sell alot of things be ready to be disappointed and better to buy some snacks/ water to standby.
the kettle place at the dry kitchen but does not have PowerPoint... where do you want us to plug? ended us we have to buy water from elsewhere. very little power point. prepare international plug.
not convenient to travel from and to..

Convenient with 7-11, drugstores etc., just downstairs and platinum mall nearby. However my mom and I felt that the walk to the train stations were a little too far in the warm, humid weather. Overall, we enjoyed the home. Cosy and clean. Host is very welcoming, helpful and quick to respond :)
Lilly is very helpfull whwn there is a problem
Great communication

Excellent stay at Supasak’s Airbnb. It’s in a great residential location, quiet and next to an amazing massage business. It’s a short 5-10 minute walk to the BTS which gives you access to the bustling city attractions. It’s also a 10 minute walk from Ari, one of my favorite neighborhoods in Bangkok. Highly recommended for hospitality, cleanliness and communication.
ห้องเล็กไปหน่อย แต่ส่วนกลางดี ครบครัน
Merci à Mike pour sa réactivité nous avons passé un super moment dans cet appartement ! ✌️

Host was warm and has great service. Breakfast that was provided was up to expectations.
The airbnb was clean and has all the necessary amenities. Only thing is that the place was quite a distance from the nearest BTS which was roughly 10 mins away by foot.
Very nice room and host

Good place to stay if you’re visiting Bangkok. Malls in walking distance and great mom and pop restaurants around in the area. 711s from both directions for those late night trips. Shuttle available if you do not feel like walking.
No complaints, excellent stay and host. Would recommend.
真的很干净，设备很齐全，下楼就是吃的，超级方便，也很安静舒服，总结值得住
Très bel appartement, aussi beau que sur les photos, situé sur une rue très tranquille et dans un quartier très intéressant. J'y retournai, c'est certain!

Easy to find, perfect for 6 people and located nicely (although it was loud at night but I guess that’s normal in such a big city). All in all we enjoyed our stay pretty much, it could have been a  bit cleaner (compared to European standards) but it wasn’t bad at all.
很不错

For people staying long days or hanging out late at night, it is a bit inconvenient to go in and out of the building. Otherwise, it's a good option. Location is good, facility is clean and Tony replys very quick.

We had a family of 5 adults and an infant and a toddler. Travelled 22-26 October 2018.
Location wise it’s very close to the BTS station. We used it for going to Chitlom for pratunam and platinum mall. We had most of our meals near the condo.
The condo project is fairly old, but the unit was clean and all aircon functioned well. It was rainy when we were there but still used the aircon every night. Water heater was not a problem at all. The master room is really huge, the other two rooms are smaller. If you need a dark room then I will suggest to avoid the smallest room.
I stayed in the 200 sqm plus 3 bedroom apt. Huge dining and living area, and balcony. The bathrooms both have bathtubs but no stopper so you won’t be able to have a bath. However, we asked for a baby bathtub and it was provided promptly on our day of arrival. As we had an infant Too, a nice wooden crib was provided with mattress, pillow, comforter and linen. A toddler feeding chair and utensils were also so thoughtfully provided.
We used the washer and dryer rather frequently. Tea, coffee and sugar were provided together with eating and cooking utensils. Do bring or buy your own condiments and oil if you intend to cook.
It’s secure where only residents and known persons will be allowed to use the lift, you need the Guards to tap the lift otherwise you cannot access the floors. My 2 year old enjoyed the pool, with me of course as it is 1.2 - 2.55m deep. She also had fun at the playground, which was empty and had an indoor and outdoor area. There is a nursery/kindergarten in the building, which is really convenient.
Had some problems with the cab drivers. They kept bringing us to the wrong place until we mentioned trinity mall 3. When you say holiday inn express silom, they will bring you to the wrong place. I even showed them the Thai address provided and still had problems.
Food/amenities
Morning market with a lot of street food options. Villa market is the Supermarket which is just 3 mins away. There is a foodcourt which serves cheap and good food, pad Thai for 50-75baht. A lot of good restaurants within walking distance, like Lek seafood, felang, Larp etc. At night you will also find street vendors selling yummy food. There is a vendor selling fried chicken just opp the hospital nearby, 4 chicken drumsticks for 50 baht and really yummy.
More high end places like Eat Me also within walking distance. We didn’t try out the place, wanted cheap and good local Thai food.
Pharmacy is within trinity mall 3. Hospital within walking distance. A seven eleven further away.
Supermarket
We did our supermarket shopping at central big C, were told that there is a Tesco nearby which is 3 stops away or a short taxi ride. We didn’t make it there. But you should really consider making a trip there.
Overall, everyone was pleased with the stay. I would stay again.

기존에 이용했던 맨션과 같은 위치라 찾기 편했고 파야타이역과 매우 근접하여 BTS사용이 매우 용이함
맨션 경비등 매우 친절하고 근처에 마사지 매장도 가까움

This place is super close to Phloen Chit BTS Station, Siam Pharmacy, 7/11 and very accessible to everything!
The host is super responsive and the staff/guards are very accommodative and friendly. They will try their best to assist and greet. 🙏
There are useful furnitures such as oven and cooking wares / refrigerator, water heater etc.
The soace is very spacious. We are four pax, the other room has private bathroom with tub and the other one has 2 beds.
I recommend this place for those who would like to be near and accessible in all downtowns in Bangkok. :)
THAT VIEW!! The pictures don’t do it justice. It’s absolutely amazing.

Fabulous building, but very clear notices in lobby that short term rentals not allowed, so as a lawyer and a person who does not like to break rules, I always felt a little guilty when I bumped into anyone in the lifts or at the pool. All people that we met were very kind and warm but i suppose that is Thai culture. The water pressure in the shower and basin in the bathroom is terrible and something needs to be done about it. We reported this to the host and were told its a pipe burst in the building and that it would be fixed that day at 17h00, but it was not. When we left 2 days later the water pressure was still awful and water trickling out of the shower is simply not acceptable!. The rest of the place, the location, the amenities and the views from the pool on 32nd floor are amazing. Apart from the water issues, and if you are ok with breaking rules, a fabulous place. When you are Thai fooded out, there is a fab western foodie restaurant The Fat Cow which is brilliant.
This condo is a 2-minute walk from BTS On Nut. There is a large shopping mall called Lotus right across the street, which is very convenient

I love Sujira's place.(1) Sujira was very responsive to my inquiries, and I appreciated it very much. (2) Check-in was smooth, (detailed instructions were sent beforehand). The building staff were kind, they were helpful when I needed to leave my luggage for a bit to get the key. (3) My stay was very comfortable. I felt safe. Commuting or getting a grab ride is very convenient.
I would love to stay at Sujira's place again if I get to visit Bangkok in the future.

Overall good value for the price. Very roomy, well located, fairly close to everything (BTS, Boat Canal, Restaurants, Pub, Shopping mall…) with a 10-20min walk. A good place to rest after a day out in city. Easily accommodates 4 people eating a takeout meal, light breakfast, but don’t expect it being decently prepared for doing any cooking. An apartment clearly built to southeast Asian standards, but it’s noticeable the effort to accommodate western guests expectations. Cleanliness was the biggest issue: most dishes, cabinets, floor, appliances had to be cleaned before used. Some cleaning materials in the kitchen were provided. The feeling with many amenities in the apt is that if you really need to use them they are there, and it’s possible, but not necessarily in a pleasant and convenient way. A way too common feeling in many Airbnbs here in Europe, so nothing new to me. The host was super polite and friendly, very responsive and clear with instructions.
Sehr guter Service. Das Team LeFoyer hat uns schon mehrfach beherbergt und wir waren wieder sehr zufrieden. Vielen Dank.

I was very happy find this place. very close to the airport looks exactly the pictures and bigger than what pictures suggested.
I will make use of this stay again on my layovers in Thailand.
great spot.
Great location, just a few minutes from chit Lom bts. Could get u anywhere and it’s generally a great area, Host is also friendly n helpful. Would come back again
飯店很舒服
Currently has construction around it and was pretty loud but stopped before we went to sleep. Not too much to do around it but very convienient if you have a flight out of BKK
excelente apartamento gran vista y ubicación

The check-in experience was very good. The host was very nice. As soon as we checked in, we took us to a local hypermarket and gave my son a super handsome car as a gift.  We were taken to the airport early in the morning and thank him very much for his help.  Recommend everyone to stay, the house is comfortable.  The transportation is also more convenient, the key is that the homeowners are very good.

This house is very comfortable with fully furnished rooms and all the necessary amenities. It has four private bedrooms, which is great for a group, and we loved having a bedroom on the ground floor it was perfect for the kids and my parents. The house is clean and well maintained.
The location is quiet and about 950 meters from Huai Khwang MRT station. It’s in a peaceful local residential neighborhood, which I really liked. The host was very kind and helpful. Perfect for a relaxing stay.

Actually, the condo is really nice. It looks just like the pictures, the beds are soft and nice but here’s the big BUT: Unfortunately, the apartment was very moldy, which is why we could only sleep with the window open and couldn’t use the air conditioner. The ceiling in the bathroom was moldy, and as soon as the AC was turned on, there was a very strong smell of mold—it was really hard to stand. Plus, there was a big puddle of condensation on the floor every night. Otherwise, it’s a really great apartment, with a great pool and gym, and the host was friendly too. But unfortunately, mold is an absolute no-go.
该房源地理位置优越，装修风格简单高级，家具齐全，公寓综合设施配套健全，我很喜欢，房东paul热情，回复反应及时，以后来曼谷还会选择！

Wanree and her family are amazing hosts. From going to get us after we got lost (our fault), to treating us like family, we definitely had a nice stay. If you want to get the real experience of living like a local, stay here! The place itself is perfect. My boyfriend and I felt secure staying there, we had lots of delicious snacks waiting for us, good wifi and they have netflix.  As soon as you step onto the main street (2min walk), you will have your choice of street food! Easy access to taxis and tuk-tuks. Make sure to ask them for sites to see, they have lots of recommendations.  They really do treat you like family. :)

Năm 2022 mình đã từng đặt ở JP một lần và đến năm 2023 khi mình đến Thái Lan lần nữa mình vẫn lựa chọn JP là nơi dừng chân.
Mọi thứ rất tuyệt vời, chủ nhà vô cùng thân thiện và phản hồi lại rất nhanh.
Căn phòng rộng rãi, thoáng vừa đủ cho 8 người ở. Có gần như đầy đủ tiện nghi như: đồ ủi (đồ là), máy sấy tóc, dây nối điện dài, sữa tắm, dầu gội, lò vi sóng, tủ lạnh, bồn rửa, dao muỗng nĩa, nước rửa chén, chén dĩa, bao rác, chổi quét nhà, móc phơi đồ.
Khu nhà cũng gần chợ và gần với BTS Ari cũng như gần với 7/11, khá là yên tĩnh. Xung quanh đều có các hàng quán ngon và dễ tìm nữa.
Nếu như có cơ hội lần nữa đến thái lan, tôi cũng sẽ lại chọn JP là nơi dừng chân của mình.
A great hozlst with good homes. Nothing negative!
Amm is an amazing host. She responds quickly and is very welcoming. The place is clean, modern, and convenient. I look forward to staying there again. Thank you Amm!

There is a reason why this property is guests’ favourite. Have so much to be grateful for. Will try and cover everything.
My mom and me felt a lot overwhelmed when came to the city. Having Kengcom as host and Pong as co host just made Bangkok so memorable for us. Kengcom was there every time I texted him, every time. At his best with his best information. He was so thoughtful to send pastries for mom’s birthday. Provided us with breakfast the next day of our visit. Pong was there at just a call or text. That is all you need when at his place. His place was so beautiful and amidst such a safe society. My mom has not stopped talking about it since we left for Phuket. Infact when I was at Phuket also, Kengcom was at text when I asked for help.
More and more bookings to such warm, considerate and kind people and host. May every Airbnb feels the same.
The home is beautiful and vintage Thai style place with modern facilities.  We really enjoyed being in a local neighborhood with excitement.

This was my 5th time visiting Bangkok and this time I came with my family with kid. They were satisfied and enjoy the stay. The area is a quite place, so we can slept very well. Max is very thoughtful, he prepared for every basic things (trash bags and toilet paper) in bulk in the cabinet. The most important thing is there has a water filter water that we can drink directly. All of us drank and so far ok, so the water is clean.

This stay was exactly what we were hoping for! It was a last minute booking but the host was very accomodating and communicative. We loved being so close to so many activities but it also felt tucked away and peaceful. Bonus that the coffee shop was so close and had amazing coffee to try in the morning! Overall very clean, peaceful, and a great stay. Thank you for hosting us Shamp!
Neat and cozy are all I wanted, and Mam’s condo did all of these.

We arrived early, and the host was kind enough to let us check in ahead of schedule. The house is in a quiet neighborhood, and the instructions were clear. The host was also very responsive to our questions. The room was quite spacious and overall clean, though we did notice a small cockroach toward the end of our stay.

I booked this place for the pool, but there's no pool.
The bathroom was dirty, with hair on the floor and used toilet paper stuck to the outside of the toilet.
The place was spacious. It was on the 14th floor, which helped dampen some of the street noise. It was a ten minute walk to the train, so pretty convenient. The area was safe with plenty of shops and restaurants.

We really appreciate our host for having us in her place. It was truly worth the amount we paid. The unit is spacious and perfect for a group of eight like us—there was more than enough room for everyone to feel comfortable.
We were also pleasantly surprised that they provided body wash and shampoo in both bathrooms, as well as liquid detergent for laundry. These small touches made our stay even more convenient and enjoyable.

第一次去曼谷，讓我最開心滿意的地方就是tor的家！每當我們訊息他時，他都能很快速的回覆我們。擔心我們下機後的交通，問我們有什麼想吃的食物或者有什麼不能吃的等等⋯
抵達他的家時，他跟女傭就出來迎接我們了！一見到他，挺驚訝的！因為他跟照片是判若兩人！高高瘦瘦的，很smart！
進去房子，感覺很舒服。設備很齊全，而且他屋外屋內和樓上都放了鮮花，看了心情超級好的。他很貼心的講解了所有house rules，還介紹了家附近的夜市跟按摩中心。家中也安裝了一個電鈴，有什麼問題隨時都能叫他，超級貼心的。
重點來了！這間房子很適合給有潔癖的旅客，家裡的每個角落，包括相框的邊邊角角，地上的邊角，床底全都一層不染。甚至連廁所的玻璃和不鏽鋼水龍頭一點水痕都沒有！誇張吧？呵呵所以想要住這房子的人，絕對不用擔心衛生問題。
再來就是房間啦！床超舒服，床單不會粗粗的！好眠啊！房間還提供了一個大衣櫥，裡頭有浴袍，室內拖和雨傘。
浴室是乾濕分離的，tor還提供了淋浴用品，而且不是那種便宜的洗髮水，洗了頭髮超級柔順的。超開心的！
tor的家提供洗衣機，女傭還幫我們洗衣服，超級不好意思的。tor每天都會問隔天幾點想吃早餐，女傭都會準時送上。女傭煮的早餐超級好吃！天天不一樣的早餐！超開心！
我相信tor應該是一個不常去旅遊景點或者娛樂場所的人，因為我們問他，他都不太知道。但是，他會想盡辦法給我們答覆。我們想去看thai girl show，他不知道哪裡有。之後我收到訊息說他查了soi cowboy有這類的表演。
這點讓我很驚訝！因為他真的很真心的想滿足顧客每個要求。
我們臨時要求了第二天的早餐內容，因為時間很晚了，我們也不太好意思。他說他會盡力準備，沒想到隔天起床真的看到我們所要求的食物。天啊！超級開心的！回味無窮！
臨走前一天，tor訊息我說，叫我們等他。因為他要和我們合照，還送了我們紀念禮物。那個紀念品超級特別，是什麼就不告訴你們了。自己去體驗吧！
還有很多很多的細節能看得出男主人的細心，所以想去曼谷的朋友別猶豫了，fantastic44就如它的名字一樣，fantastic！

The room and furniture, especially the bed are very good! Good locations for business and just beside of this Condo one of the best street food meals I took for lunch(Wantang soup with pork/ chicken)!
The service here is excellent!

Très bon emplacement ! Proche des transports et d’un grand nombre d’activités à faire à Bangkok (temple, grand palais, chinatown, Iconsiam…) Le logement est très spacieux, propre et les hôtes sont très réactif 🌞 Nous avons passé un agréable séjour, nous recommandons vivement !!
여기 너무 좋은 숙소에요 모든것이 완벽합니다!!
Recommended!

Dara's place is near to BTS as described. The location is its strength. It's not too far from the heart of the city, yet it's quite peaceful at the same time. The room was tidy and spacious. Dara is always responsive and very helpful. Thank you so much for your amazing place. Will come back next time!

Overall, pleasant stay. Worth it for the price tag for the amount of space given. (2 storey - 3 bedrooms) Slightly further away from the heart of Bangkok. It would be great if daily necessities such as more trash bag, shampoo, dish washing liquid and so on can be provided. About 30-45 mins to both airports.
超级好的房东，所有小细节都很贴心！公寓周围很安全，位置非常好！周围买东西也很方便！我们是凌晨1点到的曼谷，房东一直等着我们！房子非常舒服，让人找到家的感觉！非常推荐给大家！！以后来曼谷，就住这啦！房东很贴心画了地图，并标上了哪里有什么东西卖的位置家里也留了外卖单！总之这是一段非常好的旅程！
民宿很安静，离地铁站只需要步行五分钟，两个站就能到达暹罗中心，特别方便，推荐入住
Very comfortable space, with a great location, within walking distance from a night market and major shopping malls
fantastic place!
좋았습니다

If you're looking for a peaceful, cozy getaway, this is it. The space is small but perfectly laid out, making it feel intimate and snug rather than cramped. The bed was like a cloud, and the neighborhood was so quiet. It was exactly the restful stay I needed!

Le logement est super ! Nous recommandons à 100%. La résidence est toute neuve, le personnel très accueillant, une magnifique piscine, et il y a un salon de massage thaï à l’intérieur de la résidence!

Pupe's place is a classic heritage townhouse in a brilliant location. It is well designed and fitted out with cool decor. There is lots of great eating, drinking and sights to see all around. Staying there was a great experience and more memorable than a cookie cutter apartment or hotel by far.
As Pupe accurately described, this is an old traditional home so expect steep stairs and basic water pressure. But we weren't concerned - all was as advertised.
Comfortable place for a visit to Bangkok
地理位置不错，周围娱乐商场很近！房东很热情❤️

Had a group of 10 people stay here and it was great that everyone was able to have their own space with a communal  living room and dining space on the bottom floor. The AC units worked great in most of the rooms. Everything was clean and the location was great.
very accommodating and welcoming owners!

This bnb is spacious with clean, simple and stylish furnishings, as well as sufficient daylight.
Walk distance to a chic shopping mall “Emsphere”. Few minutes to BTS station too, but for the elderly people, better using free Tuk Tuk to there.
The host is nice and kind :)

The host and her family all assisted with our check in and check out were very friendly,  polite and accomodating.  We had a late night check out in the evening the day before our actual check out time which they accepted without any issue.  We had excellent communication with the host and her family  throughout . The condo itself appears brand new, with comfortable sofa and bed. The entire place was spotlessly clean. It was nice to have a full size refrigerator and a kitchen that was stocked with  items like apples, coffee, cookies, juice, and water. The overall size is cozy, so okay for a short stay, though for two people with a lot of luggage or for a longer stay, it might seem a little too small, though it is exactly as described and pictured in the listing. The unit has a small balcony where you can let in fresh air if you want, or otherwise you can enjoy the comfort of two separate aircon units one for the living area and one for the bedroom. Overall the condo has excellent security, including security guards, gated car entry, triple card key access, and electronic keypad for the unit door. We felt very safe the whole time. The condo offers a free shuttle service from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. to take you to the BTS Skytrain station. There is also a 7-eleven  within walking distance.
โอเคสวยเหมือนในรูป
This place is amazing!  Great location to local transport and shopping/food, etc.   apartment is clean with all the amenities and beautiful views.  Would definitely stay again on my future trips!

One word: "Perfect!" The pictures and other reviews do reflect my own experience. The studio apartment is in my opinion the best choice for exploring Bangkok. It's clean, tidy and neat for a very reasonable price, nothing short of the comfort of home. The washmachine has a short program so washed laundry can dry overnight, there is a big supermarket next to the building. Within walking distance there is the Metro that gives you easy access to the rest of the city. The owner Nokiko is very friendly and helpful. From now on whenever I go to Bangkok, this is for me THE place to stay.

정말 너무 좋은 숙소였습니다. 4명이라 호텔 구하기가 어려워 에어비앤비로 선택했는데 방 2개에 거실인데 가성비 최고였습니다!
숙소 정말 깔끔했고, 고급 아파트라 로비도 훌륭했습니다. 5분 거리에 세븐일레븐이 있고, 1층 카페 아이스 아메리카노도 정말 맜있었습니다(가격은 110바트로 조금 비싼편)
무엇보다 호스트의 답장 속도가 정말 빨랐고, 저희가 많은 것을 부탁드렸는데 흔쾌히 다 들어주셨습니다(수건도 더 주시고, 심지어 짐도 맡아주셨습니다) 정말 만족했던 숙박이었습니다 감사합니다!

Appartment clean in a good area (embassy of USA, Italy, close to a lot of convenients like SIAM shopping mall, restaurants...) and even if there is the highway close, the appartment and the neighborhoud is quiet. Concerning Pim, i appreciate the fact he take care of us from the beginning to the end.
Very nice and comfortable room ❤️ Thank you for everything

Kanomping & Tatiya both are great host. They would response to our query promptly.
The check-in was a breeze as instruction given was clear. The apartment was nice and it is allocated about 10 minutes walk from Ari BTS. Around the vicinity of the apartment, there are supermarket and eateries at the Villa Market.
We would return to the apartment in future and also would definitely recommend this place to other guest.
regards,
wati

Eine großartige Wohnung mit super Ausblick über die Stadt und den Fluss.  Diesmal bin ich mit Freunden angereist, dabei ein Kleinkind mit 18 Monaten,  es war alles super, ein Babybett, sowie ein Babystuhl standen bereit. Eine super Küche, in der das Kochen Spaß gemacht hat. Ich werde mit meinen Freunden wieder kommen. Es fehlt einfach an nichts. In der Umgebung befinden sich viele Restaurants,  ebenso ein schöner Markt an dem man das Streetfood genießen kann.
A reasonable place for matches at Rajamangala National Stadium, only 20 mins walking. The room is neat, clean with all necessities.

I am glad, that we rented this apartment for one month. It is very quiet because it is located at the garden side of the building. The bus station is just around the corner and there are some streets food stalls nearby. Everything is very well organized, we enjoyed our stay.

Super Host,sehr gute Kommunikation!
Schöne Wohnung mit super Aussicht!
Toller Pool und schnelles Internet!
Ich war absolut zufrieden!

It been a wonderful stay. The host are very helpful and responsive! The location is good and pretty close the train station with a less than 5 minutes walk to the nearest 7 eleven. Totally a worthy stay in bangkok! :)

I lived in this place for 20 months. Central position, every service is very close (supermarket, restaurants, BTS, gym, shopping mall). Hosts provided me with a warm welcome, they have been always super responsive to my requests and helpful. The house is very clean, well furnished, the maid comes once a week. I strongly recommend this accommodation to everyone who wants to live in Bangkok for a long or short stay.

You can dropoff luggage before and after check-in/check-out. very responsive host. everything matches description. hot water issue was fixed.
喜欢公寓的泳池
Host was absolutely great! Very friendly, would definitely stay again
Chonnyis very reactive and answer fast to all ! Thanks

5 Stars – The Sweetest Host Ever!
Jenny was truly the highlight of our trip to Thailand! From the moment we arrived, she made us feel right at home. She kindly offered us an early check-in, which was such a relief after our long journey. To top it all off, she greeted us with the juiciest, most refreshing watermelons—such a thoughtful and sweet gesture!
Her local recommendations were spot-on and helped us discover some hidden gems nearby that we would’ve totally missed otherwise. Every interaction with her was smooth, warm, and helpful—she gave super clear instructions and was always just a message away if we needed anything.
But more than anything, Jenny is just a gem of a person. Genuine, kind-hearted, and full of positive energy. If you’re lucky enough to stay at her place, you’re in for an unforgettable experience. Highly recommend!

Amazing stay, amazing rooftop pool and gym we used everyday. The aircon was AMAZING, especially in Bangkok heat. The multicoloured cat that walks round the apartment is also super cute!
Only downside was that the street to walk down at night is a little scary if you were a woman on your own I can imagine. But the place itself we felt so safe - like a haven away from the busy Bangkok!

Все безумно понравилось особенно локация, специально подбирал это место для своих потребностей, единственное было небольшой разочарования во время моего пребывания на бассейне все шезлонги не работали, также сторона бассейна световая только примерно до 11-12 дня, дальше там тень
Great Airbnb & great host.

Great location, honestly was very sad when it got booked out and I couldn't extend my stay. truly a hidden gem, especially around this area. quiet street, but lots of small and hidden bars nearby, with good coffee shops and bakery.
gym is solid, it has a half power rack with heavy weights (enough for 3 plates). host was super accommodating and responsive.
view was superb. I was able to get a high floor on my first unit; and it's hard to find a view like this near sukhumvit 31 area. even in sukhumvit 19 area with the high rises, it often has obstructed views. this view was splendid, with tons of natural light.
big middle living room space, I didn't feel cramped at all, with a nicely sized balcony. came with tons of amenities, the shampoo, conditioner and body wash all smelled really good. shower and I'll water pressure was incredibly good, especially coming from Koh Samui/Koh Phangan; this felt like absolute luxury.
the sofa wasn't spotless perse, but was decently clean overall.

I had a fantastic stay with Miu Miu and am very grateful for her help in providing me accommodation so quickly (I confirmed booking at 10pm and checked in just after 11.30pm). Communicating with Miu Miu was very quick and she responded to all of my queries quickly. The apartment is beautiful and has everything you need. The location is fantastic and close to the BTS, water ferry and a very large shopping center. I will absolutely return and stay here again.
Great house and host we really enjoyed our stay :)

Overall this was a solid place to stay for the price, no big problems.
Pros:
- Great overall location near Phrom Phong BTS, Sukhumvit Soi 22, Emquartier mall, and Benchasiri Park. Walkable to Asok area too.
- Simple easy check-in.
- The gym has dumbbells up to 50lbs, which is heavier than most hotel gyms, and the AC works in the gym.
- Free water daily.
- FamilyMart right downstairs is very convenient.
- Good air conditioning for the most part (sometimes still got hot in afternoon).
Cons:
- WIFI seemed weak; I ended up using my phone data instead.
- Using the shower got the bathroom floor all wet.
- No real view out the windows—just another building a few feet away.
- Gym closes a little early (8pm).

Such an outstanding home! Tucked away on a quieter street in the Thanglor neighborhood. Easy access to the Saen Saep canal and easy boat access to points east. Also, easy walk to local upscale market (15 min). Very central location with easy grab/taxi access to local shopping, weekend market, and Grand Place/Wat Arun.
The home is beautifully designed—perfect for our family of three—having everything we needed. It was wonderfully comfortable and we appreciated the extra touches (welcome treats, gift, water,, etc.).
When we return to Bangkok, would definitely stay here again!
Easy to find and easy to check-in, host great communicator. Location is near many restaurants, laundrette, MRT and convenient stores.

This was our second time staying at Khaophot’s Airbnb and it was perfect! Khaophot is an amazing host and very thoughtful. The place was clean and had all the amenities we needed (including a shared laundry machine right outside the unit door). Khaophot was super responsive as usual and provided great recommendations. The street food vendors near the Airbnb were tasty (and cheap) as well!

The listing was pretty, very similar to the pictures. Here are my pros and cons.
Cons: The bedroom was a little dusty to begin with, but my mom was able to clean it, so we didn’t ask for help. The bathroom ledges are trip hazards, the floors are slippery and stairs slanted. There also isn’t much street food around the area which was a disappointment. The sidewalk smells really bad, so walking to our house stink the whole walk.
Pros: Easy check in process. Shampoo/conditioner/Washer and dryer was available for us to use so that’s a plus. BTS was convenient and easy to use. 7-11 was a 2 min walk. Fai was quick to respond to anything I inquired, which is very much appreciated.
Overall, stay we enjoyed our stay because we had each other, but I really wish I was more informed about the conditions of the bathrooms. Those ledges are dangerous. Be cautious! Also the slanted stairs are not as safe either, but i understand codes probably are different out here.
Good value apartment 👍🏼

Очень удобное местоположение. Чистая квартира. Чистые ванные комнаты. Хозяйка очень приветлива и быстро доступна для связи. Из минусов могу выделить неприятный запах в гостиной, он напоминает запах туалета. Возможно, это был запах от кондиционера. Я предупредила об этом хозяйку. Также хотелось бы использовать более удобные подушки, эти были очень неудобными и бюджетными. Это сказалось на качестве нашего сна. Матрас кстати был комфортный.
Все хорошо. Отличный бассейн и вид на город
The unit was very clean and the photos represented the actual unit. The apartment was very secure and had security during the night. Overall great stay and great host.

Clean room and building. No issues with the room. Location was where I wanted. The washing machine was a combo washer/dryer so that was convenient. Traffic not too heavy on the street so taxi/grabcar was easy to hail. WiFi was just enough for browsing and getting some work done. Host says will look into it.
Tanya was a great host. We'd highly recommend her.
The best place in Bangkok

Very helpful host!
Clean and convenient place.
Food, train, and bus nearby. Amazing ice cream a few steps away. I will miss the mangosteen gelato and green tea ice cream.
Outstanding
The water pressure in the shower is magnificent! The jets are soft but come blasting out of the shower head so fast that they create mini wind storms, definitely my favourite part of this rental...

Amazing host and very kind and chill! Considering the fact that he speaks English made things a lot easier. Darren even recommended a few nice places which were great too. He was through our stay pretty much seen around the apartment so interaction was perfect. Thanks Darren for everything. See you soon mate!
Jammer dat er duidelijke aardbeving schade was en er mag iets meer aandacht worden besteed aan het schoonmaken. Verder hebben we een fijn verblijf gehad
Good place for staying in Bangkok.I liked the ''Buns'' you can eat at 1st floor bar:)
非常高性价比的公寓酒店，房间是真大，两卧室两卫生间，都是大床，大客厅和开放式厨房，虽不豪华但非常舒服干净。该有的都有。每个房间都有一个小阳台真的太棒了，视野开阔，周边安静。酒店服务热情及时，离最近的bts站和711大概有个三四百米远，酒店门口的巷子前后都很安静没有什么店铺，但大堂有免费tutu车随叫随到送到大路口或者酒店南边几百米一条很热闹的巷子。还有泳池和健身房。希望下次继续入住。

Accomodation was great, it gives enough privacy and space. Place was clean and the aircon worked well.
The check in was flexible and host was very responsive to messages.
Internet connection was ok, just one thing needs to improve-You have to log in every time (on your floor's wifi connection) and if you change floors internet might stop, and then you have to log in for the ground floor.
If I had an internet, then I would make a different way to log in, more easy one. I hope it changes in the future. Apart from that, everything was perfect.

We had an absolutely wonderful time staying at Alex's apartment! The space was clean, well-appointed, and exactly as pictured. The apartment complex offered fantastic amenities, including a gym, pool, and a meeting room, which Alex was incredibly helpful in booking for us due to limited availability.
The location was ideal for experiencing authentic Thai culture. There were countless food options right outside the condo doors! While the walk to the BTS train station wasn't the most pedestrian-friendly, the shuttle bus provided a convenient alternative. Alex was an exemplary host. He was incredibly responsive, friendly, and always willing to assist. His helpfulness truly elevated our stay. We would wholeheartedly recommend this apartment and Alex as a host. We'd definitely stay here again!
Nice location and room overall, there was a bit of noise during the day because there were some restructurations nearby, but I would definetely recommend this, also for good quality/price
民宿很温馨，房间非常干净，床很舒适。apple女士很热情，会讲英语，沟通方便。住了2天，这里的饭非常好吃，每一道菜都特别好吃！有一只可爱的猫咪。唯一的小小的缺点是，距离曼谷市中心有一点远，乘坐地铁的话，步行距离较远，且路上没有人行道。其他的地方都很完美。
We had a great experience at this Homestay. Excellent communication, clear signage around the building regarding the house rules etc, and some very good security to boot. Recommended.

Alors on va commencer par la communication inexistante personne non présent sur place ne répond pas au téléphone mail envoyé répond 30mn plus tard résultats 5 personnes en attente pour les clés. Bouilloire inutilisable car aucune prise de l'appartement correspond ! Une honte de loué une t'elle poubelle ! Je ne recommande pas attention au faux avis sur cette location.

Had a wonderful stay. The place was as described And felt even bigger than expected. Everything was clean and perfect with a easy check-in and check out process. The host Chanya sent all the details and clear instructions well ahead of time so everything went smoothly. The location of the property is perfect and near everything from the malls to the trains. Thank you for everything. Had a great time at the property. I would highly recommend it staying here when in Bangkok.

This place was just as described. I think the rotation was very convenient. The AC works well, and there is a very nice view. There were three of us that stayed for about a week. We were only provided 1 towel per person - but there is a washer. We requested for extra towels which they brought, and we appreciated! However, there were some slight makeup stains that couldn’t come out  and we were charged $50 which I thought was a little bit ridiculous for thin towels. No towels cost that much even back in the US lol… we would’ve been better off replacing them. So just be mindful about that.. don’t stain their towels that’s all lol.

Love our stay there. It is near the wet market, mosque with plenty of Halal food. It is also near the malls.
For parents with small kids like us. Ensure that the door to the luggage lift door is always closed. This is not the owner of the apartment fault but more of a structural design of the building, thus we understand and as parents we have to play our own part to keep the kids safe.

very patient and helpful host , made my first airbnb stay a memorable one.
overall good stay!

Otherwise, everything was okay.
Idk why theres a few cockroaches and rubbish left behind.

We enjoyed our stay at Ed's cozy apartment. The condo is exactly as the pictures show: very clean and comfortable and I loved the pool on the rooftop! The communication with Ed was excellent, he helped me very quickly.​

Chonny siempre estuvo al pendiente, el departamento está en una zona muy bien ubicada. Cerca de muchas amenidades como restaurantes, centros comerciales, etc. El departamento es amplio y tiene lavadora. Los muebles podrían mejorar pero en general descansamos bien. Gracias por recibirnos!

Amazing stay in a quiet area with mostly only thai local restaurants and food markets around - exactly what we love! Pool was great, appartment spotless and comfy, would highly recommend and would stay again!

The room was clean and quite spacious. The maid was also very helpful. I really loved the place since it’s near a 7-Eleven, only about 300m by walk. Overall, it was great value for money.

It was a good place to stay.
Not too touristy but everything you need nearby.

The host was great and responsive. Any concern I had she responded within the hour. The only reason why I rated it a 4 star experience was because the beds were not comfortable at all. I woke up hurting everyday. The beds were too firm. Other than that, everything else was superb!
Very large room and secure, the shopping mall near by and close to MRT station.
Very friendly staff, good location, nice and clean room, very satisfied👍

The place is recommended for those who have business near the Chulalangkorn University. Staffs were very helpful and nice, only the problem that we could not find the entering lift at the very first time.

Gift is an amazing host. Prompt response to all my messages.
Although the space is not very new, you will feel like home from Gift's service and the smiles of the security guards. Gift provided extra service without any charge.
Very close to sky train station and department stores. You can have everything you need here.
The CP value is high. I would be here next time I come to Thailand.
Nice location, clean room, the host gave clear instructions. I’d definitely recommend!

Ha sido una estancia bastante caótica porque se han dado multitud de problemas pero Silveira siempre ha contestado y tratado de solucionarlos súper rápido. Había una serie de cuestiones que daba por sentadas y que no teníamos (sábanas de recambio y cubiertos en la cocina) y la verdad que lo resolvió bastante rápido, siempre contestaba y mandaba a alguien con mucha rapidez. El sitio es muy barato, está en un sitio extremadamente tranquilo, las habitaciones tenían aire acondicionado y espacio para dejar las cosas, pero es cierto que se nota que no se ha hecho una limpieza en mucho tiempo, hay productos caducados de años en la cocina y todo está un poco a medio camino de estar bien, por mi parte ha sido más que aceptable pero mi amigo no estaba muy cómodo, por lo que deberiaís plantearos qué tipo de alojamiento queréis. Para mí por el precio está súper bien, algo cutre pero más que asumible totalmente, sino pagad lo que cuestan ese tipo de alojamientos, que es mucho más.
Excellent location, nice host, fast internet and quite.

Very nice place to stay
Premium building

We enjoyed our stay in the apartment. Great design, comfortable and clean, nothing more you can ask for! They had utensils, cups, bowls and any kitchenware you might need. It is convenient to get to places too since it’s near the BTS. Highly recommend staying in this location!

Suwinun's place as one of the nicest, best located, and real value of all the places we have stayed. The place was very clean, modern,and had everything we needed to feel at home. Also close to minimarket  and fresh market. Communication was great too. We would highly recommend this wonderful house.
Moon is a very responsive and friendly host. Lovely place to stay in.
Patsina was a great host. I would stay again. Location was safe and very convinent to the metro.
Très bel appartement je vous le recommande

房子距离Saphan Taksin的BTS站大概15分钟左右 确实是民宿无误 从新机场打的过去大概450泰铢 基本上出门靠着google就可以找到 看到七十一就可以找到了 楼下做生意的街坊邻居看到了就招揽进去 房东说是员工来着就在楼下档口做生意 印象中三四五楼改建的阁楼 位置我个人觉得很好 这完全就是在居民区 楼下当地泰国人做生意 早餐档水果摊都有 是个很适合体验泰国当地人生活的好地方 房东好像没见过不过沟通很顺利没有太大障碍 本身预定了两个晚上后面因为签证问题先后飞泰国 正式抵达时间已经是凌晨六七点 房东答应退半天房费真心已经很不错了 唯一美中不足的应该算是卫生细致度 洗手间的洗手池那块看得出来没有清洗干净 此外的体验都挺好 推荐可以主住感受一下 另外说一点就是泰国的空调特别大

A great place to stay if you're on a budget, everyone was super welcoming and the loaction is great!
we did have a problem with the bed which prevented us from sleeping very well and the wifi kept disconnecting.
Great apartment with lots of space, nice rooftop pool and area to relax, and easy access to most of Bangkok
Amazing stay zero complaints
