很好的房东，位置很好，吃喝玩乐一应俱全。下次还会选择这里。
A good place to stay on a family or group trip. The surrounding areas are full of local food shops and convenience. I enjoyed my week-long stay.
Had a great stay during our several weeks in Bangkok. Conveniently located close to the Skytrain and some delicious restaurants (especially Chalong and 1993!). Glad we stayed!

•Booking and Reservation: We had an easy time communicating with Oom when we started planning for the trip. She attended to all our concerns (no matter how stupid some sounded) almost instantaneously -- really quick turnaround. She even accommodated changes in the schedule. Days before the trip, she took it upon herself to reach out, providing us with useful information like options for airport transfers, restos, etc. We appreciated this immensely since a lot of locals have difficulty communicating with tourists.
•Communication: During our stay, Oom never got tired of checking up on us and answering our questions about the city. We even had a wonderful chat when we finally met her in person.
•Safety: The place is safe, with (friendly) guards stationed at the lobby. It also has automatic doors that needed keycard to access.
•Convenience: Oom’s place is conveniently located near the Chong Nonsi BTS station, which made it so easy for our group to around the city. There are also a good number of eating places, a 7-Eleven and a grocery store nearby. A big plus is the massage place in the building!
•Cleanliness and Comfort: The apartment was tidy, and the space is more than enough for us.
•Completeness: We liked that the apartment had everything we needed – heater, microwave, kitchen ware, etc.
•Recommendation and Rating: 5/5. We enjoyed our stay, and I am sure that when I head back to BKK, I will book her place again.
Очень понравилось местоположение, центр города, удобно самостоятельно добираться из аэропорта. Хозяйка апартаментов быстро и подробно отвечает на вопросы. Всё очень понравилось. Рекомендую.
Great host!

Earth is a great host, available 24/7 and support on any inquiries. The residence is comfortable clean homie and easy connecting to mrt and shopping malls.However,Abnb in Thailand is unfortunately not 100% legal but it’s ok to stay as a low profile resident which not causing any problem to other people in the area. I would come back and stay there again soon and give a recommend to friends as well.
I think its good location to shopping. You can use only stairs. Elevator only luggages. 7/11 so close.
Great place had a home feeling

Great localization in terms of moving around the city via public communication. We were there during Songkran, and many restaurants around were closed, so we didn't have much chance to try them, but there was surely a lot nearby. Good place to stay with a baby.
Our family of 7 had a great time. The apartment is very spacious with fantastic location. Staff was quite prompt in responding to requests as well. All in all great place to stay.

A lovely apartment for a short or long stay. Modern and supplied with everything you need for a relaxing break from the busy Bangkok neighborhoods. An easy walk to the sky train station and the shopping centre. Sutatips instructions and support was excellent. Highly recommend.
很舒適的房間

We have had a pleasant stay at Tony's. The unit is secure with modern secured lock system at the main entrance and the place looks true to the pictures shown (in fact it was actually better in real life). The unit was really clean with all basic facilities (there was an iron and an ironing board which comes in handy to iron out your crumply outfit out of the suitcase after a long flight & hair dryer for the ladies), washing machine and not to mention a bathtub with rainfall shower, it was definitely an experience for me. I would say it was a luxurious stay with an affordable price! The unit was really brand new and the conditions of the furniture and everything else in the unit was well maintained and new.
The unit was however was quite a distance to walk to the nearest BTS station (Saphan Khwai) but there are plenty of tuk tuks and taxis around and Grab car and Uber were easily accessible there so it wasn't much of a problem. I would have loved the walk from the unit to my destinations was but it was really hot while I was there hence my friends and I opted for Grabcar and tuk tuk. It has a 7-11 store at the junction turning into the alley of the unit which made it so much easier to get water and food supplies, Big C Supercenter is also within 1 km away so it was really convenient for us to get groceries and shopping.
Tony himself replies instantly to my messages whilst I was there at the moment I checked in and he even provided information of the tourist spots in BKK and few tips of eating places nearby and on how to get around the area which was really helpful if this is your first time here.
I really enjoyed my stay there and this place is highly recommended!

Patty's place is perfect for hopping on the transit system or a river boat.  A 7-Eleven is right around the corner.  The bed was comfy but the floor mattress was super firm. Patty supplied another pad/mattress to place on top when I asked. She was very helpful and responded pretty quickly when I had a question. The room was very clean and a comfortable size for 3 people. We had access to a microwave, dishes, and a coin-operated washer and dryer which was wonderful. I would recommend staying at Patty's place when visiting Bangkok!
Thank you for Ivy's place. We love this place, good location next to Choaphraya River, quiet and peaceful, perfect rooms size for family, food and convenience store just downstair. Highly recommend
ชั้น 37วิวสวยอลังการมาก .. หมอนที่นอนมีเหลือเฟือ ฉันรักสระว่ายน้ำของที่นี่ ยอดเยี่ยม
Nice, quiet and was close to the BTS transit. Front desk staff were very helpful when visiting and recommendations for local site seeing. Great for couples or solo trips.
Exactly what I was looking for, good vibe and great accommodation.
I enjoy my stay here very much, its a relaxing and quiet stay
Nice place, great location, good value. WiFi sometimes wasn’t always working. I will return again.

This space was well worth the money! I stayed for about three weeks and the host was very accommodating. Anything I needed or any issue I had was taken care of immediately. Overall affordable and comfortable stay!
There’s a local mall with a huge food court, activities for kids, and nice stores to go shopping!
Honorable mention: The daily market (extends to night) right under Talat Phlu BTS station
Lots of walkable hidden gems in the area: San Ke bar, Banh Mi Nem, Wat Nak Prok
Only one suggestion: Please consider adding conditioner in the bathroom
Gute Adresse für einen kurzen Aufenthalt
地點方便，鄰近7-11

スワンナプーム空港から近くて個室なのでコスパ抜群でオススメです。部屋の周辺には屋台が立ち並び食には困りません。他にも24Hのマックスバリュや大型スーパーもあり生活自由度が高いです。

A good stay for my short trip! Unfortunately I got sick after a day in Bangkok & I had to recuperate in the room for my remaining stay, but everything was taken care of! The 7-11 convenience store which is a minute or two walk away have isotonic, coconut drinks & medications too.
For the value, it’s worth it! And hosts are prompts in their replies too.
문제가 있었지만 등한시 하지 않으며 해결법을 전해주고 도움을 주려고 했음 근본적인 문제가 있었던건 사실이지만 대응이 너무 친절했음
การดูแลบริการเยี่ยมดูแลใจใส่ลูกบ้านดีครับไว้มีโอกาสจะต้องมาพักอีก

The place is very cozy and clean. The owner is so helpful, she immediately respond to me when I need extra blanket. And the air condition is quiet. The shower has great water pressure and nice hot water.
Thx a lot! I had a great time staying in this appartment.
Le séjour a été parfait! :)

Very clean appartement with nice pool.
Maybe an extra subbed would’ve been nice.
Easy to take a taxi or grab from the appartement, 7-eleven just around the corner. We were able to check in earlier then planned, which was very nice after an 11h flight! :)

Abe’s place is in a fantastic location, within minutes walk to Ari BTS station. Abe was very flexible with the checking in time which has made our journey a lot easier (we arrived at 3am in the morning). The apartment was very spacious and had everything that we need. The gym and pool in the building was fantastic. Overall, an excellent host and superb apartment. We will definitely stay there again! Thanks again Abe & Jess.
Eugene é stata molto ospitale, la casa era pulita e molto spaziosa,, tutto sommato è andata molto bene 👍🏽

Amazing. Photos really don't do it justice. Every inch of the place is beautiful. Pakasit and his wife proudly showed us magazines and articles admiring the interior design. Such proud parents of their son who designed it. They say he found all the objects used to decorate at vintage markets.
The family takes in sick small dogs and nurses them back to health. There were about 8 small dogs they cared for, and one very friendly, healthy cat.
The location is perfect - tucked away behind a main road so it is almost silent at night (despite having thin walls so we could hear other guests, but no street noise). A 7/11 convenience store and a laundry service with lovely ladies less than a minutes walk. Train station about 5 minutes walk is so convenient, but so is walking to the main road to get a tuk-tuk or taxi. Easy walk to the pier as well for boat rides up and down the river and canals.
Only bad things I could say about this place were that the bed wasn't very comfortable (but the bed frame was vintage), and that the walls are very thin. We were on the bottom floor and could hear every word and footstep from the people staying above.
The positives undoubtedly weigh out the negatives though. Would both recommend to anyone and would definitely stay here again on my next trip to Bangkok.

호텔 서비스를 기대하고 선택하지는 마세요.
불편했던점과 편했던 점에 대해 써보겠습니다.
<불편했던점>
1. 체크아웃 후 로비 대기 절대 안됨. 그랩 기다리는것 조차 가드가 옆에서 무서운 얼굴로 나가라고 재촉합니다. 큰 도로로 나가서 기다리라고 합니다.(방콕 에어비앤비가 모두 그렇다고 합니다) /당연히 짐 맡기는것 절대 불가이겠죠.
여행 마치고 집 돌아가는데 저희는 택시 오면 바로 타고 나갈건데 무서웠어요. 즐겁게 여행하고 돌아가는데 기분 상했네요.
분명 다른나라 에어비앤비 와는 다릅니다. 사전에 주인과 자세한 사항을 알아보고 예약하세요.
2. 수영장 자유이용 아닙니다. 집주인이 카드 가지고 함께 동행 후 승인 해줘야 합니다.(보통은 주인이 항상 콘도 내에 있다고 하는데 저는 원할때 이용 못했습니다)/ 시간 변동이 많은 여행중 수영장 이용 시 미리 몇시에 할건지 공지해야 하더라구요.
이점은 숙소 페이지에 공지되어 있다고 했어요. 저는 사전에 체크 못했구요.
3. 투숙 기간 중 수건교체, 휴지 보충 없었어요.
<편했던점>
1. 위치가 번화한 곳이 아니라 차막힘 없었고 그랩도 5분내로 도착합니다.
2. 가격이 호텔보다 약간 저렴합니다.
3. 숙소가 매우 깨끗했어요. 식기류도 충분히 비치되어 있어요.
4. 안전해보입니다.

We have been travelling to Thailand for decades and this place stands out. We use the BTS to get around Bangkok and the walk to and from the station is a short walk through traditional Thailand streets. That is refreshing to see how people live their daily lives.
The house was perfect for our stay and was more relaxing than staying at hotels. Wi-Fi was fast, laundry machines saved us so much time, and the place was very clean.
The host was so professional and fast at getting back to us. They offered great local places to eat and visit. You are staying less than a 15 minute walk to Talat Phlu night market steeped in tradition. This is a great night market with many You Tube videos about it.
If you are looking for a great place off the beaten path, traditional Thai living and close to the best transportation, This is the place for you!
Staying here made our trip and we will stay here again.

Place was cozy but looks good. However we encounter many issues with the rooms. The balcony lock was faulty, blood stains can be found on the spare mattress. Water heater is faulty, no hot tub. Spooky experiences throughout the 4 nights as well.
Baan YenTaFo is an amazing place. You got everything close by that you need to experience bangkok. Would go back there for sure!
Friendly and helpful

top notch cleanliness,  excellent customer service, room feels premium, neat furniture arrangment.  the owner really take care of all the details. for example, extra extension was provided w/o the need to request. location is hidden and could be scary at night but the area is close to grand palace and tha tian pier to go to wat arun ,iconsiam and asiatique. Overall, recommed to stay here
Great location, and clean room.
Very cozy place to stay. 5 mins walk to BTS station. Will definitely choose to stay here again when next visit.

I stayed here for over a month after staying a few other locations in Bangkok before. I can tell you that Ari is one of the coolest places in the town to be and this room is a fantastic bargain for its quality and literally being steps from the BTS, 10 coffee shops, sooo many food options, and lively streets on both sides of you. Real hipster vibes all around Ari minus the super expensive part of the hipster feel. JJ is so quick and helpful, the room was maintained whenever I asked, and there was a pool/nice gym in the facility as well. 10/10
The place was nice, beds were comfortable. Good place to stay with many and very clean. I enjoyed my stay and I'd love to come back again.
房主Grant很好，中途有问题也及时帮忙处理

REALLY POOR HOST, SHOCKING COMMUNCATION & UNSAFE PROPERTY IN ITS CURRENT STATE.
Early communication was awful. We only received check in information an hour before check in time (after chasing numerous times).
Before we arrived the host made us aware that the stairs had some damage. They were actually a death trap. Steps were snapped (see pictures) with large splinters. We had to ban our 3 year old from going on them as they were so dangerous. There was also other damage to the property.
One of the main reasons we booked the villa was because it had a swimming pool and gym. One of the check in instructions was to give 1 hours notice to use the pool. It took 5+ hours to get a response and the response was that we couldn’t use the pool as the staff were off. So for the entire stay we had zero use of the facilities.
Really poor experience and would definitely not have booked here if we’d known in advance how the stay would be.
很温馨的套房 四个人住还是比较安逸 主要是离机场真的很近 从苏梅岛回来也订的这里，房东人很好，定位有问题直接过来接我们，沟通没有问题，赶飞机很方便哈哈.
The apt looks exactly like the photos. Chieanchai’s very responsive. The staff there were also very friendly and helpful. Overall 5/5 experience.

Cool Vibes & Decent location.

Amazing place

The property is run-down and really needs renovation. The water tank should be under the shade so that the water will be cool when used.

Place was clean and well maintained. Location is also very convenient nearby to BTS. We also felt safe with the 3tier lock system in place.

realy friendly and helpful people!

the stay was great thanks a lot !

I consulted with the host and applied some solutions. However, Ii was hard to completely eliminate the bad smell.
I appreciate the host's cooperation, but it is also a problem of infrastructure in Thailand and it is not easy to solve.
One of the best place to stay near downtown and all the places is nearby and best privet spot and super friendly security and host

Super séjour au cœur de Bangkok et du quartier animé de Sukhumvit. Appartement idéalement bien placé, très bonne literie. Communication très facile via messages instantanés avec Noemi la propriétaire. Un chauffeur nous amène directement à l’appartement, c’est très pratique.

Thank you so much to our host for this time in Bangkok! He is a sensitive and helpful person who is a pleasure to deal with. Excellent stay! I would recommend to anyone that wants to be comfortable and near all the nightlife action. Host went above and beyond to help me and I will definitely book here again in the future

Rebecca and Wei organized everything for us beforehand, everything was perfectly arranged and given clear instructions to us. The place was clean and quite centrally located. Had an amazing time and will definitely recommend
Albert’s place is conveniently close to plenty of restaurants, shops, and nightlife. It’s an excellent location and beautiful home with a great view.

Tout simplement magnifique. Un petit cocon super bien placé dans Bangkok, super cosy bien agencé et super bien équipé. Idéal pour un séjour sur la capitale thaïlandaise, nous avons hâte d’y séjourner à nouveau !
This place was just great and Ont was a perfect host! I will be here again for sure !!!

I usually don’t write reviews for hotels or Airbnbs unless something goes wrong—but this place definitely deserves one!
Even before we checked in, Aim sent very detailed instructions on how to get to his place by train, Grab, and other options, complete with pictures. It was super clear and incredibly helpful. He also shared great recommendations for places to eat, shop, and visit, which made us feel familiar with Bangkok right away.
What I loved most about Aim is how responsive he is. It honestly felt like he was online 24/7—every question was answered almost instantly! He even allowed us to leave our luggage at his place at no extra charge since the next guests were arriving later. That saved us from carrying everything with us to Pattaya.
Thank you, Aim, for making our stay so easy and enjoyable. Highly recommended! 🌟
once again, Fing's place will never disappoint you. Second time staying here.. Stunning view, clean place, you get everything u need!

Квартира просто отличная - просторная, чистая, есть все необходимое.

Во дворе много кафе и массажных салонов. 10 минут пешком от метро и парка Lumphini

Grand logement avec très belle vue de jour comme de nuit. Nous étions 4 adultes et 2 enfants. Piscine accessible au 9e étage. Ménage fait tous les 2-3 jours. If your looking to get away from the central city but still be within minutes with stunning condo like view this is the place for you, if you don't entirely feel like finding something to eat there's a built in 711 just pass the B section to grab quick snacks then head right back up to your what feels like room away from home, I'd only advise reserving this Airbnb if your a chronic homebody or you'll never want to leave the room
早上八点多就打扫卫生会影响到休息，没有一次性牙刷，其他都还好

場所は素晴らしくプロンポン駅から徒歩3、４分ほどです。大通りから一本入った裏通りにあり、コンビニや飲食店が近くにあり便利です。
自分の部屋は４Fでしたがエレベーターがないので荷物が大きかったり、高齢の方は大変かもしれません。
設備に関しては一通り必要なものは揃っていますが、設備自体は古く、自然な汚れが残っていたり、バスルームのドアがしっかりと閉まらなかったり、どこからともなく甲高い音が聞こえてきたりするのが少し気になりました。また、セーフティボックスは電源は入るものの、閉まる部分が壊れていて使えませんでした。後はWifiが途切れ途切れになってしまうのが残念でした。
ただ、慣れてきたら余り気にならないですし値段などを考えると長期滞在にもかなり良いのではないかと思います！ホストの方の返答も早く、説明もしっかりしていて特に問題なくチェックインなどを行えました。

Porntip was extremely helpful and outgoing.
I would totally recommend this place!

Excellent accommodation with great location.  Nearby there are BTS, Terminal 21, Starbucks and many small restaurants with delicious European cuisine.  Thank you, Shin, we were glad to be your guests!

5 stars for everything.

Near transport
Clean
Tv

I had a great time staying at Rahim's place. The view is incredible, the location is great, and Rahim is always quick to respond.
I'd love to stay again whenever the next opportunity arises!

We liked the apartment and the residential complex. Located on the 18th floor, it has a great view, is spacious enough for two people, and has an access to a nice gym. There is a 7-eleven right next to the building, and a shopping mall with cafés, restaurants and a large supermarket (Lotus) is located within a 5 minutes walk, next to a BTS train station. Having said that, we were disappointed from the poorly equipped kitchen and the host’s attitude and lack of communication. All the plates, cups and bowls were made of plastic, and there were no pots, despite pots being part of the listing’s description under “cooking basics”. We mentioned it to the host, but he refused to provide us with a pot, and at some point just stopped responding. Only after we kept insisting, we were eventually provided with one.
excelente lugar!!

I had an incredible stay at hide-and-seek. The theme was so creative and thoughtfully executed, adding a playful and unique touch to the experience. Every detail fit the theme perfectly, from the decor to the cleverly hidden surprises throughout the space.
The location was absolutely ideal—perfectly situated with so many attractions and activities nearby. Whether you’re exploring the local area or just enjoying the comfort and creativity of the home, there’s never a dull moment. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a memorable and fun getaway!
Apartments with a very convenient location and a beautiful view

Overall, this is not a bad place. It wasn't as clean as we would have liked, there was a smell on the pillows and sheets and in the overall room. The washroom layout is kind of inconvenient because the shower is not blocked off so water would spill over everywhere into the toilet and sink area when showering, and not enough towels to wipe down water spillover. During evening and night time, there was no hot water, barely warm. Location is central to everything, right across from Terminal21 mall :)

Evan was the most helpful host I've ever had. Nothing was too complicated, was so helpful with everything The accommodation was small but had everything we needed and was so central to get wherever we wanted to go trains going everywhere with the train station only couple minutes away Will definitely be staying here when we're back next time Thank you!!!
Hallo Prae, es war , wie immer sehr schön bei Dir zu sein. Ich komme bestimmt wieder.

Dan's place are awesome, in term of location, cleanliness and the host itself! Quick response from host where ever we in doubt or need help! 7-11 are very near and there are massage parlour nearby! Overall it is a great place to stay in!
Well located.  Clean.  Modern.  Compact.  Good view.   Comfy bed.

What an amazing place!! I loved it! Loved my very spacious room, the delicious breakfast and the very warm welcome by mr Pakasit and his wife. The design is fantastic, you just want to keep taking pictures. The B&B is in a quiet residential area which is really nice, good to be away from the craziness of Bangkok but very close to the skytrain and express boatservice. The walk to the ferry is a perfect way to get a sense of the non-touristy, village feel of Bangkok. I hope to stay here again in the future.

Jah’s place is better than the pictures, it’s really clean and we had great communication all the time. He gave us some local tips and I highly recommend his place.
Thanks for making us feel like home Jah!
The place, location is great. Just 5 minutes walk to skytrain. The owner is excellence.
Clean room, great host, easy to communicate and responsive

The host was incredibly friendly and responsive, always making sure I had everything I needed. Just a short walk to the train station, which made getting around super easy.
The space was very spacious and perfect for big groups, plenty of room for everyone to relax and feel comfortable.

The apartment may appear to be in a small "alley" - but the neighbourhood is safe. We walked around at night freely. It's the old neighbourhood, lots of characters and interesting architecture. I wish I spent more than one night here.
The place is super clean. This is the perfect place for a group who wants to spend a lot of time exploring Bangkok and coming back to a homey accommodation.
Dinso Road offers variation of massages, cafes and restaurants.
thank you Danuchot for your hospitality!
房東細心解決遇到的問題👍

Charming place, exactly as advertised on Airbnb. Local morning market and night market at walking distance plus the picturesque Huatakhe market, around this guesthouse...
Owner offer a delicious breakfast to overnight guest...
In the daytime, lot of customers in the restaurant.
If you’re a light sleeper, you will hear boat and flight, but earplugs are provided in the room...
Communication with the host and information provided about how to reach the place are clear and effective.
Lovely stay, very nice host

Really outstanding condo on 37th floor, deluxe and breathtaking views day and night!
Pool on 19th with great sunset, gym on 20th with all you need!
Perfect for traveling with late departures. as late check-in and out!
would book again!
Great accommodation and very convenient to get around. Also lots to see and eat near the Airbnb.

Good size, comfortable condo in very central and convenient location near Nana BTS and Sukhumvit underground.

Tops and Foodland supermarkets nearby. Avoid Villa as its more expensive.
overall really loved the place! it's spacious! really accessible and close by to alot of the places we went to ^_^

I highly recommend jennie’s house who want to stay silence and neat place in bangkok. The place is quite far away from center of BKK but just 1mins from this apartment have MRT station. It’s easy to go to central BKK, takes around 1hour. But chattuchack weekend market is really close with this place so you can get there so easily. The host jennie is really nice and kind. She reply the message quickly.

入住这民宿，感觉非常赞。第一，房间以及床上用品很干净 地上看不到一根头发的
第二 洗漱用品以及洗衣用品齐全，生活非常方便

nice accommodation, will come next time
Shen was very responsive, had lots of little amenities and place was very clean.
I really enjoyed the stay! Swimming pool with a awesome view!
Maravilloso el lugar, Super limpio, nos sentimos como en casa!

The place is as shown in the photo, good for a group of 4 couples to have a nice unit to stay in a good location. Although slightly pricy, if the group is large, it is still value for money as the location is quite good.

My stay at Max’s place was amazing! It was the most convenient location, the doorman downstairs were so kind and helpful, I felt safe, the building was beautiful, and the place felt comfortable.
It’s super easy to get into town, and I was able to call transportation. That was there always in less than five minutes. I walk to the neighborhood, and it was right next to a 7-Eleven with an ATM.
It was super easy to get in and I like the security downstairs so I felt safe traveling solo.
Even the skyline Was cool to look at. I would definitely recommend this place anyone coming through Bangkok.
the host is very friendly and the airbnb is clean and good location

Everything ok! The room was nice and clean with air conditioning that works very well. Everyday they clean and change the towels. The hotel Is in a very good e safe zone, you can walk to arrive to Grand Palace, the reclining Buddha etc.
The host was very kind and smiling
The only problem is the noise from the first floor if you have a room at the ground floor. You can hear everything, even when they snore but we already knew this problem, because the host wrote in the description.
Principal point négatif était l'évacuation de l'eau du lavabo. En effet, l'eau sale sort directement sur le sol de la salle de bain et des toilettes ce qui plutôt gênant et très peu pratique.
Nice, simple apartment in a perfect location just off Sukhumvit. One bedroom is large and sunny, the other one a lot smaller and darker - but both are comfortable.

Bird was an amazing host. She responds quickly. She checked in with me daily and made suggestions for daily activities. She even includes pictures and information of how to get there. Now for her condominium. The entire place was huge and very clean. The view from the terrace was spectacular. The location is centralized to every thing that you can imagine and need. I will for sure recommend her place and I will stay here again if I return.

Stella was so helpful and friendly. loads of helpful advice. The house was fantastic, I was with my 2 boys and  there was plenty space.  The house had so much character, definitely better than a modern flat. Highly recommend for couples, friends and families. thanks so much

Families can book this beautiful and functional home with complete peace of mind.
Thank you for everything!
Great apartment, only a short walk to shopping and restaurants. Would stay here again.

this place smelt like garbage (literally) and has the strangest rules that they only tell you when you arrive, such as having to be accompanied by their staff every time you enter. the security there harassed me and made me feel like I wasn't allowed to stay and they do not check to see the cleanliness of the unit. this feels like a sweat shop accomodation

cheap  and nothing fancy but not far away from the airport. taxi from airport  is only around 150 baht. Good for the price if your next  flight is later and you want a place to rest. Nothing for picky people.But good enough for sleeping.

Didn't meet Hollis, but he was responsive in helping me get set up with the key, wifi, etc.

I was in contact with Cindy via the airbnb app. She scheduled the maid to check me into the room and her brother gave instructions to the taxi driver on how to get to the studio apartment.

I booked the place because it was close to the BTS Udom Suk (E12) station (about 700m according to my iPhone Google Maps app). The taxi ride from the airport cost 320 Baht (250 meter, 50 driver, 20 toll).
On my return to the airport, I used BTS (E12 to N2 for 52 Baht) and then transferred to the airport rail (N2 to BKK airport for 45 Baht). The taxi was definitely faster, but if you aren't in a hurry, and want to view the city, the train ride is doable.

Seeing Bangkok by BTS was good. For 130 Baht, you can get an unlimited use 1-day pass. I went to the Siam shopping mall, the big open market within walking distance of Mo Chit (N8), and rode the river boats near Saphan Taksin (S6). However, if you go out to enjoy night life, the BTS train stops by 24:00.

The place was in a convenient location. The building isn't new, but I felt safe in the area. I think the place was a good value for the money spent. The food stands near the apartment were a good value too.

I guess one concern is that the bed felt a little weak. The frame seemed a bit fragile. Also, I never got any hot or warm water to work in the shower. Other than that, I didn't have any major issues.

This place is great for the price and the location it gives you. We were also able to check in 2 hours early free of charge which was super nice after a ton of travel. Tons of tasty food and cool building around too. Worked great for my buddy and I.

We had a great second stay at Sara's apartment. We were in Bangkok in transit for a few days and were thrilled when the apartment was available. About a 10 minute walk from public transportation, this place is easy to access all of Bangkok. It is super clean and has a lot of space for 2 people. Sara is super sweet and answers any questions you may have. Thanks for a great second stay!

I would recommend any travelers to stay at this Airbnb! The host was very understanding and accommodating. The place is huge, clean, and very well kept. The 5 working ACs all kept us cool in such intense March heat! You also get so much light from the huge windows -- the best part is sipping coffee by the huge dining table next to the window.
The kitchen is stocked with enough pots, pans, utensils, plates, bowls, and cutleries. The dish soap and hand soap are also always filled. Trash is taken out and the apartment is cleaned very well. The cleaning staff is so polite and efficient! They really kept the apartment clean and desirable to live in. Good smart TV and so many DVDs! Having a washer with so many hangers and drying line makes it super convenient for long-term rentals.
The fact that each bedroom has its own full bathroom is a huge plus for my family! The apartment is super spacious so it's also very convenient to have friends and family visit. Not only that, it's also located in a central location with 7-eleven, coffee shops, groceries, and restaurants nearby!
Staying at this Airbnb made our trip very enjoyable.
So nice place to stay for a long term. Highly recommend this place. Thank you

El lugar es como se describe y la ubicación a pesar de las obras era de fácil acceso, nosotros nos movimos en taxi y caminando sin inconvenientes. El departamento tiene todo lo necesario para una estancia confortable, la lavadora fue un plus que se apreció mucho. Respecto al ruido, no nos molestaron las obras, más bien se oían ruidos del departamento contiguo por las noches. Nuestro anfitrión nos dotó de tapones para oídos y botellas de agua suficientes para la estadía. ¡Quedamos gratamente satisfechos!
Nice spot to stay, great pool.
Recommend . Abit far from BTS but walkable. Will definitely go back for it again
Place was very clean, beautifully designed and only 10 mins walk away from the BTS station. Highly recommend the place and will stay again if I come back to bkk.

Lalipat give you good hospitality and waited for me to arrived to show me around the condo & facility. The room is very well furnished and good for a couple to stay and next to shopping mall where you can enjoy the restaurant there not forgetting the food court with many local dishes serve at very reasonable price. Also the huge supermarket to buy whatever you  need + travelling make easy cause it’s next to subway.

Felt at home in a comfortable clean cozy and local apartment. Great appliances, shower, beds and housekeeping service.
Coming back in 9 days

Amazing experience. They picked us up from the airport and took us to the hotel, which wAs very close about 10-15 minutes. They have a mini bar and breakfast buffet with Thai and American food. I got my first Thai massage which was excellent! Perfect place to stay the night before or after your flight to/from the Bangkok airport! Nice rooms with pretty decorations, definitely recommend.
The room was clean and comfortable. If I return to Bangkok I will definitely stay here again.
The apartment is great for a stay in Bangkok. Very well located and very well equipped. The residence is very beautiful, clean and secure.

There was a very bad sewage smell in the apartment which the host was well aware of, after raising the issue she said it will get fixed but it didn’t, it was so bad I had to check out after 1 night but was charged for 2 nights, seems the host is more concerned I’m with making money than the guest satisfaction. The room is on a busy street and almost on top of the road so it’s very noisy all night. I would not recommend staying at this place.
Great, quiet apartment with good places to work, which is located near the metro station that leads to city center.

Fantastic. Building is old but the apartment is renovated well, very clean, well equipped. Office and security staff always ready to help with a smile. Unbeatable value for the location.
Would return in a heartbeat.
Great location, great communication from owners. Happily stay there anytime I’m in Bangkok.

Just a great apartment, Super friendly and supportive Host, bright place with Internet Router in the flat itself, great for cooking, the Flat is facing a green place. Great sleep. Can recommend this place!
its value for money. simple but functional.  we didnt encounter any problem, it's just a bit far from mrt and bts, but walkable .clean, safe and quiet

Très pratique pour une nuit car à proximité de l'aéroport et propose des navettes 24/24 7/7 !!
Chambre jolie mais odeur d'humidité présente qui se confirme dans la salle de bain qui mérite un rafraîchissement.
Mais pour une nuit cela fait largement l'affaire!
Beautiful spacious apartment, perfect for working!

Great stay overall. The apartment is clean, modern, and well-maintained. The area is quiet, private, and feels very safe. There’s a 7-Eleven right downstairs which is super convenient for anything you need.
Location is also a big plus — just about a 5-minute walk to a lively nightlife area with plenty of food and activities, but still far enough to keep the apartment peaceful.
Check-in was smooth, communication was clear, and everything worked as expected. Would definitely stay here again.
Highly recommended for both short stays and longer trips.

We stayed for one month and everything was perfect. The apartment is spacious, clean, and very well-equipped. The WiFi is fast, the kitchen has everything you need, and the weekly cleaning is a nice touch. Great location near malls and transport. We had a fantastic experience and would definitely recommend this place to anyone!

The location is great, in the heart of the entertainment area.
There is no noise at night in apartment.
The room was exactly similar as in the pics.

We have arrived late night around 11:30pm and have already informed the host reg this. The problem was with the lock, it wasn't opening at all, even upon calling around 10-15 times, no response at all. we had to book another hotel nearby for the night out of my own pocket and had to come back to the stay and found that the lock is problematic and we had to force the key in with left right left right left right motions until the key fits in completely and then open the lock. This wasn't mentioned in checkin guide, and no reimbursement too. Was disappointed to face such a situation having coming for an international trip for the first time with my family.
By the way the stay would be comfortable for 2 ppl but for 3 it is very small and tiny. Stay is good, Host should have been available at the time of checkin and we shouldn't tell the security because Airbnb is not allowed as per policies at the locality. Didn't reach out to security as it might be troublesome again, yet no refund. Ok.

vibrant night life that happens at night with a lot of bars and restaurants with good food. brunch at breakfast story is highly recommended, which is right round the corner.
lily fu for a nice Asian twist on delicious Thai cuisine and an absolutely nice place to people watch during the late night activities.
Not really recommended for people that want a less busy street as this is probably one of the busiest bustling street of Sukhumvit.
It does feel amazing to soak in all of it at least one of the nights staying here though.

really great value for money. the condo is small but well equipped. it's 11 minutes walk from lotus and bts on nut  but the condomium has a shuttle service going there and back so I ended up using it alot. also has a snooker place right across the road and great swimming pool
Siriwat was very friendly and helpful. I can only recommend to stay at his place! The location is also not too far from Khao San Road. We had a great time and the rooms were very clean and tidy.
Good stay!!
clean cozy room and great view
Overall nice stay. Lack few things in the property.
附近有7-11，适合团队旅游，房东很好

We fully enjoyed our stay at this place. It is very cosy, clean and comfortable. Loved having the space and a full dining table. The building is very well run and managed like a hotel. The luggage storage is very useful as we could leave our stuff to explore Bangkok. There are many food choices around the neighbourhood. We especially liked the local food right across from the accomodation where there is a Watsons too. There were many malls at Ekkamai BTS station so we could get anything we needed by just walking. Excellent area. Would stay again when I'm back in Bangkok!
Nice condo. Good host. Thank you for the stay.
Es war alle perfekt organisiert und sauber … die Lage ist top und die Gastgeberin  ist top!!!

Beautiful house and very nice garden and swimming pool!! It was a great place to relax after a long flight and to get used to the temperature. Room was perfect. Our three year old son loved it as well! Keep in mind that the location is far away from the things you might want to visit in Bangkok, so you always need a taxi.
Wonderful apartment with great views and very convenient location... Highly recommend..
Excellent experience

Everything was great, the Security are so friendly.  The only complaint we have is 'parking' since we rent a car, that was painful driving around looking for parking space near the Condo.  All in All we enjoyed our stay.
房东很nice，超级贴心，早餐会根据你的口味喜好去做，住在那里心灵得到放松，微风徐徐，三五好友对酒言欢，很赞！人也超棒，超热情，还怕我们不知道去玩哪里，给我安排好行程，可惜有朋友要去shopping，没有实施，很可惜，捷运就在边上，步行十几分钟即可，我是走过的，房东妹妹还会帮忙打出租，一定要当地人帮你打出租，不然出租司机会杀猪，住的真的很开心！

市場やスーパーに近く、最高の立地でした。
また、プールやジムも気軽に利用でき、食料や飲み物の自動販売機、きれいな川沿いの裏庭もありました。
ホストは親しみやすく、イレギュラーなチェックインに対しても柔軟に対応して下さいました。
Great location. Great facilities.

The villa is prefect for a group of friends or family, especially those with young kids and toddlers!
The villa has everything you need in - free snacks, coffee and water, a cozy corner filled with board games and toys for kids, as well as clean and new kitchenware and cutlery! To our surprise, they even provided with a baby highchair, bathtub, crib with a pillow and blanket, and baby cutlery!
Lastly, there is a washing machine and a dryer on 2nd floor, along with a spacious balcony (or perhaps the villa’s roof). This makes it incredibly convenient to wash and dry your clothes quickly.
Definitely worth the try. Responsive very helpful host. Beautiful view, convenient location.
Отличный хозяин, хорошая комната. Останавливался тут уже второй раз
Really good
很棒的房子跟房東，整體非常乾淨整潔，雖然位置不好找，但還是很推薦。
Great experience :)
非常感谢amy的爸爸妈妈。早上很早就在机场接我们 还提前一点让我们入住 房屋配套设施齐全 真的下楼就是bts 很方便，而且相当安全 进出必须刷卡 晚上特别安静 下次去还会住这里
Lived there for a week. No complaints. Everything is great. For that price nice place.

挺好的，非常靠近nana，离商圈也很近，坐地铁🚇也蛮方便的
附近有两家711买东西蛮方便的

Clean and safe place, all service people are nice and kind; small gym and swimming pool are all very clean.
Only if you’re very sensitive for noisy in the night, here will not good choice, the building design put air conditioner external machine outside of bedroom.
Washing machine is public machine outside using coin, rather than dedicated for yourself in your room.
Nice, quite and clean place. Swimming pool was a big plus. Bts is a good 20 minute walk so if you're short on time you'll need Grab. Wish there was more towels.
CJ’s apartment is small but efficient. It is in a great location and walkable to food, shopping and more.
Beautiful roof top with amazing views.
老板人很好 也很有耐心 名宿很方便 下次会再来住
地理位置优越 离地铁5分钟 711 5分钟 非常方便
위치가 좋습니다. 방콕자체가 너무 차가 많이 막힙니다. 샤워기,  컵, 전기레인지도 교체해주었습니다. 따뜻한물은 거실 화장실만 가능합니다. 친절하게 대해주셔서 감사합니다
Great place and great host, Lucas was very helpful and responsive during the whole trip. Would definitely stay there again
Sehr schön eingerichtetes Appartment. Genau so wie auf den Bildern. Die Aussicht ist atemberaubend aus dem 50. Stockwerk.

到BTS站走路15到20分钟，小巷子很幽静，由于有学校，巷子里没什么人，晚上不太敢出门。离超市走路大概10分钟左右，还算方便。
公寓设施不错，健身房和泳池都很好，工作人员热情亲切。
房屋内基本设施都有，对于我来说，锅比较少，稍微不方便。电视不是网络电视，只有泰语频道，且无法投屏。
房东很好，回应及时。根据我们的要求给我们准备了电饭煲。电视的问题，他也给我们准备了chromecast，虽然没有解决看电视的问题，但也是非常热心了。有要求马上能满足。

The apartment was older than I thought, but it had everything I needed. I was impressed by the friendliness of the staff at the reception. The accommodation was clean and it was nice to have a shopping mall nearby.
Amazing apartment. It has beautiful views of the city, excellent access to public transport and facilities.
Nice~
不錯 浴室很乾淨 離bts站稍遠 但還ok

Отличная квартира, соотвествует фотографиям, много магазинов и ресторанов в шаговой доступности, гипермаркет и торговый центр в 10 минутах ходьбы. Большой бассейн и тренажёрный зал.
Самая большя проблема это заселение, после 8 вечера не заселяют ссылаясь на то что работники рецепшена уходят домой, но к ним это не имеет никакого отношения, по факту приходит совсем другой человек и просто отдаёт вам ключ, спокойно можно было бы оставить ключ в почтовом ящике и мы бы заселились,а так нам пришлось снять отель на 1 ночь. И ещё "хозяйка" квартиры которая указана на сайте никак с вами не контактирует, за 2 дня не смогла найти кнопку принять запрос на изменение. Всё время пребывания мы общались с другим человеком. Хозяйке 0 за свою работу.
I enjoyed staying at Paw's place. College Haus is convenient, clean and quiet. I will stay here again should I visit Bangkok again.
absolutely brilliant place to stay nice and cosy, amazing host always responding!!!
Great location, clean, and great communication from the hosts! Loved that there was a pool and a conveniently located massage place inside the building. We would definitely stay here again.
Great place and price, location is far from shopping centres but very cool home

Highlight of our stay was our host, Peter. Responsive, helpful and kind to top it off.
Rooms were squeaky clean, thoughtful amenities provided such as travel adaptors and extenders, plenty of clean towels.
Would stay again!
Perfect location and cozy bed
Good location , clean and responsive
I have a very good stay and very near to tourist spots
房间偏小，开关有点难找，已跟房东反馈，日后会改善
Easy to check in and out, flexible timing. Good communications
Napa is a great host, and we loved everything about our stay at Napa’s place.

Nous avons adoré notre séjour : quel bonheur de louer cette belle maison en bois, au calme, décorée avec goût, dans un quartier très chouette au fond de petites ruelles. Nous avons tellement aimé que nous croisons les doigts pour que ce logement soit libre la prochaine fois que nous venons sur Bangkok. La communication avec May a été parfaite : elle est très réactive, donne plein d’indications. Si vous arrivez avant le Check in, vous pouvez aller dans son café à quelques pas et y laisser vos valises en attendant le check in. Que du positif, un vrai coup de cœur ! ❤️
素晴らしい。
Friendly host, comfortable n nice place. Suitable for family stay.
Quiet and clean, nice location
I will definitely stay here again!!
We’ll definitely be back!!!! 🤍

Logement conforme aux attentes et à la description . Mon arrivée étant prévu plus tôt, Beverly a accepté sans problème que je prenne possession des lieux 2h30 avant. Elle a également accepté un départ tardif. Un très bon rapport qualité prix pour le quartier. Une très bonne communication. Merci beaucoup.
מקום סבבה ,ליד בית חב"ד
非常棒，值得推荐。
Overall, a good place to be chilling out and relax with great location. Very big living room with huge TV.

Great place to stay as always! It's me and my wife second stay in justus and it still feel the same as our first! This time round brought my sis and her husband to visit and they like it too!
Am really impress by their staff dedication to maintain their service and clealiness of the space and environment for guest comfort!
Will definitely come back again to visit and hopefully am able to book justus homestay again!

This is my third time with Sujira. Good location and well equipped room. I could do laundry easily with a little but very useful sun hanger in the balcony. Secured place and near to good walkable areas and street markets.
Ttes bon séjour

Chonny's apartment was very comfortable for a stay in central Bangkok.  It's easy to find and her instructions were super clear.  She was also able to answer questions within minutes and very helpful and understanding.  The kitchen has everything you need for simple cooking and eating, the beds are comfortable and it was a great place to be with tween-teenage children since there are 2 beds with a bit of separation.  It's an easy walk to Terminal 21 mall and many other amenities are nearby.

Great place to stay while waiting for a flight or transit. The hosts are very friendly and helpful. We appreciate their quick responses and accommodate our needs. The drop off offer at DMK airport is certainly a big plus. They went above and beyond to help out with our request. Thank you very much for your help and kindness.

The place was very clean, amenities were great and the staff(concierge, cleaning staff and security) were friendly, very helpful. The women working at the front desk spoke English well.
Location was near the sky train/BTS (5 min walk) and the instructions provided were easy to follow. Lots of street food nearby. A bit far from the center and more residential than touristy, but I guess the price reflects that. Getting around anywhere by BTS is super easy.
The room was clean and comfortable and had everything I needed. If you don’t need to be downtown I would recommend this area.
Amazing place
An excellent location with everything you need. Brand new facilities and the pool is stunning. I recommend you try it out. Restaurants and entertainment are at your doorstep.
Die Lage und Größe der Unterkunft sind top.
Very nice accommodations and great breakfast.
Good place - near happening areas
Excellent experience I highly recommend especially for travellers looking for a true Thai experience. :)
Alles in allem gut

Very decorative attractive atmosphere. Super clean, fully air conditioned room, delicious breakfast and coffee are served. And cute 4 little dogs are adorably welcomed us which was another attractive part of this experience! 6 min walk from BTS station and easy shuttle bus access to the most latest mall, ICON SIAM.
非常棒的公寓，干净整洁，房东有问必答，回复及时，周边生活便利，我非常喜欢这里，下次还会继续入住。
Ev sahibi sorunlarımı çözdü ilgiliydi memnun kaldım

Any AirBnB with a convenience store close by is always a good AirBnB. :)
Honestly though, couldn't ask for more with this studio; great location with everything we needed just around the corner -- MRT/BTS station, food and drink, massage, street food, convenience store 7-11 just downstairs (!!!). The place was also very clean, Pim provided the essentials for a comfortable stay and we slept very well every night! Will return if I am staying in Asok area again :))

Pao's place is an amazing and cosy house! Everything is artistically arranged and has an unique style! From the sweet balcony you have a great view over the channel and you are in the middle of the authentic Thailand, far from tourism, with pictorially corners! Pao was outstanding generous, and showed a great hospitality and kindnes! My highlight was that Pao invited us to hand out some food to the monks in the early morning! Thank you so much! I will definitely come again and I recommend it absolutely!
Clean and comfortable stay with communicative hosts!
Very comfortable stay at Max' Apartment & great view from the rooftop pool! Located near the MRT Station and BKK City Centre

I stayed here for a total of 12 nights and it was absolutely wonderful. The room was clean and comfortable. The accomodation is close to great spots to eat and it is easy to get to other areas of Bangkok from here.  Ashley communicates well and is very forthcoming should one need anything.

The place is lovely but there was issues right from the start. Check in was an hour later than stated on Airbnb as the cleaners were still cleaning which was not ideal. For the actual accomodation, there were lights broken in almost all rooms (ceiling lights) including bathroom, Wifi was incredibly unreliable (you definately can't work there or even rely on it for a YouTube video...) and the beds are INCREDIBLY hard, to the point you think you are on concrete - some people will like it but for most I think not. This place is lovely I hope the above are rectified for future visiters.
great stay!
很棒
잘 쉬었다 갑니다. 위치나 숙소나 좋았습니다
Todo el personal del hotel muy amables y atentos. Tenían la habitación muy bien presentada y limpia. buena zona para hospedarse.

Lalana’s place makes me feel like home. The place is cozy to stay, and the host is so responsive. The dirty clothes are always a big problem in a trip, but Lalana helped us out!
The bed is not as soft as I expected but it’s big enough for two people👍🏻. And I think there are two types of pillows for us, so we could choose which one is better for us.
The area is quite safe I guess, just a bit hard to walk to other locations as it’s not near to any shopping center. So it would be a better choice to take Grab to save time.
But it’s super convenient to go to the 7-11 as it’s just a two-minute walk!
Last but not least, I would definitely recommend this place because the shampoo is not 2in1!
She has shampoo, conditioner and shower gel!🤣🤣🤣
The location is very strategic, easy access to various places throughout Bangkok.
这次居住体验非常好，房东也是很友好和热情。不但给我们提供饮用水，居住期间也分别有两次主动给我们带来了当地的美食和糕点，非常好的体验。

Great location (less than 10 min walk from khaosan rd) and everyone was super friendly. I got in late at night and they were quick to let me in. Was also able to store my luggage and use the common room amenities for the day after checkout.
Nice

The place is very good. They have a sumptuous breakfast and cool amenities. It’s peaceful and most of all it’s clean. The staff are hospitable and kind. The location is very easy to locate and right on spot in the heart of Bangkok.
Alles wie beschrieben und in bester Ordnung 🙏🏻
It was very clean, orderly apartment and a generally quite neighbourhood. It’s easier to get to the different parts of the city using public transportation. Overall we had a good time there:)
The place is neat and near to BTS so no hassle in terms of transportation.
A nice stay with a great location, Busy street with Venders, Restaurants and bars right outside but it is quite in the unit.

Excellent base for longer stay. Local night market, Big C food court/supermarket and Blue Line MRT all within 10 min walk.   2 a/c units 2 tv's, refreshing pool.  This apartment is on top floor in the corner and very quiet. Beautiful view to the west. The host even left us some instant coffee. We felt right at home and rested well for a week after 17 hr flight. Highly recommended
Mikes appartement is great for a city escape! Kitchen is equipped, swimming pool is clean, and gym is awesome. It’s quite and a nice place to recharge.
Great place!

Motto is a very caring host. Any time we needed anything or asked anything Motto answered very quickly and helped a lot.
The apartment and location is great!

Good apartment with amazing view. Nice working table and comfort bed. But there’s a problem that i think is permanent in this building- lots of cockroaches. I met at least one every day. Lily the host told me she sprayed against them before my arriving but that not worked. She even gave me another one spray when I tell her about it, but it didn’t worked as well - you can hold them temporarily only.
Otherwise its an okay room for a couple of nights
Great host! Great location! Great stay! Thank you Chonny again ka!
櫃檯人員英語溝通良好，還有嘟嘟車服務可以去車站，往後面的小巷走當地早市可以解決早餐
房东人很好，房间很清爽干净，还带小阳台晾衣服很方便，进出要刷卡很安全，步行到巷子口斜对面就有711，步行几分钟就到bts轻轨站，很方便。
房子很不错，院子环境很好！特别是房东提供的早餐很美味，很丰盛！离大皇宫直线距离不远，但是由于我们带着孩子步行到码头还是不方便，所以都是打车去的，这样一来就得绕道河对岸，所以会显得有点远。离711也很近，买一些生活用品很方便。

늦은시간이었지만 픽업정확하고 친절한 매니져 깨끗한숙소 맛있는조식 서비스 좋았어요
늦게 공항도착해서 하룻밤 편히 묵고갑니다

Thanks, everyone. The place was comfortable and suitable for a family stay. However, we were a bit disappointed with the lift, and we also realized it was quite far from the nearest MRT station, so we had to rely on Grab most of the time. Overall, it was an okay experience. Thank you again! Cheers!
Very convenient surroundings. Across the street there's a nice noodle street food place. 20m to the right from the gate there's a 7/11. The host is great, the apartment is nice and clean.
Very nice property and good facilities in the room.
Totally recommend shins place. Excellent value quality accommodation.

Great stay with minor hiccups. Had to wait 15 minutes for the key since cleaning wasn’t done yet. Minor inconvenience because of the heat and carrying luggage. Also had to wait for the gym key a full day and a half (half my stay). If that’s a reason for you to stay like it was for me it’s very inconvenient but the rest was fine.

Wir können die Unterkunft empfehlen, allerdings muss man sich bewusst sein, dass die Unterkunft im Rotlichtbezirk liegt, welches wiederum an einer sehr sehr stark befahrenen Straße liegt und sehr teuer ist.
Wir hatten dadurch Schwierigkeit, ein Grab zu bestellen bzw. mussten immer mindestens 10 Minuten warten und standen dann mindestens noch 10 Minuten in der Straße im Stau, um auf die große Kreuzung zu kommen.
Die Unterkunft stellt einen kostenlosen Shuttle zur Verfügung, der einen zur „Nana Station“ bringt.
Möbel sind ziemlich veraltet aber die Suite bietet sehr viel Platz und einen schöne Pool
Lovely place to stay.
非常好的住宿体验，非常好的房东，附近有一切能够满足需求的设施。

Idéalement situé, ce logement nous a permis de (re)découvrir Bangkok à pied. Tout est proche, beaucoup d’options de balades. La chambre est spacieuse, propre et décorée avec goût. L’espace salle de bain est tout à fait correct, et la cuisine bien pratique. Merci aux hôtes pour leur réactivité et bonnes adresses !!
Great value as well as location. Very clean

房子很好，非常适合机场转机休息一天，干净整洁，物品都非常齐全，建筑的窗户也都很可爱，空调很静音，入住也超级方便，Aong的指引非常清晰，也一直关心住的是否舒服，包括推荐附近餐厅便利店，入住期间一直会感受到房东的真诚，很推荐
This is by far the best airbnb room found! Great ambience great hospitality great neighborhood. I’d say a bangkok must try

Everything was so great during my stay. My room is on 28th floor, I can see the view of the city and the view of sky train. The room has no bad smell and very quite. The host provided everything for using inside the rooms except one thing, there are no slippers inside the rooms. Anyways, I felt safe and comfort as home during my stayed. It is so crowded outside. There are many restaurants, pubs along the streets. It seems like pub street in Siemreap Cambodia. 7/11 store and 24h supper markets near by. It’s close to Nana BTS sky train maybe 10 walks to the station .
Terry is a very good host. Even late at night, he always responded the sms. He’s very helpful. What I couldn’t find, he tried to help to find it for me, even it’s out of his business. Thanks a lot Terry and thanks all Co-host.
Finally, I’d like to thanks Airbnb that’s always followed up with me. Airbnb is a trustable app.

The location is near enough to the MRT that getting around isn't an issue. Maps etc finds the place best under ' Baan Sabai' rather than the technical address. The reception is excellent and very helpful. We stayed 2 1/2 months here and the weekly cleaning service was incredible and very helpful. Safe and clean location would stay again.
Tony is nice, gave us very detailed instructions and suggestions regarding our stay. They were all helpful. And the place is very good. Thank you

During my trip to Bangkok, I had a wonderful stay at an Airbnb that was conveniently located near the metro. The place was a peaceful oasis amidst the city's hustle and bustle, offering a much-needed respite after a day of exploring. The hosts were incredibly friendly and accommodating, and the accommodation itself was cozy and well-maintained. I highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone looking for a quiet and comfortable stay in Bangkok.
Clean and trendy hotel with a nice pool and nature theme. Surprisingly few city noises in the evening and night because of its location next to a park full of trees. The bed was really comfy.

房子很棒，也很舒适，宽敞、明亮、安静，配备的各种现代设施从照片上都能看到，从冰箱、微波炉、炊具、烤箱，到锅碗瓢盆、Sony电视、松下的吹风机，虽然没有洗衣机，要到8楼的洗衣区洗衣、烘干，但房东大人超贴心的可以帮忙负责送洗服务，让我们可以尽情享受旅行而不必花上2个小时去看着洗衣服~
我跟先生都很享受这次的旅程，尤其每天游玩回来，瘫在沙发上吹空调看电视发呆的时光，还有热水浴洗去一身的疲惫。感谢Tan的建议，去了郑王庙对面的Sala天台bar，看到了超美的晚霞。可惜没时间去卧佛寺的按摩学校尝试按摩，下次一点要再去！感恩！
The house is amazing for our stay in BKK. They are very nice people, and very kind, useful local advances! The house just like exactly what it is on the photos, if you like the style, I suggest you to choose this house for your stay, we like it!
Aivan kelpo paiķka pysähtyä matkalla ja levätä. Huoneisto on hiljainen ja tosi tilava. Golf-kärrykuljetus kaupungille on kiva lisä.

We stayed in Kate’s apartment for a month and absolutely loved our time there. The apartment complex is a brand new building with all the amenities you can think of including two big outdoor pools, a gym, a pool table, a sauna, a jogging track as well as a sports court. There is even a 7-Eleven and a Starbucks on the ground level and a BTS station just a few steps away. From here you can get to the heart of the city in less than 30 minutes but busses as well as taxis are also readily available.
The apartment itself is located on the 23rd floor and comes with a great view over the city. You can see the river as well as the iconic state tower and the lights at night are phenomenal. There is also a big bathroom, a king-sized bed and a fully equipped kitchen with microwave, fridge, kettle and a stove to cook your own meals. If not, there are plenty of restaurants and streetfood stalls nearby.
Additionally we were very happy with the WiFi connection which was strong and reliable (and which will be upgraded to an even better plan). You’ll also get two tables where you can comfortable sit on, which was very convenient.
Kate is an exceptional host and tries everything to make your stay extra special. She lives in the same building so if there is anything you need she can sort it out straight away.
Should we return to Bangkok for a longer period, we’ll definitely want to stay at Kates Place again.
This is a beautiful place to stay! Suttinee was very nice and accommodating! Would definitely stay again!

Austin is not only a great host and responds fast but the place is absolutely amazing! The greatest view ever from the balcony and the bedroom. The location is great and there is even a plaza attached to the condominiums that offer a variety of different services. This is a great stay. I will definitely be coming back again!
Great stay! The host was kind and helpful, the room was clean, and the location is perfect, close to everything. Would definitely recommend!
The place was very beautiful to stay and good friendly neighbourhood felt welcoming by the locals

Wir waren das 3te mal in Bangkok und fast 4 Wochen in dieser Unterkunft.
Vorteile:
- super an die ÖV angebunden!
- grosszügiges Apartment
- schöner Fitness und Pool Bereich
- kleines Einkaufszentrum gut zu Fuss erreichbar (über einen Skywalk)
- sehr nette Kommunikation
- Smart TV mit Netflix
- Sehr schnelles Internet (ca 300Mbit/s)
- Eigene Waschmaschine in top Zustand
- Bequemes grosses Bett
- Die Küche ist zum Kochen ausgestattet
Nachteile:
- bei Ankunft war das Apartment etwas „schmuddelig“ aber er gibt Putzmittel in der Wohnung
- Das Sofa, wie auch die Bettdecke hatten Flecken die nicht ausgehen.
- Das Apartment wirkt bewohnt (viele persönliche Dinge, wirkt dadurch etwas vollgestopft)
Wir waren mit unserem Aufenthalt sehr zufrieden und können dieses Apartment weiterempfehlen.

Sen was a Superhost made me feel like I was in my own home. I needed a second card to get in. He provided it right away. The hot water wasn’t working I text him and in 3 minutes he had maintenance in my condo fix it. I would highly recommend Sen and his property he treated me with respect and kindness. I had a wonderful stay! The apartment was exactly as described—clean, cozy, and conveniently located near Krung Thon Buri station. Check-in was smooth and hassle-free, and the host was friendly, responsive, and proactive in making sure everything went well. I really appreciated the thoughtful touches like complimentary coffee and toiletries.
The Wi-Fi was excellent throughout my stay, which allowed me to work at night without any issues. The location isn’t right in the middle of tourist shopping areas, but it’s very accessible via the BTS station. Just note that if you take Grab or taxis, travel times can be longer due to traffic.
It’s close to Icon Siam via the Golden Line from Krung Thon Buri station, which is very convenient. For someone like me who enjoys a more relaxed pace and wants to experience local living, this place was perfect. I also loved having a big 7-Eleven nearby, and with the BTS, it’s easy to reach parks and malls in the city. Highly recommend this place.
Very convenient place to stay. It's near to every tourist attractions

The place is amazing. The style and design was right up our street. Full of quirky spaces. The staff were helpful and friendly. The room was as described. Simple and all you needed. Great location and will recommend to anyone. We will be back whenever we visit Bangkok again.

Would recommend this place highly if you don’t need to go to the city center every now and then. But, then again, I guess that’s for anywhere in Bangkok!

The place itself isn't anything fancy, but was clean and well kept. The only thing within walking distance is a convenience store and small outdoor market-- which is all I needed the night before my flight!

This place was great!  The price is worth it.  Large space, with enough room to separate your work space from your sleeping space.  Sun was also very communicative and gave me lots of helpful advice on the area and what attractions to see.  The room is set back from the main road, so it's secluded but still very close when you want to go out.  The area has a lot going on, especially during the day, and it's easy to get around via public transport.  I definitely recommend this place if you're looking for somewhere to get some work done or if you've got plans in the area.  I would stay here again.
The apartment was very clean, stocked with plenty of water to get us started and the essentials! Close to shopping malls and food options.  Overall it was a good stay.

We had a wonderful stay here. Pim provided us with very helpful information and helped us with car arrangements. We had a wonderful stay at Thambaphol’s Airbnb! The home is located in a fantastic neighborhood in the old town, surrounded by amazing street food, 7-Elevens, massage parlors, and shopping malls – everything you could need is just steps away. The location truly can’t be beat.
The Airbnb itself is spacious and super comfortable. The main level has a large open area that’s perfect for dining, relaxing, or watching TV, and upstairs features one very large bedroom and a smaller one – both cozy and clean. The place is spotlessly maintained and has multiple air conditioners, which made our stay cool and comfortable.
Thambaphol was an outstanding host with great communication throughout our stay. He even provided helpful local restaurant recommendations. I highly recommend staying here – it’s a perfect base for exploring the old town and enjoying everything the area has to offer!

Apartment room in a great location. The apartment is spacious and clean, with everything necessary for both short-term and long-term stays. It was a great pleasure to stay here. Thank you for the constant support and quick responses. I will definitely come back again. Thank you. Highly recommended.

We had a lovely stay at this townhome. It is in a fabulous location! Easy walk to restaurants, supermarkets and shopping! The hosts were clear in their communication and responsive. The home was clean, spacious,well outfitted and had all amenities you need for a short stay.
Only downside was that we were a little surprised with how much electricity we apparently consumed and ended up paying a fair bit for 2 days that we went over the included electricity units. I supoose this wouldnt be a concern in cooler months or if there were fans installed. Overall we would certainly recommend this home for a very comfortable stay for up to 10 people.

This is a quiet, well-furnished unit, slightly out of the way, but walking distance to Ekkamai Station and all the shops and restaurants of that area. Nice swimming pool, gym, and a really great cafe in the lobby. Helpful, friendly staff. I enjoyed my stay and would recommend it to others.
The unit is close to the Central World Rama 9 which is a good location, the place is quiet and you can find everything nearby. It could use some fresh and new linen, but it's a nice place.

My stay here was absolutely delightful. The accommodation is situated in a vibrant local neighborhood, offering an incredible variety of authentic Thai food and the opportunity to interact with welcoming locals. The room itself was a perfect sanctuary, providing excellent rest after a busy day exploring Bangkok.
For getting around, the St. Louis BTS station is a pleasant 30-minute walk away. I found this journey to be very safe and enjoyable, with numerous shops, cafes, and restaurants lining the route. For a quicker trip, affordable motorbike taxis are readily available for just 20 baht.
Finally, Frank was an exceptional host—responsive, helpful, and a pleasure to communicate with. I would not hesitate to recommend this place and will certainly book it again on my next visit to Bangkok.

It was a good stay but a few things could’ve been better. The kitchen is really poorly equipped, no bottle opener, no glasses (only a couple plastic cups), etc. the bed is super hard which I didn’t mind but my other half didn’t sleep great. The sofa is awful and needs changing IMO - We moved the TV into the bedroom which was much more comfortable. Some of the wallpaper was peeling too.
The most inconvenient thing was that we only had 1 key card. And you need the key card to get anywhere in the building. If one person wanted to be by the pool or go out to the shop and the other go to the room, it was impossible. You have to go everywhere together at the same time.
The building itself is great and the facilities too. We used the gym every day and the pools also.
Overall, it was a good stay but it could’ve been better with a few simple improvements.

Wi-Fiが強く駅に近い場所を探して決めました。歩いて10分でONE Bangkokがあり、駅も近く便利でした。徒歩2分でセブンイレブンもあります。熱いシャワーが気持ちよかったし、エアコンと扇風機が涼しくてよかった。オーナーとは直接会わずアプリを通じての会話になるので、外国語が話せない私は意思疎通が楽にでき、案内の通りにチェックインが簡単に出来た。マイナスポイントは階段3階が辛かったのと、冷蔵庫とドライヤーがなかったのと、トイレットペーパーがなかったこと。髪を扇風機で乾かし、何度も階段を往復して新鮮な飲食物を都度買いに行く必要がありました。無料の水も用意がなく、全てゲストが用意しなければなりませんでした。

Cons: Had a hard time checking in because the receptionist cant understand english and there was no wifi in the lobby to message the host. There was a power maintenance on the 3rd day of our stay between 9-3pm. However, when we got back to the condo around 4pm, there was still no power and the receptionist told us that they had to check with the owner if they paid the electricity bill. This was a bit discomforting especially that it was really hot and humid. Had to fine a wifi spot in the mall to contact the host. Fortunately, the host was quick to respond and follow up.
Pros: Worth your money. Centrally and conveniently located to tourists’ hotspots.
Overall: I can say that our stay was still pleasant. Encountered some minor issues but I think the expereince we had when touring Bangkok, especially with their food and culture still matters the most.

My stay with Balloon in Bangkok was both peaceful and full of discovery. While the location is a bit off the beaten path—even by local standards—I actually loved that about it. It pushed me out of my comfort zone and into the real rhythm of Bangkok. I rode the BTS, hopped on the MRT, and explored neighborhoods I might have otherwise missed.
Grabs can add up if you’re relying on them too much, so if you’re feeling brave, hop on a motorbike taxi—it’s the best way to beat the traffic and feel the city’s pulse.
The apartment itself was very comfortable, clean, and felt completely safe. The security team was exceptional—alert, helpful, and even gave me a sweet farewell when I checked out. It was honestly endearing.

Siri is a wonderful host and was concerned to make me as comfortable as possible. Everything worked and there was attention to detail, such as providing good quality towels, bed linen, washing powder and dishwashing liquid. This is a corner apartment so there is plenty of light and also a breeze. The grounds are lovely with many ponds full of water lilies, and the gym and pool are big and modern. There is a small shop within the apartment complex, and the MRT and Gourmet Market are easy walking distance, so that is really convenient.  I had an issue with a lack of privacy as the apartments in the facing block were close enough for anyone to see inside the apartment. Also, as it is close to a major intersection, there was a constant hum of traffic, but I gather that is not unusual in Bangkok. But any issues were offset by the hospitality of the host. I recommend this place.

We travelled as a family with my aunt and cousins and had a wonderful stay at Beam and Suda’s place. The location in Ratchathewi is very convenient, with local restaurants and massage spas within walking distance. The space looks exactly like the photos, clean, well prepared, and very comfortable for our group. We loved the free snacks during check in, which was such a thoughtful and welcoming touch.
They also shared must visit markets and restaurants nearby, making it easier to explore and enjoy the area like locals. Suda is very hands on and quick to respond, and both hosts are respectful, kind, and professional throughout our stay.
There is ongoing subway construction in the area, expected to take about 3-5 years, so traffic can be heavy at times. Be patient when booking Grab or Bolt. This affects many businesses and is not the hosts’ fault at all, but part of the city’s development and improvement.
We truly loved our stay and would gladly come back again. Highly recommended.

My partner and I stayed in this apartment for a month and I can definitely recommend it. It’s a modern condo within a straightforward 12-minute walk to the On Nut BTS (with a sidewalk all the way). The neighborhood is quiet, with several nice, affordable cafes nearby and a 7/11 right around the corner. We especially appreciated the privacy of the windows—you get a decent view, but they are positioned/tinted so that people can’t see in, which is very convenient.
The apartment itself looks exactly as it does in the photos, though perhaps a bit more lived-in. It is fully equipped for a mid-term stay; I was able to cook easily and keep the house clean with all the tools provided. Overall, we felt safe and right at home. It’s a great spot for a stay in Bangkok!

Jingli's place is great, exactly like the photos and squacky clean, which I loved. The room size just right for two people staying in, the bathroom is also clean with hot water, shampoo, and soap . Jingli also has great kitchen with full facilities like microwave, refrigerator, medium-sized table, and water heater. They don't have stove, tho which is wise for minimizing accident.
One thing that makes me cannot give full 5 stars, the receptionist accidentally listed wrong check-out date. We were back to the room with someone already occupied and our belongings were packed and stored at the front desk. They forced-checkout us without confirmation despite having our phone number and bnb contact. He gave us a new room, but it was on the 6th floor (originally it was 3rd floor). Kind of unpleasant with the experience. Hope you won't do that to the other guest as it was unpleasant when others touched your belongings, especially uninvited.

We stayed here for 2 months and felt right at home in this apartment. It’s fully equipped with everything you need, you just bring your personal belongings.
The location is excellent. Shops, restaurants, and massage places are all nearby, and you can easily walk to Lumphini Park or One Bangkok shopping center. Right downstairs there are hair and nail salons as well as a 7-Eleven, and just across the street there’s a great Thai restaurant with a very kind owner.
The surrounding area is perfect for walks in quiet streets, and we felt very safe at all times. All the staff in the building were very kind and welcoming.
The apartment is quiet, making it easy to sleep well, and the bed is very comfortable. Everything, including the common areas, was clean and pleasant.
The owner was very kind, responsive, and helpful.
We would definitely love to come back.

The location of a house is pretty good (just a small walk to underground around 7-8 minutes).
The room was really good and absolutely king-size especially bad. We spend there just a few hours during a night but we have a good emotions about the house, the room and Evan.
Evan is a great host and always ready to help you.
Recommend!
Perfect stay, was my 2nd time here and was a last minute booking but everything was perfect as it was a few months ago when i stayed. Arisudan too guy as always hope to be back soon!
