The only thing to add is that the bed/pillows are definitely on the hard side. It was okay for me to sleep with but I know it bothers others a lot more.
Even then, if you had a problem with it she might actually fix it.

We had a wonderful stay for over a month! The host was incredibly responsive and kind, even accommodating our request for an additional table. The apartment is located on the 36th floor and is just a 5-minute walk to the metro. From there, it takes around 20 minutes to reach the city center and about 15 minutes for a direct connection to the airport.
The flat is fully equipped for a long stay, including a washing machine, cooker, fridge, freezer, and a fast internet connection (around 300 Mbps), which was essential for us. The building also offers a basic gym and a large swimming pool on the 9th floor.
The area was very quiet, which we loved, and just a 5-minute walk away was a big 24/7 supermarket. There’s also a 7-Eleven conveniently located within the condo area.
We had everything we needed and thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Highly recommend it!
AWFUL HOST AND PROPERTY! The condo reeked of cigarette smoke from the moment I went inside, and the host REFUSED TO REFUND ME MY MONEY for the condo.
Andy is a super host. Super chill guy and knows the best places for food. This location is also in the middle of the city so it’s not hard to navigate in.

It was my first visit to Bangkok for a stay in over a decade and I'm glad I chose Arpapicha's place as my first experience for an Airbnb stay in the province.
Considerate service and sound instructions given to her customer (me) on the pros of the place (can't think of any cons, really!)
I highly recommend anyone who looks for a nice and peaceful stay to checkout Arpapicha's!!

Sue's home is very ideal for more intimate bonding for families and big groups, rather than a hotel set-up. We liked that the home is quite spacious and very clean, and the layout of the space encourages interaction, like a true family home. There are ample eateries just walking distance from the place. But do not expect that it is a "happening place" as it is by the quiet end of a highway at the foot of a bridge and quite a distance from markets. However, Khaosan road is a short tuk-tuk ride nearby if you suddenly decide that you want a massage at 12mn.
We are grateful that Ms. Sue went over and beyond, as she was the one who made arrangements with van rental company for our pick-up and drop-off to airport, as well as the out of town trips for 2-days to Ayutthaya and Samut Songkhram (Maeklong Railway Market & Damnoen Saduak Floating market). Sue was also very responsive with our every concern. It was a memorable and fun family holiday staying at this place!
Very nice apartment in a nice location. Sharon helped with everything.
Great place to stay in Chinatown

Hidden gem in Pratunam Market! At first, I thought it would be difficult to find since it’s located inside the market, but the host provided very clear instructions, and it’s actually just a short walk from where transportation drops you off. I really loved the area and would highly recommend staying here. The space was spacious, clean, and perfect for families. My family especially enjoyed being all together on one floor.
很棒，尤其是房东人很好
Was great staying at Bryan’s place. He was a perfect host, always responding super quick and helpful. Place was exactly as described and location was great. All in all everything was looking for.

Really cool place to lay low for a little in Bangkok! It’s not my first time in the city so I wasn’t doing too many touristy things but it’s close to the metro and walkable to Silom area though it’s like a half hour walk! The apartment itself was perfect, huge comfy bed with a nice tv which I used to watch Netflix, YouTube and listen to music on Spotify. Pool was nice enough, the gym was spare but enough to get a decent workout though it was a bit worn - still got a good one in!
Overall a very pleasant stay for a few days and I can imagine staying here long term too. Balcony was a little small so not much room for chilling but I believe Sujira has other properties with bigger balconies! Speaking of Sujira and Johannes, they were both extremely responsive and helpful with every query I had and I couldn’t have asked for better hosts!
Thank you for the wonderful time!

Location was near BTS, and it was a mere 2 minutes walk to the apartment. If you are going by taxi/car, look out for Holiday Inn Express, as the apartment is right behind the hotel across the road. Apartment was large and comfortable, and we loved that the dryer was available as we we could use it to dry our clothes right after washing it in the washer. Location was also near a supermarket and many food stores, where you could walk around. Host was a little unresponsive via Airbnb and we had to contact him via a call to reach him on our check-in day. Overall, pleasant stay!

The place itself is beautiful and well put together. The loft design is fantastic, and I especially loved the huge TV, comfortable bed, and spacious feel of the apartment. However, there were a few issues that impacted my stay. The windows looked like they hadn’t been cleaned in a long time, which was a bit off-putting. Additionally, the bathroom had a strange smell that lingered throughout my stay.
The main issue, though, was with the cleaning service. At 11:48 am, right before my checkout time, they entered the apartment without permission to leave the next guest’s luggage. This startled me and caused some anxiety, as I wasn’t sure why they would come in before my checkout without asking. It also felt uncomfortable knowing that they were bringing in someone else’s luggage while I was still there. This definitely affected my overall experience, which is why I’m giving the place a 3-star review.

Nous avons passé un super séjour dans l’appartement d’Emily. Elle a été super réactive et bienveillante.

And klong pier very close to condo. You can easy and fast get to area of Golden Mount Temple, legendary restaurant Thipsamai and Jay Fai.

+ Fast internet

Cons:

체크인전과 체크아웃후 짐보관이 가능해서 편했습니다. 호스트와의 소통이 빠르고 원활해서 좋았습니다. 객실은 깔끔하고 시원했으며, 화장실또한 청결하고 수압이 적절합니다. 헬스장과 수영장은 7층과 31층에 있는데 완벽한 시설입니다. 일정이 얼마남지않을때 예약해서 2일만 묵었는데 다음에 태국에 온다면 모든일정동안 묵고싶어요!
Really nice hotel, lovely room, really clean, beautiful rooftop pool, right on Khoasan road! So can be a little noisy but nothing you wouldn’t expect staying there, didn’t keep us up at night !!

Had an amazing stay here! The host was very accommodating, the beds and sofa were comfortable and the aircons are very cold. There are a lot of accessible restaurants and convenience stores nearby. The train station is w/in walking distance.
The smell in the CR is still present (as per reviews) due to drainage issues but that could be worked on with a little air freshener.
All in all still a very nice place to stay.
Check out time is at 11am, which I’m dissatisfied about

订完房咪咪会很贴心的发来一份到达及周边设施详情，很有参考价值。只是里面的机场打车费完全没有意义，实际价格是 廊曼机场过来650左右，素万那普机场过来250左右。
房间距离bts非常近，三两分钟的距离，到暹罗车站坐12站，20分钟左右。周边的市场超市大排档也都是挺方便的，价格比市中心便宜一些。
咪咪说她很忙，入住是跟楼下保安拿的钥匙，是比较古老的住宅楼，弥漫着香港旧楼的味道。泳池比较干净 可用，健身房实在太小，有味道，超过三个人很难使用。洗衣机烘干机房间里都没有，小区一楼有付费洗衣机，很便宜但我们不敢使用公共洗衣机，毕竟都是贴身衣裙。所以全程手洗的衣服，却没有地方晾晒的尴尬。多士炉是坏掉的，通知了房东被无视，所以吃了一周软面包早餐。房间里空调很好用，吹一会儿温度就会降下来，床比较硬一些，沙发可以打开成为一张单人床。
需要感谢的是，退房那天因为是晚上飞机，咪咪同意我们下午三点退房，这是很贴心的帮助。。另外咪咪会一些中文。
Perfect stay! Having your own place in the heart of Bangkok is amazing

Friendly and hospitable host :) This home is in an residential enclave, away from the traffic gridlock. It is possible to flag a taxi on the main street & taxi is a great option coz it is cheaper than tuktuks. Tip: know the pronunciation of the address in Thai, (+written address) it will help you communication better w taxi drivers.
房间很干净空间也大，去哪里都是很方便，楼下可以吃饭逛街按摩，非常好的体验，下次来还住这里，
The place is comfy, looks like the picture and description. Taspol is really proactive and helpful.

Excellent experience. Tony’s instructions were very clear, I was welcomed in person, guided through the entire unit and building. Apartment was clean, extremely well-equipped, like the pictures. Additionally, some extra equipment was provided, which was highly appreciated (and convenient). The apartment has everything that one needs. And when contacting the host, he is always extremely reactive and very accommodating. Excellent experience and I’ll probably book any future stays in Bangkok with the same host.

Great host (Anun), friendly, helpful, and rapid response. The room: super clean, spotless, quality amenities provided, good bed. There is a swimming pool and lots of parking if you have a private car. Quiet condominium in the downtown and many local delicious street foods on Lardproad, soi 1, you can try (southern food, noodle,  congee, Thai food, fruit, and beverage). Big malls nearby that you can reach by walking, eg, Central LardProad, Lotus supermarket, and Union Mall. Easy to visit many tourist destinations by the BTS and MRT subway to Chatujak weekend market, where you can find everything you want, and can exercise there in the morning or evening. Thank you very much, Anun and your room, for taking care throughout my stay, and you are a perfect host. I will be back again to stay here for sure, and I highly recommend it for people who are looking for a room in BKK.
It’s as shown on photos and it’s really worth of money and great place for young couple or single travellers
very good
Suitable for family or friends group. Best location in city near Yaowarat road. There are so many nice walkable bars and restaurants nearby.
Great host! Convenient and nice place. Host was very friendly and even went to retrieve my charger when I forgot it.
Honest and warm-hearted host. Comfortable condo which deserves booking again and again.

I can’t recommend this apartment enough! It’s right in the heart of everything yet super private and quiet. Host is responsive and friendly. Tons of restaurants cafés and massage parlors closeby. Apartment looks just like the pictures and is super clean. Can’t wait to come back again!

Unfortunately, Air BnB  is not really "allowed"  in Thailand condo and apartments. And so in this case, on my second visit to Natty's my third visit was cancelled and It was a stressful time as I thought I was going to have to leave the apartment. My passport was suddenly required, which I was reluctant to provide, etc. She suggested I do it off-book for the next visit, but who needs to do things in a furtive manner!
Overall a great place that is clean and centrally located.
Luxurious place to stay in the heart of the city. Angela was extremely helpful and made me feel right at home. Thank you 🙏
very immaculate place. quiet surroundings and exactly what I was looking for. my host was very accommodating and would definitely book again in the future
Pam is a superhost, House is at Good location and very much accesible to markets, 7 Elevens. House was Clean and welk maintianed. We had a good stay. will again visit her's place.

Booked this place as somewhere to stay before an early flight and it was perfect for that. Got the train one stop and then a taxi to the hotel (cost should be 50BHT but the drivers will likely charge you 100BHT) There isn’t a huge amount to do around the hotel but there’s a 7-Eleven a few minutes walk. The room was clean and the bed was huge. Would I stay again? No BUT for the location, price and for one night, it’s completely fine. Communication before I checked in was great. The one negative I will say that the elevator up to the third floor is pretty sketchy (there are stairs but they weren’t pointed out)
Highly recommend Anna's place. Very comfortable, quiet, and only a quick walk to the BTS and other amenities like grocery store and anything else you may need. Very comfortable for a longer stay!
Unkomplizierter Gastgeber, schnelle Kommunikation. Super Wohnung. Gerne wieder

good place to crash, safe, near a big shopping center and the metro

I enjoyed my stay at Cindy's.  There were plenty of local food stalls around the area and a 7/11 right in front.  I require fast and stable internet because I teach online.  The internet was perfect and I never had any issues while working.  I will definitely stay here again.
great place overall

这是一幢很漂亮很复古的别墅，除了可能临街有点吵，是楼梯需要自己搬行李上去，其他都很好。Host和小妹妹都很友好主动，我们因为飞机延误很晚她们也及时帮我们开门并提前开好了空调，行李也帮我们一起抬上去。服务细节很不错，每早的早餐都很丰富，营养均衡。附近离朱拉美食街和Siam商圈都比较近，可以步行的距离，离国家体育场地铁站也比较近，出行相对方便。我是一个皮肤敏感的人，如果床品不洁会不舒服，但是在这里没有，一切都很舒服很美好！感谢host和小妹妹们的这几天的照顾，如果下次还来还会住这里。

decent apartment, well located in the very center of bangkok. two train lines ~15 min walk, allowing to reach most of the city skipping the traffic jams.
fantastic view ontje city both, from the aparment and rooftop swimming pool on 27th floor.

Very cozy place with separate bedrooms+ bathrooms and shared living rooms. Everything looks nice and in good condition. Every place equipped with air conditioner and soft sofas. We had big books shelves and fridge at our floor.
Location is great: very authentic street in the city center, close to metro station, has a lot of markets surrounding.
Friendly and helpful owners and amazing bed, I slept like on a cloud:)
One piece of advice for guests: if you have sensitive sleep, take an ear plugs with you, because you can hear well your neighbors and all vehicles outside. I think it’s a Bangkok charm, but you need to sleep well to enjoy it:)
Thanks for hospitality!

The host is really kind, and the response is very quick. The room is very clean and cozy. The location is also convenient for going anywhere. If I have the chance to visit Bangkok again, I would like to stay here again

What you see is what you get. Definitely worth the stay! The apartment is away from the town area. There's just a 10min walking distance to the train station, if you don't mind walking that's alright. During the period of my stay, I mostly depend on uber to get me to town area.

Amazing experience. Location is very centric but in a quiet street. Many places you can reach walking or take a short ride. Inside is everything neat and clean. Two WC so no fight who is going to release spicy tom yum first 😂
Absolutely recommend to stay there! ❤️ Can not wait to come again!
A great place and convenient to everything. I would stay again
its very comfortable and convenient.and there are many good restaurants and cafes nearby
Nicha is very friendly and helpful person,  room is cozy and clean, have 5 adorable cats in there. Location is nice which is around BTS  station and easy to go anywhere.

The place is very unique, gives an authentic feeling of a shophouse. We had a bit of struggle with the stairs but we were prepared for it. It was also very hot at the time we visited. Fans are placed in every room which is good. Bathroom could be improved. We didn't see any other issue with the house, it was very cool to stay in a modern shop house.

Fantastic spot. Much quieter than downtown Bangkok. The apartment exceeded my expectations, great value. Host was very kind and helpful. Highly recommended.

Só tenho a agradecer ao Sr. Konk, muito atencioso, prestativo. me ajudou em tudo oq eu precisei. Seu apartamento super limpo, completo, espaçoso,em ótima localização. Recomendo e voltarei em breve.
Great stay!
房子非常干净和舒适，还附有线上电影设备，四周环境非常幽雅高级。步行大概12分钟就可以到达繁忙大路，一路上有餐馆和路边小食，感觉很安全。房东非常有效率，会在短时间内回答问题，很亲切。非常推荐。
This is our second stay in the same place.    We would like to stay there again but some basic upgrades and professional cleaning needs to be done.

This is a second week we stayed in this studio.
The boat/ferry ride is the best we both like despite the dirty water and smell (some area). There is almost not much waiting time and no traffic jam compare to Bangkok road traffic, This transportation is wonderful. Quick and cheap, particularly in rush hour there are every minute a boat leaving.
The drawback is here is bit far from downtown and once you miss the boat (after 8pm) you must either take other transportation which is always in Jam except you walk to MRT or BTS or Airport Link, then you must take a taxi home.
We had a comfortable time in this studio, her Mom brought us enough coffee and tea, kitchen paper, Kitchen towel, but just no knife, (also no small knife for small cutting) Damm! Thai people don't use knife as we European.
Anyway they have the most kitchen facility among other Airbnb apartment. Now we stay in Chiang Mai, the kitchen is worse than their.
Do visit the steak vendor in the food market we mentioned in the last comment. It is very good street food..
We wish Nirintana and her family good luck, hope we meet again in Bangkok.
BTW there is a couple tanent at the balcony who live there without paying rent !! LOL
房东Atcharee非常热心，对于第一次来曼谷的我们一家给了非常大的帮助。送我们到地铁站，帮我们定车，规划游玩路线，推荐地道的餐厅，为我们准备水果，每天有不同的泰式早餐。房子位于市中心，非常漂亮，也很安静，离机场快线很近，出门3分钟就有市场和7-11。增送的按摩服务也非常棒！如果还有机会来曼谷，一定还会回来来住！非常推荐！
A lovely intimate space in the heart of BK, would recommend to anyone who is looking to have a relaxing stay in a clean space that is close to everything!
The apartment is super nice, well located and Spotzel is super helpful.

je voyage beaucoup et en Thaïlande je fais plusieurs endroits et franchement c est un bon logement. bien équipé, pas loin du BTS de restaurants ou de magasins. je le mets dans mes favoris pour un autre séjours si disponible.

We loved our stay here, the location was perfect. The area was quiet, but still had lots of coffee shops and restaurants. We loved the ice cream shop in the building. We also attended Tatiya’s cooking class, which was AMAZING! Thank you for making our stay in Bangkok comfortable and fun.

Extremely professional. Very clean. Liked the location even if a bit out of the way. Chan Road is a pretty underrated area and there were quite a few places to go, and very easy to take a taxi to hotter spots.
Currently the 7/11 nearby is closed for renovation, I think they said it'd be back up mid-June 2023. There is another one a bit further away, though. Was literally the only pain point. I really liked walking around the neighborhood behind the condo complex, so it was a joy even so.
I had to leave in a hurry and had to leave some belongings behind, they appeared very kind about it. Thanks Roy and Berry.

This was our 2nd year staying at Hattori’s place, this time for 6 weeks - which shows what a wonderful little oasis this is! Calm, quiet, private and cool, with all the amenities you would need or have at your own home (with the addition of a weekly cleaner!).
The gym and pool are fantastic, the building and cafe staff so kind, the proximity to great cafes, supermarkets, convenience stores, 7-11, restaurants and bars in this primarily Japanese neighborhood is superb. Access to the Phrom Phong BTS or super quick Riverboat is 20/10 mins walk respectively, but if you don’t fancy the walk then Grab is always available or there is a permanent motorbike taxi stand across the road at the little shopping centre. And if course, Hattori is a great host!
In short, we love it here and will absolutely be returning when we’re back in Bangkok next year.

The apartment and building are definitely worth it's price, highly recommend

The property was excellent. We stayed here for 1N, it has 6 rooms with attached bathrooms. The property is actually built on a small land, but the house planning is near, you won't feel it small, the rooms are spacious. The towels, linen were all clean.
There is 7/11 store in walkable distance, but not too many restuarant options or local food nearby. But of course if you can travel 5-10 mins by car you can find options. I stayed in this property during our transit in Pattaya due to late night flight.
The rooms were clean, would definitely recommend.
The host Jibbo was very good, helped with local recommendations and arranged the cab for me. Was very proactive and gave all instructions well ahead and followed up on my schedule. Thank you for the wonderful stay.

Die Ankunft war sehr unklar – das Taxi hat uns am falschen Hotel abgesetzt, weil die Angaben nicht eindeutig waren. Wir wussten nicht, wohin wir müssen, und erst nach einer Nachricht kam jemand (vermutlich die Reinigungskraft), die zudem sehr unfreundlich war. Wir fühlten uns überhaupt nicht willkommen.
Die Unterkunft ist für die Gegend deutlich zu teuer und war nicht sauber: Das Klo war dreckig, unter Sofa und Bett lagen dicke Staubschichten, und das Sofa hatte sichtbare Flecken. In der gesamten Unterkunft roch es unangenehm. Wir hatten nur ein Handtuch pro Person für eine Woche, das nach ein paar Tagen zu riechen begann. Seife und Duschgel waren fast leer und hielten nur wenige Tage; Schwamm und Spülmittel fehlten anfangs komplett.
Außerdem gab es keine klaren Anweisungen, z. B. zum Fitnessstudio oder zur Müllentsorgung.
Alles in allem können wir die Unterkunft nicht empfehlen – es war leider unsere bisher schlechteste Airbnb-Erfahrung.
The place was as described. It was cozy and comfortable. The thing about the construction was as described. But was not too troubling if the doors are closed.

Absolutely an   Amazing condo , stocked up with everything you need , nested in one of the most amazing areas of Bangkok , close to Everything and bustling with nighlife and  restaurants and yet the condo it self is so peaceful and quiet. Zen and her family made me feel right at home. This property is in the suburbs of the city. I was here for 10 days. I felt like a local living here. I think I made the right decision of booking this property, made me fall in love with the city.
The hosts are the sweetest people you'll meet in the world. Due to my flight timings I reached their place quite early. But they were flexible and let me check in early. Zen's mother makes delicious breakfast, so definitely a bonus if you choose to stay here!
The property was nice and quaint. Gives you the real experience of staying in a Thai home. Definitely worth the price I paid for it. 10/10 I would stay here again if I'm ever in Bangkok again.
Please do book this property if you want to experience the authentic Thai suburban life. The BTS station is just 10 mins away by foot. Multiple 7/11s in the vicinity. Everything was very convenient. Looking forward to visiting this place soon!

A very nice stay! The location is unbeatable with a shopping mall, 7/11, and delicious local food all within walking distance. We stayed for a week and felt right at home. Great choice for anyone visiting the area.

Tan is super easy to communicate and is a great host! Highly recommended if you want a place in Bangkok for a reasonable price!

Overall, I recommend this place for travelers and I will stay here again when I come back to Thailand. 🤍🤍🤍
非常好的一次体验，我们一家半夜到机场，从廊曼机场步行10-15分钟到达房屋。干净整洁，设施齐全，自助入住。走的时候我忘记拿重要的东西了，房东很善良帮我保管了一周，我可以再次抵达拿取。非常感谢🙏 下次到廊曼机场还会选择入住。

We loved our stay here. The hospitality was wonderful. It was a great location where we could easily walk to places or hop on a local bus near by. Very clean and thoughtful touches throught the room. Having drinking water available on each floor was very helpful. Would definitely stay here again.

Жилье очень старое и грязное. Первое что мы увидели заселившись - огромное количество черных волос на белом постельном белье , внутри кондиционера черная плесень , которой нельзя дышать , соответственно и кондиционер включать невозможно. В туалете стоял отвратительный запах который никак нельзя было выветрить из-за отсутствия вытяжки. Жилье по размерам очень маленькое , спальня хорошего размера , но вот кухня с входной группой слишком тесная. На кухне нет нужных принадлежность для готовки. Также хозяин не посчитал нужным сообщить заранее о том , что бассейн находится на ремонте до мая 2026 года , для нас выбор жилья с бассейном был важен.
Также несколько слов о районе в котором находится жилье. Честно , из всех раз сколько я останавливалась в Бангкоке этот район худшее, что со мной было, хоть это и центр.Район полностью под Арабским влиянием , все вывески вокруг на арабском языке , все заведения с такой кухней , все магазины держат Арабы , а ночью толпы проституток выходят на улицы.
下次还会再来👍👍👍

Nous avons passé une semaine très agréable et reposante à Bangkok dans l'appartement de Taak et Vora.
Leur accueil à l'arrivée et au départ a été très aimable.
L'appartement correspond exactement à la description et aux photos de l'annonce avec de multiples produits d’accueil (boisson, nourritures,hygiène etc...)
La vue est très dégagée et donne sur des villas et jardins, bonne surprise surtout par rapport à l'entrée de l'immeuble située sur une rue très passante et bordée de buildings.
Pour notre part, il s'agit plus d'un appartement familial (couple avec enfants) que d'un appartement pour 2 couples. L'une des chambres est vitrée et donne directement dans le salon/salle à manger. Ce qui peut nuire à l'intimité.
La piscine est située au rez de chaussée et ne bénéficie pas d'un ensoleillement propice aux bains de soleil. Mais par contre, faire des longueurs est très agréable surtout le soir en rentrant d'une journée en ville. Piscine avec douche ,Wc et même sauna.
Il faut compter 15 à 20 mn à pied de l'appartement à la station de métro la plus proche, très facile à trouver (toujours tout droit).
Également au pied de la station de métro, 2 énormes centres commerciaux à voir pour leurs restaurants (situées dans l'Helix).
Bref, à conseiller et nous y retournerons volontiers.

位置离摩天轮夜市比较近，打车一百铢左右，四面佛考山路打车两百左右。
房间挺干净的，但是入住体验真的不怎么样。1、首先是房东发的入住指南，上面写的是7-11旁边的公寓，给的照片也是这个公寓大门口的样子，然后我们在这个公寓门口等了十几分钟等不到接我们的阿姨，当我询问房东的时候，房东回答我的口气非常不好，“走进大厅去”，“拍照给我看”、“公寓名字昨天已经给你说过了”，全程房东都是这种口气回我，后来我问了保安才知道应该是隔壁的公寓。请问入住指南能写清楚一点吗，或者是前一天跟你沟通的时候能多说一句是你入住指南给的公寓隔壁的这栋吗？
2、房间的密码是阿姨带我们入住后，我问房东要才给我们的，而且房东也没有告诉我们楼下的门襟是要卡和脸一起刷才能开门，是后来我们开不了楼下的门，问房东才给我说我们进出楼下需要等其他人开门才行，房间详情上只写了需要说是房东的朋友不能说是日租，但是并没有说不能自主进入，这点感受也很不好。
3、我们一共4个人住4晚，房东只给提供了两卷卫生纸。当我联系房东问能不能补一些的时候，得到的答复是“不好意思这不是酒店，我们只负责第一天”。呵呵，住了这么多国内国外的民宿，还真没见过哪家连备用卫生纸都不给的，可能是我见识短吧。
总结一下就是公寓还不错位置也还行，应该是我们自己的问题才有这些不好的入住体验，毕竟房东可是“超赞房东”呢！

The property was not only easily accessible but also thoughtfully equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. From the little details to the overall ambiance, everything exceeded our expectations. We truly appreciated how well-maintained and organized everything was.
Highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a hassle-free, comfortable stay in Bangkok. We’d definitely book again in the future!
Great location

It was a very nice stay from the first second. The driver waited for us (for some hours due to flight delays) and brought us to the place where we met Henry. He gave us a brief introduction to the place, which was exactly like in the pictures. It even exceeded our expectations. It is very centrally located and you can get around very easily. Henry helped us with every questions we had and is a very god host. In one word, perfect :)

Overall a good experience. Kitchen is well stocked and a decent amount of cleaning products / toiletries provided. Aircon in bedroom isn't very strong, but the one in the living area is very strong. Unit faces south with a very good view, but is close enough to the main road and skytrain to cause much traffic noise from about 6:3o-24:00, especially emergency vehicles. FYI  (not related directly to the host): signage throughout the condo building can be misleading / out-of-date, and be careful about parking. Even with access to the parking garage, Juristic person is a stickler with steep fines regardless of the Condo's lack of information available on where specifically each person is allowed to park. There was a lot of work being done on the building on multiple floors, hopefully that is temporary, because it did cause building-wide power outages.

Dit is een perfecte plek voor een hele mooie prijs. Er is werkelijk aan alles gedacht: schone handdoeken, goede shampoo en zeep, koffie en thee. Pim, de eigenares is super vriendelijk en spreekt zelfs een beetje Nederlands. Het huisje zelf is zeer lief en schoon. Als we een volgende keer in Bangkok zijn, komen we zeker weer hier. Vlakbij de BTS en Airportlink naar het vliegveld. Het centrum is daardoor wat betreft afstand niet ver, terwijl je in een super rustige omgeving zit.
Chỗ ở sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, tiện nghi. Chủ nhà hỗ trợ nhanh chóng. Đây là 1 trong những căn hộ tôi sẽ ở lại khi tôi có dịp qua Bangkok lần tới.
من افضل الشقق صراحه كبيره و واسعه و ثلاث غرف تكفى  حق ٦ أشخاص صراحه جدا جميل وانصح فيها قريبه من المولات و قريبه من شارع العرب بكل امانه أنا انصح فيها

Det er en lækker lille lejlighed midt i byen. Det er præcis som det ser ud på billedet. Vi blev taget imod af Bee's far, som var meget behjælpelig med alt! Vi savnede ikke nået. Alt i alt en rigtig god oplevelse !
في قمة الروعه وكبيره والغرف كثيره حقت عائله وانصحكم بها

This hotel is so so clean and the host is so friendly. They give me the direction and how to get into the room very clearly and they always support and answer very fast. The room is so clean and simile the photos. My opposite room has the view so beautiful, and it’s safe here. We can walk to station (about 350m) and go to center of city. Near the house, there are some local restaurants that are quite delicious and cheap.
房間稍為有點殘舊，但整體來說性價比很高

Perfect balance of comfort, cleanliness & convenience – would absolutely stay again
I had a fantastic stay at this apartment in Sukhumvit 12. From the very start, Ben, Su & nDee were super responsive and attentive to emails, making everything smooth and stress-free.
The apartment was beautifully clean on arrival. I personally love a firm bed, so I was in heaven every single night – genuinely great sleep.
The rooftop pool and sun loungers became my morning ritual before heading out to explore – such a nice way to ease into the day.
Location-wise, it’s ideal. Close enough to the energy and chaos of Bangkok to feel connected, but just far enough away that you’re not kept awake by street noise. Two 7/11 stores are just a short walk away, and Terminal 21 is only a few minutes on foot.
Having a washing machine and a clothes horse on the balcony was a game-changer – no need to overpack. That kind of convenience really makes a difference on any trip!

We had a wonderful stay. The location is very convenient, with easy walking access to the BTS and many shops and cafes nearby. The building feels modern and hotel like, with smooth access to the floors and pleasant common areas. The amenities are great, including a well equipped gym and a rooftop pool with beautiful views, although the water was a bit cold.
The apartment was clean, quiet at night, and had everything we needed.
Phani was very responsive and handled everything quickly. When we asked for a second blanket, it was delivered right away.
The internet was fast and stable throughout the building. Highly recommended.
房源宽敞干净！步行3分钟即可抵达轻轨站和便利商场，那里有大型超市和餐厅。我们住得很愉快，房间里有毛巾到洗衣机、无线网络、吹风机、电视、厨具和冰箱。您只需自备牙刷牙膏和衣服~我们强烈推荐这个地方。非常干净！比我们入住的五星级酒店更干净

最棒的就是出门50m拐就有一家7-11，早餐和饮料一直都在这里解决，物价低，让我们把很多吃的喝的都试了个遍~旁边是rama 9，附近就是central plaza，去乘坐mrt不算走很远~不过其实在曼谷乘坐什么交通工具也要看时间段…在上下班高峰期还是坐taxi吧~上highway加50B~房子还算不错的，有点在家的感觉？不过在家门口比较难拦到taxi，用grab软件比较好，但其实直接拦taxi，by meters会便宜一点，我们坐的黄绿色的士

Really nice and helpful host.
The apartment is in a cool area and had everything we needed.
Would definitely come again.

This location was perfect for what I needed. Only a few nights, but they hav 7-11 and Thai food right on premises.
The building itself was more then what I expected.
Communication from the host was very quick w responses. Recommended places close by.
The condo was very clean.
I would recommend this host, and I would use them again!
Thank you
When u stay in bangkok this place to sleep is a must. Perfect contact, perfect area and super clean apartment. Absolutely recommend this place. Thank you marek for these days.

Rainy is a great host, provided all information and gave clear instructions. Also responsive and very friendly. Place is nice and you’ll have anything you need. Close to BTS line Udom Suk station and market to try local foods.

the place is located in an amazing neighbourhood,with chick coffee shops and places to hangout.
the house is really special in the design as you seen in the photos,
the hosts are super friendly and helpful,my flight delayed and I came late and they were around to welcome me.
overall the stay was great I loved it my wife loved it and I will certainly visit there again and recommend my friends.

Die Unterkunft können wir nur empfehlen. Die Wohnung ist sehr groß, schön und gepflegt. Wir haben uns direkt super wohl gefühlt. Die Lage ist top. Zu Fuß sind sehr viele Shoppingcenter, Restaurants oder der Lumpini Park zu erreichen. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und würden jederzeit wiederkommen.
Great stay would recommend for sure!

Everything was perfect, contact with everyone was super easy. Very helpful people, and everything about this apartment and Bangkok was just perfect. You have some food choices downstairs in lobby and Lawson 108 that was open 24/h, 7 eleven near by the hotel, and the view was absolutely 10/10, sky pool was amazing, and the gym and private jet pool area just for cassia residence was also amazing. It was really clean in the apartment too, really love the design in the whole apartment, thank you Terry and everyone else in the team! See you soon!🙏😊
Very good place, not so far from every places to be seen in Bangkok. I had lot of fun over there

The host is nice and quick to respond to the questions. The place is exactly the same as described or photoed. If you need a  well一equipped place with easy access to BTS, restaurants, and a supermarket within Gateway, speedy Wifi, good security system and a alert safety guard ofthe building, this is definitely a place for you

the room is big & breakfast is really great.
but slow internet & far from Bts
L’appartement est très confortable, l’emplacement est idéal pour visiter Bangkok. Nous recommandons !
很好！

Very modern condo with great design and furnishings. Love the luxurious beddings, sheets, pillows and comforter is very high quality, and the bed is firm. The condo offers great amenities, fast wifi, Netflix, showers great water pressure. The kitchen is fully stock but I didn't have to use it since food is so cheap I'm Bangkok and they are everywhere.
The location within reach , a good walking distance to all nightlife, restaurants, shopping. It's a good 12-14 minutes walk to the BTS Nana station. If you don't like walking then that might be an issue. The building is at the end of the quiet street, away from the hustle and bustle, no noise, not even the tuk tuk, beep beep of the motor cycles.
I have a wonderful 7 days stay! and I highly recommended.

We had a great time, the location is excellent and the rooftop pool offers a fantastic view.
Downside: The furniture in the apartment is quite outdated and the bed is very hard. The pool area definitely needs renovation, as the tiles are coming off.

The apartment was absolutely beautiful and in a prime location. Communication with the host was easy and they even provided us local tips to help make our stay easier.  The building staff is extremely professional and kind.  This apartment is very clean and had great amenities. I highly recommend booking this place if it's available.

Joyce’s place was better than the photos and incredibly clean. It was the perfect location if you wanted to get to any of the biggest tourist locations, a quick tuk tuk away. There is also an amazing bar on the roof of the building that I highly recommend.

Great place to Stay at. the 7 eleven and the restaurants were very convenient to have near by and a good selection as well. the place felt nice and friendly. I was staying there by myself, so it was comfortable to be at.

We stayed a long time in this place. The location is perfect, close to Tao poon, bang sue and few eat markets. When we arrive we first had to clean the apartment because it was kinda dusty. The communication was really good with the owners. When something was broken, they directly sent a technician.

Very nice modern and spacious rooms in the middle of brand new area.
Recommend it
Bien situé pour qui veut séjourner dans ce quartier de Thonglor
good room, good location, clean, just a little dark
靠近河边的一处非常安静、干净、整洁、优雅的房子，房东很用心，体验超级棒。
It was a great place for my family of 6. Would highly recommend.

The apartment staff was super friendly. Got a comprehensive walkthrough at the time of check-in, which I've never experienced anywhere. Excellent hospitality.
Gym is small but good enough for a short workout. Pool is fantastic.
They have a complimentary tuk tuk you can take to the BTS station. If you walk, it's about 8 to 12 minutes.
The street seems residential so it's very quiet but there is 24/7 security at almost all the buildings and street lights in the alleys so it feels safe.
If you're planning on coming back to the apsrtmet multiple times a day, the walk can get tiring, especially with this heat, but if goie planning on being out all day this location is perfect to come back to a comfy bed, clean and secure building, and a spacious apartment. Perfect for a couple or solo traveller.
Great central location and excellent facilities.

Ok location but there was cockroaches there. It felt a little fishy as we were guided into the building by car and got into the elevator without entering the reseption area. They had detailed instructions not to stay in the reseption with our luggage. Earlier guests have been evicted by the police because the owner is not allowed to rent out the place, this can be read if you look for the negative reviews. We would not rent this place again.
Convenient location in the middle of Chinatown. Description and photos are correct. Does what it says on the tin.

We had a really good stay at HOMEROOM. The host, Gift, was very responsive and accommodating—when we requested to borrow a flat iron, she kindly lent it to us. The place itself was comfortable and made us feel good throughout our stay. Location-wise, it’s nicely balanced—right in between being close enough to many destinations in Bangkok while still tucked away from the busiest areas. It’s also easy to hail a ride from here, which made getting around very convenient. Overall, we enjoyed our stay and appreciated the warm hospitality.
Convenient location to get around Bangkok.
Very nice house, Central location. Can walk to China town and subway. Close to bars but very quiet neighborhood.

Mali’s place was very nice and clean, is close to a lot of restaurants and stores. The place is impeccable and the decor was very nice. While we were out the cleaning crew came and clean and organized the apartment. I would come back and recommend the place to anyone  going to Bangkok. My family and I love it!!!
Pasamos un gran momento en el apartamento de Ken. La comunicación fue muy buena y nos respondieron rapidamente. La piscina en el rooftop tiene una vista espectacular de bangkok

السكن جميل و مطابق للوصف. وجدت النظافة و الهدوء.
كان الوصول الى موقع البناية صعب قليلاً.
المضيف متعاون و يتواصل بشكل جيد.
这个房子特别漂亮，有洗澡和吹风机，没有牙刷和牙膏，所以如果出国旅游住民宿的话，还是要自己准备。这个房子跟描述的一样漂亮.很大跟舒服，我们我们五个人住刚刚好，里面的人很好。
Very clean and private place. Tatiya was very responsive.
在这里的一段住宿很愉快！日式公寓设计小而美，室内陈设干净崭新，走路三分钟即可抵达bts和gateway商场，商场负一楼的生鲜超市可以满足日常吃饭和水果需求，非常方便。
중심가에 근처로 연결성이 좋지만 태국의 더운 날씨로 걸어 다니기엔 부담되고 바이크를 이용하면 좋아요. 보안도 확실하고 고층이지만 엘리베이터가 빠르고 신속해서 좋아요.

Incredible. This was our first time in Thailand and even though we flew in to Bangkok late Nitaya and Pop were responsive and so helpful with assisting our taxi driver on how to find their place. This stay was extremely personal and a beautiful way to experience our first days in an incredible country. Nitaya and Pop offer a rich, personal and very hospitable staying experience. The room was clean, and exactly as depicted. It felt very safe and was comfortable. We are very thankful we chose to stay with them and we owe a beautiful time in Bangkok to them and their family. Coffee is AMAZING by the way.

Très bon séjour !
Le logement correspondait aux différents commentaires positifs de l’annonce ainsi qu’à la description de l’annonce.
It’s a nice place and worth the money
Ideal pour moi proche de tout , piscine, salle de gym
We had a great stay at Tan’s place. Everything was easy - the Airbnb living room was a very cute space for us to relax and watch the tv! There are many cool restaurants and cafes nearby!

신속한
응답에 위치도 좋고 깨끗했어요

Fantastic place to stay, next to the Canal and centrally located to walk, take the water taxi, metro or whatever you choose.
Everyone was very helpful and I would highly recommend staying here on your next visit!
Great stay in a superb location. The studio feels like home — comfy bed, nice sofa, and smart TV. Leah is genuinely kind and welcoming. I wouldn’t hesitate to book here again on my next visit.
房子很乾淨，很舒適，房東非常友善
I like this place because it's relatively central and on the BTS line. The  apartment also has all the amenities you could need. Check in is super easy which is appreciated.

A beautifully styled, modern two-bedroom apartment just steps from Ekkamai BTS—perfect for travelers who want design-forward comfort and seamless access to Bangkok’s vibrant neighborhoods. Spacious, chic, and super convenient for both city exploration and relaxing at home.

Ha sido una estancia muy agradable y cómoda. Ubicación tranquila para poder dormir alejado del tráfico, quizá alejado también del centro, pero está el Skyline a 10-15m a pie. La habitación en líneas generales muy bien. Alex y Kannicha te acogen desde el principio como uno más, dispuestos a ayudar y muy cercanos. Gracias!.

Great area, fairly quiet, nice clean condo, private lift. Note: washing machine is in cupboard to the left of the lift. Good value for money! Unfortunately no access to the rooftop pool, but overall worth it.
著書很完美

Mike was very quick at responding , the place was very nice and tidy , easy good location , we had just landed in Bangkok so we’re very exhausted yet the place was easy to find and getting in was very very quick .
I really like this place....... the room look exactly like the pictures, it is clean and no smell....... highly recommended!!!

Clean place that is a 20baht motorbike ride or 1km walk from a BTS station.
The place is clean and quiet and sufficiently well maintained.
Would have no issues rebooking this place.
很有特点很棒的民宿，房东超级热心，也很健谈。除了交通有一点点不那么方便外，其他一切都很好！

Great apartment, just a couple of walk from the BRT station; perfect spot for visiting the city! Clean spaces and super comfortable mattress. The pool is a special plus to refresh from BKK hot weather! But what we liked more was Tanny: super kind, fast in replying, very helpful... Thanks a lot! You made our journey even more special!
Mitch, very hospitable and friendly. I was happy to stay in his wonderful house, it feels like home. There are very friendly kitties living in the house. Highly recommended 🙌
Hôtel super pour visiter Bangkok. Les tuktuks gratuits pour aller au métro sont très confortables. Je recommande 😊

The receptionist were helpful. As I m a wheelchair user, they take the initiative to provide a ramp as there are two steps into the apartment.. apartment is spacious n free of clutter, bedrooms are big.. there are few restaurants around.. near to BTS which is a plus point.. overall pleasant stay
Everything was perfect! Host was very responsive, place was really clean! I would definitely recommend staying at this plan if you’re visiting Bangkok!

This was a great stay in Bangkok. It is very close to the BTS station. It's quiet and very clean. The bed was incredibly comfortable. The hotel staff were very friendly and helpful. I will stay here again when I am in Bangkok.

I throughly enjoyed my stay. it was peaceful, relaxing, and a great location for whatever you need. foodland is right next door, 2 7-11s are across the street inbetween is a local market with great cheap prices across the street easily accessible from the sky walk maybe 30 meters from the condo or less. The amenities were wonderful the pool was beautiful empty and i didn’t see anyone using it besides myself whether day or night time. The gym was clean not very busy at most there were 2 or 3 people at most depending on the time of day if not you were gonna be there yourself. I would stay again and i recommend others try it truly felt like home during my 12 day stay.

Nice stay in Soi 33. The second time I’ve stayed in this studio and it’s great, clean, easy access to BTS Phrom Prong (less than 10 mins walk).
Only small downside is there is no door to the balcony - just a window but no big deal
Hote professionnel hyper réactif 🌟🌟🌟🌟 je recommande. Le lieu est magique pour découvrir Bangkok sur un angle humain authentique agréable et serein. 👌🌟🔆👏
Coffee and food right down the road.  Train is near by.  AC worked great.  I used the washer which was fine. Bed was comfy.  Quiet place

地點沒話說。
房間有螞蟻，所以不要將甜的食物放過夜，每個房間有專屬的冰箱隔層，你可以放在那裡。
如果能主動提供wifi密碼和水的話就更完美了。
Wifi 連網速度感覺並沒有像其他評論說的那麼不穩，滑滑手機 看影片都還可以。
廁所出奇乾淨，應該給打掃阿姨加雞腿
Perfect and wonderful stay at Mr Sommart’s place. House is big and spotless!
Very nice & clean space! The host was always responsive & communicated well, would recommend!
位置非常好，房间很舒服
房子很方便！一切都很好
호스트께서 무척 친절하시고 숙소도 가격 대비 훌륭했습니다. 수영장도 잘 사용했고요. 아시아티크 바로 옆이라 쇼핑과 식사 편하게 했습니다. 다만 방에 방충망이 없어서 모기에 좀 물렸네요 ㅜ 그것만 아니면 완벽합니다.
Great quiet local place to stay. Loved having a well equipped kitchen to cook meals during Covid-19. Would definitely recommend. Evan is a great host and let us check-in early.

Overall, the stay has been very pleasant. Amenities are good as well e.g. well equipped gym, swimming pool, shuttle bus to the main street. As for the apartment, everything was good aside from the water heater which kept breaking down. nonetheless, summer was extremely helpful and responsive, and had arranged for a service man to resolve the issue. thank you.

Apartment was clean, spacious and big. The living room was a level above the bedrooms, hence, we didn't get to use it that much. If you want a place near to Platinum Mall and Pratunam Market, this would be the most ideal. Slightly more pricey than other apartments but I guess you have to pay for one which has a good location. The only thing that was not that great is that it does not have any elevator, staying on the 5th floor will require guests to be reasonably fit physically to climb the stairs and carry luggage. One thing to note that it has only one bathroom cum toilet in the apartment.
거격대비 매우 좋음 위치도 좋고 이가격이 유지된다면 또 오고싶음 만약에 3만원이면 한달살기 하고싶음 ㅎㅎ
Amazing house, recommend for large families to stay!
Great stay, great location lovely flat a smooth stay with a helpful host
Always staying at this residences when I’m in Bangkok. Worth the price
这套公寓非常好，有很好的一块地方可以晒衣服，阳光每天很好，衣服晒得香喷喷的。整个公寓很干净，水压也很好 ，洗澡洗头完全不用担心。地理位置更加棒。
everything was good
너무 친절하고 완벽
Place was excellent and was as described and Ed was very helpful to this newbie in Thailand. Well definitely stay again at his places.
地理位置很好
这是一次不错的体验，虽然没有想象中离地铁那么近，但还好，走的不远，房间干净整洁，空调制冷快，接待人员非常热情，总得来说是次非常棒的旅行

Absolutely wonderful place for an affordable price. Would highly recommend and would stay over again. The place was super clean and comfy, in fact spotless. The train station and seven eleven was also nearby so it made it all the more worth it.  Thank you P'Apinun for being a very reponsive and informative host and welcoming us at your place
Neat and clean house, very convenient amd close to many restaurants amd cafe. Viia and her team very responsive and helpful. Thanks for your hospitality :)
住宿位置交通方便，健身房設備齊全。社區公共空間寬大舒適。房間內與頂樓的夜景超級美，媲美河岸邊的高級酒店。
amazing stay, highly recommended

Staying at her place was one of the most beautiful experiences I’ve had in Bangkok.
She is incredibly kind, considerate, and calm — which made me feel truly at ease.
The location is perfect: a peaceful, green inner street, yet just a 5-minute walk and you’re right in the heart of the city with so much to see and do.
The house is lovely, and there’s a space out front where you can sit, relax, and enjoy the birds and the peaceful atmosphere.
The internet is excellent, and the house is cleaned thoroughly every day.
She goes above and beyond to make sure everyone feels comfortable and happy.
Thank you for everything and for sharing your beautiful space and spirit.
按照房东给的地址，用谷歌地图，很好找。距离BTS很近，步行过去还有菜市场。房东给我们准备了丰富的做饭材料，有面包和鸡蛋香肠，非常感谢。我们5个人入住很方便。卫生间洗澡也有热水，就是蚊子有点多。其他都很好！

The room is pretty nice and clean. The condo is quiet! You can take shuttle tuk tuk to bts. Mam always provides instant support and reply. This is my first experience in airbnb and I really grateful Mam. I would definitely select Mam’s room next time!

we stayed for a month and the condo had everything we needed such as fully equipped kitchen and a washing machine.  the pools and outdoor areas were great. it is walking distance to both bts and mrt and the lovely jodd fair Dan neramit night market. soi 1 had lots of good food and massage places. the host was very responsive and helpful. would definitely recommend this place.
Place was nice and quiet amenities like aloft and no hot water

This spacious, cozy house was the perfect base for our family trip. It’s bright, beautifully maintained, and genuinely feels like a home-with plenty of room to relax and great air-conditioning in every bedroom.
We especially appreciated how clean the entire place was. One family member is very sensitive to chemical scents, and the hosts kindly honored our request to use only natural/no-scent cleaning methods throughout the house. It made a huge difference and allowed everyone to feel completely comfortable from the moment we arrived.
Location is fantastic: tucked into a quiet local neighborhood right behind a stunning temple, yet super central. Street food, 7-Eleven, shopping malls, and MRT are all a short walk away, making getting around Bangkok a breeze.
We’ve had a very nice and comfortable stay. Highly recommend for families!
交通很方便，路口就有711，房东很好。

とても便利な場所にあり値段もすごく安く
広いベッドで家族ゆっくり過ごすことが
出来ました　: ) ♡
高級ブランドショップまでも歩いていけて
近くに美味しい24時間の海鮮の市場もあり
最高でした！

ありがとうございました🙏
房东回复信息🍺处理事情都挺快的，好评

Great apartment in a very central and pleasant location, close to everything we needed.
The owner was extremely supportive and responsive, helping us with anything we asked for.
They even arranged pick-up and drop-off, which made our stay completely stress-free.
Overall, a very comfortable stay and highly recommended.
Very challenging finding the place and had to ask for many details in order to locate it and get inside. It’s a decent two story house that looks like the posted pictures. Reasonable value.

We enjoyed our stay, and even extended it, as this place met all our needs. We appreciated the style, comfort and decor. It’s a well decorated space that feels welcoming. There’s lots to do nearby and transport is easily accessible. The host was extremely responsive and accommodating, wifi wasn’t working well when we arrived but they took care of it immediately. While the description does say there is no elevator, I wasn’t exactly prepared for the stairs - but that’s on me. Just note there are no hand rails. There is a slight sewer smell in the bathroom, but it’s easy to remedy. This isn’t specific to this location only, we’ve come to learn it’s common to the majority of the places we travel, so we just pack a few drain covers wherever we go and that does the trick. Overall this is a great place with a friendly and accommodating host. We’d definitely stay again.

I had a wonderful stay at this Airbnb. The host was incredibly welcoming, responsive, and went out of their way to ensure everything was perfect. The apartment was spotless, comfortable, and exactly as described.
We reached there at around 9am way before checkin time but she was kind enough to allow us to use living room and drop our luggage. There is no common washroom, so i would suggest if you're coming early morning, make sure you book for previous night as well.
The only thing to note is that the immediate area around the apartment is a bit quiet, with not much to explore within walking distance. However, the metro/bus station is close, making it easy to get around the city and explore more vibrant neighborhoods. It usually takes 1 hour to get to nearest attractions via bus. Though the street is small but taxi comes to house door.
Overall, if you’re looking for a local area stay with excellent access to public transport, this is a great choice!

We spent three days here and overall had a very good stay. The price is more than fair, the location is nice, and the apartment is fully equipped. Many things are clearly labeled with stickers, so it’s easy to find everything you need.
A few small things that could be improved:
1. The sofa is a fold-out “book” type: it’s fine for sleeping but not very comfortable for sitting.
2. There are only ceiling lights. Adding a floor lamp or a couple of smaller light sources would make the place feel more cozy and intimate in the evenings.
These are just my personal preferences though – overall, the place is great and worth every penny.

this host is more the over kind than what u think. really really kind. i call him to help but he was already outside then he call to his brother to visit our room for helping in 5minites, when i was sick. how can i say more thanks him.. no neet to compair and worry. u must be feeling how kind and comfortable if u will stay here.

I love the rooftop glasshouse with the kitchen tools and also the table, very good to have coffee in the morning and enjoying the city lights at night, our family enjoyed our stay, Highly recommended! Easy to go to pratunam,  platinum and centralworld just by walking.. Will definitely go back! Thank you so much from the Philippines!

짐 마타주는게  뭐그리  어렵다거...... 첨엔 마타준댓다가는 나중엔 말돌리기일쑤임.... 지가 메세지 잘못일것다고함.. 혹시나 해석해서볼까바서 맞춤법을요러케 ㅋㅋ 거리는 시티쪽이라서 조킨한데 주인이 너무 깐깐이임  그래서 그럼 어떠케하냐고 하니까  짐마타주는 서비스 이용하라고 상술부림ㅋㅌ 그냥아침일찍 담넌가야대는데 터미널21에 맡기기에도 10시에문연다길래 못맏끼니까ㅏ  하는수없이 그 건물 경비아씨한테 마타달라함 ㅌㅋ 그분다행히 차캄!!!  호스트는 분명 안댄다고햇음  경비아씨한테도 맡기지말라곸ㅋㅋ 무튼 거리 그냥 bts타고다니면 대니까 여긴 별로임 위에랑 옆에랑 자는데 가벽인지 소리 다들리고 조그만소리도다들림 ..... 창문문은 열지마라더라  고장이라써낫던디ㅣ ㅑ모르겟다 무튼 잠만 자고나옴..

Hostel vibes but better.
Large room with a private bath and a shared small kitchen and washer/dryer on the first floor. No elevator so you will need to carry your luggage up the stairs. Staff can assist you.
Very close to Ekamai BTS connecting you to everything in Bangkok. About 30 minutes drive to BKK airport depending on traffic.
The staff was very accommodating and will go out of their way to assist you the best they can. Great impression!
Good communication from hosts as well.
I wish they had a sink in the small kitchen so you can rinse dishes but not a deal breaker.
Overall very good value for a night or two of exploring the area and heading off to the airport.
位置离地铁站步行10分钟左右，在巷子里面，不过公寓挺新，房间很干净，而且配了洗衣液洗发水沐浴乳，房东沟通也很及时，好评。
Awesome place to stay!!
This place is truly a hidden gem in Bangkok! Perfect location and close to supermarkets and the bts station. Will definitely book again on my next trip to Bangkok 😄

Schöne, moderne Unterkunft mit sehr schöner Dachterasse und Pool. Die Lage ist gut, man sollte sich zwar meist ein Taxi nehmen, aber die Fahrzeiten halten sich in Grenzen und das nötigste ist ebenfalls zu Fuß erreichbar.
유아포함 5명인데 머물 수 있도록 배려해주셔서 감사합니다. 넓고 화장실이 2개라 편했어요.

Wir verbrachten 2 Nächte in diesem tollen, kleinen aber feinen Apartment. Leider lernten wir Bung nicht persönlich kennen, aber Yaonicha empfang uns sehr herzlich und zeigte uns alles. Bung reagierte schnell auf Nachrichten. Alles war unkompliziert. Das Apartment ist in einem Wohnhaus mit Empfangshalle. Alles ist sehr sauber und die Umgebung sicher. Zur BTS sind es ca13 min zu Fuß. Lage war für uns ideal. Der Rooftop Pool ist unglaublich - tolle Sonnenuntergänge. Das Apartment ist sehr gut ausgestattet. TV, Wlan, AC, sogar Wasser stand bereit.
Wir würden Bungs Apartment jederzeit Freunden empfehlen.

In just a month or so, the place will be completely ready to host you in the most by manner ! The room was amazing. Todd and his wife are just amazing folks. The location is really really nice. Had a very happy and fulfilling though very short stay there. Next time will be longer for sure !
Decent place to stay
Super Aufenthalt in toller Wohnung

We stayed with three persons in the apartment of Darren. The complex consists of multiple units and ours was on the fourth floor. The unit itself is very clean and amenities such as snacks and water are provided. I would strongly suggest replacing the mirrors as these have permanent marks on them. The only (!) issue was the swimming pool - the sealent joints are nonexistent between tiles, which may hurt. Also, the pool water is quite full with particles visibly floating in it. I wouldn't go underwater with my head. The daily cleaning service is great and very helpful and can be trusted around expensive items. Huge plus!
服务非常好👍

check-in was fast.. we areived early and we able to put our bags and back again for check-in at 14:00 and the bags already in our room..
the unit is 1bed which is good and spacious also fits for 2pax..
has washing machine and microwave and AC is also good..
the location was OK walkable to Petchaburi MRT station around 15minutes walk.. and for Pratunam you can cross the road and take bus which stop in front of platinum mall..
check-out also fast and easy..
overall value for money and recommended..
might stay at this appartment again maybe for the next long stay..

I booked here before. Hasn't changed a bit. Still the same cozy room with everything you need as almost 2 years ago. Patty is super friendly, very accommodating and gives you some pretty good recommendations for your stay in Bangkok. Close to the malls, nightmarkets and many restaurants around. Highly recommended.

Evan literally gives his guests a book filled with tips and places to go in Bangkok. check-in was unbelievable Smooth. the apartment was clean and we had a great sleep.
the only thing that caught me off guard was the camera inside the apartment facing the exit. there was also something that looked like a camera in the living room area. as were two men it didn't bother us too much. Evan is an excellent host and I would stay again.
推薦！房東May的資訊非常完整，包括周邊的推薦去處、入住資訊、寄放行李資訊等，歡迎想來曼谷的時候入住這個房源。

The building was so clean and nice.  Especially, there was a swimming pool and sauna.  The house was kept clean and decorated.  There is a shuttle to Nana Station, so you can easily get there.  Be likely to use again
地理位置还不错，房间空间很大，卫生状态也还可以
按摩地點就腳，附近環境一般，步行8-10分鐘到Asok站

The place is good, the location is right on the heart of the city, lots of malls around and easy access to the train. It’s a busy noise at night time but I believe this is the price that you need to pay to be that central. All the staff are very friendly.

Alex is truly a superhost! He responds within minutes of receiving a request, is accurate, efficient, polite! The Bluetooth check in process was new to us but he was so helpful with it! His place is fantastic - huge 3 storied house with 6 bedrooms, each done up beautifully. The beds are very comfortable. The bathrooms though very small, work well The house is spick and span. 3 of the bedrooms have a fridge, microwave and Smart TV! The kitchen has all appliances you will need. The hot and cold water dispenser in the kitchen is a real help!
Just a few points to note - there are stairs since it's a 3 storied house and hence carrying up your suitcases is tough! Not a problem if you're prepared for it! Also, without the AC the house is very airless and unventilated. So the AC is required all the time. Alex has been thoughtful enough to provide stand fans in most rooms.
The location is very good - just a couple of minutes from Bangchak BTS.
Since my flight was at midnight, Alex allowed us a late check out in the evening, which we really appreciate!
Do take up his offer for an airport drop - very convenient!
I would highly recommend Alex's house!
Great host and great location

Yaowanee’s place has all the things that you need to feel comfy. Equipped kitchen, nice fridge. The bed was really comfy and room was spacious. The living room was also enough for a small group to hangout. You also have a good view of Bangkok it is on the high floor and view from the bedroom is unobstructed.
The condo itself was convenient as you have a laundry room at the lobby and 7-11 in case you need to buy something urgently or grab a snack in the middle of the night. You don’t even have to leave the lobby. The location is also convenient for Grab drivers to pick you up. Overall, I really enjoyed my stay and Yaowanee was very responsive when I needed something. She was super prompt and checks in on you in case you needed anything. She even bought me dinner this one time 😂 I stayed at her apartment for 30 days and would totally do it again. And yeah the wifi speed was great and this was important for me as I was doing remote work and needed stable and fast connection.

The place was as presented with great views and convenient to everything. Inthanom had great suggestions for restaurants and other things of interest. Transportation was set up for us as well with professional courteous drivers.

This accommodation was suitable for a family of five, which can be hard to find in Thailand where most places are hotels. The price was very reasonable, and overall the accommodation was comfortable and pleasant. We were happy with the swimming pool and gym facilities, and the location was excellent. It was close to EmQuartier, within walking distance to Terminal 21, and the area felt very safe. If I had to point out one minor drawback, it would be that the main bathroom could use a bit more cleaning, especially around what looked like mold, and it would be better if enough towels were provided for guests staying multiple days. Aside from that, we were very satisfied overall.
房东人很好 除了有一张床垫有点太软了外 所有事情都很完美
有り難うございました！また、利用したいです
rachel是位非常友善的房东，她会给您提供全面细致的旅行建议。我很喜欢猫猫们，他们很可爱，也很亲人。
Lovely staff, good amenities, clean rooms, comfortable bed. Would definitely recommend nila oldtown bangkok 👍

Très bon logement et aussi très bon hôte .
C’est très spacieux et l’hôte est vraiment accueillant et disponible !
Il fait aussi un service pour l’aéroport qui est très utile !
Je recommande si vous êtes de passage à Bangkok . Le logement est bien situé près de toutes commodités .
Excellent stay and loved the balcony! Only complaint is the shower pressure and hot water doesn’t work very well for the number of guest we had.
房间干净卫生舒适，交通便利，靠近bts，楼下就有便利商店、按摩店和餐饮店。房主Gift很nice，及时回复信息和帮我们处理事情，解决了我们的问题，让我们有一段美好的旅程，是一个值得推荐入住的房源👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

連絡も早く、立地の割に値段も安く、比較的清潔で快適に過ごせました。
浴室がもっと快適だとさらに良かったです。
オーナーは最後までとても親切で優しい方でした。
We really loved the place. Everything was perfect. Thank you gift
Nice part of Bangkok to stay in, Jesus is a great host and always quick to answer any questions. The apartment is really clean and comfortable and very quiet too.
Excellent, comfortable, kind, cute, cool

We highly recommend Nui's place. Super clean and great location. Minutes from the Sky train--which turned out to be extremely convenient. Bypasses all the traffic of busy Bangkok. Sukhumvit is a cool
Neighborhood: great food and some of the best Thai massage. Nui's place was exactly as advertised and he even left us lots of water and snacks! The pool was a great bonus. Would happily stay here again.
Well-designed small space, unique.
The space is ample and comfortable, close to Lumpini Park and only a few minutes walk from transit stations.

The apartment is very clean and modern. The front desk staff and host Fing were helpful getting us settled in upon our arrival. My only criticism is that the place is located pretty far from the city center and other main tourist attractions (ex: temples) we wanted to visit. This added the addition cost of taxis and/or long walks to get places.
Communication, location and check in were all good and easy!
Great place for the price

Great place for a group of friends, bright apartment spread out over 4 floors. Clean apartment with nice furniture. Good location and very responsive host. Accommodating with luggage storage for a few hours after check out.
very nice stay
So peacefull place.

A very nice and spacious apartment, with all amenities needed. Hooray was very easy to communicate with, and the apartment looked like presented in the pictures. Lang Suan is an upmarket street in Sukhumvit, and it is a relatively short walk to the BTS at Chid Lom. The apartment is on an alleyway from the street and very quiet. Absolutely recommend Hooray’s place, I would not hesitate to stay there again if I have the chance.
Great place to stay in Bangkok. There’s a Lawsons right downstairs for all your snacks cravings and last minute essentials. The space is comfortable. We loved the bed!

Amazing value for your money. The condo is new with a two plate stove, this is the main reason we choose to stay here. We also love the swimming pools and the gym. The location is also great, we used the local busses a lot. But you can always grab a taxi if you want to take it easy.
Jackrit was also amazingly helpful with finding us a store where we could print papers and with bringing us a frying pan.
Some minuses:
- No warm water in the shower ( not a big deal for me )
- Dirty floors ( I'm sure this will be fixed for future visitors )

Clarence's condo is exactly as in the pictures, and a perfect place to relax in the busy city of Bangkok. We didn't see him during our stay, so we had more of a hotel feeling, but if that doesn't bother you then this is an amazing place to stay! Spacious, clean, a very big pool area, ...
I had a nice stay at this Airbnb, it was a close walk to the BTS, lots of restaurants nearby, and I would definitely stay again!

This is a super place to stay in Bangkok! About 10 minutes walk to thong lor bts station and there are 7-11s and some street food at night around not to mention restaurants, highly recommended place as place is clean as the pictures and amenities were fully equipped! Great! 5-stars for a guest home! Cute chinchilla at the reception which we always say hi to when we return every night!
Really clean, the location is fine (you have to make sure where you’re going then decide). The wall was bit thin and most of the times you can hear the neighbors. Besides that it was great experience

非常好的一次住宿体验。
首先说下房东，人真的很好，定的红眼航班，到民宿都快3点了，房东一直在等我们，而且国内疫情刚爆发，房东还问我们现在怎么样了，超暖心。
然后房子的位置真的没的说，距离地铁站走路10分钟以内，附近两个大的全家，两个大的7-11。基本生活所需都能满足。
最后说下房子本身，我们住的是二楼的房间，很干净整洁，和图片的一样，卫生间可能稍微有点小，但是完全够用。每天打扫的也很干净。
总之去曼谷的话推荐这家。

Al llegar nos dan una habitación de 2, cuando éramos 4. Nos la cambian y nos dan una con litera,la cual no tenía escaleras para subir....Poca organización entre ellos...
La ubicación es regular. Lejos de todo, según que taxi no te lleva al centro.. En limpieza se puede mejorar
All really good.
离MRT非常进，步行大约5分钟左右可以到达，非常便捷！住宿周围也比较安全。房间非常干净整洁，没有异味

perfect location
perfect accomodities
perfect pool
the perfect stay, we hope so we can come back much longer
房间整洁，体验非常好。下次来曼谷还会选择这家。民宿对面有一家很好吃的餐厅。唯一美中不足的是，这边交通有点堵，门口是单行道，打车花了很长时间。

Betty made my stay a breeze! Extremely helpful with anything, goes above and beyond other hosts, the place was super clean, more clean than most airbnbs ive stayed in. They even arranged a seamless pickup from the airport even tho I was arriving very late, would love to stay here again
and for those who don't know the On Nut area there is so much to do within walking distance, restaurants, bars by condo, lotus for anything you need, BTS super close, can't go wrong with this location
would recommend to anyone
La ubicación es muy buena, zona tranquila. El alojamiento está muy bien pero es más pequeño de lo que parece. Falló un poco la limpieza😞

The host was responsive and easy to communicate with.
The accommodation was well-equipped and had everything you need for a comfortable stay. It was clean and tidy. It also had a beautiful view. I would consider staying here again.
Amazing place with amazing host
Was a great clean place to stay in a great location can’t fault this places. Being close to the train and the receptionists where very helpful
对于追星人来说很合适，离GMM家不远，而且去各个商场也不远，有公交也有地铁，很方便的！干净卫生，卫生间空间很大！卧室确实不算大但也足够了！
It’s my second time to stay here. There are many nice restaurants with very foods around the surrounding.

Thank you so much for the wonderful stay .. The location was ideal, the place was perfect . The place is in the heart of Sukhumvit area.
We friends really enjoyed the stay at your place.
Will surely recommend your place to friends and family.

Great space in a lovely pocket of Ari. Quiet but not far from the BTS and lots of restaurants and life! My baby slept very soundly in the travel crib that was provided (plus high chair) which was very appreciated. Very stylish and comfortable space - great value for money. Communication very easy and grateful for the flexibility on check-out.

The unit itself was okay like I said but few things were broken such as the office chair, also there’s a smell with the toilet. Also, it’s conditioner instead of shampoo and also the sound insulation wasn’t good I could hear others talk or walk. Also the soap dispenser in the bathroom is empty, just filed with water. Last but certainly not the least is the knocking on the door during my stay. I am pretty upset about this. Not only did you not reach out to me by phone or text or even check my reservation, you could’ve rung the doorbell nicely and asked nicely too. But no, instead you were knocking on the door violently in a way of wanting to break in and see if I’m doing anything suspicious or something. This is such an intruding of my privacy that I’m beyond words or believe so that’s why it’s taken me some time to respond. It’s a pretty scary and awful feeling to have when your privacy is being intruded by this level of unprofessionalism.
Excellent room for its price. Ideal for short-term stays. The location is excellent. The room is minimally furnished, but very clean. Lertrit is a wonderful host, sensitive and polite.
Good place to stay for the price.
Really great hotel accommodation with a night market right outside. Quiet, comfortable bed, and a nice set-up for a smaller space (perfect for 1-2 people).
Superbe hôtel, le service et impeccable, je vous le recommande vivement pour quelque jours à bangkok !!
Es war sehr ruhig, Check in und Check out lief reibungslos.
May is a delightful host and the apartment is immaculate – a huge thumbs up for the wonderful shower. As always, the washing machine is a huge plus for us when traveling.

Great place to stay! The hosts were very responsive and friendly. I really liked the apartment as it was clean and had everything it needed. The furniture was a bit worn out and the apartment had an air freshener which was just a bit too intense for me. But these were minor things.
This apartment complex has a poolside, a cafe and massage place which was amazing!
Would definitely recommend for short or long stay.

Great Place, Great location, Great host. I have been staying there for 3 months and I recommend that place.
very convenient, super well located and hist very responsive anytime. THANK YOU Yoyo
Very cozy place, close to Don Mueang International Airport. A heavenly place to rest.
I had a great stay in Narumon's apartment. The location is perfect next to Sukhumvit soi 49. The pool is really nice too!

Ravie d’avoir choisi ce logement qui correspondait à mes attentes et à l’emplacement que je souhaitais . Viva est une hôte parfaite très réactive disponible aimable et à l’écoute . Malheureusement la piscine était en réparation au cours de mon séjour donc je n’ai pas pu en profiter très longtemps . L’appartement est très agréable lumineux et bien équipé .
Un grand merci !
Overall a very pleasant stay. Room was nice and clean and the staff were friendly and helpful. The pool area was especially nice.

Firstly I would like to say the host responds to messages fast and is very welcoming.
Secondly it was lovely being picked up at the airport by transport they had laid on for me, it really made finding the apartment and checking in so easy
The pictures matched the place perfectly, and it’s in a great location, close to IconSiam and the BTS sky train.
The apartment is the perfect size for one or two people, and the roof top pool was great for cooling off in.
Best host, very good airbnb, great view from bedroom, a lot of restaurants, Great communication, everything was perfect!
房源很好，设备也很齐全，服务人员响应也很迅速，只是去到各个景点都不算近，再加上曼谷很堵车。整体的入住体验都非常愉快
A great place to stay.

On photos looks better.
But water filter is an amazing decision

It is a lovely place. Quiet, clean, internet works super well, and having a 7 Eleven close by makes life easier. The host is very responsive and friendly, always open to help and quick to reply. I felt comfortable and safe the whole week. I would be happy to stay here again
My best recommendations. Subtle and professional service, clean place, cameras in the building. Very good host.
Very nice place!

Nattaphol and his sister Kwang were exceptional hosts during our stay. Check-in was simple, efficient, and we were provided with plenty of information and recommendations about the area.
There is a washer-dryer in the apartment, kitchen supplies, spare bedsheets, and some basic toiletries to start you off. The dining area is the small breakfast bar you see in the photos.
There was one issue that came up, however, Nattaphol was quick to respond (even though it was late at night) and did his best to rectify the situation as soon as possible.
Overall, we had a fantastic stay - thank you Nattaphol and Kwang!

Great apartment near BTS Chong Nonsi
Jacks apartment is very nice and exactly as described. Great pool and gym and beautiful view from the balcony.
Closes BTS is 10min walking, there is a 7/11 and restaurants/ food stands nearby.
Jack is easy to communicate with and respond quickly. We would like to mention that we only received 1 keycard. It would have been more practical to have received two since we are a couple, for instance to go to the gym you have to use it to get to the facilities and the apartment. We couldn't do that separatly.
Good place

If you are someone who’s travelling light with small luggage, I’d definitely recommend you this accommodation. Even though the rooms are relatively small, there’s privacy, the wi-fi speed is excellent and  a lot of convenience stores are nearby. If you like busy neighbourhood with lots of bars and spas, this is the place. The BTS station Asok is about 15 minutes away to walk.
บ้านให้ความรู้สึกสงบ เหมาะกับการหลบความวุ่นวาย แต่งสวย สะอาด สิ่งอำนวยความสะดวกครบ ไวไฟเร็วมาก แอร์เย็น ของกินอร่อยในบริเวณเยอะมาก ใกล้แม่น้ำ หลบรถติดโดยเดินทางด้วยเรือ

We had air conditioner problem at first night. Host replied very quickly and ask the staff to help right away. Moreover, they also asked the technician to double confirm it. Thank you for all help and provided the new room for us!
Great apartment, had everything we needed , host were lovely too

사진에서 확인하기 어려운 정보가 많음.
홈스테이라 생각하시면됨.
사진을 100% 신뢰하면 안됨.
기찻길옆임.
Great stay

An amazing place to stay. The host Rebecca and James are extremely responsive. The apartment was clean and beautiful. The location is a cherry on the top, it has everything you need in walking distance.

-Good location
-Clean, privacy, n beautiful
-great host
-the coffee is amazing!
I really love this place!💖
The condo was located in the perfect area to enjoy the nightlife.
Enjoyed my stay. I had blackout curtains in the bedroom

My boyfriend (31M) and I (29F) had a great experience staying at Wilson's flat. Enough space for two, close to multiple good restaurants, very good security in building, and AMAZING pool! We also used the local MRT transportation and it was very easy to understand and get anywhere around Bangkok. We had no issues with our tour guides finding the location. We would stay here again for sure!
Great room very clean great location

BEWARE that this is not the room you will be assigned. Anything appealing about the suite (Eg: decor, artwork, throw pillows/bedding, end tables) was removed. He claimed “some furnitures were damaged” and offered us a 5% discount…. The room we got was an entirely different layout. Definitely not what we were expecting so this did put a damper on our last 2 nights in Bangkok.
Also, the toilet in master was constantly running/ making loud noises. The light in the 2nd bathroom was so dark I couldn’t even get ready in the mirror.
Overall very boring suite. Nothing special or nice about it. Also something to note. When you check out, don’t expect to wait near the pool until your next check-in time or flight. The security patrols, and tells you if you’ve checked out, you must take your bags and wait outside the property.
Very nice stay

Super séjour !
Merci encore tout était parfait 👍🏼👍🏼
가깝고 편하고 가성비좋아요
WE FELT LIKE HOME HIGHLY RECOMMENDED.

Communication and Check-In was good but expect of this the place is very low standard and of a bad quality. The mirror was broken, the shower is dirty and does not turn hot, the towels are synthetic and the balcony was very unsorted when we arrived.
nice location, quiet at night. good enough amenity
非常好的体验，地理位置不错，并且房间的布置很温馨，感觉比起酒店更愿意住这样的民宿，以后出游也会多多体验民宿。

Quiero mencionar que la anfitriona está atenta en todo momento😇
El apartamento es simple pero por ese precio y la ubicación, está justificado.
Si no vas a estar más de dos días es una opción buena de paso

駅に近く移動が便利でした。
部屋も清潔でくつろげました。
Everything is fantastic.  The host is really friendly and helpful.  I really missed my three days in her room.
It’s nice and clean all you need in walking distance.
I would definitely stay here again!
Clean apartment, check-in easy enough with the keys left in the mailbox. Spacious enough for 2. Little bit out of hand from the city centre, but quiet.

Great place to stay in Bangkok. Five minutes walk to the airport link and underground train, and the canal is directly behind the apartment block for quick, cheap and fun transport to siam, and even to the old city (terminates at the Golden Mountain, change at central pier).
The apartment itself is terrific. Very spacious, huge comfy bed and a large walk in shower. Well equipped for toiletteries and eating if you bring some of that som tam home with you. Spotless throughout too.
Ramone couldn't have been a friendlier host. Thank you for your hospitality, we had a great time going out with you.

On the same road as the hotel there are 2 really cute coffee and food shops with smoothies and food. They were super convenient!  Hotel had security and everything felt safe. There’s also a hotel kitty that sleeps on the chair to the left when you first enter in, soooo cute and cuddly highly recommend giving it pets 🥰 The gym and the pool are really nice and kept clean. The place was nice and clean upon arrival, and despite being so close to the road it really wasn’t all that noisy or hard to sleep. Got what we paid for, and were overall satisfied. Luke was super nice and quick to respond as well! Thank you so much for letting us stay 😊

The Ashton Chula apartment is located in one of the best neighbourhoods in Bangkok. Close to two malls, one of each has KFC and Starbucks open 24/7. The MRT is also close.

The facilities of the building (gym, library, social club, pools) are outstanding.
Surely, I'll stay at Windy's apartment on my next trip to Bangkok.

(조식은 8시부터) 샤워실은 공동이지만 큰 불편없고 시설 괜찮았고요. 가격대비 훌륭합니다!!

My wife and I stayed for 4 nights and loved it. Surrounded by locals on the canal, sitting on the deck watching water monitors and long boats pass by. The home is authentic and full of character.
