All was good in the appartment. Beautiful skyline view and pool too. Perfect for stay few days in Bagkok.

The place is in a residential area which makes it peaceful and quiet. I enjoyed our stay and the area is laidback perfect for avoiding the bustle of the city. There are also nearby local foodshops that you can eat thai foods. I'd recommend this to my other friends when they visit thailand.

I can't say enough good things about this particular airbnb. it may be a small distance away from the shopping area of bangkok but we certainly enjoyed home22 a lot more than staying in a small hotel room elsewhere.
large room with additional sofa bed with a sufficiently equipped kitchen and microwave. Aircon is big and cools the whole place fast, considering Bangkok's heat.
there's a large balcony to hang laundry which is a major plus. a washer and dryer, free to use for guests on the ground floor.
beside the accomadation is a mid size street, it's quiet during the nights so it's fine for most sleepers. they provide ear plugs if needed.
5 mins to the nearest mrt and 7 mins by foot to the bustle of yaowarat Chinatown street.
not to mention, there are several reknown speakeasy bars to enjoy in the close vicinity.
the property is well managed by the host with all the concise information for a comfortable stay.
I certainly hope I'm lucky enough to book this place again :)

This apartment building is great. The amenities are fantastic. The unit I got had a great view and a high floor. I come to Bangkok often so I always book this building.
That said, I requested a certain unit but was told that I will get whatever is available because it's not a hotel. But that's actually how a hotel works and not how Airbnb should work. So you don't really know that you're getting. That I don't like.
The apartment is lacking some essentials and it seems like they want to charge for anything extra. There weren't any cups to use, hand soap, or detergent. I asked for extra towels but we were going to be charged for it.
Great apartment, but hospitality wasn't completely there.

It’s a great find! Amazing location, stylish and comfortable place with easy access to a huge swimming pool. The host is super nice and caring. I hope I can stay again at Alexandra’s place when I’m back to Bangkok!
The place is near chinatown , very convenient to access around . MRT is located nearby as well. The host response is real quick should any problem arise.
It was a clean place, very comfortable to stay in. It was easy to communicate with the host.

The room is in a great location with markets and convenience stores nearby, and the BTS is a 10 minute walk away. I stayed for a month in this apartment and really enjoyed my time here. Chayanin is a great host who provided me with a larger desk so I could work more comfortably on my laptop and was always quick to respond whenever I had a question. The apartment was spotless and the location is excellent. You’ll find groceries just a few minutes away at 7/11 or Lotus, along with plenty of restaurants and barbershops nearby. The building also has a gym and a pool, making everything easily accessible. I’ll definitely be coming back soon!

Paul's accommodation is located just a walking distance from BTS Chong Nonsi, there is 7-11 nearby, and a lot of food options. The room itself is spotless, bathroom compact but decent and clean, hot water for shower always ready. There is a communal kitchen with free-flow mineral water. Not to mention Paul's accommodation has a rooftop with superb view!  All in all, if you are looking for affordable and comfortable stay in Bangkok, Paul's accommodation is for you. I would recommend this to my friends and family. Definitely will come back here again when I came to Bangkok!

Wendy's place is in a great location. The clear instructions on how to get in made it a breeze to access the apartment. There's a BTS station within 100m, and her apartment is in the same building as the Ascot - with very helpful hotel staff. There is also a "Tops" supermarket within 100m and a convenience store in the parking lot of the building. The apartment itself is bright and spacious with all the amenities - microwave, fridge, air-conditioning, Wi-Fi, washer, iron etc - for a comfortable stay. We had a great 5-day stay and it felt like home! Wendy was a great host. Very helpful and quickly responded to my questions on shopping and places to visit. All in all, would recommend the place in a heartbeat.

Recommend to family to live in this house,it has 3 floor in this house,one is big bed-room,another is two bed room.the 1st floor is dining room. we family has 5 adults and 1 kid.It's very suitable for us.It costs 20mins to Grand Palace by taxi and around 100TB. Costs about 350TB from Don Mueang airport.Thailand people are so nice,I will come again in the future.

Marffew was extremely helpful through out our trip. Very quick with his responses and flexible when we needed a bit of help. The apartment is in an amazing location. Be sure to try the night food market right behind the building!
Good place. Very accommodating hosts. No elevator, two flights of stairs to reach the second floor room, which is not a problem if you’re traveling light.

Such a lovely place. Very well taken care of by super nice and helpful people. Victoria welcomed us and gave us great local adive. The rooms are comfortable and stylish. I can only recommend this place in every way. Also it’s well located in a lively area and pretty close to most must see places.

Fantastic location in Silom area, 5 mins walk from Chong Nonsi BTS and the cute buzzling local ‘Lalai Sap’ market is just next to the building.
The clean, well-maintained 3-bedroom condo that we got was huge, with ample living room and dining room space, perfect for our family socialising. Please note that this is not a brand-new apartment building so there are some wear and tear, however to get this large size condo it is almost impossible when it comes to newer buildings - so expectations need to be realistic.
Check-in was wonderful and it seems that the building has some sort of legal airbnb permit and agreement with the landlords hence there was no ‘unfriendly’ signages banning airbnb that are common at many bangkok buildings. The security staff were all very friendly and we felt very safe.
Ant/Albert were very prompt when it comes to query.
Would definitely recommend this place!

Mike was great — very fast in responding and helpful with all the details.

There are many restaurants nearby, and the best one was Arno’s Steak House, located just opposite the apartment.
A coffee machine would make the place perfect. Traffic can be a bit troublesome during rush hours.
Great for the one night we needed to stay as we got in from a late afternoon flight and left in the morning. Easy to find food and snacks and close to the airport for our convenience!

- Free shuttle bus to the nearest BTS station. We always had to walk back because we were out till late. About a 15 min walk, which was doable.
- Very kind host, quick response time, good instructions.
I’d definitely recommend staying here if you want to have a great space to go back home to after a long day in Bangkok :).

非常好的一次体验，位于两个地铁站中间的小巷子里，走的不远，公寓门口也有送到巷子尽头的小车，非常方便，对面就是商场，很多美食，顶楼有露天泳池，下次来曼谷还会选择这里。
如果浴室增加浴帘会更方便，洗澡时水会溅出来，晚上睡觉的时候，有设备运作的噪音，有点吵。
房东姐姐很热情，但是要要注意房源离地铁站并不是很近，出门的话可以选择摩的，超级快

Tek’s place is great! Everything is within walking distance - BTS, shopping, local food, massage.
Place was clean with great amenities. Definitely good for 2 to 3 people. Will definitely use the place again the next time I come to Bangkok.
Wonderful apartment, so clean and comfortable. Wish we could have stayed longer! Thank you
It Was beautiful, and breakfast the best!
非常好的入住体验

We loved this place! Extremely cozy with all necessary amenities such as laundry, wifi, and AC.
The host is great, our friends were hurt and he was kind enough to provide us with a wheelchair. If we had any questions about the city he was very quick to respond. I would absolutely stay here again!

Останавливались здесь и остались под огромным впечатлением. Вид из квартиры — просто невероятный, без преувеличения один из лучших, что я когда-либо видел 🌆 Особенно вечером и рано утром — атмосфера совершенно особенная.
Само место очень живое и аутентичное: вокруг настоящий городской ритм, локальные кафе, улицы, люди, ощущение “настоящего” города, а не туристической декорации. При этом внутри квартиры было комфортно и спокойно, можно было отлично отдохнуть после насыщенного дня.
Очень понравилось сочетание атмосферы, локации и самого пространства. Место точно запомнится и оставило очень теплые впечатления 🙌
Если хотите влюбиться в этот город эта квартира поможет вам это сделать.
Мы обязательно вернемся 🫂

Hi Jenjira, thank you for your hospitality and your help finding a driver to Koh Kood . We really enjoyed our stay in your lovely house. When we come to Bangkok again and your beautiful place is not booked we defintely stay again at your place.
Excellent place if you don’t want the bustle of the city. Yet close to city Centre
I had a good stay. The room was spacious and clean, equipped with everything I needed. It was soundproof from the road at the back door but not at the front door. The host was great!
Pai was an extremely attentive host.

I rarely review any place, but today I am taking a little time to review this accommodation for the following reasons:
1. The host was very welcoming and supportive, and he even brought food for our child.
2. The location is very near. Everything convenient for moving, so very saving cost.
3. The house is wonderful, clean, and quite comfortable

我們一行八人，有老有小住的地方和照片一模一樣的乾淨舒適。
有問題房東的回應即時，也不厭其煩的幫我們解決問題。
賣場和按摩要走一段路，但那不影響我們的旅遊。
包車和計程車也都可以門口接送，很讚的一個住宿。
在小区别墅里，走到小区门口需要5.6分钟，小区门口都有吃的，有711，有超市，第二天免费送去机场（就是厕所有异味，属于 汗臭味，味道散了好久🥹）

Her şey fotoğrafta göründüğü gibiydi. Dairenin manzarası harikaydı; uzun vadeli konaklama için mükemmel bir tercih olabilir. İnternet gerçekten çok hızlıydı, bu nedenle daire dijital göçebeler için de ideal bir seçenek. Isidore her seferinde hızlıca yanıt verdi ve sorularımıza hemen yardımcı oldu. Harika bir deneyimdi.
Beautiful condo with a beautiful view right in the heart of town. Perfect. I will definitely book again in future.
peaceful area and easy to get in. the entire place was extremely clean and the kitchen fully equipped. Paijong was very friendly and made you feel at home
Great place to travel with my big family.
房间干净 就在大皇宫附近步行可到 早上711旁边的早市 深度体验了本地人的生活 除了主卧的台阶不太好下 其他都很完美 是一次非常棒的体验
Everything was good. Nice Service :)
オーナーの対応も良く過ごし安い環境でした

The host was quick response when contacted. 5 minutes walk to BTS, they even have shuttle service to BTS if you are lazy to walk. Minutes to 7-11 and local eateries. Pool was nice place to hang out. Place is clean and new.
房東很好，當我想退一晚房錢時，房東能立刻為我安排，回覆率很高，還貼心地為我們準備了椰青:)

Le logement est très pratique, arrivée autonome et grande flexibilité et réactivité de notre Hôte 🙏🏽
La piscine n’était pas en service c’est dommage.
les lieux sont sécurisés et calme.
merci pour ces 3 nuits à Bkk !
Genie的房子很漂亮，是独栋的小木屋，生活设施很全，我在这里住了5天，感觉到很安静，自然又舒适，院子里有许多猫咪，缓解了我对家里猫咪的思念，每天晚上都可以坐在院子的水池边处理一些信息，水池里有很多锦鲤，还有一只每天都在发呆的青蛙，街道有许多便利店跟小吃，每家我都尝试了，下个月我可能还会再回来

The apartment is very spacious for 2 people. It was also tidy and clean.
Contacting the host Curry was also very easy, since he always replied within the next 30 minutes.

Good location, on a quite street but has some basic amenities within 5mins walk. It was easy to get a Grab taxi from here if we wanted to go anywhere in the city. Ami is a great host and very responsive and she even got us a small Christmas present which was very sweet!

This unit is seen as per what the picture shown here. We are a family with 5 adults and 1 children, this unit is spacious and more than enough for all of us. Max is very responsive to our request and inquiries. He converse very well in English hence no need worry about communication breakdown. Location wise is very convenient as it is very near to PloenChit BTS and is just 2 station away from Siam where most of the major shopping area located. In conclusion, i surely recommend big group or family to stay here!
Nice and clean apartment, the host was really helpful with checking in.

Great place
Simple and best
Great location

Amazing home for a short to long stay. Very responsive host with great guidelines for check in. The security staff downstairs helps with the check in and taxi pick up and drop offs. The furniture is so nice and the overall ambiance of the home is welcoming l!
房間非常舒適，很乾淨，地點很好，風景很好，很推薦。
Good Stay
Giffy is extremely helpful and the place was super clean and we had everything we needed. We got to check in a little early too. Overall we had a great time and enjoyed the place.

An amazing building with fantastic outdoor pool on 8th floor and phenomenal gym on the same floor. Luxurious building populated with many young professionals. Lots of internationals.
Nearby restaurants with good food, (Oak is one of them).
Host Ille, is amazing, friendly and welcoming, great communication and flexibility. Apartment is very accomodating 2 bedroom with floor to ceiling windows.
Absolute recommendation to anyone coming to this part of the world!
Mo went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable. I would come back if I had the chance next time I'm in Bangkok!
The bnb was very clean, very well located and check in and check out were very easy. Our host was very pleasant and communicative
짜뚜짝 가려고 묵었는데 숙소가 너무 좋아서 나가기가 싫었어요. 엄청 깨끗함. 그랩 이용해서 바이크 택시 잘 이용하면 짜뚜짝이랑 아리 둘러보기에 너무 좋습니다. 가족여행이었는데 공간이 편해서 좋았어요!
Very nice building with amenities, pool, sauna, gym.  Nice apartment new with nice TV's.  Excellent restaurants everywhere.  I would stay here again visiting Bangkok.
Overall a pleasant stay and within walking distance to the mall and train night market..
Good location for most things, clean and quiet

this place is really nice and cozy. i will definitely stay there again if i go thailand.
thank you very much
房间位置挺好的，离asok站步行10分钟。房间也很干净，隔音挺好，空调给力。房东答复很快！

호ㅅ 트가 은근 까타알 스 럽.
개 쪼 잘 거림. 새 벼억에 연락 옴.
바앙으음 조온나 안됨.
삼 박 사 일 있는 데 타오올ㄹ 하나로 써야함.
픽업 서비스는 좋음 :)

Rooms are bit more dated than the photos. However everything was very clean and staff was incredibly friendly. The one issue is the staff accidentally gave a key card to someone checking in for our room, so a completely stranger walked into our room while we were sleeping. Felt a bit unsafe. Other than that incident we enjoyed our stay. Close walking distance to the MRT and lots of food options nearby.
Angela was very kind, and we enjoyed the place.

Great place to stay and walking minutes to the blue line. Great gym and pool and sauna to relax. Recommended, we stayed for almost a month. Easy check in as well and she always replied when we had questions.

Great place with great hosts. This is a nice and clean studio apartment in a quality condo complex in Bangkok. The bed is comfy, there is ample storage, the kitchen is well stocked, and the view from the balcony is great especially the sunsets. The condo complex is great, has many nice swimming pools and gyms, as well as private parks located throughout, and is located a short walk from EmQuartier and Emporium. Also, the staff and security are very friendly and helpful.

Tek's apartment is in a wonderful location. He was a fantastic host, going above and beyond, even offering to hold our luggage for the day after we checked out and had a late flight that evening. His apartment was very new and modern, great AirCon and beautiful pool.
Very friendly team but it was also dirty.. The floor room, the laundry, the kitchen..

The Condo from Jane and Micky is perfect.
Close to BTS 2 min walk, next to a 7 eleven shop and also starbucks.
Jane and Micky are great hosts. They respond very fast and apartment is like on the pictures. Great to a have also a wasmachine available. The pool and fitness room also very nice. Check in and check out went also smoothly.
Thanks for the early check in.
I can only highy recommend. I would defenitely come here again when i am in BKK again.
Huge room. Good location, close to the center. Two seven eleven shops on each corner of the street.
Overall is a good experience. Highly recommended
Simply amazing! They are very kind, warm and helpful and the bed is comfy 🙌🏽

We loved our stay at K. Pao's homestay! It's just such a nice escape from busy Bangkok, yet close enough to get there pretty quick by taxi from downtown. From the Airport it's just a stone through away. The private rooms are upstairs with a nice river view balcony, but we stayed most of the time at the lovely cafe by the river.
The house is in great shape and the rooms even have an aircon (which we didn't use as the mosquito net on the window and the fan was ideal).
In walking distance and also on the water are a few options for food and drinks.
Thanks again K. Pao and we will be back soon!

This is an very nice little apartment near Bangkok. There were everything you needed and very clean. We didn’t have the time to enjoy the gym or swimming pool but maybe next time.
I strongly recommending this place if you want to live outside of Bangkok.
Solveig
Good
위치도 좋고 너무 편안한 곳이었습니다

Great experience at Heart’s place.  Smooth check in and she was very patient explaining exactly how her smart tv and entry door password operates.  Very secure building, with both street security and doormen.  Doubt there is better 38th floor infinity pool and huge exercise room in Airbnb system in Bangkok.  Welcome food gift and another treat after I stayed a week.  Food and drink options everywhere along soi 11.  Lots of new restaurants, as they are really cleaning up this soi.  She is a great communicator, I look forward to staying there again.
Impecable. Excelente edificio y ubicación. Muy atentos a todos mis pedidos y preguntas. Incluso me permitieron exceder la permanencia en función de mis vuelos. Sobresaliente!

loved our stay! Comfortable, real culture, super cute place to eat thai food right down the street on the corner. 7/11 super close and the street food is good and near by. the bed was comfortable and theres air-conditioning.
很大的空間，比照片更美麗更舒適，推薦🫶

I’m giving this 5 stars because I was generally satisfied with almost everything. However, there are three things worth noting:
The Shower: The hot water is a bit 'all or nothing.' If you try to mix in any cold water to get a warm temperature, the heater just shuts off completely.
Bathroom Upkeep: The bathroom furniture definitely needs a refresh. The drawers have water damage and don't really function anymore. The hair dryer is not easy to use.
Noise Level: Since the condo is right on Sukhumvit Road next to the BTS, it’s quite loud. If you’re a heavy sleeper like my child, you’ll be fine, but my partner and I barely slept because of the traffic and sirens.
Amy is a brilliant host! Hugely communicative and extremely helpful. Great apartment. Highly recommended!
very good

Superbe endroit pas loin des principaux temples quand on aime marcher(30min’) après c’est un peu loin des centres commerciaux pour les fans de shopping.
Emplacement idéal pour moi
La chambre est juste parfaite pour moi quand on y reste juste pour dormir
Les hôtes sont hyper gentils le breakfast est simple et efficace quand on déjeune pas beaucoup comme moi.
Merci beaucoup j’y reviendrais avec grand plaisir

it is off the main road in a quiet little cul de sac. peaceful with cafe/bakery, bars, restaurants lauderette and public transportatuon (BTS) all within a 5 - 10 min walk.
Hosts provided clear instructions and good communiations..
Room was lclean and spacious and well furnished for business visit or vacation.
overall it was a very pleasant 6 day stay!
Thanks, see you again soon!

It was a really nice place to stay and very clean! The rooms are big enough and equipped with AC, furthermore  there was a pool, a rooftop terrace and they even offered free yoga classes. It is a great place to stay when exploring Bangkok, being close to numerous famous temples, markets and bars. Highly recommend!:)
Super!

Host was proactive and extremely helpful from the start of booking till we ended our stay, and even prepared small snacks, multiple beakers of cold water prior to our arrival. Travel adaptors were provided, which was a huge plus.
Accomodations were clean, spacious and was situated in a peaceful neighbourbood and away from the main road/traffic. Will definitely look to book in our future trips to Bangkok.

บ้านน่ารักน่าอยู่มากๆค่ะ เปิดประตูเช็คอิน เจอน้องแมวดำมาต้อนรับที่รั้ว ร่มรื่น สะอาดและเดินทางในเมืองสะดวกมากๆค่ะ ครอบครัวเราเข้าพักพ่อแม่ลูกเด็กเล็กเด็กโต และคุณย่า มีอุปกรณ์อำนวยความสะดวกครบเหมือนอยู่บ้านเลยค่ะ ทีแรกกังวลเรื่องที่จอดรถเนื่องจากอยู่ใจกลางเมืองแถวเอกมัยแต่ไม่มีปัญหาเลยค่ะ เพื่อนบ้านในซอยอัธยาศัยดีน่ารักทุกบ้าน มีพี่ยามคอยดูแลเรื่องที่จอดรถ เดินทางไปสถานที่ต่างๆในเมืองสะดวกมาก แถมละแวกใกล้เคียงมีร้านอาหารอร่อยเยอะมาก คาเฟ่แบบเดินไปได้5-10นาที หากมีโอกาสจะกลับมาพักอีกแน่นอนค่ะ

Jeg boede 3 måneder i Bangkok, og er utrolig glad for at jeg lige netop valgt den lejlighed! Fantastisk placering, utrolig lækre faciliteter (pool, træningscenter, fællesområde)
Lejligheden er rigtig fint indrettet med alt hvad man behøver.
Udlejeren var utrolig hjælpsom og meget hurtig til at svare på eventuelle spørgsmål man måtte have.
Vær dog opmærksom på at lejligheden ligger overfor et hotel, så hvis man har gardinerne trukket fra, vil dem fra nabohotellet nemt kunne kigget ind. Dette gør blandt andet også at der ikke kommer nær så meget sollys som jeg ville have fortrukket, men ikke noget som jeg vil fravælge lejligheden på. Jeg boede her som sagt 3 måneder og havde ingen problemer med det.
Photos in listings are exactly same as the room. The building looks old and rundown but the interior is well furbished and clean. Except there are ants around.
This is a very nice condo in a modern building right next to BTS Thong Lo. Two bedrooms, two bathrooms. The building has very good facilities.
Väldigt trevligt boende som var lokalt och det var enkelt att nå restauranger och nattliv. Värden gav ett väldigt bra bemötande och hade hört av sig i god tid innan vår vistelse.
Love the place. It is walkable distance to BTS and there are a lot of street food. Overall convenient location and really value location. Can’t complain anything. Thank you Paw.
etwas laut, da mitten in der stadt. Aber sehr zu empfehlen für junge leute!
highly recommend 👌
really good place, had a good stay
Great stay

The host is nice and friendly and the place is 2mins walk from bts
which is very convenient. The room is also tidy. I would recommend people to stay here.
Very convenient everything with walking distance
Best host in Hyde 11 :) house matched description and photos, well enough for 1-2 person. Amazing view.

Все отлично, квартира полностью соответствует описанию и фотографиям. Она находится в закрытом кондо, дома стоят квадратом, там очень спокойно. Отличный тихий чистый бассейн с местом для маленьких детей 0,5м и для взрослых 1,2м. Есть спортзал, сауны, 4 кафе на территории. От трассы рядом ночью сильный шум, но к нему привыкаешь, а если закрыть окно то полная тишина.
Не оставляйте окна открытыми на ночь, огромное количество москитов. Включайте кондиционер в гостиной и откройте двери в спальнях, так можно спать.
Рядом есть 7/11 до него 5 минут пешком и рынок 10 минут пешком. Но советую доставку grab, фрукты воду и продукты там брать удобнее.
방콕 장기여행자에게 추천합니다. 주변에 BTS역이 있습니다. 오토바이 택시를 이용하면 저렴하고 편리하게 역과 집을 왕복할 수 있습니다. 수영장과 피트니스 센터 컨디션도 훌륭합니다. 다만 방음이 조금 아쉬운데 주변 이웃들 모두 조용하고 예의있는 분들이라서 여행자만 주의를 요하면 될거 같습니다. 주방과 세탁기 모두 완벽하게 완비되어있어서 좋았습니다.
Good
Very clean. Very convenient. Good location. Very good

房间干净整洁，外面重新装修让人焕然一新。
房东人很好，响应及时，发消息及时回复，房间里没有玻璃杯我告诉他了，她马上送达（即使房源没有写明提供）只要有需求她都会及时耐心的解答，这个床睡的很舒服，房间也很安静，非常感谢提供那么舒适和优惠的房源下次还会来
Amazing stay
Great location! Awesome host and a nicely cleaned apartment with a washing machine too.
非常棒～ 很宽敞，空间很大。每天都有早餐送到房间。遇到问题也会及时解决，已推荐给朋友。
Lovely place and will definitely come back.  Stella was a great host.

The place, in general, was ok.
However, the tap in one of the bathroom’s sink was loose. And we saw small cockroaches? around..
perfect
Recommended

Our stay went without any glitches. We were well taken care of and the condo was as advertised  and service was excellent .Any concern was addressed immediately .
Top, rien à redire je recommande

The room is perfect, it has everything you need, the location is great, there are shops and a supermarket nearby, the neighbourhood is quiet and safe. The internet in the room is very good, I was working from there for a few days and it worked perfectly.
Marc is a super host, very responsive, flexible and makes sure everything is well and that you are enjoying your stay. I had an emergency due to a cancelled flight and he helped me with everything and super quickly, thank you very much Mark!
I highly recommend this place!
Good place to stay

We stayed as a couple for 3 nights while in Bangkok. Great stay at Curry’s place, with the spectacular 33rd floor pool being a real highlight. Curry communicated brilliantly with us for a smooth first Airbnb stay. The check in key is just around the corner from the apartment, with clear instructions on how to access. The apartment itself was exactly as described; modern, clean, comfortable and reasonably well located. We spent a lot of time in central and Grab taxis were a cheap and easy way of travelling around. The air conditioning is ideal after a day in the city humidity. Overall, enjoyed the stay and would recommend this apartment for affordable luxury.

公寓其实很好找，而且打的（用Grab）直接就可以到民宿门口。刚开始以为外面那么多车会很吵 但其实并没有 很安静。离7-11很近也很方便，但是就是离BTS蛮远的不过也还好打的很方便。这次来旅行之前同行的一个朋友脚受伤了，问房东能不能帮忙租轮椅居然也租到了！真的很意外～人在国外能在需要的时候伸出援手真的很暖心。房间虽然不大但是格调很舒服。我最爱餐桌那部分 又大又宽敞。感觉很适合两人以上一起来住～民宿离Siam商圈也很近 要买买买真的很方便呢～

This is the second time that we stayed at Napa‘s place during our visit to Bangkok. We felt like home and Napa was very responsive, helping us to orient ourselves in the apartment.
We also enjoyed the proximity to Chinatown & the Chulalongkorn area with their excellent and diverse culinary scene!
Nice place. Spacious. Nice pool. Good location. I would stay here again.
À

Wir waren für zwei Nächte bei Rachel. Es war sehr gut. Ein Lift für unsere Koffer (und uns und eine Katze), saubere und gut eingerichtete Zimmer. Sie war beim CheckIn und CheckOut vor Ort und stand für Fragen jederzeit zur Verfügung.
Das Frühstück vor Ort ist der Wahnsinn. Ich kann Rachel und ihr Mooncome Homestay nur empfehlen. Für meine Tochter waren die Katzen das Highlight :)

Although we never got to meet Pundh in person, he was very great to us during our trip. He gave very simple instructions for finding the hotel and check-in. Also, he responded to our emails quickly as we did not have a working phone number.

His condo was just like the pictures. Cozy, but beautiful and clean. The view was outstanding! Location was solid as there were many street shops and food close by and the BTS station was very close as well. The laundry unit was extremely convenient for us! Overall, it was a great experience.

Tara’s place is located in a quiet neighbourhood and very accessible to BTS station too, it’s around 5min walk only. There’s a couple of 7-11 close by too, one being approx 1 min walk from the building. There’s also a pharmacy and a small morning market (you can buy fresh soy milk, fresh cut fruits and bbq meat) around 10 min away.
The place is clean and just enough for 1-2 people. There’s enough space to open one large luggage, you can open 2 but will be a bit tight. I appreciate the free water bottles in the fridge. I like that there’s a balcony too.
I checked in quite late but it was easy to do it with the security guard around. I loved my stay here. I recommend her place.

Super fin bolig! Meget nem og behagelig kommunikation og tydelig instruktion. Boligen var ren og der var god plads. Området er godt hvis man vil udforske forskellige markeder og templer. Lokal stretfood tilgængelig!
Der kan være støj fra gaden, men værten har lagt ørepropper til os.

LIKE THIS ROOM VERY MUCH!! The host come to pick us from the nearby BTS station and tell us how walk to the good restaurant. You can find all kind of things you need in this room
The swimming pool is sooooo beautiful!
And there are many famous bars near this room ,only need few minutes to walk there!
Well placed and affordable 🫶🏽

Firstly, I'd like to point out that this isn't a place hosted by an individual, it is most likely run by the management of the building. The building is similar to a hotel yet somehow still residential. You check in at the front desk in the 'lobby'. For some reason the 'host' didn't book our reservation with the front desk so there were minimal complications checking in though this ended up in a free upgrade to a much bigger room. The place was absolutely huge! It's like an enormous apartment. Note though that the place is really old and you will be able to tell via the musty, dingy odors and worn out, old, stained furniture. The place was fine but it was a bit creepy just because it was so outdated and spacious. Location wise it is quite a central place to stay in; a 10-15min drive from all the big malls in Siam (Siam Center, Siam Discovery, Siam Paragon, MBK), 10-15min drive from Central World, and the Big C. There is also a nearby BTS (subway) station though my family of 5 and I just took taxis/ubers as it was more economical. The beds were comfortable though it looked like there were some old stains on the duvet covers. The bathrooms weren't bad either, they were clean and quite modern. All in all, it was a convenient place just for one night but I certainly wouldn't stay here again.

The house was nice and quite spacious, with well-utilized rooms that made it feel cozy and comfortable. The location was great if you prefer to stay away from heavy traffic, though being right on the main road did make it a bit noisy at times. The photos matched the property overall, though the place looked a little bigger in the pictures than in real life.
The common area was a nice touch with a foosball table and a combined air hockey/pool table. Unfortunately, a few items were missing or broken — the pool cue was damaged, and the air hockey disc and foosball ball weren’t available. The downstairs bathroom door didn’t fully close, which was slightly uncomfortable since it was located near the living room. Also, only one out of four downlights in that area was working, making it a bit dim at night.
Aside from those small issues, the house had a nice, modern touch especially for a typical Thai townhouse setup and worked well for a comfortable short stay.

Conveniently located near the BTS, the apartment offers easy access to transportation and a plethora of dining options, enhancing our overall experience.

It is a very short walk to the BTS and there are some good street food options around the station. Although it is quite distant from the main downtown area it was surprisingly quick to get anywhere using a combination of public transportation and Grab. I had an amazing stay at this Airbnb in Bangkok! The location couldn’t have been better—super convenient, just a short walk to the BTS Skytrain, making it so easy to get around the city. ( They also offer a free drop off service to nearby Station)The apartment itself was exactly what I was hoping for: clean, comfortable, and equipped with everything I needed. The amenities were top-notch.What really made my stay stand out, though, was the host. They were incredibly responsive, and proactive answering all my questions quickly and making sure I had everything I needed to enjoy my time in Bangkok. I felt well taken care of the entire time! I highly recommend this place for anyone visiting the city—great location, great host, and a fantastic space. I would definitely stay here again!

La maison est placée en plein centre du vieux Bangkok, à distance de marche (15 minutes à peine) de tous les temples les plus importants. Elle est située dans une rue très typique et entourée de voisins adorables. Un marché est situé juste en bas, c’est très sympa et vous avez un petit supermarché très pratique ouvert 24 heures sur 24 et 7 jours sur 7 pour acheter tout ce dont vous avez besoin. La maison est meublée avec un grand goût, les chambres sont spacieuses, très bien climatisées et il y a 3 salles de bains et 3 WC. La salle à manger et le salon sont très agréables également, même si nous n’y sommes pas restés longtemps car nous avions beaucoup de visites à faire dans Bangkok! Vraiment le rapport qualité-prix est imbattable et l’hôte est si gentil et réactif… il nous avait laissé pleins de bonnes choses à grignoter et des boissons dans le réfrigérateur.
Vous pouvez réserver ce logement sans réserve, car je ne pense pas qu’il en existe beaucoup de ce type dans le vieux Bangkok!

This was hands down the best part of our entire stay in Bangkok. The place was exactly as it was advertised. Everything looked so beautiful and clean. This is well worth the price. Thank you so much for the great stay!

Molly’s Airbnb apartment was an absolute delight! The space is big, spacious, and spotlessly clean, just as described in the listing. The apartment itself is exactly like the pictures—modern, cozy, and welcoming. The big TV, comfortable couch, and huge bed made it feel like a home away from home. Everything about the space is designed for comfort, and you can tell Molly has put thought into making her guests feel at ease. I wouldn’t hesitate to stay here again or recommend it to anyone looking for a wonderful Airbnb experience!

Positives:
- Major: Great location, right beside the MRT in Asok. Really nice building. I love it.
- Major: Suite is in good condition. Sofa bed is very usable.
- Moderate: Nice amenities on 35th including gym and swimming pool. Nice lobby.
Negatives:
- Major: Hospitality of the host isn’t high. Host messaged and insisted multiple times for me to arrive at 2pm sharp for check-in. I did. His staff was 46 minutes late. Asked about general maid service and unclogging shower drain, and was told to clean it myself. Asked about improving wifi speed — go buy a SIM card yourself. The existing wifi is very slow and throttled (roughly 4.5 Mbps). (I know the listing says wifi is not included, but this really is important in 2024, especially in a city!) During the day, you often lose all connection for 5-15 seconds, which disrupts video calls.
- Minor: In room lighting is really dim at night. Main table is a bit short — imagine a high coffee table height.
The rooftop pool was one of the highlights of our trip and was a perfect ending to out holiday. Beats any hotel in that price range!

it was very close to the subway station, and the space was clean and cozy.

there are little noise in night time cause this apartment is on a high floor.

There are mom/pop restaurants downstairs, coffee shops (I really liked Mahasan), laundromats, massage shops, and 7-11 stores downstairs for your convenience. The train station is a 5 minute walk, which you can use to reach the more touristy places in Bangkok. There's also a small night market about 10 minutes away where you can buy thai food for cheap.
The only con to me was the bed. It got a little uncomfortable for me and gave me back pains in the morning. But besides that, I definitely recommend!

This is the perfect place for a couple or small family. The house was immaculate, fully stocked with everything you need. The living and dining area is big enough to entertain friends. Internet is fast and you can work on either level. There's a 7-11, gym laundry and wonton mee shop, all within a 1-minute walk.
If there's any downside, it is the location, it's about 30 30-minute drive to the Sukhumvit area and 15 minutes to Iconsiam. However, ride-hailing and taxis are affordable in Bangkok and there are rarely traffic jams around this area, unlike Sukhumvit.
A nearby BTS station takes you directly to Silom and Siam Paragon.
It's the perfect Airbnb and you'll never want to leave. We will be back soon.

I was pursuing the Cambridge CELTA certificate at IH Bangkok located at Silom Road. As Silom is an area well-known for expensive acommodation, I decided to try AirBnB.

I would like to thank Evan for making my first AirBnB experience an excellent one! On the first night, I was still trying to settle in and didn't know where to eat at, so I casually asked Evan if he would like to have dinner together, and so he brought me to a small air-conditioned Thai restaurant nearby; I guess I must have mentioned many times that it was extremely hot and humid in Bangkok, compared to Singapore! I appreciate the gesture. :)

The rooftop room was generally quiet and had lots of privacy, which was very conducive for my CELTA studies -- I passed with a very good report; on the other hand, I could contact Evan via WhatsApp any time if I needed anything.

The listing description is accurate: the room is well-kept and brightly lit; the air-conditioner works very well which is important since it gets unbearably hot and humid in the months of April and May; it is really a no-frills home stay, so it felt like I was staying with house mates rather than other guests. It is not shown in this picture, but the room has an additional sofa between the small table and fridge, which was great as I could put my school bag on it or just sit on it instead of having to sit on the bed all the time.

The neighbourhood has many shops and a 7-11 convenience store around the bend. I was able to buy a rash cream in the nearby pharmacy, change my money at the nearby money exchange for a good rate, and eat good Thai food along the main street or the soi for my lunch/dinner/supper; it is a 10-minute walk to Lumphini MRT; there are many motorcycle taxis around so I was never late for school. To my pleasant surprise, I found out that my fellow course mates from another country were also staying at Evan's adjacent house, so it was nice to have some company.

Would I stay in this rooftop room again in future? Yes, definitely. I had plenty of fun playing with Evan's pets after a long day of school: 3 huge yet tame huskies Syrup, Sugar and Cereal; peering into his fish tank with 3 lobsters and other fishes; feeding his sugar gliders.

The apartment was very clean and had everything needed for a comfortable stay. The main advantage is the condo itself — great facilities including a swimming pool, spa, gym, and a co-working area. Schöne Wohnung mit schöner Aussicht.

Lage trotz Sukhumvit etwas weiter vom Geschehen weg. Aber ist kein Problem gewesen.
แนะนำเลยครับ ใกล้ mrt เดินทางสะดวก ห้องพักสะอาด อุปกรณ์อำนวยความสะดวกครบ

The place is immaculately clean. Bedrooms are very spacious. The location is in a great neighborhood, peaceful surroundings. The pictures do not give justice to the unit. However, there should be extra toilet papers in the bathrooms. Also, the a/c in the downstairs bedroom isn’t working which is my fault that I didn’t notify the host. Overall, it was a perfect place for my group.
A great place for those wanting a quieter location. Free to access to the bike made traveling around Bangkok great fun.
Honestly, I booked for the location but ended up loving the bed the most. So soft, clean, and cozy, keep it up Tak 👍🏻

I booked a four days stay at Supapens’ apartment and our stay was awsome. The place is as is from what is posted on her page, clean and sparkling white. I felt like everything are all new. It was 20-30mins drive by taxi from dmk airport and 10-15mins walk from suthisan metro. While walking to the metro you can find some thai streetfoods from the neighborhood which you can enjoy.
With regards to the host, Supapen was so helpful in every bits and pieces you need. She provided everything we needed from street maps to tourist attractions and markets we have to visit. She even dropped our cousins to the metro station. We felt like no strangers to her. Best thing is she responds quickly to any messages or questions you sent to her.
Love the place and the host. We enjoyed our stay here and will definitely book again this place if we have to go back to bangkok. I highly recommend this place.
非常赞的住宿！ 太喜欢，管家很贴心，总是会想得先人一步。有可爱的小狗小猫，有绿植有美餐，就是略远了一些，不过交通还算便利。下次到曼谷一定还来！
คุณแตงโมน่ารักมาก เหมือนเพื่อน คอยให้คำแนะนำอยู่เสมอ

This place is an amazing stay and looks better than the photos. It is located in a good location surrounded by grocery stores and restaurants. You also not to far from Kamala beach. The inside was very comfortable and had everything that you would need. The pool and outside areas were nice places to lounge after a long day of exploring. Definitely highly recommend this stay.

Loved the place,
Keep the keycard with you at all times, without it you're nothing here
Pool, gym, social club is amazing but only available from 6am to 10pm everyday
Will come again for sure

Alles war super die Kommunikation einwandfrei
Falls es Fragen gab kam sofort eine Antwort ich würde jederzeit wiederkommen

This is my favorite and my only place I stay any time when I come to Bangkok. Needless to say how great the place is and Kobkul deserve to be the super host. Kobkul is the real Bangkokain, she knows Bangkok inside out. She helped me with many things beyond just being the host.

Усюди таргани. У квартирі і в коридорі таргани. Я надіслала фото і відео з тарганами усередині й поза, господарка сказала піти мені придбати спрей проти тарганів. Варто розуміти, що таргани були й великі, й маленькі, вони там живуть й розмножуються. Я була на межі істерики. Написала у підтримку з усіма фото/відео, вони повернули усі кошти, але господарка за 2-3 години проведені в її квартирі – поки вирішувалося питання з підтримкою – захотіла оплату за першу ніч. На наступний день вона написала мені з проханням поставити їй 5 зірок, а вона поставить мені. Я настільки шокована цим досвідом, що у мене немає слів
Great location nice house
适合一群朋友出行居住的房子，房东回复及时并友善
It was nice place and close to everything
这次来泰国体验感最好的一家民宿！老板一家非常亲切。因为我们到的特别早，没到check in的时间，但老板还是让我们先去洗澡放松一下。还为我们准备了现做的饮品和泰式甜品小蛋糕。下次来曼谷也一定会选择的一家民宿。强烈推荐！！
Het was fantastisch
Nice little place cheap and good location

Extremely hospitable and friendly person. Apartment just as in the picture, amazing view from the balcony and the rooftop. 3 minutes to 7eleven and 5 to bts station, about 30 minutes by walk to Bangkok’s centre. Definitely recommending!
房东很热情，帮助我们很多。感觉挺安全的，有个大门，里面有好几栋房子，进出都要锁门。民宿位置也挺好的，路口那有个711，早餐都是在那解决的。遇见的泰国人都很热情☺️

What a great place to stay, super comfortable place which was great for us, the location is awesome, only 10 mins from the BTS if you walk, or 3 mins on the motorbike. The condo is very quiet but outside there are so many places to ear, local Thai places to eat from noodles, 7/11 and fruit shops. The bedding was very comfortable and the entertainment with the Tv was excellent as well as the Wifi. A great stay, l will be back!
Nice stay and location. No issues.

Cool little flat in brand new building with outstanding common facilities (roof top garden, large swimming pool, gym, sauna) in very good location (near Skytrain station). The young couple who owns the flat were excellent hosts: Marek was waiting for us in the street when we came, Rinrat helped us get a taxi when we left.

Lertrit / Jack was very responsive and helpful. My sister and I arrived at around 12nn. We communicated this earlier with Jack and he was kind enough to let us check in earlier than 2pm. The room and toilet were clean. Set of keys were provided - one for the gate, main door and the room, and it also has this thing that needs to be inserted to power up the electricity in the room. There is no fridge in the room but it's fine. The room is just right for 1-2 pax. The place is near and walkable to Chao Phraya, Khao San Road and other restos and 711 stores. It is located in a quiet neighborhood, just a few steps from the main road. Overall, the place is good and the host is very kind and accommodating. Will definitely recommend this place!
It is a great, clean and comfortable apartment. Frank was very helpful and responsive for any questions. I would recommend this apartment.

We stayed at Billy & Vickie's place for 5 days. The apartment is clean and comfortable to stay in Bangkok. The amenities are sufficient for staying for days in Bangkok. The check-in process is flexible and they provide clear instructions to get to the apartment.
是一次很好的体验，可以考虑入住哦
beautiful.  everything was super easy
Excellent

I have no complaints. The place was so nice and squeaky clean, not to mention the hosts - Nat & Noi - who were so, so wonderful! They were both very friendly and sweet youd feel like you are staying at your friend’s house.
很舒服的小院，非常宁静和舒适，房东很友好，不提供免费清洁房间和洗衣服服务，有洗衣服需要可以使用民宿的洗衣机投币清洗，房源距离火车站很近，方便乘坐火车前往机场各地，再次感谢招待🩷🩷
とても綺麗で快適に過ごせました。生活の中で困ったことがあった時にすぐに対応してくださりとてもありがたかったです。また利用したいと思います。

amazing stay I loved the condo and the facilities were great! Nice gym lovely pool. very good communication with the host they were very responsive and quick too deal with any issues I had which were few. I highly recommend this condo too anyone who wants too stay in that area.
Ligger nära 7-11 avstånd 4 minuter att tar promenad. 5 minuter till sky trains. Rummet är rent och fräscht. Trevlig kommunikation med lätt att komma i kontakt.
Alles Super, genau wie beschrieben.

Great place in a great location. My daughter loved the pool. Unfortunately we were there soon after the earthquake and only one of the three lifts to the 16th floor was working...a serious amount of waiting around ensued.

Hôte très serviable et accueillant. Appartement bien situé avec de nombreuses aménités. Le barman du rooftop est excellent qui plus est !

Being on the top floor, it’s also very quiet.
The only suggestion I have is that a longer bed with a thicker mattress would make the stay even more comfortable.

Our stay was truly wonderful ! Amazing views of Chao phraya from rooftop pool and gym  Transportation accessing anywhere in the city and dining all within a short walk. My host was always responsive to any needs and a pleasure to rent from .. bldg and location top notch! 🙏🏻

Good location. Walking distance to Restaurants, Malls and nearest BTS station

Great stay. Same like what they wrote in the description.

Ace was very responsive. We had a pleasant stay. The bath is a bit small and dated but really no complains , it worked well for us .. it was heartwarming to see other tourists with kids coz we really were looking for a kid friendly place that would be clean . We were happy to see clean crisp sheets on the bed, house was clean with all the amenities we needed. . We felt safe and the best part about this place is the proximity to the bts ! It was our daily escape above the Bangkok traffic - peak convenience ! Would recommend this stay to anyone looking for a family friendly environment with proximity to the bts
我是一个人入住，房间什么都挺好的，唯一缺陷的是没有牙膏需自备，小区附近就有711和familymarket买东西很方便，而且小区离商场很近，走路只需要十分钟，就有很大的商场和超市，奢侈品和护肤品都有很全，商场四楼就是泰国bnk的剧场，所以人多很热闹
Great Host And Great Place ,  very recommended to who want to stay at here

Overall, property is as pictured. Modern and with all facilities. Except for some minor issues with regards to the bad stench from one of the bathrooms. Location is good, except that it’s not very easy to locate for first time. Need to have driver speak to host on exact location.
recommend

这间公寓最棒的优点就是位置极优，位于曼谷老城区中心，步行几分钟到达各个景点和码头可以坐船。房东非常nice,很好沟通，回复迅速，餐厅的员工也很热情给了很多帮助。旁边的餐厅饭菜很好吃 味美价廉。唯一不足的就是公寓窗户靠马路，而曼谷太多摩托车了，发动机发出的噪音非常大，几乎整晚都在吵，睡觉会受到干扰，房东给了耳塞可以缓解，但是介意噪音的人士请慎重选择。
Nice stay, clean and spacious. good location. easy to check in
Good view of trees from living room. Peaceful environment and good equipped kitchen. Responsive host.

This apartment was perfect for our short stay in Bangkok, easy to walk to the MRT train which can get you to where you want to go. Food options i walking distance, if you don’t need to stay right in the centre then this place is perfect

We had an amazing stay at Jack's property. Everything was exactly as shown in the listing, clean, comfortable, and well-maintained. The location was great, and the check-in process was smooth and hassle-free. Jack was a wonderful host, responsive and helpful throughout our stay. We truly enjoyed our time here and would highly recommend this property to anyone visiting the area. Thank you, Jack, for a fantastic experience!
Great apartment, right in the centre of Sukhumvit, very easy to access public transport. The apartment itself was very clean and modern, and very spacious. Thanks!

it was a nice stay but most importantly the host was very friendly and cooperative,  whenever you need something she responds very quickly.  Really appreciated her efforts making things right and helping whenever needed.
항상 머물고 있는 곳입니다.

一定一定要google ELIO XXX（房东给的长串信息里面好像有），千万不要相信大谷的定位，给我定到街对面10分钟路程的地方去了。旁友要自备毛巾，牙刷哦（出去住那么些天，我就当大家都会带了（ '▿ ' ）），房间里面还有电饭煲，咖啡机，简易桌子，衣架。楼下出门右拐有24小时超市，还有，门卫小姐姐小哥哥好像不懂英语（妈呀，我的手语不及格），高高瘦瘦有点黑黑的小哥哥会一点点。但素！！他们都很热情！最后，最近附近在施工，略微有点吵，但是睡着了就什么都不知道了。哈哈哈

We had a lovey stay. The apartment is very clean and comfortable, exactly as described. The pool and gym available are fantastic. Jason and Somza are very responsive and accommodating hosts, we would definitely stay here again.

Really nice place and sparkling clean! It was a little hidden making it harder to reach but close enough to the city that you can still get around.

Brought a large group of family to stay together for their first time in Bangkok and they loved the location as it was easy access to places. They loved how it was designed and had large spaces. And the hosts were great as always!

The location and interior of the accommodation were truly top-notch. With just a bit more attention to cleanliness, I believe it could easily become one of the best places to stay. Thanks to the kind and responsive host, we didn’t experience any major inconveniences.
Lovely room and great location

We’ve been here for three nights and it has been amazing! Lertrit it’s very kind and friendly, the room was clean and the neighborhood it’s quiet. There’s also, in case you need something in the middle of the night, a 7Eleven right nearby.
Thank you again so much for everything! :)

We had a great time at your house. The decoration was very classic. We even did some photos shooting there and it was a wonderful place for our photographer. Dream is very helpful and always reply messages on time. About fifteen minutes’ walk away from the airport.

Shin’s place was great and close to a lot of things to do in the Sukhumvit area. Despite its proximity to the huddle and bustle of Sukhumvit, Shin’s place is really quiet. It also had great amenities (gym and pool), which I used. It is a bit farther from attractions like temples (e.g., 20 min drive in light traffic), but it’s easy to catch the train or take a Grab (the local Uber). I’d recommend staying here!
Excellent, with an unbeatable location.  Highly recommended.
Logement situé dans un quartier très animé, facile pour se déplacer avec le tram pas loin
We needed place for a night only, to catch tomorrows flight. The service you get for thie price you pay is outstanding. just go for it!!! Thanks really recomended!!! A+++++

Mt’s place is really incredible. All amenities are there as described. The location is very convenient. Just a few minutes walk from train station and also have shuttle car. Jodd fair is just below. Overall, we satisfied on our stay and definitely come back next year.

Проживали в квартире 1,5 месяца и остались довольны. Хороший дом, расположение (рядом много магазинов, рынков, есть торговый центр  и близко до метро и автобусов). Хозяин оперативно отвечал на все вопросы и помогал. Спасибо!

Wunderschön eingerichtetes Appartement in sehr guter Lage, prima Zugang zu öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln.
Perfektes einchecken, sehr netter Kontakt. Wir hatten eine tolle Zeit, vielen Dank für den Café und die Aufbewahrung unseres Gepäckes.
다 편하고 좋았어요 약간 중심가에선 멀지만 좋았어요^^

This apartment was perfectly located for getting around Bangkok.  The space was clean and comfortable, and it was very convenient receiving water bottles everyday.   The pool was great for cooling off.  Highly recommend staying here!
good location, taxi everywhere, the only thing is at night still the sound of motorcycle 🏍  or car still keep moving around our ears... everything else all good.

A very nice place and totally worth the price. The receptionist is extremely kind, friendly, and helpful. The apartment is amazingly clean with almost all the necessary amenities, the kitchen utensils and appliances are pretty basic though, so it might not be suitable for you if you plan to cook some serious meals that need a lot of stuff. The hotel is quite near to the BTS station, there is also free tuktuk service that take you near the station and you'll need to work about 3 more minutes. Fairly speaking, it is not the best location since you almost always have to transfer when travelling by bts to different places, but compared to the price, that seems totally reasonable. All in all, I would highly recommend this place. One small tip: if you wanna find something nearby to try for your breakfast, besides the 711, there is this cart at the head of the alley that has amazing Thai noodles/rice noodles with soup!
I had a good stay here!
房东人挺好，我们退房耽搁了时间，房东也是耐心等着没有不高兴不耐烦的表情。房间挺大，微波炉，冰箱，沐浴露洗发水等生活用品房间都有，且免费的。楼下一百米左右一边一家711便利店。交通方便，走几百米可以坐公交船去闹市区，但是感觉河水有点脏也有点危险。坐曼谷的空帖和地铁不是太方便。我们四个人出门一般就打车。

離BTS很近 步行五分鐘內可以抵達 交通方便！

很棒，跟照片看起來一樣，很特別的樓梯，很適合年輕一點的遊客，就在地鐵站旁邊，晚上房間很chill很有感😊
除了房间小点，其他没毛病，在就定的人决定好，房间真的小，而且多一个人还会一天收你200株，我们4天交了800，一个没发票的收费，合理下来房间也不便宜了，跟200多的酒店无异，所以，住的人思考好再付款吧，一旦付款，有问题的话房东不会回复了都

Sujira's apartment is superb and her Housekeeper is a Lady and very helpful.
10/10.

This area is great for families. The flat has signs of age and being well used, but is also very convenient for families and has everything you would need. We would definitely stay there again. The host was easy to communicate with and helpful.

Will totally recommend this place to friends and family☺️❤️ Keep it up a good work team, every thing just lovely as its in the photos. We can’t wait to be back!

Five stars stay! The apartment was sparkling clean, photos are accurate, absolutely comfortable, beautiful and well conserved. Location is very convenient,  plenty of markets and restaurants. Overall good experience staying at this place, the hosts have been easy to communicate with and very responsive.

非常棒的民宿，老板有问必答。。。房间非常干净，住的很舒服

Everything was fantastic at this apartment.  The air conditioning worked amazing which was important since it was very hot.  Everything g worked great and the bed was so comfortable!  It’s close to so many great restaurants and shopping. The washer works super well and the fans from the air conditioner units outside dries the clothes very fast. This is a great stay!

Thong is very helpful and waited for me at the lobby to help and explain the checkin process, making it seamless and easy. The apartment has everything I needed, location was great, security is awesome, very near to night markets and also a quick 5-10mins bike ride to Big C Supercenter Ratchadamri, will come back again if I'm traveling to Bangkok alone!

Thank you Bee for the wonderful accommodation. Your place is awesome! We appreciate your guidance and your little surprise for us. We are definitely recommending your place to our friends. 👍

Great location and very responsive host. Meet our requirements as a family of 4 ( 2 adults and 2 kids).
Very nice unit for the price. Great location, spacious and comfortable. Had a little glitch checking in but N'Dee was very quick to respond and got me in with very little delay. Would stay again.

I enjoyed Sujira’s place, I had to work during weekdays and the place had everything I needed. Especially the big monitor was very helpful for me to work with and watch Netflix after work :)
The location is not in the center but quiet and BTS station is walkable. There are many cafes and small local restaurants around the place.
Also there’s a nice local night market by 3 mins walk and this place is not even on Google map. I was able to enjoy many different Thai food with amazing price.

Such a quaint & homey place. Do note that it’s 4 stories for those with lots of  luggages & bad knees. Initially it was v hard to locate on the map as the small road is not accessible by car. But the community there is so friendly, they helped us find the exact house. The home itself is super clean and filled with lots of love & memories. You will feel absolutely at home! All the rooms are super big & clean. The market below is a major plus and there’s lots of nice eateries around. I’ve been to Bangkok more than 20 times and this is one of the most memorable places I’ve stayed in.

Very clean modern apartment, excellent view, great location in that pleasant locality which is away from the City Centre, it has many choices for cafes restaurants, bars, shops.

GT's apartment met my expectations and given the price it's a real value. nicer condos are offered on Airbnb but for much higher price. I found the location to be great. 2nd time staying here at the apartment, The Mansion, Great Location near BTS Ploen Chit station, close to attravtions near Nana area, arab, indian, halal food, money changers. Conveniently close to BTS station. One who likes street food can find several stalls on the Soi. The apartment is quite and seems secure.

This downtown Bangkok apartment is a gem! Perfectly situated, it's just a 5-minute cab ride from three major malls and has easy access to groceries. The one-bedroom unit is clean and comfortable, truly a home away from home.
The complex boasts multiple buildings, each with its own gym and Olympic-size pool – a luxury for fitness enthusiasts. The warm, friendly staff and attentive landlord went above and beyond to ensure my stay was perfect.
If you're looking for a central location with top-notch amenities and a personal touch, this is the place. Highly recommended for anyone wanting to experience the best of Bangkok!
Great room and helpful receptionists!
位置非常好，房间十分干净，离地铁站近，我预定的房间再五楼，非常私密，独享整个五楼空间，值得推荐。

We couldn’t have had a better experience staying in Praravatee 's apartment! Located right in the heart of Thonglor, it’s surrounded by shops, cafés, and restaurants. Despite being in such a vibrant area, the apartment itself felt like a peaceful home away from home.
It was spotlessly clean, with fresh towels and bedding that made us feel instantly comfortable. We really appreciated the thoughtful extras—cases of water, tissues, toilet rolls—all the little things that make a big difference when you’re traveling.
My favourite feature was the almost floor-to-ceiling windows in every room which made the apartment feel so open.
Praravatee is so friendly, helpful, and genuinely welcoming. You can tell they really care about their guests' experience.
Highly recommend this place, and I’ll definitely be staying here again the next time I’m in Bangkok!
Very lovely

It was a very good experience and was like home with all the necessities. Pornchai’s place had all things necessary to make it feel like we were having a vacation at home. He is also very easy to reach and responsive.

The restaurant by the canal also has WiFi, nice food for reasonable prices and a laundry area. All the people in the neighbourhood were very quiet and very nice to us, we really felt at home for a few days!

One of the best Airbnbs I’ve stayed in while in Bangkok. The apartment sits in a high‑quality residential complex of three buildings, with excellent facilities — a full gym, a huge pool, co‑working areas, and everything kept in great condition. The neighborhood is a real Thai area with very few tourists, which I loved. It’s far from the sleazy side of Bangkok and feels genuinely local.
Security is top‑notch: you need a magnetic card to access the lift area and move around the building. The location is also super convenient — walking distance to the MRT, two shopping malls, and there’s even a 7‑Eleven right outside.
The apartment itself is on the 15th floor and looks exactly like the photos. Well‑equipped kitchen, fast Wi‑Fi, washing machine, strong A/C, and a very comfortable bed with good pillows and quality linens. I honestly wish I could have stayed longer. Highly recommended.
The place is amazing, the view is great. Totally recommended
Everything ok, self checkin without any problems, nice and spacy flat for 4 people. Chonny was still communicating, I would choose the accomodation again:)
Good value, well located and a helpful and efficient host.
J’ai passé un excellent séjour! Le logement est calme et spacieux, et est très bien situé à proximité du quartier chinois.

Hi Yimmy,
many thanks for welcoming me and my friends to your humble abode. we will definitely consider rebooking when we visit Bangkok again.
Ed place was very accommodating and clean. It was close to all the fun night spots in the area. A short walk to the Nana BTS. Ed responded very quickly on any questions I had.

The place is as described and located well within the neighbourhood. Food, drinks, convenience stores and massage parlours are all within walkable distances. Maybe just a note that it has stairs up second floor so maybe not as friendly for elders with knee problems. The host is really friendly and responsive to our needs. He even go out of the way to recommend us food places :) he also accommodated to our late check out timing due to our flight delay. Definitely a 5 star stay in BKK 👍🏼
Great place to stay close to the airport. Rooftop restaurant/cannabis shop is great, staff is very kind and welcoming. Thai massage place right next to the hotel is very good too.
Lovely place! Very quiet at night and the location is just perfect! The room is super clean and cozy. Jeeranan was such a nice host and she really helped me a lot!

Gross. Absolutely unlike photos in every way. Black mold in shower. Sticky countertops. Pubic hair on sheets. Food in micro. Loud construction. Grime around tub. Dirty floors. No soap. Poop stain on bathrobe. Visible raised scum on bathroom counter. Kitchen not remotely stocked. Actual food on silverware and plates in cupboards. Different furniture than pics. Dust and hair around baseboards. Illegal Airbnb. Dangerous after dark. Extra door lock won’t engage. Many pictured facilities unavailable. But mostly, hosts who won’t take ownership of misrepresentation. I’ve never complained, never left a bad review. We even offered to clean the place so we could stay and they rudely refused to let us access cleaning products. They blamed us for the grossness (we had been there 12 hours, long enough to sleep after 40 hours of travel). Never have I ever seen such a bait and switch. With a few photos, Airbnb refunded us and we left. What a learning experience.
Todo espectacular!! sin dudas volvería, tiene todas las comodidades que esperas fuera de tu casa, muy funcional, nuevo y bonito. recomendadisimo!
great location & helpful host

You cannot ask any better for the price you paid. It may be a bit far from the center of Bangkok.  But.the MRT station is 10 min walk and many grocery and restaurants around. The apartment is clean and equipped with all the amenities you need for the daily livings. Atikun was very responsive. He will answer your queries within a second. He is so reliable and kind.

The apartment offers enough space for 1-2 people. There's a comfortable bed, nice balcony and it's quiet during the day and in the night. Clean, no insects, strong AC so you don't feel the heat.
The WiFi works perfectly and the speed is fine for checking e-mail, writing blog and checking you social media accounts. If you need to upload videos, it will take longer, a couple of hours.
Wimonpak is nice and helpful, she gave me great directions how to get to the apartment from the airport by taxi or by train. I have come earlier than check-in time, but there was no problem: the staff from the building gave me the key and let me in.
The neighbourhood is real Bangkok, not the tourist side you might know after visiting Rambuttri Village and Khao San Road. Plenty of food on the streets, few tourists, lots of shops, old buildings, characteristic architecture, hard to find someone who speaks English but you'll be fine with using your hands and phone.
We stayed with Evan for 2 nights, I would recommend his place. The location was good and the room was clean and comfortable.
Great space and prompt communication.
The accommodation was very comfortable, clean and easy to navigate. Kate was very helpful and responsive as well.
Pawinee是个非常友善的房东  她妈妈也超级可爱 房子更是超乎预期的满意 走时小区帅气的小哥哥还免费送我去公交站  对我来说这里的回忆ahi wan m是完美的～

Hands down the best international Airbnb I have ever had thus far. Great for big groups. Nana Plaza and a train station are around the corner. The two ladies that clean and cooking breakfast are amazing. They will do everything in their power to make everyone feel at home and comfortable. Trust me, choose the Thai breakfast option and you will not regret it. Be ready to use a translation app to communicate with them though. I can’t see myself going back to Bangkok and not staying at this place.
很喜欢地上的那张床哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈
Stay is very beautiful, in a peaceful location. Lots of restaurants around. Had a great stay and May was helpful with everything, great host.

Great hostess, clean and homely apartment. Will definitely be booking again when back in Bangkok.

Not sure where the 5 star reviews are coming from as the room is old and tired.  The description says the room is 'lovely'..... it isn't.  Maybe it once was.  The sofa has collapsed and barely usable.  All of the furniture has seen better days.  Yes it's peaceful as it's in a side street with nothing of interest within walking distance although a short taxi will take you to more interesting places.   Parking in a challenge as there are way more cars than spaces! The good bits - The host was very good and responsive and even installed new wifi as the original was inadequate.  The bed was very comfortable.  The condo was a decent size.  Washing machine was good.  2 bathrooms useful.

Pros: the location is great. The condo is nice. Good smart tv. Great wifi. AC works perfectly. Close to the BTS and 2 nice malls with plenty of grocery stores and restaurants. Had an issue with bed and host helped. Unit and condo are very clean.
Cons: had some difficulty to communicate with the host. They're responsive, but I felt we did not understood each other 100% in chat more than once. Bed is very hard, and like some other furniture, it seems like it needs to be replaced. The unit itself is too small for two people. It's fine for one person though. The area itself is quiet at night, but unfortunately the apartment is not soundproof. I could hear a lot of noise from the near unit, they were always loud in the middle of the night. The condo itself is not a fan of Airbnb, there are signs against it. But if you book at least a month you should be OK. For ~1 month stay I spent 1.3k usd. I feel like it's a bit too much for this one. Overall I would say it's OK.

Tula's apartment ticks all the boxes; it has a great pool and gym, it's in a quiet neighbourhood with easy commuting either by boat or train at your front door, fabulous local restaurants and the Gateway Mall all within walking distance. To top it off, Tula is a wonderful host. We will definitely stay here again.

Had a great time staying here. They are great hosts and were very flexible & helpful. Always quick responses to any questions.
The location is great because you have easy access to all the transportation: BTS, River Boats, Buses etc. Also lots of good food options in the area.

Thank you Koko for the stay! It was a good location and very walkable to the mall. We were surprised at how hard the beds were but found out this is normal in Thailand :) so appreciate the experience. It would be nice in future to have an extension cord so the microwave can be plugged into the wall without putting it on the floor. The kids loved the pool and we would definitely return.
super einfache kommunikation, alles supi!:)
It was great! I’ll definitely stay here again
距离廊曼机场很近，房东人特别好，我们凌晨三点多到，房东耐心等待并接机，还送我们去711。附近两百米就有711便利店，总体非常好！推荐入住！

The house is conveniently located in China Town and close to subway station (on a lateral street, which is good, as you can have a hope of sleeping after midnight - the street has some bars and it is lively though). It is a place for design lovers rather than your typical accommodation in BKK. The house is restructured in a perfect way, keeps its original charm and atmosphere with doors and window frames. It was done with love for details and a sense of beauty. The bar next door worth being explored too. The terrace is a nice escape and we spend there the evenings hearing the city beat. Be aware though, that the windows are not isolated (bring earplugs in case you are sensitive) and also that the shower facilities are of an old house - drainage is slow and it might be a cumbersome to get yourself ready for the day. I believe that small improvements to this, could make the place an awesome spot.
All in all, I am happy with the choice I’ve made, as I was looking for a different place and we really enjoy the time there.
Boa localização, de preferência para estadias longas, pois o uso de área comuns para poucos dias é proibido. O apartamento é bem bom.
Nice place with great view. a few mini-markets around and supermarket - Lotus in 5-7 min walking. Also local restaurants arounds the place.

Ho soggiornato solo due notti e posso consigliare questo alloggio che si trova molto vicino alla fermata della BTS NANA...appartamento pulito e con tutto ciò che può servire per vivere anche più  giorni ...l'entrata con cucina e sofà  è  separato dalla camera buon funzionamento dell'aria condizionata ...il quartiere è frequentato da arabi  ...molto.vicino un supermercato con annesso.un ristorantino locale con ottima colazione europea e cibo thai a buon prezzo - c'è una lavatrice e un piccolo balcone non utilizzabile se non per stendere
