We had a nice stay at this apartment. Very clean and good communication.

I loved my stay while in Bangkok! The host was very accurate with the descriptions of the stay and was extremely helpful and able to respond quickly when I had questions, regardless of how simple or complicated my questions would be. I would come back!
Nice and clean place,  I definitely stay again if I came back to Bangkok.
Excelente qualidade-preço
Awesome stay

Fantastic apartment in a great location,  just 2 minute stroll to the skytrain. The apartment has everything - large,  comfortable bed,  cable TV,  wifi,  big bathroom with separate wet room,  kitchenette with dishwasher,  washing machine and dryer,  iron etc etc. The apartment is situated at the Hansar hotel,  which has a residential wing. The hotel amenities are free to use. A fantastic pool,  big enough to do laps,  and a well-equipped fitness centre. Andrew was so easy to deal with. I highly recommend this apartment

Pim's place is awesome, when you want to discover Bangkok individually. With the airport rail link in walking distance or 2 bus stops away, you can easily navigate through Bangkok. I also recommend to discover the area around the location for authentic food markets and shopping because it is not a touristic area and you can dip into the all-day life of Bangkok residents. Pim was a great host and easy to reach for any requests/questions. Recommendation!
Sutasinee非常善解人意一直用中文和我联系，热情为我解答问题，服务非常周到。公寓处于巷子深处，但位置地段还不错叫车也很方便，很不错的一次出行体验。

lovely spacious condo in a great location.
perfect communication from the hosts, Ruj.

Wonderful location & very safe studio. Many lovely street foods nearby.
charming decor shabby chic style very friendly staff and good security , nice pool / and gym and very clean.
非常に快適なステイを楽しむことができました。景色も良く清潔感もあり、素晴らしい時間を過ごすことができました。

This place is really bad and especially for that value.
We asked the host to give us an appartment as high as possible, we were ok with minimum 10-15 floor.
She told that have apartments that floor and that try to give as higher, and she didn’t tell what minimal floor she has.
In the day of arrival she gave us : 6 floor.
And in the day of arrival she wrote that the infinity rooftop pool is closed - so everything expected for this value is unavailable for us.
We were dissatisfied as we were expected for minimum 10 floor and rooftop pool - but both were not provided.
And host didn’t tell it before booking.
So I can’t recommend this have and this host .
Enjoyed my stay Cho's place. I really liked the atmosphere and the room was nice. Markets and coffee shops within walking distance. Great place!

매우 깨끗함
지하철역이 가까워서 이동이 수월
這次6個朋友來住！整體來說很不錯！只是最上面的房間冷氣有點難涼，要等他一下！這次的超級舒服，房間採光不錯！
Great host and good value apartment

Die Unterkunft war von Kim war super und hatte eine schöne Aussicht. Kim war jederzeit erreichbar und hat uns einen früheren Check-In ermöglicht.
Wir waren sehr zufrieden. Vielen Dank Kim!
Nice place to stay for a short stay in Bangkok !
Good value for money. best location if you want to visit grand palace area, a lot of good food. Patanee is also a great host. thanks for everything
説明も親切で、最高の宿でした。
comfortable retreat!
The layout of this room is my favorite. I travel alone in Thailand. This room makes me feel very warm and romantic. Suitable for a person to think and read. I hope I can come again next time.
Good place for a nice stay

It’s a nice place. Near to the pratunam market, central world, platinum mall, etc. All the places its nearby, so i just need to talk a walk 5-10 minutes. Large place too. Good to family. And easy to find.
Very beautiful place and very very nice view. You can sit and watch sunset. It's so relaxing. We really enjoyed staying there. Very recommended!! We would come back again for sure.. ☺️
Excellent space! Very clean and modern. Exactly as described, and Ken was a fantastic host.

非常好的房源很推薦喔，
外觀也很漂亮
看起來非常清潔
總共有四層樓因為是舊房子，
所以木梯在行走的時候聲音大一點，
但是房間離樓梯比較遠，
所以如果在裡面睡覺
其實是聽不到有人在走的
那1樓有垃圾桶大的冰箱跟洗衣機跟烘衣機，
房東很認真很快速的回覆，雖然外面路邊在施工，
但是巷子裡面完全聽不到聲音喔，非常推薦這個價目很棒
我們入住了五個晚上
只要入住四晚以上還會送一次管家的清潔，
如果要換毛巾也可以跟管家講有多的他也會換給
離機場接送站走下來就到了那附近也有嘟嘟車跟捷運站地點非常好，巷口外面就有seven
轉個彎過去就有按摩店一個小時才250非常推薦過去一點，也有稍微高級一點的按摩
後面有一家很推薦的海南雞飯
跟龍蝦媽媽麵住在這附近的朋友不要錯過
總之感謝房東他回覆非常迅速資料也都非常的清楚有需要的朋友真的可以住這邊

Thor's  house is wonderfully designed, chic in a retro way, full of art and character, and extremely comfortable!  The neighborhood has a great night market and small restaurants a stones throw away.  His housekeeper, Chu, tidied up from our breakfast every day -- unasked for and unexpected -- and very thoughtful, and provided laundry service for a very reasonable fee as well.  Wish I could have stayed longer!

Mike ist ein Gastgeber, der sehr guten Service bietet. Er reagiert so schnell auf alle Fragen. Das Zimmer ist sauber. Generell ist Circle Sukhumvit 11  für mich der beste Ort in Bangkok, weil alles in der Nähe ist. Das Zimmer ist sehr sauber, modern und schön eingerichtet. Für einen längeren Aufenthalt in Bangkok, wäre das Ideal für eine Langzeitmiete.

The unit is beautiful and neatly clean and have a nice view on night time..
Host very responsive to all your inquiries easy to check in place is easy to find..
Xu’s was very lucky to his host we forgot our money to the unit and Xu’s message us and let us know..Thank you so much for being so honest that’s rare now a days…God bless you and your family..

I had a really nice stay, lovely place and great hosting on June’s part. The cleaned the rooms every day, if wanted, and they kept it neat and tidy. There was also a fridge in the room and that came in handy. The door of my balcony couldn’t be closed, which was a little inconvenient because of the warm air that kept slipping in my room, but I didn’t mind that much because the airconditioning did it’s job.

This property is maintained well. Pretty clean  and  spacious property. Conveyance is easy because station is close  by.   We were a group of 6 people. Upon request, Pat arranged for a van for us for next day. The price was reasonable. Pat is very prompt in her responses. She is pretty friendly and accommodating.
Great place and great host. Will definitely stay here again 😊
The place is exactly as the description says, the location is great and it was very clean

Spędziliśmy kilka dni w domu Weeraya, który położony jest na cichym, czystym, strzeżonym osiedlu, na którym jest basen i siłownia, dużo zieleni oraz sklepiki, lokalna restauracyjka z jedzeniem na dowóz oraz kawiarenka. wszystko bardzo blisko domu. Dom jest duży i miał wszystko co potrzeba na kilka dni dla naszej trójki.  Sąsiedzi są przeuroczy ❤️. Niedaleko osiedla jest 7/11, a na przeciwko wjazdu do osiedla jest restauracja z przepysznym lokalnym jedzeniem, przy 7/11 jest jeszcze więcej lokalnych knajpek. Nocleg polecamy z całego serca ❤️❤️❤️.
The apartment is in a great location near restaurants and a beautiful park to exercise in. Thank you for your prompt help and clear instructions during our stay.

Die Wohnung ist einfach genial! Wir hatten schon mehrere Wohnungen in Bangkok, aber diese war wirklich die modernste und schönste Wohnung. Sie ist überaus geschmackvoll, stylisch eingerichtet, mit tollem Blick über Bangkok. Wir waren zu zweit in dem Appartment. Vom Flughafen aus, fährt man, wenn nicht so viel Verkehr ist etwa 35 Minuten zu dem Apartment. Wir haben ein Grab genommen, das kostet etwa 450 THB. Wir wurden freundlich von Freund von Tomyia empfangen, und er hat uns die Wohnung kurz gezeigt. Das war sehr unproblematisch. Die Kommunikation mit Tomyia klappte hervorragend. Sie antwortete immer sofort. Leider war an dem Tag, als wir ankamen, der Pool gesperrt, aber dafür konnte Tomyia nichts, sie hatte uns auch kurz davor geschrieben, dass die Hausverwaltung den Pool an dem Tag gesperrt hat und somit waren wir vorbereitet. Sie bot auch eine kleine Entschädigung an, was sehr aufmerksam war. Insgesamt ist es mindestens eine fünf Sterne Wohnung! Wir kommen wieder! ☺️ Danke! 🙏

Pek and Tu were incredible hosts.  We had a rather large party, and several of us arrived at almost 2am thanks to a delayed flight.  Pek was incredibly communicative and our arranged airport transport worked perfectly. Great hosts and would definitely recommend!

Very nice and tidy space! Clean and comfortable, would definitely recommend. Loved the pool with a view over the neigbourhood and option to use the gym. Very near the sky train which basically brings you everywhere in Bangkok.
Beautiful property in a great central location. Will definitely book again

The apartment is just as described. Very nice location next to a mall and lots of restaurants and food stalls. Well equipped kitchen. Everything is well designed, both in terms of comfort and appearance. Nice view from the balcony as well.

Billy’s place was just as advertised. He is a responsive and helpful host, which made the stay smooth. The apartment was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped, with access to great amenities like a pool and gym downstairs. Some of the furnishings are a bit dated, but everything was in good working condition. There was a minor issue with a bathroom light bulb, but Billy was quick to respond and had it fixed the next day. The location is central and convenient for exploring the city. Also, it is worth noting that daily rentals aren’t officially permitted in the building, so guests will need to keep a low profile during their stay. Overall, a solid stay with good value in the heart of the city.
it was perfect, thank you amy

Didn’t realize until a day in, but great location for navigating Bangkok, super close to bus stops and also general tourist hotspots. Room is perfect for needing a base in the city to come back to every night. Would highly recommend.
nice
I came to stay here again for the second time because of the great location and amenities. I would absolutely book again for my next visit to Bangkok.

staying at Piti Haus is really a good deal, feels homey, there is a 7-eleven very close by, for trips with lots of people piti haus is really recommended! The most important thing is that the host is really responsive, so kind, friendly and good at recommending things. When something is needed in the piti haus, the host is immediately ready to come to solve it. i really had a good experience in staying at piti haus

Wir waren sehr zufrieden mit der Unterkunft und vorallem mit den Gastgeber Tee, er war sehr zuvorkommend, hilfsbereit und sehr freundlich. Können jedem diese Unterkunft empfehle , ist im Zentrum und vieles ist zu Fuß erreichbar.
Wir werden, wenn wir wieder nach Bangkok reisen, aufjedenfall wieder diese Unterkunft buchen. Danke für alles
Host very helpful, thanks to Boommi and James. Great location, just few minutes walk to Terminal 21 and Asok BTS station.
Although the building is a bit old , the apartment is cleaned and is a very nice location. Thank you
Quite spacious
Appartement, très propre, fonctionnel, bien équipé, et situé près des beaux centres commerciaux, du métro et d’un joli parc

We wanted to avoid agents with tons of flats, get the place we see on photos and have a direct contact with the host. The authentic Airbnb experience. We got exactly what we were hoping for, and much more. Location is close to MRT and two big shopping centers with great food courts. Amenities that feel just right, rooftop terrace with beautiful views and swimming pool in the middle of the building so there is enough shade to use it anytime of the day. Comfortable bed, lots of storage space. But the biggest advantage of this place is the host. You have the feeling that she really cares about the guests and about the place. No place is perfect but what matters is how the issues are handled. And that’s where Eve goes above and beyond any expectations. We needed a lightbulb change, done next day. AC needed adjustments, service team showed up. We noticed stove was damaged, it was replaced in no time. We really recommend the place and host hospitality. We had a lovely stay.
Friendly and helpful host. Beautiful little apartment, everything was perfect.

I had a wonderful trip in Bangkok, and Roman was definitely a big part of it! He was very helpful, responsive, giving recommendations, and the place felt so homey! I love how it’s walking distance to everything I needed and it’s such a great area.
Definitely will be staying there again on our next trip to Bangkok!

great experience, very clean and convenience wise 5/5!!
definitely worth the stay and money

Great location, much quieter than expected, easy to get to BTS and shops. There's also a Harborland (kids playhouse) about 2 blocks away. Phannivat and team were very helpful and responsive. We would stay again.
I really enjoyed my stay. The place is in a local Thai area, giving a genuine local experience. It was comfortable, cozy, and Boss made me feel welcome. I had a great time there. Thank you so much ❤️

Nikki was a good and accommodating host, she was always available if we have any question. She even waited for us to arrive at 4AM in the morning to welcome us. She’s responsive from the moment we booked until we left. Always checks how our day was and if we need anything. The place is neat, adequate, well ventilated and illuminated, bathroom is clean which is a big factor.
She even gave us a parting gift, Nikki is also entertaining, together with her cats, there are a lot of cats some are friendly, some are aloof but it’s okay they are all adorable 💓
See you again Nikki when we visit Bangkok! :)
Clean, quiet, very friendly staff - a great stay!
Highly recommended! We had a great time at Bryan’s apartment. He was very responsive, helpful, and made everything easy for us. We would definitely stay here again.
The place is exactly as described. Will consider this for my next trip.

First I’d like to thank Cathy for being very hostile and helpful! We really enjoyed our stay in her apartment, it’s so cozy and comfortable. We felt like home. There’re everything you need even for a long stay in the apartment. We enjoyed a view from the window a lot! There is a good swimming pool and a gym inside the building, 7/11 at the ground floor - what is very convenient. Also there is a small playground outside. The location is kinda noisy because of the road next to the condo but we got used to it very fast. I highly recommend Cathy and her apartment!

Great stay. The room has about anything you might need. The pool is great, relaxed.
Mook is a great host too, let us in the room much earlier after our early arrival!

房東非常友善！回覆迅速且安排彈性
會再回來這裡住的！這裏還有gym和泳池 非常好
Very nice!😻
Great location, great Airbnb, would stay at again

Nous avons adoré l’endroit, le logement, tout était parfait. Nous avons cependant regretté le peu d’interaction avec notre hôte… ce pourquoi nous voyageons en Airbnb et pas à l’hôtel mais pour d’autres ce ne sera pas un problème. Nous on aime parler de notre journée, des choses à faire, échanger les expériences etc et ça ça nous a manqué. Le logement était par contre un vrai coup de cœur

Super chill place with a Lawson right next to elevator. House is clean and comfy and the hosts are great with communication
非常好 下次来曼谷还会订
非常好的住宿 房東人也很好 有什麼問題都立馬解決 很幫助房客 很喜歡這裡
很棒的住宿！房间很大，干净整洁，周围风景很好，去大皇宫等景区还有iconsiam都很近，房东非常友好，走路可到711便利店。下次来泰国还住这里👍
房东姐姐热心肠，在泰国很多年了，会说泰语，泰国通。找她订房她会告诉你很多好吃好玩是地方。让你在泰国不迷路

Fácil de llegar, buen sector te quedan varios templos cerca y tienes centro comercial y comida local muy rica cerca, es una buena alternativa para incursionar en su cultura y también tienes metro que te comunica fácilmente , trato amable, muy limpio y ordenado, lo recomiendo 100%
Great location and a nice clean place with all the amenities needed for a medium length stay. Would stay again!

Its the building on the left- (not the right, the taxi driver got confused but Google map should help.
Very easy check in with security in parking.
Super quiet area very safe. Very easy to walk. Good livingroom space near the gym.
I did find the aircon too direct on the bed- but you need the aircon as otherwise it gets stuffy. Ac is quiet. No mozzies at start of Jan. Balcony is great and quiet
Only downside is the bed- its what looks like a mattrass topper on a harder surface. Not a proper mattrass.
All and all had a good stay close to sprout

Great location, easy check in and super responsive host! Tiny points of improvement would be to add some hand soap to the bathroom and have more absorbent towels! Some street sounds at night but they were no bother to us (and expected in the busy city!). Overall lovely stay!!

So incredible grateful for Pong and his stay. I had a very late arrival into the international airport and then had to transfer to the domestic for a flight early morning. Instead of sleeping in the airport I felt to book here due to the reviews and his support and time to offer me space and pick up. Very much appreciated after a huge day of travel.
I didn't get to meet pong in person, but was welcomed by his nephew and had constant communication with him well up to check in. Send me driver details, where to meet etc.
Be aware that if drop off at hotel and driver offers to take you to the airport it will occur an extra cost and need to be aware to organize this well in advance so pong doesn't get over charged.
Thank you again :)
I only had 2 hours sleep, maybe less, but the hot shower, complimentary water and bed to sleep was so incredibly valuable :)
See you again next time.
Brianna

It's a cute room.
It have everything you need.
I think it is suitable for short stays.

I had an absolutely fantastic time at this Airbnb! The house was beautiful, spacious, and well equipped. It felt like a home away from home. The decor was stylish, and the amenities were top-notch, making it incredibly comfortable. The location was nice, with local surrounding. Communication with the host was smooth, and they were incredibly helpful. I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a great place to stay!
Beautiful home
This is a fantastic stay for an authentic feel. Simple 2-storey house with small terrace. We were in regular contact with Pupe and she was on hand for everything we needed.
很好，凌晨到的机场，有车来接机。房间很干净，没人打扰，早餐也很好吃。另外地方去景点很方便，有直达的公交车，附近美食也有很多，下次去再住
Arty is very helpful! The stay is clean and big!
tout était très bien 👍🏽

A nice and cozy accommodation. The space is on the smaller side, but it’s very well designed and everything was clean and well maintained.
Personally I prefer a bit more space, but many guests would probably consider this a very lovely place to stay. Overall I had a good experience.

the place is clean and spacious just like the photos&very nice high way unblocked view from balcony and bathroom, host was very responsive and check in was very smooth, below got 7/11 and many food, massage&beauty saloon downstairs in the condo compound. i really love the place, juz before extension further, i was late and already booked.  will go back once it is available

Nous étions 4, et avons passé 4 semaines à Bangkok chez Rae et Charlie. Que dire, si ce n'est que nous avons passé un séjour merveilleux. Nos hôtes étaient formidables, toujours présents pour nous donner des indications, des idées de visite et même pour papoter.
La maison est très propre et tres confortable, la piscine est niquel (piscine nettoyée tous les jours et la maison 1x/semaine).
Merci Rae & Charlie, nous reviendrons sans hésiter !!!
Ich war sehr zufrieden mit der Unterkunft. Vor allem die Lage und die schnelle Kommunikation waren super. Patanee ist sehr hilfsbereit und zuverlässig. Danke! :)

住在这个房间真是太享受了。 窗外的景色让你心情非常好。位置很好，市中心，步行即可到达bts On Nut站，BTS沿线去哪都方便。
房子很干净，浴室也很干净，泳池和健身房都很棒，顶楼花园非常适合放松的喝一杯。 推荐！
Very lovely!!

Great place - very clean - host thoughtful left some beers and water in fridge
Close to skytrain so ideal for getting around
Amazing street food just below apartment
Had a great stay the host was very responsive and very clean stay would recommend!
I had a good stay here overall.

房东人超好，我们由于飞机延误5点才到，房东一直在等我们，以便可以把我们从巷口接进去。走的时候我们想行李寄存一下，房东说可以晚些退房，走之前回来洗个澡。感动！！
我们的房间非常大，有独立小客厅、阳台和厕所。有沙发，冰箱等，简直像一个小家，比酒店有归属感。卧室里有一张很大的双人床，和可折叠床铺，所以如果多人入住也很方便。床品很舒服。离码头很近，坐船去大皇宫大约半小时。很不错的地方。
It was a wonderful experience. The room is very big with sofa, refrigerator, water heater etc. It is close to pier and asiatique within walk distance. The hoster were very warm,who gave us a lot of suggestion and advice with patience.
Everything great
Geweldig verblijf en super hosts!!

hôte très réactive, très bon rapport qualité prix...
nous ne sommes resté qu'une nuit et avons passer un très bon séjour...
nous recommandons...
👌👍😁
Nice place to stay very good for family and friend of 4

I had a great stay here. The place is comfortable, clean, and conveniently located near the city center. All the staff speak English very well and were always incredibly helpful throughout my stay. There is also an adorable chubby orange cat that made the place feel even more welcoming. Highly recommended!
Will stay here again when I’m back to Bangkok! Great place with great facilities with a huge supermarket in the same building. Perfect.

Absolutely fantastic few nights at Donzos place. The views are incredible and were such a highlight of the trip. The apartment was spotless and we really enjoyed the pool too. A central location as the famous spots you may want to visit are all roughly the same distance away in each directions. A few minutes walk to Icon Siam. Shop downstairs for all of your necessities. Fabulous time and would definitely stay again. Thanks so much! X
great location
My 3rd stay here - great hospitality once again from the staff and the room was as clean as when I first stayed here. Appreciate the small gestures like complimentary bottles of water and snacks!
The apartment is exactly what in the photos. 7-11 is opposite the building. The apartment is located in an old building,  but overall are clean and quite. Smooth check in.
宾至如归的体验！家一般的随心！推荐200号房间！
Lovely place. Near the skytrain. Great view from the apartment.

We had a lovely two night stay here. The apartment is beautiful inside well worth the price. The apartment is in a good location and it’s easy to get to places downtown in a short period of time. Jun was very helpful before and during our stay. We would highly recommend this apartment. Thank you Jun
Perfectly situated with restaurants and bars all around. The perfect space for what I was looking for.

Lalana ist eine großartige Gastgeberin! Super gut erreichbar, schnelle Rückmeldungen, immer sehr freundlich und bemüht.
Die Unterkunft ist wie auf den Bildern beschrieben und gut zu Fuss von der Metro-Station erreichbar (jedoch nicht mit den Koffern).
Aber tiptop, vielen Dank!!
Good experience , very comfortable and i will be back

Хорошее не дорогое жилье, рядом с аэропортом. Хозяйка разрешила заехать даже раньше времени заселения. Очень милая девушка внизу, всегда старалась помочь с любыми просьбами, а также делала нам отличный кофе. Спасибо всем, нам все понравилось)

Great spot near the airport. You have the entire floor to yourself with two bedrooms which is great for large groups who are looking for a pocket friendly option to stay at, airport is about 15 minutes away so very convenient

Really responsive, very helpful. Lovely guy. The place is exactly what you need! Has everything you need if for.
It’s spot on and would recommend for anyone wanting to stay in Bangkok.

来的这段时间kay不在，他的妈妈Apple接待了我们，Apple人超好很热情，虽然不会中文，但是英文沟通也基本无障碍，来曼谷我们没有计划去哪些地方，她会先问我们喜欢干什么，然后给我们建议，看以前的住客说Apple厨艺很好，特意试了一下，她煮饭真的很好吃。也有一些不太方便的地方，因为这里有一条很深的巷子，晚上来不太好找，接机的司机差一点没有找到地方，我们打电话给Apple请她帮我们和司机沟通才找到的，再有就是公共的浴室卫生间对女生来说不太方便，除此之外没有别的不满意的地方了，总的来说在这里住的四天是特别愉快的体验，来这边玩待的时间长的话非常推荐住Kay家，希望下次有机会住这里的话能见到他(^-^)

Ik ben niet tevreden. Het was zó lawaaierig terwijl ik niet eens een kamer aan de straat had, maar je hoort daadwerkelijk alles! Echt geen oog dicht gedaan. Ook is het heel vochtig, dus stinkt het. En de kamer is veel kleiner dan verwacht. Wij hadden ons erg slecht ingelezen dus we wisten niet dat je letterlijk boven de uitgaansstraat zit. Is wel handig om te weten!
Wel was de communicatie en het inchecken erg makkelijk en goed te doen.
Antwortet schnell. Einfacher Check-In. Gut mit dem Taxi erreichbar. Liegt neben der BTS Nana. Gerne wieder.
Good Experience
Stayed here a month and loved it. Would stay again!

Terry and Ludoping are extremely great hosts. They’re clear with the check-in and check-out instructions and easy to follow.
The room is great and beyond my expectations. Everything is clean and well stocked with their kitchen wares too. Very very comfortable room to stay in.
Location wise, despite the slightly long walk in Soi 11, the location is ideal if you’re looking for street food and nightlife activities. It gets really crowded on that street at night, but I had a great time in this area.
Highly recommended and will come back to this place again next time.
Thank you again, Terry and Ludoping !
Bonne expérience globale malgré le bruit incessant de la circulation à proximité directe de la maison.
Great location with a must try coffee shop just a few metres away ,great for the stop of the day ,thanks mate will stay again
房間比想像中還要棒，乾淨又大間，房東很好、訊息也快速的回覆，下次再來曼谷的第一選擇。👍👍👍🥰🥰🥰
Very lovely place, super beautiful, watch out for mosquitoes tho
It's a good place to stay and feel the local atmosphere. Everything you need to stay, including restaurants, convenience stores, pharmacies and BTS station, is right nearby.

This property is exactly as pictured online—beautiful, clean, and well-maintained. The location is fantastic, right in the heart of Chinatown and close to many attractions.
The host was incredibly kind, patient, and accommodating. We arrived early and had a small communication mix-up on our end, but the host graciously allowed us to store our luggage until the 3:00 PM check-in. They even took the time to walk us to the local Golden Buddha and recommend a nearby café, which was a wonderful introduction to the area.
The property included delicious snacks that our group thoroughly enjoyed. We loved the hand written welcome note it added a personalized touched.
My group enjoyed the front porch and felt safe at all times.
Neighbors and locals at the nearby Street Café were very friendly and helpful as well.
The home feels very new, and the rooftop terrace was amazing. Overall, we had a fantastic stay and would highly recommend this property to anyone visiting the are

It was the best room I have every stayed at! The hosts were friendly and communicative, and always recommended us what to do! We even had a free welcome ice cream which was very tasty😋
When I come back to Bangkok I definitely will stay here again!!!!

A great Bangkok experience. I already look forward to my next trip back.
There are 3 things that are all equally important for any Airbnb experience. 1stly is always the Host. Nadia was always fast to respond. Also, she shared details of the best eating spots around which made all the difference!
2nd, location! Perfect. So much food! A buggy from the apartment will bring you to the Ekkamai BTS which is right next to Thonglo, which has even MORE food! Taxi's are plentiful at the main road. 2 minutes from the apartment is a really nice local bar with their own local brew and some food, but I did not try the food. There is a 24 hrs Supermarket 3 minutes walk from the local bar. A really cool Japanese restaurant right in front of the Supermarket. AND a really good local Thai restaurant next to that Japanese restaurant. Seriously....
3rdly, the apartment. Super comfortable bed. So important and sometimes a detail often ignored: a good bed. Clean and modern. The apartment is small and compact. Perfect for 2 people.
Cheers

The best house on the canal. It’s modern and the hosts are super lovely!  It is a short walk to The Artists House with lots to do and restaurants .  Just a note there is quite a bit of boat traffic in front during business hours so it’s not quiet then. Perfect for a couple of nights. I highly recommend a stay! Thank you. 😊🌸
空間寬敞明亮，設備齊全，環境乾淨衛生，周圍景觀很好，非常適合朋友、家庭一起去渡假旅行，下次會想再居住。

Host picked me up from DMK (Don Mueang) airport, even waited while my arrival visa was delayed!  Then a quick 15 minute drive to the room, which was very clean.  Cable with over 80 crisp channels on flat screen in the bedroom, fast wifi with good strong connection.  Host even let me use his mobile phone to order food delivery so I didn't have to go out in the rain!
Wir wurden vom Flughafen abgeholt super netter Service super Aussicht bin echt zufrieden

This is a fantastic place to stay, especially if you don’t need to visit the city center daily. But even if you do, Grab is readily available and affordable—not just for taxis, but also for restaurant and grocery deliveries.
The view is truly breathtaking, even better than in the photos. The apartment is packed with amenities, including a PlayStation, making it perfect for a long-term stay. The host is incredibly friendly and responsive, ensuring a smooth and comfortable experience.
Overall, I would definitely stay here again on my next trip to Bangkok and highly recommend this place!
地點很方便，入住有家的感覺，很溫馨。
出门就是地铁，非常方便，靠近中心繁华地带，周边马杀鸡也比较多，这次住的非常开心，唯一的不足:退房时间有点早
hostel is hostel I have nothing to add, you get exactly what is shown in the preview + convenient location and friendly staff
Mali  is very helpful and the place we stay is cozy. Thanks for letting us stay at your place.
Great place to stay, great location and the host were amazing to deal with
美好的旅程

Great deluxe apartment close to big malls, excellent view from roof top pool and apartment, Tony was a great host always sharing very detailed information to make things easier, I would definitely recommend

Nice apartment with all essentials. Appliances, iron, and hair dryer included. Quiet and peaceful location near restaurants and shops, with a convenience store on-site. Note: thin walls let in air conditioning noise in the bedroom. Perfect for short stays.
As he got already a lot of reviews, I don't no what to add. Everything was just really fine.
Nice play in a very convenient location.
Host好nice，地方好乾淨，房型好多，很有設計感，有機會會再工。諗
Nice and pleasant stay

Everything was very good but you have to know that there is no possiblity to use the kitchen ; there is no kitchenware and only a microwawe which means you cannot cook at all. For me it was a big inconvenience but for visitors who go to restaurant everyday maybe this is not a problem.
Otherwise the appartment is very nice, clean and quiet.

Everything is fine, would be nice if the rooftop Pool and Fitness room would be open longer and not only till 9pm.
Other than that, I would recommend it for everyone that is fine with not being in the middle of BKK-City.
Great host. The place is clean is peaceful. We enjoy good restaurants and nice vibes around the area.

徒歩圏内にスーパーやレストラン、マッサージ等が充実しているので、駅からは遠いものの、立地はとても良いと思います。
バイタクも近くにスタンバイしています。ただし、夕方からの渋滞は酷く、近くのサミティべでタクシーを待っていても20分は待つことになります。
部屋はとても広く整頓されていました。何故かWi-Fiが最後の1日は使えませんでした。
ベランダには洗濯物を干す十分なスペースがありました。ただ、湿度のせいで乾きにくいので、是非、乾燥機を置いていただきたいです。
プールが大きく、子供達は大喜びでした！　深い所は2m位あるので注意は必要です。
料金含め満足していますが、気になったのは、アリとバスタオルです。
キッチンと、リビングとダイニングエリアにアリが多く出ました。アパートが古いのでタイでは仕方のないことかもしれませんが、やはり日本人には気になるところです。
そしてもう１つは置いてあったバスタオルの毛羽立ちが酷く、シャワー後にそれで拭くと毛だらけになってしまうし、それと一緒に洗濯した洋服も毛だらけになってしまい大変でした。品質の問題かもしれません。
バスタオルだけ何度か洗濯してみましたが改善されず、途中からフェイスタオルのみを使用することにしました。
とは言えども、タオルくらいは許容範囲です。
オーナーさんはすぐに返信をくれるので不安はありませんでした。
乾燥機さえ揃っていれば、是非また利用したいと思っています！

Amazing stay in Bangkok, beautiful room with amazing views. Right next to a street filled with restaurants. A beautiful lobby with doormen and security 24/7. Nat is an amazing host who even helped me getting through immigration at the airport upon arrival. 10/10 would say again
second time. very happy that I found this place. for me it's perfect

Incredible view! Nice place to stay in BKK. All the appliances there, operational. Lots of space for work and chill.
Recommended.
Bathtub is a bit small and required some maintenance though, double check if you plan to use it
Comfortable apartment, great location close to everything, and a very helpful host.
Very easy and friendly

The place is perfect for those who want a peaceful and noise-free environment around the busy city. A short walk from the mall and the BTS. Host was very responsive to inquiries, check-in was easy and the staff was very friendly. The place is simple and homey. This is recommended!

We had a wonderful stay. Condo is very clean, spacious, and prime location. Host is flexible, quick to response and accommodating to our requests. We especially enjoyed the roof top swimming pool. Train stop is also walking distance to the condo, as well as convenient store, coffee shop, restaurants, and massage parlor. Thank you for making our Bangkok visit enjoyable.

Payaq viene venduto come una piccola casetta all’interno di una galleria d’arte. All’interno della proprietà troverete un bar aperto fino a notte tarda con molte persone che sono lì a bere e fare confusione. Le bellissime sedie che si vedono in foto non siamo mai riusciti ad utilizzarle perché erano sempre occupate dai clienti del bar. All’interno della stanza non c’è nessuna finestra e l’aria è soffocante. Sopra la camera da letto c’è un grandissimo albero che rilascia i frutti sopra al tetto non permettendo di dormire. Buona la posizione ma per il resto tutto da dimenticare.

1. Great location
a. Minutes from metro (sky train)
b. Five minutes from supermarket at Lotus
c. One stop to the fabulous Paragon mall n MBK discount mall
2. 6 min walk to a great gym (jets)
And a very nice laundromat
3. Great Italian restaurant ( Da Mama)
minutes away
4. Nice pool at complex, never busy
Chatey's place is highly recommended! We loved staying there and we look forward to staying again! Thanks Chatey!
Excellente résidence, chambre très agréable, l’ambiance est plutôt celle d’un hôtel que d’un Airbnb, et les repas un peu plus cher qu’en ville.

I recently enjoyed an incredible 9-day stay and it truly exceeded all my expectations. The apartment was spotless, equipped with everything you could possibly need, and the bed was incredibly comfortable. The amenities were top-notch—the pool provided the perfect spot to unwind, and the sauna and gym were ideal, especially since they weren't crowded when I used them at 7 am. The neighborhood is a hidden gem, surrounded by delicious local Thai food. The local market, which opens at 4 pm, offers an amazing selection of authentic Thai dishes, all without the usual tourist crowds. One highlight of my stay was discovering a fantastic Thai massage therapist just a minute's walk from the condo, before the 7/11. I've been to Thailand nine times, and I can confidently say she provided one of the best massages I've ever had—I went every day, and she took such great care of me. If you're looking to experience the "Local Bangkok," this place is perfect. those like me who come to Bangkok for local.

I stayed at Jaden's apartment for 1 night, as I had a flight next morning (it's close to the airport) and I can tell it was a great experience. The apartment is cozy and neat. Also, the place was not noisy (no traffic noise), and the air conditioners were not noisy as well. Also, 2 bottles of water and free transportation from and to Suvarnabhumi Airport were provided. I really recommend Jaden's apartment.
Alles Okay 👍

Terachai is very responsive on messages. the Location is great so convenient. Staff very nice although they cant speak English. sheets were very comfortable. only complaint is that the wifi was very slow and needs upgrade. otherwise I had an excellent stay stay
Amazing location, easy check-in, super friendly and responsive hosts. The cafe at the bottom was a nice touch!
房间很好
thank you much hosting for us. definitely comeback. host and his co host was wonderful and helpful.

Maria and her husband are great hosts - they were always quick to respond and check in was well arranged. They were very kind and it was wonderful meeting them.
The space is very private - essentially a standalone apartment - and was perfect for a solo traveler (would also work well for a couple). The location is good, about a 15 minute walk to Asok station for the MRT and the BTS. The unit was very clean. WiFi and cell signal can be a bit spotty in the unit, but assuming this is just due to the building materials.
Overall I would definitely stay here again if ever in the area.

It was a good deal and local to many shops, a big temple, and restaurants including ThipSamai which is a popular padthai restaurant. It’s close to the MRT and Chinatown. The place itself is definitely more of a traditional style with the cement style walls. It was a cool experience. The lights were dim and it’s not very bright on a cloudy day so if you like cozy, this is the spot for you. The internet was a little slow, I wish it was faster speed. This location feels like a little oasis and doesn’t feel busy so it was quiet.

The place was clean, and a short walk away to the train station.
Great AC too!
Veldig hyggelig vert og fikk raskt svar. Men vi ble ikke informert at air condition ikke funket. Var derfor veldig vanskelig å få en god natt søvn for var veldig varmt. Men veldig bra beliggenhet

The best location right next to BTS. The place was really clean. The host has responded very promptly.
Parking for guests was quite inconvenient. If you have your own vehicle you need to tell the host in advance to provide you with sticker and device for entering. Your guest who has car might need to park at the gas station close by.
Great place , decent gym . Will come back for sure
Fantastic location, clean , 5 minutes walk from bars , convenience stores , close to Saladang BTS
thank you so much having good time nice place

Very nice home not far from shopping,.
Lively bars and resturants..lots of space for a big group. Bedrooms are very large with each having a balcony. Roof top garden/terrace amazing.Home furnished well,kitchen has all utensils, cups and dishes dining table to support large group of guest.
thanks again to our Host for providing the home.

Enjoyed my stay at Nokiko's place for 5 days. The condo is very beautiful and comfy with the most amazing view of Bangkok on the 23rd floor. Much better than staying in a hotel. It is also very convenient. Tesco Lotus supermarket is just next to our condo, Central was just opposite tesco lotus. Union Mall and the MRT is also a walking distance from the condo. I will definetely stay at Nokiko's place again during my next visit to BKK.
Всё Мы остались довольны нашим пребыванием в этом отеле. Красивый вид и комфортные условия сделали наше пребывание приятным. Спасибо за гостеприимство

Josef is a great host. He is easy to communicate with and responded quickly when I had a couple of questions. Check in was easy, the condo is close to supermarkets, lots of food and amenities. The pool is salt water and that is a bonus. Well worth the money and I would highly recommend and will stay again.
是我梦想中小院，有好多可爱的喵喵会跑到你的房间陪你玩～在房间里不开空调看着窗外放空自己也很治愈～早上吃完早饭去Bts 也很近，到去哪都很方便！

The location of this place is simply amazing! It’s right next to the Nana boat station, which makes getting around Bangkok super fun and easy. I took the boat to Central World every day — just 4 stops, only 14 THB, and the ride itself was like a mini sightseeing trip. The apartment is on a high floor with a stunning night view. Facilities are complete too — there’s a washing machine, fridge, and even a kitchen for cooking, so it really felt like home in Bangkok.
The only thing that really needs improvement is the cockroaches. There were quite a lot, and sometimes they showed up on the bed or even in my luggage. Unfortunately, one little “friend” even traveled back home with me! It was both funny and frustrating. Overall, I still enjoyed the stay a lot, but if the host could improve pest control and cleaning, this place would easily be a perfect 10/10.
Very nice, comfy and stylish place. Definitely recommend

First time took my parents to travel to Thailand and I’m glad I’ve found this place, my parents are very happy, so am I. The house looks exactly like the pictures, the room is spacious, spotless and everything is well maintained. The house owner Tararat is very friendly and always responds quickly. The check in guidance is clear and the we have everything we need. There is a big 711 2 minutes walking distance and the metro station is not far. Taxi driver never has problems to find us. We love our stay here, highly recommended for family, couples or single travelers.
Host is very kind. Allow us to check in early. Environment is good. It’s a high end condo with very big gym. Next to Jodd Fair night market.
Lovely stay

The house was nice, we had a great time! everything was accessible so it was easier to roam around bangkok. T’was near the local market, convenience stores and phra khanong bts station, will def recommend. 🤍
比预想得好。定位准确，吃饭和购买生活用品方便，房子外面就有饭店，出品不错，性价比高，步行去7-11大概5到10分钟。房子里面的零食和水都可以免费食用。厨房可以用而且干净，洗衣机和干衣机都可以用而且也是干净的！总体体验很不错，房东热情！回复很快，还给我们介绍了附近的吃喝玩乐的地方。赞👍

Sure! Here's a general template for a positive Airbnb review. You can customize it further to match your experience:
---
I had an incredible stay at [Host's Name]’s place! The house was exactly as described – clean, comfortable, and thoughtfully designed. [Mention specific features you loved, e.g., “The kitchen was fully equipped, making it easy to prepare meals, and the outdoor patio was perfect for relaxing.”]
The location was ideal, tak was an excellent host, very responsive and kind, offering great local tips and ensuring everything went smoothly. also his English and Thai were excellent.
I would absolutely recommend this place to anyone visiting. i would definitely stay there again when possible.

The host is proactive and you can ask questions. Place was clean and is close to metro. Beds/Lenin's were available. Smart TV and ACs work.
Pool is not private and 1 side of induction stove doesn't work. Only 1 washroom inside the home and the other is common outside.
Saowaluck is everything you would expect in a host: responds quickly to any questions, polite, helpful and can always find a solution to any issues. We would definitely stay here again.
سكن جميل وهاديء ونظيف ويوجد امان عالي وشركة لحراسة المبنى، كل شيء جميل تقريباً، فقط ملاحظة عمل سخان الحمام في الحمام لايعمل، لم اتواصل مع صاحب الشقة فالحقيقة.
may是一个热情的人，非常热情的向我介绍了曼谷的旅游景点，也详细列举了公共交通路线，在房间准备了矿泉水还有零食，还有足够的纸巾，房间宽敞明亮，交通便利，市中心地段，对面就是曼谷像素楼，出去就有便利店，非常的方便快捷，后面就有一个清真寺供礼拜，对于穆斯林也非常友好，外面还有很多餐厅等等……非常期待下次光临曼谷。也非常感谢may的款待！

Very nice cozy place to stay. Location is great, many walkable interesting place to go around. The unit is well-designed and i love every details they put, like the red mushroom lamp, the ladder for towels, etc etc. Lots of books to read and chill. They also provide drinking waters, shared kitchen and washing machine.
Would definitely recommend this place!

May was a fantastic host and very responsive! I asked a myriad of questions from airport to estimates in fare to recommendations near the apt and received very reliable answers.
The location is very central although a slight walk from the BTS- which didn't end up being too big of an issue anyways.
Would recommend for travelers. Thanks for everything May!

When you first come to Bangkok the hectic city is really overwhelming. That's what makes staying in this little piece of calm heaven so wonderful. That, and the amazing host! (And the breakfast!)
She was really kind and helpful giving us directions of public transportation around the city and personal in what breakfast at what time we wanted. We just felt welcomed and she even arranged a tuktuk for us at a local price when we left.
The cabin is simple but has everything you need. Big fridge, some appliances and a nice shower. Perfect landing spot after a long hectic day in Bangkok.
Stroll around the nearby streets and make sure to visit the little market next to the water at the ferry! We had an amazing time.
A really great place that I find no fault in! All is working well, location is convenient, area is safe and checkin/checkout timing is flexible too. Will definitely stay here again in the future!

Das Apartment befindet sich genau zwischen den MRT Khlong toei und Lumphini Stationen. Den Weg zur Lumphini Station und dem  schönen Lumphini Park runter befinden sich mehrere Street food Stände sowie auch 7/11 etc. Direkt in der Nähe und nicht weit vom Goethe Institut befindet sich das KRA PRAO KROP 3 - eines der besten günstigen Restaurants und Geheimtipp in Bangkok ( sehr frisch, konstant lecker und günstig). 1km vom Apartment befindet sich auch der authentische Khlong toei Markt, wo man preiswert Gewürze bekommt und vieles andere Interessante. Im Apartment gab es Klima, Dusche, WasserKocher, Mikrowelle, Waschmaschine alles was man braucht. Das netflix und Tv-Programme funktioniert nicht, dafür Smartview aber man kommt ja nicht zum Fernsehen nach Thailand 😉 Sehr zu empfehlen 🙂👍
非常棒的房间，环境迷人有格调，像是城市里的宝藏。

Smooth check in
Clean and neat house
Friendly host
Great stay for large groups of friends or family
The house was amazing and Pumaree was very helpful in anything that was asked, will definitly stay here again at my next trip
Very nice stay again! Super accommodating host and the place has a nice pool to swim in.

The location was great the staff were great but the room had a visible layer of dust on the surfaces and the charging plug sockets were very few and weird, awkward places. I liked the location and the train night market and was a good short stay.

War das zweite Mal da. Dieses Mal war es deutlich teurer, vermutlich weil ich kurzfristig gebucht habe, auch wenn sich die Logik für mich nur teilweise erschließt. Dennoch war alles zufriedenstellend, wie beim ersten Mal. Alles ist unkompliziert und sauber. Das einzig Negative ist, dass der Raum kein Fenster hat. Wenn es das nächste Mal wieder günstiger ist, komme ich sehr gerne wieder.

If you want a place near enough the city but far enough for peace and quiet, this is a great place. Ms Kulradtha is also very reponsive and accommodating. it is around 15 minute walk to Sutthisan Metro station, and very near chatuchak market.
Exceptionally clean place. Alex was an excellent host and was very quick to respond to any questions that we had.
후기 잘 안쓰는데 생각 보다 크고 편합니다
We had a wonderful stay. Thank you very much.. will recommend for sure.
Tout était parfait
Very nice place, host was very flexible definitely recommend!

The place was truly clean, comfortable, and pleasant to stay in. As soon as I arrived, it felt tidy and very well-maintained. The atmosphere was also calm and peaceful, making it perfect for resting after a long day. The location is great as well—close to BTS Nana and nightlife spots.
The facilities were complete and worked perfectly, which made the stay even more enjoyable.
Overall, I was very satisfied with my stay and would definitely consider coming back. Highly recommended!
非常好，房间也很干净。
Amazing place and would recommend. We simply loved it and it was a great stay
Hey Tony. We really enjoyed the stay in you Condo. The pool is amazing. Bad that o didn’t have time to use the Sauna. Also the apparent was really nice. Thank you also for your Tipps during my stay.

The place was great, the building has everything you need — nice cheap restaurant downstairs, cozy and clean swimming pool, washing machines, gym and even massage facilities. 7eleven near by as well as few cafes and Japanese district with amazing restaurants.
Apartments are good and simple, nice view and best smelling shower gel ever :)
We will definitely come back.
Had a pleasant stay here. The check-in process was seemless with self check-in and password based access. The host was very responsive and the cost was reasonable.
Tony is a great host, he'll provide you with suggestion you need and the place is amazing

The BEST stay in Bangkok. The moment we met Mong we felt right at home. She welcomed us in the front, took us to our room, then showed us exactly where we are and where to go using maps drawn out my her son.  Her house is a beautiful oasis in Bangkok! Loved having the delicious Thai, breakfast in her garden every morning. The location was perfect - close to all the main transportation hubs, shopping, attractions, and markets yet you can retreat back after a long day. The room was perfectly clean and there were so many thoughtful touches like slippers, complimentary water and tea, and she even gave us a goodbye gift when we checked out. Mong exceeded our expectations and her warm hospitality is better than amy 5 star hotel. She was always available to help us if we had any questions, and she would even write everything in thai in case we got lost. From the location, room, hospitality, breakfast - can’t  express enough how amazing our stay was. We miss Mama’s Garden already!
Very nice
房间一切都很美好，期待再次回到这里。
Everything is ok...near a shopping mall
I had great time there, the apartment is good but location is not in the central
Clean place, great location

空港に近くて便利です。
付近にスーパーマーケットが沢山あります。
隣は某有名チェーンホテルですが、その反対方向に2分ほど歩いたところにあるホテルの中に、素晴らしいレストランがあります。

Great location, super responsive host and nice room. For us we would have only appreciated if the area outside (in the garden) was cleaned a bit better. For example there was dirty ashtrays and bird dirt etc. when we arrived which was still there the next day. So we didn’t really feel like we wanted to use the pool. And we would recommend or have appreciated to have a code / lock on the front gate. Literally everyone can enter and the staff wasn’t there most of the time so we felt uncomfortable leaving our luggage after check-out.
房东人很热心和亲和，当你遇到问题的时候都很愿意解答你的疑问。公寓环境超好，性价比高。打的去大皇宫大概120-140泰铢，打的去考山路120泰铢左右，打的去最近BRT：Bang Wa要45泰铢，摩托一个人25泰铢，建议的士更方便和安全！楼下有一间七仔，买东西很方便！
Nice house
Mr kini非常好沟通，入住也十分顺利，性价比很高的一家公寓

Just wanted to say we had a fantastic stay! The apartment was so cozy and comfortable - perfect for our family. We especially appreciated how responsive you were to our needs and the convenient location made exploring Bangkok really easy.
Thank you for making our trip so enjoyable! We'd definitely recommend your place to others and hope to stay with you again.

Amazing stay! The host was incredibly responsive — she replied to all our messages within minutes and was always available to help with anything we needed. It made the whole experience smooth and stress-free. Highly recommend staying here!
It’s ok
A very clean and spacious apartment at a very good location! Walking distances to BTS and major shopping areas! Will stay here again next time!
this was a lovely place for my first week in thailand! so close to a park and shopping, and down a private drive

This is the perfect spot if you are planning a trip into Thailand. Booking and departure is right around the corner which is nice if you are getting up early to catch the bus.
The place is modern and stylish. It is hidden in an alley behind one of the busy streets so you are right next to everything you need. It isn’t totally quiet at night but this should be expected with such a central location.
너무 좋은 숙소였습니다 일단 제가 위생에 예민한데 너무 청결하고 호스트가 답변이 빠르고 너무너무 친절합니다! 역이랑도 가깝고 위치도 너무 좋고요. 다음에 간다면 또 이용하고 싶어요
1 nơi ở rất sạch sẽ, tôi xin lỗi về việc đã ăn trong phòng.
Nice location near a lot of activity and good restaurants ! The place is great and cosy

Приятная квартира в спокойном месте. Нам разрешили остановиться с небольшой собачкой - это было главным критерием выбора.
Жильё стоит своих денег! Спасибо!
Alloggio molto bello e curato, bellissima vista sulla città di bangkok
非常非常好的房东，给了好多多方面建议，对旅途帮助非常大，房间也非常舒适，印象绝对好，随问随答！如果再来还是住这儿，非常好！👍👍👍

Hosts were very helpful if I had questions. Place is nice and spacious with an open floor plan. Location is very convenient. It’s on top of a 7/11 so you just take the elevator down to get a snack. There’s also a neighborhood fresh market across the street. The nearest MRT is a far walk but I took a motorcycle taxi to the shopping center by the MRT and it’s fast and about 35 baht. I would stay here again long term
Place was nice and as shown in the pictures.  Would stay again
Good

House is not fully clean, and lack of hair dryer and garbage bin. Hot water heat not fully functional, 3/4 of my shower is cooling water. And the photos showing on Airbnb.com should be 5 years old pics. And construction noise starts every 9am
A great place to stay.Warm & well arrangement

The service attitude was excellent, attentive and enthusiastic. The room was cleaned very thoroughly, and the toiletries were of good quality. There are many delicious foods around, and I am very satisfied
Muy buena estancia. Como siempre!

Chủ nhà thân thiện, tích cực giúp đỡ hỗ trợ tui rất nhiều. Chuyên nghiệp và rất dễ thương. 1000000 điểm 💖 Thank you for helping me and supporting me before and after I stay in💙 Highly recommend to stay here
Very clean large comfortable bed on top floor easy access to pool short walk to the lively night life in one direction and a lovely park with lakes the other

it was very beautiful place to stay . for
4 people very easily.
i really enjoyed the apartment colors it gave vintage vibes and that's what made the place beautiful .
beds was awesome.
the location was perfect.
i do recommend this place . the money is good and the best thing was the owner.
he helped me and answered all my questions i had about transfers to airport e.c .
10/10
Home is near Central world, clean, and comfortabe

Wuttiphon is an excellent host who is always willing to help his guests. From the time we checked in and during our stay, he welcomed us, made sure we found our way to the house easily and got settled. During our stay he often translated stuff for us into English from Thai and helped coordinate Grab Taxis (Like Uber) for us to get from our house to the city and markets. He is very patient, friendly and kind. I strongly recommend staying at his place and if you’re stopping off over night it’s a convenient location to and from the airport.

It was a great place, from flexible check -in and extremely quick to reply to questions and we were in walking distance to the excitement of the city yet still close enough to get home quick once we were ready to unwind. I’ll definitely be booking again when I come back next time
The place was great, but the oven was unfortunately not working. Otherwise, fantastic stay!

Great location, near supermarket, near foodcourt, near bts station
The place clean and modern
Alloggio fantastico con vista fantastica, mi sono trovato molto bene.
Amazing choice ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Host is friendly and allow me to check in earlier than expected! The place is bigger than expected and nearby to train station and silom especially those famous pub! All walkable!
Downside is only one of th curtain unable to cover the sun light from window, it will wake you up in earlier morning, host told that unable to exchange it due to songkran festival. I understand that.
Overall is good and I will definitely to stay again in future! Love this place much

I had a wonderful stay at Yi's! lots of great local places to eat within a 5-10 minute walk. I was working during my stay and I found it a fantastic place to work, very quiet and easily accessible. Great internet speeds. I could not recommend Yi's place enough.
Everything’s perfect. If wifi can be provided, it will be the best! Anyway, communication and place is great! On next trip, I will think of this one for my 1st priority accommodation in Bangkok.

Malgré quelques petits problèmes à notre arrivée, tout a été réglé très rapidement grâce à la réactivité de l’hôte. L’emplacement est excellent et très pratique. Quant à la piscine et à la salle de sport, elles sont vraiment exceptionnelles et ont rendu notre séjour encore plus agréable.
Very good place in a local part of Bangkok. 7-11 nearby and the metro it’s about 10 minutes walk. Good value for the money
非常喜欢这里，我们很喜欢这个房子的装修风格，每一块瓷砖都有温度。每天都会有一个篮子🧺提供我们的早餐，一共住了四个晚上，每天都期待会送过来什么吃的。昨天我去7-11买香蕉蛋糕，但是售尽了，我有很强烈的预感我能在今晚的篮子里找到香蕉蛋糕，真的很神奇，它真的在篮子里。

The place is very convenient. Saint Louis is very nearby. There are lots of restaurants and street stalls where you can eat out. The place is clean, and has all that we needed during our long stay - washer, hot shower, clean towels, and everything you need for cooking. May is a very wonderful host. I been an airbnb user since 2015, and I never encountered a host as responsive as May. She assisted us with our questions even towards the end of our stay. If ever I am back in Bangkok, I will come back to May's place. Thanks, May!
Perfect place and host!
Clean and spacious place right next to lots of street foods!
Great location, very clean and very fast response whenever we had any questions
4인 가족이 머물기 딱 좋은 공간입니다~ 모든 살림이 갖춰서 있어 지내기 좋습니다^^ 아시아 티그 근처라 배티고 이동하기 좋아요^^
Отличное место для ночевки, рядом парки, кафе и много всего, особенно радует BTS и LRT рядом, большое спасибо за жилье!
房东热情好客 体验非常好 泳池也很漂亮 有一张床有点小 不过大床说也在装修中哦 体验本地生活值得入住

First of all, the apartment is exactly what it shows off on the apps. The checkin process is clear and all the listed appliances are there in the room and all are functioning. We feel like we are in the hotel with household facilities.
However,it is not located at the jumped off distance from BTS. 12 minutes walks but very closed to lovely Icon Siam.
Ray was so responsive and even extended help for us to have a great BKK experience. The unit was also with superb feel of home ambiance!
Good place, calm location.
别墅的整体环境都不错，我们三家人去玩，一家住一层挺不错的，就是离市中心有点远了，地铁站走路需要10分钟左右也还行。房东人很好，还提前询问我们是否需要接机服务。整体感觉挺好的。我们有遗落东西回国后询问房东，房东也及时回复。门口的流浪狗是有点多。整体感觉挺好的，我们住的挺开心的。
Place is exactly in the pictures
A warm welcome and goodbye for travellers
Amazing stay
房间非常干净，地理位置也很好，出门就是seven eleven. 夜里被蚊子咬醒，如果房间有电蚊香就会更好了。早餐有吐司(自己烤），草莓果酱和黄油，凉的有牛奶和果汁在冰箱。可以自己冲咖啡，或者茶。如果能有一个鸡蛋和一点水果，就更好啦!

I really enjoyed our stay. The area was quiet and close to the pier for water transport. The space was exactly as described and pictured and was super clean. Communication was fantastic with plenty of helpful local information in the unit. Thanks for a great visit!
It was nice in general, unfortunately i was promised an extra bed but wasn’t provided one, all in all it was a good experience
The condo is very nice, the building looks like a luxury hotel. the views from the pool at the 43 floor are amazing. The apartment is small but comfortable.

ich war eine Woche in der Unterkunft und es hat alles gepasst. Bei Fragen hat bank sofort geantwortet. Die Lage ist gut 3 min von der Unterkunft ist eine Bushaltestelle von der 8 verschiedene Busse abfahren.
Awesome location

I booked this place for my mum and she thoroughly enjoyed her stay. The building and apartment are in great condition and very similar to the photos. Sumitra was helpful in clarifying the check-in process as we arrived.

Accommodation very well located in the BTS Saint Louis, business and expatriate district, more expensive than in other areas but remarkably quiet... the building is very well located and magnificent security staff, a dedication that I would like to find in France. As for SansaNeeya, I had a problem with the fridge and there was a new one in 1 week, really very good, I will come back with pleasure.

Condo spacieux et pratique, à proximité immédiate d'un marché de nuit, de plusieurs centres commerciaux, d'un accès métro.
Une piscine spacieuse et originale.
整体来说入住的体验是很好，位置很好离闹市不远，环境非常幽静，整个房屋的设计感很有格调。只是洗手间有点反味，还有因为沙发的清洁误会导致我们一家都有点不高兴，特别是孩子感觉被冤枉了。
Cosy and quiet accommodation. Reactive host and good communication.

Ami’s place is a great choice for families looking for a comfortable stay. It’s conveniently located quite close to Benchakiti Park and Terminal 21. You do need to walk a bit, but I actually enjoyed it because the surroundings are so nice and pleasant.
There was a small issue at the beginning with a slight smell from the sink water, which I think might be due to chlorine, but it disappeared quickly and everything was perfect after that.
Overall, this place is very nice and definitely worth the price great service and accommodation. I highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area!

The apartment is a short walk from Phrom Phong BTS station, making it easy to get around without traffic hassles. Nearby malls and 7-Eleven for basics.
Building amenities include a pool and gym, which were decent.
Good value for 2 digital nomads needing work space, good WiFi and convenience.

We’ve only tried three different Airbnb’s, and I think this has been our favorite so far.
-Balcony river view
-Very attentive staff, usually someone in the front office, that speaks ok English.
-Quiet and clean.
Breakfast is nothing special, but a nice touch.
Very nice and lovely apartment. Convenient location with food and convenient shops around. Easy to get around
Will come again
Alles super! Die Unterkunft hatte eine tolle Lage, war sauber und gemütlich. Die Kommunikation mit dem Host war schnell und unkompliziert. Sehr zufrieden – gerne wieder!

This is a new house and every weekday we listened to the sounds of a drill. The apartment is also new and quite cozy, but someone bit my wife at night, so we were forced to move out a little earlier than planned, because bites appeared on her skin. And the location is also not very good - there is nothing around, just a nice huge shopping center, but it’s a very long walk to get to it (about 15-18 minutes). But the house itself is good, two huge swimming pools and many recreation rooms. Nice staff and coffee machine on the 1st floor.
Nice apartment in a good neighborhood. Had a comfortable stay here.
完美的住宿，虽然偶尔会有小飞虫或者会有蚂蚁爬到桌子上，靠近马路但喧嚣程度不至于影响我，可以步行抵达车站及emsphere，如果再来曼谷的话还会选择这个地方

Perfect location
Very good & friendly staff

We booked this place to shop at the morning market in pratunam and it was GOLD LOCATION.
Everything was awesome except one of the shower’s heater didn’t work and it was on the 3rd or 4th floor so climbing up the stairs everyday was abit long.
Great location. Walking distance to Bts ploen chit.

Really think this is a hidden gem at the heart of Bangkok. Everything was great, from the comfortable beds and pillows, to the spacious clothes rack and luggage space, to the nice high ceiling space, to the strong air conditioning, all amenities were in top condition. Even the bath essentials, ie body wash, smelled great and was clean. We’d definitely book this place again, felt just right at home.

Place was great! The bed was fantastic clean and comfortable and don’t get me started with the bathroom it’s beautiful! Only thing I would have to say bad was if a later checkout time could have been accommodated

Thanyaluck was one of the best hosts I've ever had the pleasure of meeting through Airbnb! Absolutely recommend a catching a conversation with her and her husband if you run into them on the property. Incredibly warm and lovely people! Thank you so much for all of your help!! :)

Nice apartment that is just nice for 3 pax, conveniently located about 10 minutes walk to Terminal 21. It was well equipped but I would have preferred if there were some hooks available around the house to hang towels/clothes (instead of just hanging in the cupboard).
On a whole, we had a comfortable stay. Ndee gave clear instructions and was very responsive. We also appreciate the free snacks and drinks. Thank you!
very good

We’ve been living really comfortably for a month.
Nui's condo was perfact, from the inside of the accommodation to the facilities within the condo, and it was really nice that there was a Big C Mart right next to the condo.
The view was great too!
We hope to be able to book Nui's house when we visit Bangkok again. :)

Very good place but at night there are some noise from nearest bar and restaurant.
Apart from that very good.
But a little far from BTS.
因为飞机到的晚在附近住一晚。卫生干净，但是临街，声音非常大。但是房东回复很及时。有另外一间隔音会更好一些。

Great place, super clean, full of appliances and packed with all you need to have a great time. It’s close to Nana so location is excellent. Being in the red district makes it a bit noisy at night and on the streets. Restaurants and convenient stores nearby.

I spent 4 nights at Panidhi’s place and absolutely loved it. Everything was explained beforehand, and her detailed handbook with local recommendations was a great touch. I’ve been to Bangkok seven times now, and I’d say this was my favorite location—fantastic restaurants nearby, Emsphere mall just a 5-minute walk away, and great coffee right around the corner.
Check-in was very smooth, and the apartment itself was spotless, tidy, and well-equipped. The appliances and AC worked perfectly, which was especially welcome given the heat. Panidhi was extremely responsive and answered all my questions quickly.
What really stood out was the personal touch—she surprised me with the most wonderful dessert and flowers for my birthday, which made my stay feel extra special.
All in all, Panidhi was brilliant. I’d highly recommend this spot to anyone looking for a clean, comfortable stay in a fantastic location in Bangkok.
An incredible host. Made our stay so easy. Beautiful views and the rooftop pool was the highlight of the place! Highly recommend.
Had a fantastic stay! The place was spotless, well-equipped, and perfectly located. The host was incredibly responsive and made sure we had everything we needed. Highly recommend!
great place, communication was clear and timely. thanks!
séjour magnifique. l'hôte a été très accueillante et bienveillante
超级好的位置！步行就能到卧佛寺、大皇宫；美丽的价格，所有必须用品全都有，每天提供两瓶水，还有零食（被我吃了好多哈哈哈（sorry））；房东会主动帮助你，有问题只管问；这栋楼一共四个房间，该房间在顶楼（3楼），是适合两个人的大床房。

My friends and I had a wonderful trip to Bangkok!
Our homestay made the experience even more memorable. The hosts were incredibly responsive, proactive, and helpful — they made things so convenient for us by arranging our airport transfers both ways.
The place was just as pictured: clean, cozy, and well-organized. We especially appreciated the common area where we could relax and hang out after a long day of touring. It has universal sockets! And appliances are easy to use as we cook our breakfast everyday!
The location was perfect — peaceful and quiet at night for a good night’s sleep, yet close to everything we needed. We could easily find delicious dinners, mango sticky rice, milk tea, and even enjoy a Thai massage just around the neighborhood. The malls and markets were also within walking distance.
All in all, it was absolutely worth the price 💕💕 We’ll definitely be recommending this place to our family and friends!
넓고 쾌적합니다  내집같이 편안히 지내다 갑니다  다음에 또 방문할게요
The area is quite near to my mom's hospital and the accommodation is convenient for our family. Owner communication is nice and prompt. Overall, it worth for our family to stay there.

事前にチェックイン時間について調整を行い、お互い了承済みであったにも関わらず、その時間に現地に到着しても満室とのことでチェックインできませんでした。
その旨をオーナに連絡すると、「現地警備員がチェックイン手続きを行う」と連絡がありましたが、現地警備員は「満室なので、チェックインできない」と話し、結局チェックインはできませんでした。オーナにはその後メッセージを送っても無視されてしまいました。
エアビーのサポートにも連絡し、現地で１時間待ちましたが、結局状況は改善されることが無く、このまま待ってもいつチェックインできるかわからないため、キャンセルすることしました。
ヨーロッパより１２時間のフライト後のバンコクトランジットだったので、疲れた体を早く休めたいと考えて、チェックイン時間を事前に調整していたのですが、残念な結果となってしまいました。トラブル時に対応しない・できないオーナだと私は感じました。

L'appartement correspond parfaitement à l'annonce, il est facile d'accès et à moins de 10mn à pied du métro.
L'appartement se trouve dans une petite rue peu passante et calme qui permet de s'isoler un peu de l'agitation de Bangkok.

Para o efeito que pretendia serviu muito bem. Era apenas passar uma noite antes de apanhar o voo de volta para o meu país. Então serviu muito bem, pelo valor. Estava tudo limpo. Era tudo o q precisava.

Nous avons passé un agréable séjour , communication facile avec lily.
Je recommande ce logement

nuttee is a super friendley host. we met her when we arrived and she gave us all information needed and and was always available for any questions. the accommodation was very clean and cozy with an amazing view and a super comfy king size bed. the location is just perfect to reach all sights in less than half an hour.
I enjoyed stayng in this condo very much. Peack is a very friendly and helpful person. I can wholeheartedly recommend this place.
Great host and great location near the airport. We found this place in a bit of a rush and Janjeira was really accommodating and sweet. We hope to stay there again!
很舒適住宿環境，附近生活機能方便，只是離BTS & MRT 有段距離，但運用urab 叫車可以解決此問題。
L'hébergement est conforme à la description, et dans une zone résidentielle calme.
شقه كويسه

Thank-you, Kk, Chloe and Sharon. You were all very hospitable and your condo has a very refreshing and modern aesthetic.
Definitely a place I'd recommend and a place I'd positively consider staying at again.
Your proactive, clear and friendly communication during the stay was appreciated 😊
A great location with the convenience of being situated near a 7/11, Burger King etc.
room were good and clean. i will come back
awesome host - responsive and quick to respond to my requests. highly recommended
Actually, the property is much better than the pictures. Thank you.
很好的服务，很舒服的酒店
房间装修的很精致很温馨 一进门就给人眼前一亮的感觉 就像住在自己家里一样 所有的设备 都很新 我们住的很喜欢 下次有机会来泰国 还会定Aidan家

綺麗で清潔でスタッフの方の対応もよく、とても気持ちの良い滞在でした。
観光地からも近いため観光におすすめです。
We loved our stay. It’s ideal if you don’t want the touristy area, you get to mingle with the locals and the food is legit. The staff was very accommodating.

I enjoyed my stay here a lot. Next time I am in Bangkok I will probably come again.
Washing machine with dryer is also very helpful. You cannot here the neighbors.

Tte appartment is very big and the location is perfect for shopping or goining out for dinner. If you want to go to the airport the airport link is just 1 min away (also the regular skytrain). the rooms are very big and have super bathrooms. its on top in the 31 floor and there is even a gym and a pool. I can really recommand this location.
Among our expectations. The Condo is super classy, well equiped and in a very beautiful building. Our hosts were helpful and super flexible.
if I am visiting Thailand again I will choose this place.

L'alloggio ha tutti i comfort per un soggiorno breve tra un volo e l'altro. Ma io sono andata anche un giorno a Bangkok e devo dire che in taxi non ci ho messo molto, quindi ottimo anche per soggiorni di qualche giorno in più. La zona è tranquilla e sicura e il manager dell'ostello ti assiste in ogni momento, giorno e notte: un ragazzo davvero bravo, gentile e preciso in tutto. Il suo ottimo inglese ci ha permesso di farci anche due chiacchiere in tranquillità. La stanza pulita e ben ordinata. Sono forniti anche asciugamani e saponi doccia. Nello spazio condiviso c'è anche un frigo e ottima anche la colazione al mattino. Sicuramente tornerò al prossimo viaggio a Bangkok.
非常好
房间非常干净，早餐很丰盛。楼下的古董家具让整个民宿看起来很古朴精致。房东英语流利很好沟通。房子在古城区离大皇宫那几个著名景点都很近，对于想要探索古城区的人住那里很方便！楼下咖啡店餐馆啥都有不用担心吃喝

Nice place in a nice neighbourhood with lots of small Thai restaurants.
Communication trough mail with the owner is good.
very nice!
So happy to know this place after I was rejected from the previous location due to Earthquake! I will definitely use this soace for vacay again!
Great place. Helpful host. Airport transfer did not arrive but host refunded funds
The place is fantastic, worth the money. Definitely come back if I have chance.

The hotel & room was so good .
I suggested to come this place & stay one night.
都很好 除了客房窗帘 不遮光

Das Kondo ist super. Top Lage und für den Preis super. Es gibt 3 große Pools auf dem Dach, ein 2 Stöckiges Fitnesstudio (für die meisten ausreichend), ans Wochenenden einen Street Food Markt und alles funktioniert per Facescan.

My family and I enjoyed our stay. We loved the private rooms with bathrooms attached to each one along with a balcony. The washer was a great addition with the rooftop balcony to air dry clothes and hangout. Our host was very responsive and had recommendations for NYE. One of our members accidentally locked their bedroom door and wasn’t able to get in and they sent someone over immediately even though it was after 10pm. Water and snacks also provided! 10/10 would recommend.
这个房子很不错，靠近BTS站，去各大景点交通便利。房东人超好，只要你有问题都会热情的为你提供帮助。有提供免费早餐，味道超级棒。很不错，下次还会再来！

Newly furnished appartment with nice views and Pool. Very clean when I arrived. Building has a Restaurant and vending machines. Close to BTS Ekkamai, a mall and several other Shops and Restaurants. Wifi was super fast, around 500Mbit.
We had a great time at Karnie's place! Everything is brand new and the BTS is right around the corner! Karnie was very nice and communication was great. Highly recommended.
you know, when falling the rain, can you think about to fall in the pool the rain sounds and viewing. it was really great 👍  i  want to visit again here. thanks to stay here host.

Super nice and cozy place. Middle of Silom and near to Chong Nonsi BTS. Super super clean and well furnished.
Close to the road but not that noisy ❤️

Studio très confortable avec une vue à couper le souffle sur Bangkok ! Tout était très propre et l'emplacement est très intéressant. Je recommande vivement.

Place is AMAZING! Better than the pics !! Stunning STUNNING StuNNINg from floor to floor , wall to wall! Host is incredible & was very accommodating and very quick to respond to any questions. Was extremely helpful. The space was very clean and had all of the necessities for a few night stay. I would recommend.
Nice clean modern room in a good location. Would stay again.
Perfect
Great location, friendly and helpful hosts. Definitely recommend!

Hôtel très bien entretenu. La chambre a un très beau design.
Le jacuzzi et la salle de bain sont très agrèables.
Doungsawart est une personne très polie, aimable et de très bons conseils.
il y a de bons restaurants à proximité et une station de taxis en face de l'hôtel.
Pas de petit déjeuner prévu.
Nous recommandons cet hôtel à 100%.
Merci Doungsawart.
很高兴入住wm house 房东热情友好 会给到很详细的攻略 地理位置也很好 下次来还会选择这里的
Great stay, great location.

Accueil et hospitalité remarquable, c'est la deuxième fois que je loge chez Nithiporn quand je viens en Thaïlande et ça ne sera pas la dernière ! Situé dans un coin de Bangkok paisible, + authentique que les coins très touristiques et avec toutes les commodités à proximité avec les transports en prime (BTS + MRT à une station).
Le rapport qualité-prix est imbattable : encore une fois, merci, je reviendrais !

The family and I stayed at Shilei's apartment located at The Niche Mono for one month and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The apartment was perfect for the three of us supporting two bedrooms, loungeroom, kitchen and bathroom. We loved the spacious shower that also has a bench seat. A front loader washing machine is also provided. Shilei is a lovely host and was always quick to respond to our enquiries. The property has a swimming pool, small gym, quiet work room and a shuttle bus that will drop you off and pick you up at On Nut BTS directly outside Lotus Shopping Centre for a small fee of 15 baht per person. Walking from the apartment to On Nut BTS only takes 15 minutes so that is another option.

Appartement très près du BTS et avec le tuk tuk à disposition c’est parfait. Propreté impeccable, calme. Les bouteilles d’eau à disposition très appréciable.
La piscine après une longue journée à Bangkok vraiment Top
Adresse à recommander

We were staying for 6 days and we had a great stay! The unit was fully equipped and functional. The host was friendly and the check in instructions given were clear and simple. Full kitchen provided is inclusive of a microwave, it really conveniences us in preparing simple meals. On top of that, water and coffee were provided as well.
In addition, on our first day, we noticed there were some Wi-Fi connection issues but the host was responsive and helpful, hence it was quickly resolved!
Nice place , comfortable.

Our stay at Tatiya's was fine.  The 2 bedroom apartment was larger than we expected, and we found the listing and photos to be accurate.  There was plenty of room for 4 of us.  She was very helpful in arranging pick-up from the airport.  Check in could have been a bit simpler with more information provided beforehand.  The views are great, as is the location.  Our biggest complaint was the skillet which needs to be replaced.

The location is the main highlight of this apartment, right in the heart of the city with everything easily accessible. The building is a little older, but it is well maintained and clean.
The host is responsive, which made the stay comfortable. A major advantage is the 24-hour luggage storage facility, which is extremely helpful, especially for travelers with early arrivals or late departures.
Bathroom accessories seem due for an upgrade, and the TV should ideally be a smart TV, which would be more convenient for international travelers.
Overall, it was a pleasant and satisfactory stay, and I hope the minor improvements will be addressed in the future.

Bts附近 步行大約 三至四分鐘
附近有很多餐廳和咖啡店 早午晚三餐不是問題
還有泳池
