Muy buen departamento. Excelente ubicación. Todo muy ordenado y hermoso. Super atenta la anfitriona y respondió todas mus dudas y problemas.
Danke Jay , wie immer alles zur besten Zufriedenheit
Good condo, great view. I had a comfortable stay.
Ottima posizione, facilità di comunicazione e cordialità! Siamo rimasti una notte in più da quanto ci siamo trovati bene!

we had an awesome and cozy stay. Kals’
and Matts’ house is well maintained, we had everything what we needed. there is a great market near the house where we used to buy groceries and ready-to-eat food all the time, I highly recommend it.
communication with the hosts was easy-going and kind.
Was amazing!
房主很热情，房间干净整洁，东西齐全。很适合家庭旅游居住

Highly recommended for multiple reasons. The room was clean, and comfortable. Location is ideal for sightseeing as well as partying. The host's aunt who was at the house, was the sweetest ever! Phil was also so accommodating to help us self check-in as we were arriving at odd hours. His directions are on point with absolutely no confusion. This Airbnb all in all is better than one could hope for!

Stayed 4 nights at this air bnb that made our trip in Bangkok very comfortable, the host is very communicative, the appartement is the new building, great interior, clean and had the amenities in the  room, we can cooked or heated our meals in the kitchen, the location is very good opposite Talad Neon night market, and also just a few minutes walk to platinum mall and pratunam market,  also also from the airport just take the airport link (train) to last station PhayaThai you can walk, take tuk tuk or taxi, as muslim its easy to find halal food just opposite the appartment building,  there also halal food infront of planitum mall  and aslo you can go to Masjid Darul Aman to have halal food there. Such a good experience stay at this apt, free pick up at the airport is a plus, w e recommend to anyone who will visit bangkok to stay at this appartment.
Friendly host will recommend to other also
Evan was great in accommodating my non-traditional travel plans and provided great information and advice along the way.  Location is great and his directions spot on.
とても清潔で良かった

The Canal House was a wonderful experience during our trip to Thailand. Staying here, you really do feel like a local. The house is tucked away behind a gorgeous Wat that you get to meander through on your way home each time you return, which my boyfriend and I loved. The house is so charming, and we loved the feel and decor. The living area and bathroom are partially open to the outdoors so they get pretty hot, but the bedroom stayed cool with the (beloved) AC. Also, my boyfriend was awoken in the morning by the longboats passing by, but I wasn’t. I would say if you’re a light sleeper and want to sleep in, bring ear plugs, especially if sleeping in the front bedroom close to the canal.
If you’re using Grab to get around, I’d recommend using the Wat as your pick up point, since the house cannot be accessed by car.
Staying here was really a great experience and Ohm was an incredibly helpful host who offered a (delicious) restaurant recommendation and a tour of the local area. Would absolutely stay again!

Прекрасное особенное место! Мы узнали об этом месте через рекомендацию наших друзей, и теперь сами будем рекомендовать это место всем!!💚 Спасибо за возможность пожить в таком замечательном доме с историей!
Lovely place!
とても綺麗な部屋でした。やりとりもスムーズで滞在しやすかったです。

Very nice people. Amazingly kind.
Wonderful local fresh breakfast every morning.
Amazing!
Nice condominium, nice view

This was my fourth stay here, and once again, it was an amazing as always.
Mister B is incredibly helpful and friendly. The room is beautifully designed and clean. The location is top ranked, with easy access to everything in Bangkok. The rooftop pool offers a breathtaking 360-degree view of the Bangkok.
As for entering through the car park, it was not a problem at all, as everything was well explained in advance. The host even show me how to get in and also how to get out from the main entrance.
I would love to return again whenever I come back to Bangkok.

Nous avons passé un super séjour. Thanyaluck et son conjoint sont des hôtes très accueillants qui ont pris le temps de nous conseiller des activités à faire à Bangkok. Les lieux sont très mignons et agréables. Pensez juste aux boules Quies car nous entendons la circulation, bien que cela aille de pair avec le bon emplacement en ville ! Nous conseillons sans hésitation !

The house was nice, clean, and looks exactly as in the pictures. Check in was easy. The view is really beautiful. Bed very comfortable and all the linens new. Skybar in the building gorgeous. Available amenities could be greatly improved with some more kitchen utensils and basics such as salt, oil and coffee. Also the plants would look much better if they were real! All in all, a good place to stay only a few days but needs some improvements to make it feel more like a home. Some weird signs in the building about tourists not being allowed but all was ok anyway.
Great place to stay! A close 5 mins ride to KhaoSan road, or a 10-15 min walk.  Excellent clean building with elevator, highly recommended
very comfortable stay, great location, well equipped place.

I had the pleasure of a month long stay at Amy's condo, and during that time two issues that occurred were quickly dealt with.
The location is perfect a very short walk to the BTS.
There were plenty of eating places available in the area, as well there are two 7/11 stores, (one inside the building).
Amy's condo is exactly as described, and is the perfect place to get some rest, go shopping, or get some work done, as the internet had a good speed, and the smart TV was great as I was able to log into my Netflix account and watch shows I had started watching at home.
I highly recommend a stay at Amy's place, and I would certainly stay there again.
Very nice, fully equipped appartment that is perfect for short or longer stays. It's in a great location in the centre of many restaurants and bars too.
每个时间段需要做什么，房东都会提前提醒，很细心很体贴。不懂的问题她dou yi yi ji都一一解答，非常热情。

Je loge régulièrement chez Mike lorsque je suis de passage à Bangkok.
Circle 31 est une valeur sûre.
Idéalement situé. Proche de Asoke tout en étant à l'abri du traffic de Sukhumvit.
Je recommande.

Fantastic apartment, great location and friendly hosts! Beautiful apartment and facilities, perfect for what I needed 👌☺️

Loved the place! Super clean, comfy bed, fast internet, and everything you need—especially the washer-dryer, super convenient. The rooftop pool, gym, and sauna were amazing. Really impressed!
很棒的地方
Shirley’s place was perfect for large groups. We stayed for 4 nights and had a great time. The airbnb is close to supermarkets, cafe, restaurant, etc. Definitely recommended!
This place is quite far, the room is small without windows and balcony . call taxi have to book from the grab.

Was greeted with great hospitality by the staff who waited patiently due to the traffic jam. The interior & exterior was well furnished with very detailed yet minimalist concept. The pros: Squeaky clean,love the concept, quiet location, a scenic balcony view,helpful staff & nearby laundry n shops. The cons: As the floor board is made of wood it was impossible not to make the floor creak as you walk around. The flight of steep stairs to your room. But overall I'm very impressed & satisfied with my stay! Would try out their other rooms in the future!
Great apartment in a big nice building with restaurants, cafes and shop. Lily was very helpful and responsive. I totally recommend.
Pundh's place was super nice and great host! They allowed us to extend our checkout time because of our flight being delayed, which was super helpful! Would definitely stay again! :)
This place was perfect for me, as a solo business traveler in town for a week! Totally recommend it!
Super Apartment, alles wie beschrieben.

Good location in vicinity of the BKK airport. It's also such a quiet place that I had no trouble to sleep at night.
The host, Dennis is a very interesting person and talkative. It was such fun to listen to him on his experience as a diver and many people visiting him in the past. What's best about him is he is so passionate about fishing, which was my main objective during the stay in Thailand. We enjoyed visiting a fishing pond in the suburbs.
One thing you should have in mind. Dennis can give so much suggestions or options to choose out of kindness, so you need to choose ones based on your criteria. Otherwise you would easily run out of your time :).
Great location, view, and room.

Très belle endroit, avec une piscine et un service de massage dans la résidence à prix super attractif. Toujours une personne à la réception de la résidence, un airbnb avec les services d’un hôtel en soit ! Magasin 7/11  juste à proximité, et quartier paisible.

Angie’s home was in a very good location in Bangkok and transportation to different locations were a breeze. The only thing I had a complaint with was mosquitoes somehow coming into the room even after closing all doors leading outside but besides that 10/10!

Chai est un hôte parfait, très serviable.Il était présent pour nous recevoir et nous a montré les lieux avec sobriété et clarté. L' endroit est en tous points conforme à sa description, et parfaitement équipé.
Tout ce qui est nécessaire immédiatement était prévu, eau, café...
L'appartement est très joli et fonctionnel.
Le plus : il est situé à deux pas du Skye Train, dans une rue calme et verte, à une minute d'une géniale cour entourée de stands qui servent une nourriture délicieuse à des prix imbattables. Il y a aussi pas loin des cafés comme le Toby par exemple, plusieurs bons restaurants , un Spa avec d' excellent massages. Nous avons été comblés .

Everything is good.
Just the location a bit far from the public transport.

This was my last stop before I wrap up my journey at Thailand.  I wanted a place with a bit higher price than normal, but really wanted to have a nice place.  The building appeared to be relatively new, the room was very clean, the place is a walking distance to pretty much everything in the heart of Sukhumvit area.  Because I've been to this area a month ago, it was very easy to find.  The instruction from the host was crystal clear.  Getting into the room required no questions or hesitations at all.  The first impression when I entered the room was very good.  I really liked the smell in the room.  The smell was so good that I could forget the smell out in the street.  The room was spotless, all the lights were functioning well, all the appliances were working great, and the bathroom was clean.  I didn't really have to ask the host anything at all.  The access to the rooftop swimming pool and the gym was a bonus if you don't feel like walking on the street or taking trains.

Lily’s airbnb was really good . Spend around 1 week and recommend if someone wants a peaceful and good stay even for long stays . Have pool and gym facilities as well . Have many things nearby if one wants to eat . Only the MRT 10 minutes to go by a Bike or Car , otherwise everything is perfect. Highly Recommended for a good stay in Bangkok .

The location of this apartment is good but a little bit far from the nearest station (about 10 minutes by foot). I often use Grab to call taxi from the station because it was so hot and humid outside and you will get sweaty easily.
The room was really clean and enough space for 2 people. The kitchen was clean but no condiments like salt, oil etc. It has a few cups and plates so we had to give up cooking there.
Around the apartment, there were expensive restaurants and cafes but you will find some reasonable restaurants if you check out by google. I could find my favorite restaurant around there.Also the convenience store (7-11) is very near.
Their offer a taxi from the airport for free was good to save money.
I recommend this apartment.

The place was wonderful to stay at and we enjoyed the layout of the place, as there is a cafe on the main floor. The only issue was with the directions, as the address sent to us was incorrect (the street name was spelled wrong and sent us somewhere very far from the actual address).
The host communicated quickly to rectify the issue, however. I would definitely recommend this place!

Our stay was absolutely delightful! The host went above and beyond to make sure we had everything we needed and was incredibly responsive to all of our questions. Communication was seamless from the very beginning—clear instructions, quick replies, and thoughtful check-ins to ensure our comfort.
The property was exactly as described, and well-maintained, with thoughtful touches that made it feel like home. It’s clear the host genuinely cares about their guests’ experience.
We would highly recommend this place and hope to stay here again in the future! Thank you for a wonderful stay!
房間乾淨整潔，整體風格非常喜歡，熱水供應穩定，廁所水壓足夠，廁所乾淨！入住流程簡單方便，交通地點方便，前面10公尺處就有7-11，房東訊息回覆非常快速，下次如果有機會會想再訪！！
Great location, Ray walk to Chong Nonsi BTS. Very spacious place, fully equipped. Furniture slightly dated though. But for the value spent, no complaints. Highly recommended.

I do recommend and would
Come back again!!

Angelina’s place is one of the best kept airbnbs I’ve seen. It’s more than value for money. It’s a superb property with pristine views. She’s also a superb host!
And coming from a fellow Airbnb host myself, I can see kind of efforts she has put in so kudos to that !

숙소는 깔끔했고 가격대비 최고입니다.

great location and great size, excellent apartment!

Un véritable havre de paix, de confort, et d'esthétique après des journées dans le brouhaha, la circulation démente, et la pollution de Bangkok.
Ici tout est calme et sérénité, avec une vue superbe sur la ville du 30 ème étage.
Très bon emplacement, non loin de la Chao Praya et des embarcadères.
Même la piscine fut un moment délicieux (nous étions seuls). Accueil chaleureux et discret. Concierges souriants. Petite supérette au pied de l'immeuble où l'on trouve l'essentiel (même des cartes sim et des recharges tel.)
Je recommande vivement!

Very good accommodation and services , perfect to explore the city with a comfortable stay near everything
浴室去水比較慢 水壓比較少 床的話有一點不太乾淨 但是其他的都挺不錯 紙巾給得比較少但是跟房主溝通後馬上幫我們補充了 步行兩至3分鐘已經有便利店 很多附近的夜食肆需要六至10分鐘

The location is excellent as it is close to the bts. The free shuttle as well as the 10baht motorbike service are so convenient as well. It is only one stop away from the BITEC conference centre.
The facilities too are excellent. Great gym and pool. The larger pool was under maintenance when I was there and I'm sure would have been great but the small pool is good enough. The coffee in the cafe is good too and the 24hr convenience store is just the best.
性价比很高，楼下有7-11跟市场，靠近bts走路5分钟。露天游泳池跟健身房，投币式洗衣机。唯一缺点就是房间有点老，所以有点老式的味道，其他的都很好。

Tolle Wohnung, blitzssauber, die Kommunikation im Vorfeld und Check-in hat super funktioniert. Gute Anbindung an die BTS-Station Nana.
Mir persönlich hat das Viertel nicht gefallen, es war mir zuviel "Rotlicht". Das ist jedoch nur eine persönlicher Eindruck. Wer Party, Bars, Clubs möchte, ist hier genau richtig.
Die Wohnung können wir absolut empfehlen!

We had the pleasure of staying in Ben's condo for 4 weeks. Ben is a wonderful host and ensured that all of our needs attended to. The condo is in a great location and has easy access to the Thong Lor BTS and awesome local restaurants, bars and street food. Thanks Ben for a great stay!

The hosts are sweet. They let us checkout late on request. The unit is exactly like the pictures. Tony’s is right in front of the building with awesome food. The place is at the heart of Soi 11 and all restaurants are at a walkable distance. You will not regret booking this place. It is the best I have found in Sukhumvit.

Everything was good.
Very spacious and good location.

Very good place, especially for friends and family, the house is spacious!
Eatery, convenient store, and massage place are within walking distance.
The staff there is very helpful and responsive.
The only downside is the water heater, it’s difficult to adjust to the right temperature, unless you are into hot water, other than that, everything else is fine and all of us are satisfied with the stay.
Alles bestens
The place is nice and has good surroundings. Really enjoyed during our stay and had a lot of fun.

일반 호스텔 인줄 알고 왔는데 호텔이네요. 직원분들 친절하시고 방도 넓고 화장실도 넓어요. 전체적으로 청결하고 벌레는 없었어요. 아침엔 조식도 제공해요.
카오산로에서 걸어서 5분정도 거리로 매우 가까워요. 그랩 타실경우 로얄호텔이라고 하시면 될듯하고 호스트가 주소랑 호텔명을 메세지로 보내주는데 참고 하세요. 메세지 확인 못해서 주소로 검색하다 좀 헤맷네요. 어플로 이용 안하면 메세지 알림이 안오네요.
수영장은 있는데 이용 안해봤어요. 헤어드라이어는 프론트에 말하면 가져다 줘여. 방엔 비치 안되있어요. 전체적으로 가격대비 좋은 위치 좋은 공간이었습니다. 만족해요

I stayed for three weeks at this condo and I enjoyed it very much. The location could not be more central in Bangkok than this. 5 minutes away from BTS Phrom Phong and the EM-District with its great malls. You will find a variety of restaurants, from Michelin to street vendor, great cafes, Spas (Makkha) and grocerie shops (7 11 and Tops) right there next to this condo. The condo itself has everything you need. I enjoyed the views from the 22nd floor and enjoyed the swimming pool on the 29th floor. The gym is fairly equipped and nicely designed.
Everything was clean and the staff always very friendly.
The host was very responsive and always tried to help me. When I needed an ironing board, they had one delivered to me right away.
Thank you for everything! I hope to come back soon!

Definitely one of the best accommodations in BKK! The location is near the MAT samyam and BTS station, 2 stations to Siam. The room is lovely, clean and super comfortable. Also can use the beautiful rooftop swimming pool and gym. The communication between B and us are efficiently, he almost thinks everything to let us feel better when stay here, we are so lucky to have the chance to be his guest! Hoping will come back soon and definitely will choose this place again!

Tib was really fast response. The place was clean and as pictured. Location is great. It is near BTS station, pratunam and platinum, central world, it is very easy to get around from Tib’s place. The room and the common room were very clean too!

Daniele was a great host. The room was clean and had everything I needed. It was up super steep stairs on the 4th floor, but Daniele was kind enough to carry my bag up to the room for me. I wanted to make my own breakfast, but the microwave was,on the 3rd floor, and everything else o the 1st floor, so if you want to do lots of self catering, probably not the hostel for you.
The location was great. I'm vegan, and it was a 10 minute walk from many amazing places to eat.
The room was quiet, and the guests kept themselves to themselves.
My only issue was the lack of WiFi in this room. Daniele is working on it, but I had to go downstairs to plan my day, send emails and look at how to get places.

습한 날씨와 하필 여행기간중 겹친 스모그로 지치는 여행이었음에도 불구하고 Tor의 멋진 숙소와 아침마다 다른메뉴의 현지식사가 여행을 즐겁게 만들어 주었습니다. 그의 세심한 배려와 친절한 여러 정보또한 여행에 큰 도움이 되었습니다.동생들과 함께한여행내내 어머니아버지모시고 꼭 다시오겠노라 다짐할 정도로 멋진 숙소입니다!! Despite the wet weather and the smog that overlapped the trip, Tor's nice lodging and a different menu of local meals made the trip enjoyable every morning. His careful consideration and kind information were also very helpful for his trip.It's such a nice accommodation that I promised to get together after traveling with my younger siblings.
I've enjoyed my stay here. The neighborhood is nice and the accomodation is nice and simple !
Nice place and the room looks exactly the same in the photo. Host is very friendly and helpful. Just the location is a bit far from metro.

I’m TRULY HAPPY with Gift’s place. She really think it all. I get everything I want and need. DEFINETLY WORTH THE PRICE !!! 💖💖

房間非常溫馨舒適且富有設計感！床單也非常乾淨柔軟！尤其是房東給了我們非常多的資訊！因為不懂泰文的關係，房東也盡可能幫了我們很多忙，例如跟計程車司機溝通等等！（當然是在他們有空的情況下）。
這次住了兩間房間，風格都不一樣，但是舒適度都是一樣的好！非常推薦！

Pakorns  apartment was perfect! great location, walking distance from the train station, very close to restaurants and street side markets. Very clean and cozy. Pakora is a very accomodating host that will go beyond to make sure that we were happy and satisfied. Thanks Buddy!

sehr hilfreich,  komme gern wieder !

房间和图片一样，光线很好，离地铁站也很近。房东也很热情。就是没有拖鞋，牙刷牙膏也只有一副，后面可能需要再去买一只牙膏。但是最大的缺点就是这个空调太响了，响到无法入睡的程度，像有一个卡车在房间里，曼谷又特别热，晚上只能关掉空调睡觉。真的建议房东或许找个人来修一下，住了五天仿佛觉得自己被这个空调吵的快精神衰弱了。
Friendly atmosphere and clean room  with everything you need - in very calm and peaceful area. 10 to 15 minutes walk to Bkk main international area with restaurants etc.

Phatthira es una anfitriona increíble, estuvo pendiente todo el tiempo e hizo que nuestra estancia fuera agradable. También tiene un restaurante y la comida que nos recomendó estivo deliciosa. recomendamos ampliamente su alojamiento.
better than most hotels for stay

We had a wonderful stay at this beautiful designer house in Bangkok. The house was spacious, stylish, and thoughtfully designed across three floors. The ground floor bedroom was very convenient for guests who preferred to avoid climbing stairs, although light sleepers should note that sound from the upper floor can be heard quite clearly as the ceiling is not soundproof.
The first floor featured a clean, well-equipped kitchen as well as a washer and dryer, which were very convenient during our stay. The top floor had two more bedrooms, making the house ideal for our family. We especially enjoyed the nearby local market, where we bought fresh fruits and seafood at very affordable prices. There were also several 7-Eleven stores within walking distance, adding to the convenience. The only minor concern was that the floor near the kitchen area could be slippery and the staircases were steep, so extra care is needed. Overall, we had a great time and would be happy to recommend this place.

Fantastic house, great location.
Great communication and very helpful host.
The house is spotless and well appointed. Large rooms with comfortable beds and good storage for a short stay.
Convenient kitchen, laundry facilities and pool table and lounge rooms.
Great neighbourhood with excellent coffee place a few doors away. Local restaurants and cafes within walking distance.
Only thing to be aware of is the very steep stairs with narrow treads. Not for anyone with mobility issues or small children.
The place was in a great location. The owner was very responsive and helped with whatever we needed. They also gave us many recommendations for the surrounding area.

The appartment is good for one or two person. It is very clean. The pool is very calm. The location is next to the BTS station and MBK center so it’s very interesting. Pyt welcome me late but it was not a problem for him and he will answer quick if you have any questions.

Wir genossen es ,entlang der Kanäle durch die kleinen Gassen zu spazieren. Die Skyline Station war in fußläufiger Entfernung. Wir würden bei einem nächsten Besuch in Bangkok gern wiederkommen.

Phil’s place is perfectly positioned to explore the old town. The apartment was lovely and clean and all the amenities you could need were provided. 4박동안 너무 편하게 지냈습니다. 늦은 도착시간에도 기다려주시고 세면대 고장냈을때도 30분안에 와서 바로 고쳐주시고
너무 감사했습니다. 방콕에 간다면 또 머물고 싶습니다.

This place is close to the blue line so it’s convenient but it depends on where you want to explore. Check in was easy but we didn’t really get to meet the host.
There were a few problems with the room: the air conditioner was constantly leaking water even when turned on to the optimal temperature requested by the host. The sink handle is broken and the water comes out and sprays all over the place. The sink also empties out into the shower drain which I found to be unpleasant.
While this room is cheap you have to take out your own trash, buy your own toiletries and water so in the end I would say there are better deals for the price you end up paying. It felt to me like a motel that was not being maintained, not an airbnb.
位置很便利，顶楼的泳池也很棒，就是楼下在修路，路稍微有点破烂
This is a nice and quite condo outside of Bangkok.  Atikun is organized and quick in response to your needs or inquiries.

管家沟通顺畅，安排很好，有问题随时沟通，并解决，总体可以4.5分。

Yimmy’s place really made you feel like home in all possible ways. There are personal touches everywhere that tell you she put serious effort in thinking about the guests’ comfort. Not forgetting she has been very patient in answering all my queries regarding the local tour recommendations. Her place is a tiny gem tucked in a moderately busy road next to many restaurants and religious institutions. Staying at hers added a unique sense of immersion within the community without compromising the universal standards of hygiene and convenience. We love Yimmy’s place and were willing to take good care of it just like how she had taken effort to care about her guests!
ずっと行きたかった宿でした。泊まってみて期待を上回る体験ができました。隣のレストランからタイ料理を持ってきてもらい、運河脇のテラスでご飯を食べました。最高の体験でした。夕焼け、朝日も綺麗です。また、ワットポー、ワットアルン、ワットプラケオのすぐ近くに位置し、寺を感じながら過ごせるのも嬉しいことでした。また行きたいです。
Es war super schön bei Siri, wir haben uns direkt zuhause gefühlt und den Aufenthalt sehr genossen. Die Wohnung hat wirklich alles was man braucht und hat einen Wahnsinns Ausblick.

An excellent and well kept place. We had a self drive car and it was super easy to park in the free parking in the basement. The premises felt safe and since I had travelled with my family, that was my prime reason for selecting this place. Over all, a very clean and well kept place. A great place to love in if you are in Bangkok. Cheers.
Great location and amenities. Great helpful host
Really nice apartment in a great location. The street is very quite for how central it is.

Our stay at Gem’s place was wonderful. Tidy, quiet and modern. The location was excellent, easy to get around, close to the train and lots of restaurants. The building was great, nice pool, gym, and a small convenience store in the lobby which was very handy. Gem’s communication was prompt, he was sure to check in on us on arrival and departure. Would definitely recommend this stay if you’re visiting the area.
The Place is nice, the same as the picture
Really enjoyed my stay here. Loved the neighborhood. Such a nice change of pace from Central Bangkok. Hope to stay here again sometime!

Our stay was phenomenal! It’s exactly what we wanted as we start our travel, a pretty, comfortable and peaceful place. The place was better than the photos and Sani’s breakfast was great, she even sources them sometimes from the neighborhood.
I recommend this place 100% and the best part is that it’s close to all transportation needs (train and bus)
Very modern condo on a quiet Soi. The location is perfect if you want to be close to everything, but need a chill place to escape to. Great host with easy check-in process.
We had a great stay, and the view is stunning. The apartment is super clean and Jitladda very helpful. Thank you :)

Personale carino e molto disponibile, letti comodi. Le stanze (almeno quella dove ho dormito io) si affacciano sulla strada principale. Se vi da fastidio il rumore, un paio di tappi per gli orecchi sono consigliati.
这次入住该酒店是一次非常愉快的经历。酒店的位置十分便利，周边配套齐全。房间舒适温馨，隔音效果良好。酒店员工都很热情周到，服务态度极佳。真心觉得这是一家值得信赖的好酒店。

We were a group of six adults and had a very pleasant stay at this spacious flat. The rooms were very comfortable with plenty of wardrobe space. The living and dining areas were cozy and perfect for relaxing together.
The location was excellent — very close to the BTS and surrounded by nice hotels and restaurants. Having a washing machine and dryer was a great added advantage. The kitchen was equipped with a rice cooker, toaster, fridge, and cooking range, which was very convenient.

Overall, we had a wonderful stay and would highly recommend this place to others!

El alojamiento muy limpio y ordenado , las chicas siempre están limpiando y al pendiente si necesitas algo . tomamos el tren nocturno y nos dejo poner nuestras mochilas en su almacenamiento de valijas sin costo alguno . This Airbnb was amazing! A great find and spot to stay when in Bangkok, very easy to get to from the airport. The room was great and the air conditioner was much needed and so nice! Staff was friendly that helped us in and host was very accommodating as well! Great stay!  10/10
Everything was great! Clean, big bathrooms! Nice location quiet but close to the action as well.
This place is good value for money and hassle-free! They have good WiFi and cozy cafe downstairs that made my working day very smooth.

My friend and I enjoyed staying at this hostel-style hotel for a few nights. The room was super clean and there were lots of amenities like free laundry (this was huge for us) and free coffee, water, and snacks. Perfect place for long staying. Very clean room with all the necessary things for living. Well-guarded house. Nice and helpful guardians and staff. There is a free gym and pool in Condominium. There is a shopping mall Central Rama 3 in 10 minutes of walking.

Die Unterkunft war völlig in Ordnung. Sie liegt sehr abgelegen und ruhig, dennoch gibt es nette Cafés und coole Bars in der Nähe, und die Kommunikation war gut.

While the living room furniture in 2C looks nice, it could be more comfortable if using it for long periods of time.
Dr. Supot allowed us a late check-out and when our flights were cancelled at the last minute, he arranged for us to stay on another 24 hours until our re-scheduled flight. We would definitely stay here again!

Overall, while the host was attentive and tried to help, the stay did not feel like strong value for the price paid.

It's very quiet at night so no issues getting to sleep. Thank you for a great stay!

The apartment is convenient located, but the apartment was noisy all night. The host was responsive but when I asked for sheets for the pullout bed, she said she would provide and never provided them during our stay. The extra comforter had large stains on it, which I sent photos of and this was not addressed when she said it would be.
The pullout bed was a rough pad on an old wire frame and squeaked loudly at every little movement, and the normal bed was not terribly comfortable so neither of us slept well our entire stay.
The car service was convenient, but on our trip back to the airport, the driver got into a yelling and shoving argument with the building security which was really awkward and lasted for 15 minutes, and if there had been taxis nearby we would have left to find a taxi instead.
Overall despite the convenient location, I cannot recommend this place.

Apartment has everything you could need , also a gym pool and hairdressers , massage , food trucks at weekends , 7/11 right at entrance restaurants close by,, supermarkets down. the street , chemist's and public transport close by ,, not far from park .
Host was great and always avaliable to help . hope to be back next year as used the apartment for trainning at the FA Group muay thai gym .
要狂给这间温馨的房间打call！离地铁步行5到10分钟的距离，去哪都方便，地铁站对面就有个很大的夜市，楼下711买东西很方便。房间干净，房东还给准备了零食和水，房间是每天有人给打扫的。房东是同胞，所以选择这里会感觉非常踏实！

L’immeuble, composé de 2 bâtiments, est bien situé, dans une rue commerçante mais calme le soir.
Vous avez la possibilité de vous restaurer, de faire vos courses à proximité ou de vous faire livrer en bas de votre bâtiment.
La station BTS, Punnawithi, est à 15 minutes à pied. Très pratique pour se rendre au centre de Bangkok ou pour visiter les lieux touristiques.
La pièce principale est assez grande et la salle bain à un bon espace.
La cuisine à ce qu’il faut pour faire des repas. N’hésitez pas à demander les équipements manquants, car vous ne les avez pas forcément en arrivant.
Il y a une agréable piscine et une salle de sport bien équipée.
Un élément important : vous ne pouvez pas savoir en réservant à quelle étage et dans quel bâtiment se trouvera votre chambre.
La communication est plutôt rapide avec Thern Sam.
Ok but a little bit dusty

Excellent place to stay. Fantastic location and quite nice interior.
A tall person may not like the shower design (it’ll work but the shower head is low), but otherwise extremely comfortable!
The room was clean and communication was good. The only problem is it says two beds and one is just a mat on the floor

Location is near BTS statation so we can move easily. Also even though power out Siharaj helped us as far as he can.
We really enjoyed staying thanks alot
Great place and helpful host

5일동안 방콕 관광목적으로 가성비 따져서 머물럿습니다. Bts나 사톤항구까지 컨디션 좋을땐 도보로 10~15 ?오후엔..걷기 싫으면 에어컨 안나오는 버스 8밧 타고 다녔더니 관광의 질이 좋았습니다. 사톤항구가 근처라 왕궁 왓아룬 아포 카오산로드 아이콘시암 수상이용하는데 정말 편했습니다 다른관광 미팅장소인 아속역 맥도까지 편히 잘 갓구요. 더운나라여서 하루에 샤워3번하는지라 전 수건을 엄청 넉넉히 챙겨갓습니다 제공되는수건은 2인이라 2장이였는데 요청하면 더 줄듯하네요. 전 수영러버라 수영장 이용 잘했습니다 옆건물가셔서 카드키 대고 5층 가시고 들어갈때 카드 대시면 됩니다 완전 편해요 관리 잘되더라구요. 12시에도 약간에 나무 그늘이 있어서 전세내고 안되는 접영연습했네요 ㅋㅋ. Bts 근처인 로빈슨에 가서 망고사고 코코넛사고 햇는데... 빌딩1 슈퍼 가시면 망고며 과일이며 코코넛물담은 거.. 다 팝니다.. 슈퍼 방문한 후엔 거기만 갓어요. 릉루엉국수집 반쏨땀집 그랩푸드로 이용햇구요. 먹은거만 얼른얼른 치우고 클린룸에 버리시면 될듯.. ㄱ ㅐ mi ㅁㅏ ㄴ ㅏ yo! 전 완전 잘잤는데 예민한 남편은 휘파람소리처럼 울어대는 새와 바람에 흔들리는 창문 때문에 잠을 잘 못잤습니다. 다음에 한달살기 한다면 200% 재방문 하고 싶습니다. 전 너무 만족했어요!!! 고마워요~
房东很好，回复及时。是酒店式公寓，做卫生很干净，里面的设施也很齐全，不过拖鞋看起来不是一次性的，好在楼下就有便利店和小超市，直接买了一双非常好穿且便宜的拖鞋。楼下有个市场，吃饭便宜而且很好吃，有很多具有当地特色的美食。离地铁站的距离稍微有点远，但是叫车很快，总体上出行算是很方便的
I like the location, close to the metro. so easy to go to the city and around,plus the room has 2 bathroom that makes things easier for me and my husband. we really like it.

为了看演唱会定的房子，和照片一模一样，非常温馨干净，房间还香香的。房东奶奶很贴心，还过来机场接我们，到了以后仔细的告诉我们房间使用指南和注意事项，回程的时候很早，所以也帮忙叫了的士。我们这几天的行程很满，她都帮忙准备了免费早餐，房间里也有小零食，总之住的很愉快，离机场很近，就是打车不太好打，要走出去一小段路，旁边有个酒店可以定位，如果有小伙伴一起出行的话是个不错的选择。非常感谢亲切又可爱的房东奶奶～她的狗狗也很乖很可爱～

The accommodation was very clean. I'm afraid of bugs, but I didn't see a single one. The MRT station is only a five-minute walk from the accommodation. There's a night market at night. It's a reasonable choice compared to the more expensive places in central Bangkok.
we had a great stay

Nice apartment, fast internet and the apple tv is a real bonus. About 10 mins walk from the BTS Bang Na station. A bit confusing to find at first but once you know where it is it is easy to get to. Plenty of street food nearby and a really nice market across the main road. 7/11 nearby.

Staying at Ithanom's place surely beyond my expectation.  She was a great host and easy to communicate with. Great tips given by her during my stay to make my stay more enjoyable and easy.  The apartment's location is superb,  only 2 minutes walk to Chong Nonsi BTS station and 3 stops to Siam. Supermarket is just around the corner and many great restaurants nearby, even McDonalds and Starbucks is just around the corner. Stylish apartment with great amenities, great view, 24 hrs receptionist, security guard, better than staying at hotel. Spacious apartment that fits my whole family. I really appreaciate great communications with host.  Thank you so much for having us

Great Airbnb for people who want a real feel of what it’s like to be a local in Bangkok, located near multiple 7 Elevens and only a 20 minute drive from busy areas I would definitely recommend this space, the host was very helpful and communicative and the apartment itself was spacious, clean and came with very nice amenities
Perfect place for its worth in Bangkok

I would like to say a huge thank you to the wonderful host Dr. Sujira! The flat is very tidy, has all the necessities, swimming pool is pretty nice.  The location is comfortable, close to the subway station and markets.

This is a kids paradise in an urban city. The apartment is spacious and lovely. If you are a group or family this is definitely the place you want to be. The location is excellent with a quick walk to the BTS from the apartment. There is also a Villa Market closeby for groceries and countless places to eat/restaurants are around too. I can safely recommend this place for others as I will be back here again too.

Viel potenzial, leider hatte das Zimmer einen unangenehmen geruch (wir vermuten es waren die Wasserleitungen), so dass man erstmal mehrere Minuten lüften musste, wenn man das Zimmer betreten hat. das Highlight war definitiv der Pool auf der Dachterrasse.

很好的屋主 会讲中文 容易沟通 名宿干净卫生 设备齐全 屋主会一直介绍我们好玩的旅游景点 告诉我们泰国的文化 各个美食地点 很关心我们会提醒我们注意自己的健康多喝水因为泰国天气很热 也通知我们交通繁忙不易除外的时段 除此之外 还推荐我们便宜的打车软件 非常实用 超级推荐

房子很不错，里面的装修风格很喜欢，还有就是房东超级好，还有爱心早餐，唯一有一点就是位置不好找，但是后来周围环境熟了之后，就很好找。不远处就有一个地铁站。总之很不错。

The property is so strategic, near to BTS Victory Monument and only 3 mins walk to 7/11. Also the room is really clean and there’s much amenities and equipment which I can use. The host is very helpful, such a great experience to stay here in 3 nights. Would I stay here again if I visit bangkok again ? definitely YES

The perfect place for 1 to 2 people. The apt. was very easy to get to (about a 12 minute walk from Ekkamai BTS), and not very far from many places to eat or grocery shop.  The building was very well kept - many people who work for the building around and cleaning around the clock. Also many people there to help you if you have any questions. Bed was comfortable, and whenever I had a question the airbnb host was very quick to respond and resolve the issue. I highly recommend staying here!

We visited this place in April 2018 and we are from Mumbai, India. This was amazing place to stay with family during our trip to Bangkok. The condo is located centrally and easy to reach. Its a little far from the main city but its totally worth staying at this place.
The host had provided clean towels, hand wash, tooth paste, shampoo in both the bathrooms. I would say nothing was missing and everything was just up to date.
There is a mall just next to the building so food and shopping can be done from this place, A seven eleven store is in the building so you will get everything you want from this store.
About the host :- The host was great although we never meet her personally a detail instructions with photographs was sent to us for reaching this place and getting the house keys. It was so easy because of the point to point details given to us. The host was caring enough to suggest us on how to book taxis and trips to local sight seeing.
We also misplaced the host's house key and could not find it. When we informed the caretaker about the same a duplicate key was given to us in 10 min without giving any trouble to us. If you are planning to book this place book it now trust me you will have enjoy.

Logement parfait sur Bangkok pour passer de bonnes vacances.

A true gem in the heart of Bangkok. Despite being right in the city center, the location is surprisingly quiet and offers a beautiful view of the skyline.
The entire condo is immaculate and in excellent condition. The apartment itself has every amenity you could possibly need, and the rooftop pool is absolutely fantastic.
Leakhana is a wonderful host. She always responded quickly, her answers were helpful and clear, and no question ever went unanswered. She also receives feedback very openly, and you can really tell that she does everything she can to make sure her guests have the best possible stay.
Thank you for the lovely time, Leakhana!

This place is a gem! Huge spacious modern and minimalist spot. Has a nice kitchen, marble counters and tables, great views, big beautiful windows, two very nice bathrooms with amazing water pressure.
It is in a quiet but very central area so everything that is worth going to is a very short ride away, with public transportation also very close.
I've stayed here twice now and would definitely come back again.

J’ai passé presque 4 mois dans ce logement, le plus gros point fort est clairement la localisation. Il est parfaitement localisé entre les différents beaux quartiers de la ville. À 5 minutes de Central World et des plus beaux centres commerciaux, à 10 minutes de Thonglor et d’Ekkamai. Les trajets coûtent relativement moins cher avec Grab et Bolt depuis cette zone-ci, je l’ai su en comparant avec d’autres locataires dans différents beaux quartiers de Bangkok. L’appartement est plus que suffisant pour une personne, il y a tout ce dont nous avons besoin, excepté une bonne plaque de cuisson, c’est clairement le défaut de l’appartement. La la vue sur la piscine chaque matin était un énorme plaisir; à jamais mon logement préféré.
Great host! Great quiet location but close to everything. BTS very short walk away. Photos are very accurate. Highly recommend.

We loved this place.. super friendly, very chilled vibe, all the staff were really helpful..
The room was lovely, gorgeous bedding, great bathroom and shower.
I would recommend this place to other visitors to Bangkok.
Clean, well appointed, great communication and handy location. Definitely would stay again : )
Alles super.

原本是一行4人入住，有位亲临时取消了行程，所以变成3人入住。首先房东很热情，确认订单后给了很多信息参考，发消息也及时回复，楼下的security guard也很好，笑脸迎人，零距离感；其次，房间真的很棒，小两房一厅，卫生间在这个小公寓里也算空间很大，客厅有沙发和餐桌，厨房虽然有点窄，但锅碗瓢盆还是有的，对于短暂入住来说，在厨房捣腾点食物完全没问题👌房东还备了洗衣液，外面有小阳台可以晾衣服，总之麻雀虽小 五脏俱全👌然后说说地理位置，我们是grab到的，司机直接送到了楼下，附近叫grab也很方便，晚上步行到拉差达差夜市二十分钟左右，途中会经过一个大商场，里面应该很多吃的，还有一个BigC，可惜了我们两次路过都没去😭步行到王权地铁站也差不多十分钟吧，地铁去到暹罗商圈好像五六个站，去terminal21只要好像就3个站，对了楼下有超市有小吃摊早餐摊也很多选择，有一家推车上的烤鸡蛋超级好吃😋总之我们住的很舒服，下次去曼谷会考虑再次入住😬
The place was simply amazing and the host was incredible, the neighborhood was so friendly and welcoming. 11/10 will be staying here again without a doubt.
Great place, very central, nice and clean..

הבית עצמו הוא בגודל מספק עבור משפחה גדולה והאזור סך הכול נוח בשביל להסתובב בלילה ולצאת לאזורים שונים בבנגקוק. עם זאת, במיוחד ביחס למחיר הגבוה הוא לא נותן תמורה טובה. הבית ישן ולא מתוחזק, הייתה תחושה לא נקייה בבית ודברים רבים לא עבדו- שלטי מזגנים ללא סוללות, מיטה ילדים שהתפרקה כמה פעמים וחדר נוסף שמוגדר כאגף משרתת שעדיף לא להציע לאורחים עם המראה שלו בטח כשבשירותים שלו אין אור (כמו בסלון גם שם הייתה נורה שלא עבדה). המארח עצמו חביב ותגובתי יש לומר והציע להגיע ולנסות לתקן אבל התחושה הכללית היא שבמחיר כזה ראוי שהתחזוקה והחוויה תהיה שונה.
Fantastic apartment. Location not too far off from center. For the price you pay, an absolute bang of a buck. Will most certainly look forward to staying again.
all perfect. thank you

Place was super comfortable and clean. The owners even let us check in 10 hours before check in which was so lovely. Very worth the money. Only thing is I wished they provided more toilet roll haha. I’m sure it was just a little mistake. Definitely worth the money! Thank you!

We had a fantastic stay at this Airbnb! The location is perfect—super close to the MRT, with lots of local food restaurants and a 7/11 just a short walk away. There are also plenty of coffee shops and bars nearby, so it's great if you're looking to explore the area a bit more.
Communication with the host was super smooth, and they were really quick to answer all of our questions, which made everything easy and stress-free.
The house itself is beautiful and had more than enough space for our group. It's got this really nice aesthetic vibe that we all loved. Plus, it came well-stocked with enough pillows, towels, and blankets for everyone, and the air conditioning worked perfectly—which is a big plus in Bangkok!
Overall, it was an amazing stay, and we’d definitely recommend it to anyone visiting Bangkok!
Nice airbnb, very commercial, if u need a nice place to sleep, it is a good choice

Clean, luxurious, modern, pool and gym, washing machine, private balcony, and SO cheap - best Airbnb deal I’ve gotten in all of SE Asia. Host is also very responsive. Only con is that the location is a *little* out of the way of major tourist attractions, but everything else makes up for it. Definitely recommend staying here for Bangkok.

저는 모든것에 완벽했다고 말씀드리고 싶습니다 :) 일단 호스트님이 정말 친절하시고 항상 도와주셨어요. 제가 어려운 부탁을 드렸는데 자기의 일처럼 도와주셨고, 필요물품이나 청소 등 모든 요청을 들어주셨습니다! 처음에 어려움이 있었지만 진심어린 사과를 해주셨고, 일단 집이 너무너무 완벽합니다. 청결도는 물론이고 인테리어가 정말이뻐요. 한국에서는 접하지 못할 특이하면서 깔끔한 인테리어에 저랑 남자친구는 감동했습니다. 침구도 너무너무 편안해서 여행내내 지쳤던 몸을 편하게 쉴수 있었습니다. 집이 너무 이뻐서 밖에 나가기가 싫을정도로 🥹❤️ 저희만 알고싶을 정도로 숙소가 좋지만, 호스트님이 슈퍼호스트가 되길바라고 다른분들께 추천드리고 싶습니다. 집이 완벽하여 저희도 최대한 깨끗히 쓰려고 노력했습니다. 방콕을 여행간다면 꼭 다시 방문하고싶습니다. 저희는 태국여행이 5번째 였는데, 방문했던 숙소중에 최고라고 말씀드리겠습니다.
호스트님 너무 감사드립니다❤️

A very big and bright place with a very nice view to the Klong in a quiet residential area. Fa was very helpful and there were dishes and tea and coffee and shampoo.

This place was perfect. My dad and I stayed here four nights. We arrived to an easy check in, waters in the fridge after a long flight, and a beautiful river view. Would totally stay here again and reccomend it for anyone looking for a quiet place to stay and a starting point for seeing Bangkok.

We stayed in Room 3 for 5 days and had a great stay! Location is perfect—just a short walk to Ratchathewi BTS, 7-Eleven, and many food spots with a café nearby. The host also shared a spa promo code, which was a nice touch. Check-in was smooth, instructions were clear, and the place was easy to find.
The unit was clean, beds and towels were comfy, and both bathrooms had bidets. Grab pick-up/drop-off is right in front, very convenient. The host was very responsive and accommodating.
Room 3 is a 2-floor condo-style unit. It has 2 bathrooms, but both are upstairs, so you’ll need to go up if staying on the lower floor. There’s a sink downstairs for washing up. Stairs inside are steep and creaky, so be careful. Soundproofing isn’t perfect—you’ll hear some outside noise, but it’s manageable. Slippers were thin, and tissue wasn’t refilled (we should’ve asked).
Overall, a clean, comfy, and well-located stay. Highly recommended!

Apartment is very clean and neat, neighbours are quieit, never had any problems.
All in all, very nice experience, thank you Pammy!

Great place. Very clean. Close to a lot of places we went to. The condo is very beautiful and we felt right at home. The hosts were also very nice and accommodating. Will definitely book this place again. 🥰🥰

The owner is very nice and extremely helpful. I accidentally locked myself out one night and messaged the owner on Airbnb. They promptly came with spare keys and helped me back in, even though it was late. They always respond quickly to any questions. The room was clean and comfortable, and the location is good as well, with a café in the nearby building. Highly recommend!

one of the best places to stay in
If i ever will go to Bangkok again I will definitely reserve the same place

Я реально впечатлён, мы были в Бангкоке проездом и данный номер подошёл нам так как он реально семейный. Две прекрасных комнаты с ванной и туалетом в каждой комнате. И прекрасная гостиная довольно большая и удобная. Единственное что не понравилось, что в некоторых комнатах идёт ремонт и при входе тоже. Но это не доставляет особых проблем при проживании. Сам Кевин был очень внимательным и отвечал на все вопросы быстро. Вообщем очень рекомендую  данный Отель и Кевина.
Had a Great Stay over here

This place is better than I had expected in terms of cleanliness, the stylish space & decorations. The host was also extremely helpful - especially with check-in because I had a little bit of a difficulty finding the place at night. The room is exactly as advertised (even better in real life!).
I'd recommend for everyone to stay here if you want to spend time in BKK like a true local. However, for those not too familiar with BKK or travelling to BKK for the first time, it is quite difficult to commute as it is located in a very small road (sometimes difficult to explain to taxi and motorbike drivers). It is also quite far from the nearest public transport outlet (Chongnonsi BTS Sky Train).
But overall, an amazing stay for me :)

Good support from the host and her team made our one-month stay comfortable.
We enjoyed the local food thanks to the neat kitchen and walking distance from the Big C.
Great stay. Clean, modern and quit apartment. The pool and gym is amazing. Definitely worth the money.
令人惊喜的房子，完美的房东和管家，院子里有自己的小码头可以直接上游船。房东Thanut还在我们到之前准备了牛奶和面包，非常适合有孩子的家庭，孩子甚至吃了院子里母鸡下的蛋。期待下次再来，由衷感谢。
We had a wonderful time and enjoyed our stay! Thank you so much

Max's place was clean, spacious and located perfectly next to BTS Phloen Chit. If you take the shortcut through Noble Phloen Chit, you can get to the BTS within 2 minutes.
He was quick to respond and helpful. Would definitely come back.

Thank you Mo for your super great hospitality and also great apartment!
I had stay in mo’s place for 7 nights and everything was just perfect! The apartment located not so far from the BTS which is walkable. Mo already put everything you might need inside the studio, convenience store, just walk away.. you’ll find great streat food and also decent restaurant near the apartment. Everything was just perfect for me! Thank you mo! Definitely i will book this again while im in BKK!

Our family recently stayed in Bangkok, Thailand, and we had a wonderful experience. Everything was very good from start to finish. The communication was excellent—clear, prompt, and very helpful—which made our stay smooth and stress-free. We truly enjoyed our time and would happily recommend this place to other families visiting Bangkok.
Very bad and bad services from the reception, no recommend for anyone!!
Nice place to stay, will comeback for sure

Lovely space, beautiful pool and outdoor area. Living space was spacious and airy as in photos. Washing machine was very helpful during our travels and stay. Tanny was very responsive and provided many suggestions for shopping and dining in the area. Delightful stay!

I had a wonderful stay at Bunk’s condo in The Station Sathon. The apartment was beautifully designed, spotlessly clean, and had everything I needed for a comfortable stay. The location is great and very convenient. Thank you, Bunk, for being such a thoughtful and welcoming host. I truly appreciated the hospitality!
Terry is a good guy, always there for you if you need anything, he sent me a list of places to visit, the view is nice from the apartment
好的住宿位置 总体很不错
Very stylish room in a brand new building. Location is great being next to the BTS and a big shopping centre. Host was kind and quick to respond to any issues. Great stay.
Very nice place to stay!!! Strongly recommended for families!!!

Basically, location was convenient and in a quieter area of Nana on the north side of Nana station. Due to circumstances, had to extend our stay but had to move into another, more spacious unit on the second floor on the opposite side of the first unit. Noise from the hotel next door was a bit annoying.
Overall, the rooms are fine. The WiFi is not the fastest and not secure. The biggest issue is the laundry. Yes, it says it’s available but only when the cleaners are done with their work which is only in the evenings. They close the laundry room at 8:00pm. In addition, we were charged 50 baht for drying. 50 baht is not a big deal, but saying there is laundry is misleading. The cleaners looked annoyed with our using the machines. Had a two-week stay, so needed to do laundry every few days. Also, some utensils were missing which we had in the first unit. Never received them upon request.
Great place, great stay, thank you Naya :)
房东非常体贴周到

If you’re looking for a very homey, cozy and very cute place to stay in then book immediately! highly recommended.
the owners are very polite and honestly reminded me of my grandparents! i feel like they’re my family there the whole time i was there.
very caring and prepared a really heartfelt breakfast - plus the place is sooo amazing and hippie vibes
Ev sahibi iyi ve güler yüzlü, iyi konum

The accommodation was within walking distance of MRT, but I usually rode Grab. It was a little far to get to the city (main shopping mall, etc.), but the accommodation was quiet and safe. It was convenient and nice to have a convenience store, laundry room, and library on the first floor of the condo. The host Yaowanee always responded kindly and quickly, so there was no inconvenience at all. I was really disappointed that a month went by so quickly. If I go again next time, I want to stay.
去到房东哥哥来接的我们，给个钥匙就跑了，热水壶坏了而且很脏，希望可以换一个也被说没问题，房间倒是还行，但是各种原因一起，入住体验一般吧

This place is wonderful, the room was perfectly clean, communication and check in instructions were consistently easy and well explained! The pool was lovely and location is great. Really close to great spots in Thonglor.
An oasis in busy Bangkok!
10/10, will definitely be staying here again in the future.
House no. 22 is a great place to stay in Bangkok. It's near a BTS station so it typically makes you close to any of Bangkok's tourist spots. The room is well kept. I will definitely stay here again!
très bien placé
很不错，交通也很便利
Good for sleep and travel to airport
nice place!!
Great spot, very central and a quiet little street. As mentioned before, the bed is a little on the hard side! Wilson is fast to respond and very helpful.
Great host. clean and close to a lot of fun places
Nice hostel

Overall, a pleasant stay for 6 days/5 nights:
- accommodating doorman at the lobby; 5 stars, left our luggage when we couldn't check in yet, gave him tip, very pleasant (day shift younger guy)
- liked it that there were trash bags provided so we can really throw our trash daily
- liked it that bed sheets/pillow cases are white and not colored or printed; it looks more clean and fresh
- liked it that there was shampoo (used it), hair dryer and several towels
- strong AC in the living room
- place is easy to get grab and have food delivered
Great place to stay
交通便利，5分钟步行Ekkamai BTS、7-Eleven、商场。入住简单，房间很舒适，楼层高，配套齐全。楼顶泳池比不少酒店大足够畅泳。订了2天然后又订多2天，去曼谷还会再住这里
很棒的一次入住体验 房东很细心地引导我们从机场到房间 而且还给了很多附近好吃好玩的地方推荐 房间光线很好 床啊 沙发啊都很舒服 还有免费的水跟零食 零食很好吃！！！出门就有小吃摊跟seven 离地铁站大概步行5分钟左右 离火车夜市只有一个站！属于闹中取静的地段 可惜行程比较赶 不然肯定好好享受
超赞房东！！每天给我们准备不同花样的早饭，临走那天帮我们叫出租车。虽然地理位置不太好，但是坐bts还是方便的

David has very well described the apartment and facilities within the condominium & the neighbourhood. Very good 'base' location for exploring Bangkok's touristic site, evening programme and shopping. We used the famous pool (nice!) and the gym & sauna. Highly recommended airbib option for your stay in that city!
设计很好看很喜欢 但是比较隐蔽 地段也不好 出行要靠打车 不方便 房东人很好 房子旁边店里的阿姨也很好人
excellent!
ที่พักสะอาด มีของใช้ที่จำเป็นต่างๆให้ครบ   พื้นที่ส่วนกลางก็ดีเยี่ยม บริการดีประทับใจครับ
Mycket bra boende för vad man betalar. rent och fint och bra AC.

When entering soi 4 from sukhumvit road this street is very very busy, but closer to this apartment is getting better.
The condo is quite old (you can see on the bathtube and especially on the gym...)...
I'm not the biggest fan of wall-to-wall carpet, but besides that the apartment is big and especially the WIFI works perfectly!
It's located just a few meters from nana plaza. if you don't mind, it's great as there are many options for food in the street up to very late!
Skytrain station is close by, which is very convenient.
The host Mali supports your arrival with a great description. Everything is the way it is shown. My stay was very uncomplicated, Mali replied quickly and was very helpful!
So all in all, though it's not my preferred street for me i really can recommend the place and especially the host for an uncomplicated, easy stay in a bisy area!
整體房間很大，三間房房間有三個廁所，私隱度足夠，可惜當用水時會產生噪音，其他房間也聽得見，而且其中一間房間三天沒冷氣，需要有待維修，第四天弄好了，被單被套有污跡，毛巾的乾淨程度也有待改善。

Notre séjour chez Nurachee a été génial,  le lieu est bien placé (à côté du Skytrain), très propre. L'accueil est chaleureux et l'hôte d'une grande douceur, très à l'écoute et serviable. Les petits déjeuners étaient exceptionnels dans le jardin. La maison est pleine de charme. Nous recommandons vivement cette adresse. Lelié et Antoine

We had such an amazing stay here in Thailand! From the moment we arrived, we felt so welcome. The place was very clean, cozy, and exactly as shown in the photos. The bed was comfortable, and everything we needed was provided, which made our trip stress-free.
The location was perfect - convenient and close to everything, but still peaceful enough to relax after a long day of exploring. It was easy to get around and find food, shops, and attractions nearby.
The host was incredibly kind, responsive, and helpful throughout our stay. Communication was smooth, and they made sure we were comfortable the whole time.
We truly enjoyed our stay and would definitely come back again. Highly recommended for anyone visiting Thailand!
装修很新，房间光线很敞亮，晚上也很安静，下次还会是首选住宿。
Responsive host, clean room and grest location and facilities. Recommended
Great location! I really loved that neighborhood

Thanat's place at the Tree condo worked perfectly for my trip to Bangkok.  It was our home away from home.  It is very close to my friend's condo at the Riverside which made our outings easy.  The unit is small but clean and sufficient.  The building is quiet with lots of young professionals living there.  It even has a yoga studio.  Just a few steps away from the building there are restaurants, coffee shops, a market and the train station.  The ferry station is in walking distance.  I would strongly recommend Thanat's place if you want to stay in a quiet area in Bangkok.
I had a great time at Evantm and Karen's location. Very walkable location, many restaurants and stores around each corner. I would definitely stay here again.
Clean and spacious place with a great view and responsive host. Easy short walk to Thong Lor and Ekkamai

It's a great place to stay in budget.
Can go anywhere in Bangkok by Bus , Ferry and Sky train . 7-Elenven store 1 minute walk. Mr Anuch is a Great host , he will help us by all means. I'll stay here again my next Bangkok trip

The place exceeded my expectations. It has everything you need including laundry, kitchen, nice shower and a gym. We liked to have a breakfast on the balcony and enjoying a view. Host responded timely. Dara provided drinking water which is very useful. The swimming pool a bit cold because it is under other building and has no direct sun.
地理位置很好，离两条地铁都不远，闹中取静。入住也方便前台随时有人，指示牌也清晰。就是房间设施有点老旧，电视很小，还是古里老的插有线电视线的那种。不过房间倒是够大，厨房四眼电灶，东西还算齐全。九楼的泳池挺大的标准池。就是我们住的那晚外面怎么这么大风，一晚上外面呼啸不止！吵得很！可能高楼楼间风大，风大就响得很！总体不错下次来还有可能入住！

Great place to stay for a couple of nights, close to the city centre and right in the heart of many local cafes. it is also 5 min away from the subway. The place looked tidy and clean, you have everything you need except toilet paper. Though it lacks clear ventilation and might be noisy at night it is 100% worth it's money. Recommend staying here for a short time trip or as a shift stay
很棒的体验，但是位置问题我们每天都只能打车。
Nice place. Close to the mall
Great place, clean and comfortable. Good location very close to BTS stop. Host responsive and nice. Would stay again no problem.
老板很热情 给予了多帮助
The apartment is very pleasant and exactly as described. Perfectly located; an excellent stay overall.
perfect place to stay for what me and my friends needed. very responsive host and everything went very smoothly.

I booked for 10 nights and left after 1 night. I still extend 4 stars to this listing because they offered me a full refund, despite I offered to pay for the 1 night I stayed. For the record, I stayed in at least 20 Airbnb around the world over the last 15 years or so, this is the first time I didn't fulfil my stay and seek for refund.
The content of this unit is really worn out, but everything is "bearable" for me and my partner except the really hard bed. I know it's Thailand, but many guests had commented the bed is nice so I take it should be okay. Then I realised those who said so are very old reviews.
Both the host and co-host also took more than 4 hours to respond to my message when I ask about the AC after I checked in. I take it they both overlooked..?
The unit is very clean, location is great, condo itself looks decent, the pool looks nice. I am very grateful the host was generous to do a full refund, as my last minute hotel costs quite a bomb.
Superbe emplacement, au centre de Bangkok avec beaucoup de choses à faire aux alentours. L’appartement était très propre et très grand (fidèle aux photos). Nous étions ravis! Je recommande vivement

We lived our stay. Thank you for hosting us.
Cumplió todas mis expectativas. El wifi iba súper bien por lo que puede trabajar todos los días desde allí. Solo le pondría un pero, y es que se escuchaba mucho las otras habitaciones.

Thank you, Tatiya. Your place is really well kept and we loved our stay 💜
We appreciated Arlene as well for being there helping us when we have questions. We’ll come back here for sure 💗
The host and team are very responsive and helpful. The place is very clean. We enjoyed the stay very much.
Super responsive, proactive and welcoming host 🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻

I had a wonderful stay at this place it’s spacious and feels open and airy, with an incredible city and garden view that makes mornings and evenings especially enjoyable :) The apartment itself is modern and was clean. Stay was comfortable, making it easy to feel at home right away. I would definitely stay here again. Highly recommend!

viraさんの対応の速さも、とても有り難かったです。
お世話になりました。
また、利用させて頂きます。
It was wonderful stay! Best host 😄

It was a beautiful old house.
Host was so helpful :)
Thank you so much!

I would recommend this place overall
Looked like the pictures and the host was very responsive
The only issue I had was the location was very difficult for grab drivers to find, They cancelled or I had to ask the security guard to call them and explain and this always created delays. If you’re walking then it’s not a problem, but if you use grab like me it may be complicated.
The place was clean but not up to my standards, there were a few hairs in the drawers. There was a cockroach but when I told Paul he sent in a cleaning person immediately so very responsive.
I would still recommend this place, it was good value.

I stayed at this property for 7 months after getting stuck in Country for Covid. I had a small service dog and his place was pet friendly. Yard was good size and the Street was a private road with only traffic from residents. The Grocery Store, night markets, shopping center, banks, train station were all about a very easy 5 minute walk which was super convenient. In 7 months I never met the owner which is a testament to how well maintained the house is. Everything functioned perfectly and I was never in need of anything. Every 2 months I only needed to replace the cooking gas. Additionally, the owner puts some nice extra perks like preloading Netflix and the TV service comes internet ready so you can use any of the TV/Movie services such as Hulu, Amazon Prime, Reel2Rockets etc. I think it is great for families and extended stays.

Good location to stay when you need to go to the airport. There are lot of place for food, massage and local markets around, which give you all the things you need. The hotel provided a good shuttle bus to the airport service. Definitely recommended.

This property is everything you need from AirBNB. Room is incredible decorative, comfortable and clean , great location, service staff super nice and host are friendly and very responsive. I would recommend my friend who come to visit Bangkok to stay here.
Good

We had a wonderful stay!  The apartment was lovely and well-located in Bangkok, perfect for our group of 2.  What truly made our stay exceptional was the host's incredible hospitality.  As coffee lovers, we travel with our own brewing equipment, just needing a kettle.  When we discovered there wasn't one, the host went above and beyond, providing us with a brand new one within 15 minutes!  This thoughtful gesture was so appreciated.  Highly recommend this apartment for anyone looking for a comfortable and convenient base in Bangkok.
TKhouse的房源和地點很好，房內乾淨明亮、採光優，還有提供微波爐及餐具可以使用。距離兩站BTS走路都不會太遠，交通方便！
Lalana was the perfect host. Her place was spotless and very easy to find :)

Host give us not same apartment as was in photos. Overall apartment was normal but with very old furniture, and broken glass on kitchen stove. In building everywhere you can find information that they not accepted short term rent, which is very strange, because apartments listed in airbnb. Also in building not allowed to smoke, not in balcony, not even outside, only in specific area for smoking.
Quiet and clean close to mall and BTS. Was able to arrange an early check in. Enjoyed my stay. Will stay again when I’m visiting Bangkok.

깨끗하고 수영장도 관리가 잘 되어있었습니다.
또한 1층에 레스토랑이 있어서 브런치 및 커피를 쉽게 살 수 있었습니다. 그러나 역과는 거리가 15분 정도 걸리고 숙소 들어오는 골목이 깨끗하지 않습니다.

Our stay at Piaks place was so so lovely! She made us breakfast every morning and was very friendly and sweet. She was extremely quick to respond to any questions/messages. The room was clean, comfortable and quiet. We loved our stay! We will be back!

Chanlika is a very friendly and helpful host.
I had a bit of a hard time finding the meeting point/hotel at the airport (I usually fly to the other airport on Bangkok so wasn't familiar with DMK) but she communicated with me very well. She also called a taxi to pick me up at her home early in the morning the next day. Ideal location for short stay close to airport.

Pong's flat is spacious and in an oasis of peace in the heart of Bangkok. The only sounds we heard were birdsong. The apartment is close to the BTS and a huge shopping mall - 'The Emporium', which has a superb, high-class, supermarket. The flat is not that easy to find, taxi drivers dont seem to have a clue where it is although we showed the address in Thai. But if you tell the drvier Emporium, they will know. Pong lives close by but kept out of the way until needed -as, indeed, he was on the day of departure, when he arranged our taxi to the airport
Quiet location, coveniently located near train station, within reach 10-15 minit walk. Clean and clutter free space, will definately be back again.

El apartamento está muy bien y su ubicación buena, nosotros nos movimos siempre con Bolt. Zona tranquila. Apartamento ideal para 2 familias con cinco niños, aunque el sofá cama un poco duro según los niños. Las vistas espectaculares desde la planta once y la piscina en la azotea. Volvería una próxima vez!
Wszytko zgodnie z opisem polecam.
wow this was a nice property, the attention to detail was wow! we loved our stay here. close to the mall, restaurants and 7/11
Great Airbnb! We would have loved to stay longer

Very good place, and Supapen was excellent all time. Thank you so much.

Manaswin was a wonderful lady to rent this B&B from. She met us as the appointed hour at her condo lobby and she showed us around the unit as well as the amenities of the building. All very clean and as described on her BnB page.  Her English was excellent and she was friendly and helpful. This unit really is a 5 min walk to the skytrain station. There were only a few problems during our visit. 1- The mattresses on each of the three beds in the unit were EXTREMELY firm. Not only uncomfortable but also painful to us. 2- The shower in the master bath worked fine. However, the showers in the other two baths had problems with the handle attachment. So the water came out from the head of the shower at about mid chest level. Needs repair. One day the A/C unit in bedroom 2 sparked, crackled and then smoke appeared. We quickly turned it off. She said someone would come fix it the next day, they did, and it was fine thereafter. However, we lost several hours during the fix.
干净且宽敞的房间，服务非常到位，给游客家一样的感觉！非常好！

困った時に親切にして頂いた事は決して忘れません。

広いリビングに子供たちも大喜びでした。
Nous avons passé une nuit dans ce logement tout était parfait il correspondait exactement à l’annonce je recommande à 100%

We’re super happy with the place and the neighborhood is easily accessible since it’s near bts station. I also appreciate our hosr, Ace, he’s very responsive with our queries, the restaurant he suggested is 10/10 and he allowed to leave our baggages with the his staff upon checkout. Thank you very much!
Awesome stay in Bangkok! The hosts are accommodating and easy to communicate with. 5/5

Nuchy's place is so cute and clean. It is close to the BTS, bus station and mall. Nuchy provided me with bottled water and some drinks to consume during my stay. Definitely will stay again if I go back in Bangkok. Thanks for accomodating me:)
Located in the center area of Bangkok, and p'Pundh was extremely responsive, very appreciate him for letting me check out at 3 pm before my flight.
cozy accommodation, calm atmosphere, I liked everything
¡Espectacular! Lugar muy bonito donde encontrar la tranquilidad en una ciudad tan vibrante como Bangkok. Es un hotel muy acogedor, con atención de primer nivel y cuidado al detalle. Muy recomendable.

I had stay in Kiat's apartment for my business trip to Bangkok. It's a comfort apartment and just next to BTS Punawithi station.  Quiet, secured and convenient... Kait is very friendly and helpful. Highly recommend...

Die Unterkunft ist wie beschrieben. Eine tolle Lage in der Altstadt. Die Gastgeber sind sehr freundlich und sehr hilfsbereit! Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen. Der Verkehrslärm ist jedoch auch in der Nacht zu hören, sollte man beachten falls man empfindlich ist, uns hat es nicht gestört.
很乾淨的房子，位子很好，樓下有便利商店，附近有餐飲店

I loved staying at this condo!! The unit is beautiful, quiet, clean, great location and everything feels new. the view of Bangkok from the master bedroom is amazing! I booked Tony's place for a month and it was the perfect location for me to spend time in Bangkok from. The place itself was what it looked like in the pictures, and the building had great amenities with the swimming pool area, gym and common spaces at the 35th floor (and amazing views). Everything was also very clean, and Tony included a free cleaning halfway through the stay.
The location was very convenient being literally just outside the exit to the nearby MRT station and underground walk to the BTS station and Terminal 21 mall. It was also very easy to receive Grab deliveries with the drop-off zone downstairs.
I'll definitely book here again if I visit Bangkok in the future and am looking for a place on Sukhumvit.

The apartment is very clean, comfortable and well equipped.
However, travelers should be aware of a few issues. I had informed the host in advance that my flight would arrive late and that I would be checking in after 11 pm. She agreed. At first she said someone would check me in, but that person was not available, so she asked me to self check in at another apartment. The instructions were unclear and I had trouble getting in. I tried to contact her around midnight via phone and Airbnb but got no response. She later sent me a screenshot saying check in ends at 9-10 pm and that she is online until 11 pm, which made no sense since she had agreed to a late check in.
Also, the electricity shuts off when you leave the condo because the key card controls the power. I needed to keep my laptop charging while I was out for work, but when I asked for a second card or a solution, the host said it was not possible and offered no alternative.
The place is great but my experience was not.

Had a great 13-day stay at Tina's place. Studio was very clean.
What we liked:
Clean, fully equipped, cosy.
What we felt can be improved:
Mozzie issue, low water pressure in bathroom sink.
It's quite far from On Nut (pronounced On-Nood) BTS but you can easily take the No.2 bus just outside the apartment security post (a pick up truck that's converted to an open bus that the locals commute in every day). You can board and alight at any point along the route and it costs only 9 baht per way. You can also walk to the main road and take other pick-up truck buses like No. 1, 4 or 7, they all go to On Nut BTS.
If you want to take a taxi to the BTS instead, you can go for the pink taxis as they go by meter regardless you are tourist or local and meter starts from 35 baht, unlike the yellow taxis which will quote you 150 baht. The taxi ride to BTS should cost you 50-60 baht.
You can thank me later.
Overall, Tina's place is great for those who want to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city. 7-11 and street food is just right outside. The milk tea street vendor makes a good green milk tea too (cha-kaew).

This is an absolutely lovely place to stay in Bangkok. I love the small closet corner next to the bathroom as well as the interior. The bed was comfortable and very big for us. The pool on the 8th floor, although opened only from 10AM to 9PM, was an incredible deal. It's enough for us to spend our night together while seeing the stunning night view of Bangkok. The way from the apartment to the BTS was also very nice with lots of tasty street foods to try, especially the fried chicken drumsticks. It's a peaceful area with 2 7 eleven very closeby and a drugstore.  It was very easy and quick to get response from Heide, our host and he provided us all needed information. Thank you very much!
