One of the prettiest if not the best airbnbs i've stayed in so far. It looks exactly like the pictures, everything is super spacious, well maintained and cleaned. plus points for the great interior design as well. The cats were super friendly and fluffy as well, housekeepers would be there 7-10am to assist you with daily breakfast(cereal, waffles,yoghurts) Thank you Mooncome for making my bangkok stay so enjoyable🥰
非常不错

Es war in allem und ganzen ein toller Aufenthalt und wir hatten das Glück mit dem Team noch sonkran zu feiern. Ebenso konnten wir auch etwas früher ins Zimmer.
Vielen lieben Dank für alles.
Wir können die Unterkunft nur weiterempfehlen.
房东超好的，沟通很快就给答复，因为一些私人问题房东还亲自开车过来帮我解决，很卫生很干净，周围还好吃，还吃到了比日本更好吃的日料，大家快来住！
不错不错
很不错的房源

Lovely apartment in a nice and private condo. The area is great and the apartment has everything needed for short or long stays. Sumana is the best host you can find. Price was more than fair for my stay. Would totally recommend staying here and will definitely book again if coming back to Bangkok.

Amazing place and an amazing host. Honestly, the pictures don't do justice to the place. The place is much more beautiful. Lovely cozy room with a small kitchen to cater to my cooking needs. Very clean.
Will be definitely coming back.

this place was amazing. nice and convenientwith train nearby. And delicious Koreanfood right up the street. The place was very cozy neat and gives ample space and comfort for the remote worker. Iwould highly recommend staying here.
great stay!

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
We stayed at this villa in Bangkok from 30th December to 3rd January with 8 guests, and it was a wonderful experience. The villa is spacious, peaceful, and very well maintained, making it ideal for a group stay.
The atmosphere was calm and relaxing, and we felt comfortable throughout our stay. The host was extremely responsive and supportive, always quick to reply and help whenever needed.
Overall, it was a great and hassle-free stay, and we would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Bangkok with family or friends.

Natalie's place was a great base for my 6 week stay in Bangkok. The location was excellent - a 10 min walk to CentralWorld, almost next a BTS station, 10 mins to Lumphini Park.
It's a cute little studio and has everything you need for a stay. Recommended!

The landlord was very enthusiastic. He asked me about my schedule, gave some optimization Suggestions, and drove us to the pharmacy to buy medicine. In communication, the homeowner replied quickly and was very friendly. The design of the house is tasteful, well-appointed and comfortable.

Enjoyed the stay! Lots of good and affordable local food and cafes around as well. Overall good value for money. Hosts were quick to respond as well which was very much appreciated. Even provided disposable slippers and dental kits.
Do note that the steps are quite steep, wouldn't recommend for families with elders. The walls are also quite thin - you can hear when people on level 3 are shifting things/ hear their alarms even with the doors closed.
good value for money

This condo is exactly as illustrated in the photos - beautiful! Joyce was extremely accommodating and communicative both prior to and during our stay and we had a great time. In conclusion, you should book this place!
Some details:
Location is great if you are planning on doing some of the “main” sights in Bangkok. The BST station and ferry pier is a short walk - from here you can easily travel to Grand Palace, Wat Arun, Khao San road, Chinatown etc.
The neighbourhood itself has lots of authentic restaurants - made easier to choose/navigate using a guide book written by Joyce. We ended up visiting a few of her top recommendations.
Would definitely stay here again.
Sude是一个超级超级超级好的人。我们早上3点才到达，12月的曼谷晚上挺凉的，她一直在门口等。第二天早上还为我们准备了丰盛的早餐。她的花园非常漂亮，我希望下次去曼谷还可以住在她的家

Clean, good location near public transit station. Room was clean with good working ac. bed was a bit firm but other than that everything perfect! breakfast was cooked for each guest, delicious. dogs were fun to interact with. would stay again!

Staying at Co-Property Hostel made my trip to Bangkok even more enjoyable.
As a solo traveler, I found this place very comfortable and convenient. It is only a 5–8 minute walk from BTS Ekkamai, which makes getting around the city very easy.
One thing I really enjoyed was the local atmosphere. In the morning, I could walk to a nearby local market for breakfast and experience everyday life in Bangkok. There is also a 7-Eleven just a few minutes away.
The shared kitchen is very convenient if you want to store food or prepare simple meals.
The room was clean and comfortable. There was some daytime street noise, but it was quiet at night and did not affect my stay.
Overall, this hostel offers excellent value for money. I would definitely stay here again on my next trip to Bangkok.

A spacious and stylish flat which was well-stocked. The bed was very comfortable and the many kitchen appliances were very handy! It is true that it is extremely loud with the window open but no trouble with it shut. That being said, as it was a work trip I didn't spend most of the day in here, so the overlooking-the-highway part didn't bother me too much. The road outside the apartment tends to flood very quickly after the rain as well, but when in Bangkok, do as Bangkokians do and trudge through it - it's fun ;).

Tatiya là một chủ nhà tốt bụng, nhiệt tình.
Căn nhà cực đáng yêu, yên tĩnh và thư giãn. Chúng tôi rất tận hưởng thời gian ở đây.

The appartment is the perfect stay in Bangkok! Cosy and still feels spacious with incredible views and a great pool on top! The area is easy to walk and use the train.
I would definitely use this appartment for a longer stay, too.
In addition KK offered us to already drop the suitcases at his place early in the morning after we arrived. I can highly recommend this place!
Great place to stay, with lots of good local food around. The room was great; clean and spacious.
整体不错，就是刚装修，油漆味道有点重，其他很好，位置不错，楼下很方便，有7-11，有生活区吃饭。
超級完美

I had an outstanding time staying at Gavin's place!
This duplex is located in a brand-new development. It’s quite spacious by Bangkok standards, very clean, and well-maintained. I was pleasantly surprised to find a standing desk with a view, which made for a fantastic workspace. The condominium has a lovely rooftop pool with a view and a new gym, albeit a bit small. There’s also a restaurant and a convenience store on the ground floor.
Note that the area around the condo isn’t very walkable - you’ll need to take Grab to get anywhere, but this wasn’t a huge deal for me.

The place is what is in the picture . Its is very clean and organized but its a bit far in the shopping malls and for buying foods. But if you what a place that is very exclusive and quite I will recommend Max place.

Loved the location, balcony, view, and pool. Sadly the condo was not furnished as pictured in the photos. Overall I enjoyed my stay but some important elements were missing that would be easy for the owner to address and make this a more comfortable experience.
The bad:
- There's no bedside table and lamp (those pictured are gone). I had to use a dining room chair for a bedside table. It's important to have a place to set your phone, book, beverage, etc.
- The pillows are extremely fat and hard. If you like soft pillows, buy/bring one.
- There's no comfortable place to sit, like a couch or comfortable chairs. The orange bench shown in pictures is gone. Not that it would've mattered, it looks no better than sitting on a bed.
- There's no wall art (all wall art shown in pictures is gone)
- Overall just very bare, sparse, not a homey, comfortable place to spend a month, maybe ok for a shorter visit.
The good:
- Excellent location near transit
- Nice view of skyline
- Nice balcony

숙소는 현지스타일로 1층은 거실과 주방 욕실이 있고 2층에 방이 있어서 처음엔 불편했지만 재미있었어요. 워치는 현지 시장한복판에 있어서 아침은 간단하게 장볼수있었어요. 왕궁까지 걸어서15분~19분걸려서  좋았어요. 한적하고 현지분위기를 느낄수 있었어요. 아쉬운점은 5명 예약했는데 포크나 스푼이 4개밖에 없었다는점이네요. 타월도 넉넉히 준비해주시면 좋을것 같아요. 주변 마시지삽 정보도 제공해주면 좋을것같아요. 잘 쉬고갑니다.

Appartamento situato in una posizione comodissima sia per la metro SUKHUMVIT che BTS ASOK. Vicinissime! Appartamento come da descrizione, letto comodo, bagno grande (unica nota, acqua non caldissima, ma forse non sapevo come usare il macchinario per scaldarla). Host molto reattivo, disponibile e risposta sempre veloce! Consiglio questo appartamento per la vicinanza alla metro! Grazie!
Had an amazing time. Beautiful people around. Lovely home a
Ejaz is a very good host and deserves the super host reputation.
Good😃
Very beautiful home and very kind Thai family. Thanks!
Great place. As advertised. Quick response. Easy check in. The view was wonderful and the room had everything you needed. I do recommend this place! Host was great

The view from the window is stellar!  The neighbourhood is vibrant and clubby with great access to transit or taxis.  Needed to communicate with the host with questions we had and the responses and help were super fast.  Absolutely recommend staying!

Nuchy adalah seorang host yang sangat baik, kami sekeluarga nyaman tinggal di rumah ini.. Bisa mencuci baju dan dapat membli air minum refil di dekat rumahnya dengan sangat murah. Jarak BTS dan 711 sangat dekat dan dengan jarak kurang dari 200meter terdapat makanan2 yang enak dan murah. Untuk masukan, karena kami datang ber5, maka kami menggunakan tempat tidur di lantai dan kami merasa tempat tidur tersebut sangat tipis dan tidak nyaman untuk tempat tidau.. mungkin Nuchi dapat menggantinya dengan matras yang lebih tebal.

This place, I’d never stay again. I have nothing against the hosts, they are both nice. Their apartment needs a lot of TLC. First off. The building smells like sewage. It has a distinct smell in the hallways. We were not told this by the hosts. Upon entering in. Ants on dining table, counter, floor of bed. Every morning u find dead ants in your cups of water left in the kitchen. Just water. Gotta wash and clean. The shower needs lights. I feel like im showering in a jail. The toilet smells and room smells. There was one cockroach that came from the drain in the sink. The only thing that was good was the price but it’s questionable. With the darkness in the apartment, sewage smelling hallways and ants and cockroach territory. It’s not a lot of bugs # but it’s enough to annoy you that the place has bugs. I did not tell host because I feel like they know this. It’s not rocket science. Pls clean properly. This is all honest critique for improvement. Thanks.

Jingli's place was wonderful. The room I got was actually nice than the photos. The bed was incredibly comfortable - firm but really good for my back and I slept really well during my stay. Another thing that really stood out to me was how good the water pressure was in the shower. I really love the shared kitchen and I was able to put some snack and leftovers in the fridge and make myself some tea every night to enjoy and the staff was very friendly. :)
I was able to get a room on the 2nd floor but the building has no elevator so that's something to keep in mind if you're on a higher floor.
The room was easy walking distance to Central World (my favorite shopping mall) and in a really good location and I felt super safe traveling alone there as a solo female traveler.
I would highly recommend Jingli's place.

Excellent and clean apartment! I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. The place is very neat and exactly as described. It has everything you need and even more. The host was very responsive and always in touch. Thank you for your hospitality!

Starry was a
perfect host for our stay in Bkk.

we had a great stay at bee's condo. it looks just like in the pictures. it's located in a good area so you can discover the city by srt, ferry, taxi or even by foot. the condo was very clean and the communication was easy. after exploring the city, you can relax in the pool. Bees dad was a great help. we would recommend this place:)

Honestly for the price it’s hard to complain I had a wonderful stay that acted as my soft launch in Thailand.
I recommend this place 1000%. It’s clean, hyper convenient, BTS is right next to you, you have access to a wonderful pool and gym and a lobby to chill out or hangout before your grab arrives.
The host ( team) and staff are extremely nice and super responsive.
They are also quite flexible and really here to make your stay easier.
I have nothing to complain about this place.
Just book it and you’ll see by yourself.
great stay
I think it was perfect for us

All was perfect! Very nice apartment with a really beautiful view to Bangkok! Hosting and all was perfect! I would really high recommend this place and the apartment! The place is very central and have good staff!
Thanks for the very good hosting! Speciall thanks to dydy!
Patrice
It's a beautiful property in close proximity to the airport. Suttinee makes you feel very welcome. Very charming and comfortable place.
Great place

Unit has the basic necessary amenities.  Location is about 10mins away from Jodd Fai market (factoring in multiple traffic light wait at junction) or MRT - pretty convenient. I like that host is v prompt in her replies n is very helpful - thanks for the enjoyable stay!

LEGGI QUESTA RECENSIONE PRIMA DI PRENDERE QUESTA CASA!!
Dunque partiamo dalla cosa più importante: QUESTO POSTO È SILENZIOSO!!!
(Ovvio, siamo in un palazzo, quindi si sentono le persone camminare o se fanno l’amore, ma molto poco e soprattutto NON c’è rumore di macchine, galline o persone che urlano o parlano)
Altre cose positive:
1) la casa è completa di tutto, sarei potuto stare anche 1 mese per lavorare e riposarmi e mangiare
2) è vicino a tutto, ma è una zona residenziale (per questo che è silenziosa)
3) all’ultimo piano c’è la sauna (che ho fatto e funziona) e anche la palestra
4) il rooftop è bello grande e si può prendere il sole o rilassarsi
5) il proprietario è disponibile e mi ha pure pulito la stanza senza pagare nulla
Cose negative:
1) il posto si vede che è un po’ in decadimento.. peccato
2) quando sono arrivato la casa aveva un’aria pesante, però ho risolto arieggiando aprendo le finestre
3) la doccia grande era rotta e c’è un po’ di sporco dentro i cassetti
👌👌👌

If you want to stay in a quiet place in the Nana area and have fun at night, it is the best place to stay. The apartment is a bit far from the main road. However, this is the reason you can sleep well without any honking. They provide free shuttle service from the main road up to 10 PM , which is great. I loved this place.
Super clean and nice. She was responsive and kind.
房子很不错，房东也很好，房子设施齐全，细节也好😊 ，温馨，很满意的一次住宿。

I can’t explain how appreciative I am to have found Nannapa’s place. Nannapa’s wonderful apartment is very close to the airport, making it a great place to stay if you are trying to fly out or if you want to get out of the big city for a little while. The place is extremely cozy, has everything you need, and is close to a wonderful mall if you want to shop or get something to eat. Check in and check out process was very easy. I’d recommend the place for families and single travelers alike! It has a great neighborhood feel that I haven’t felt before in Bangkok.
Great value for money and worth the price. Will highly recommend.
Great place in a very walkable location, close to public transportation and the local market. The neighborhood is peaceful and quiet. I stayed for about a month and truly enjoyed my stay.

Een echte aanrader, op loopafstand van Khao San Road en andere straten met leuke restaurantjes, maar toch rustig.
De host is erg behulpzaam.
Bij een bezoek aan Bangkok, zeker de moeite waard.
A perfect host , who was warm and very helpful. The flat was great very clean , just as described.

모든게 다 괜찮지만 나갈때시간을 맞춰야한다는거 빼면 좋아요

Such a nice place to stay. Definitely a place to recomment to all tourists. Host is very accomodating and friendly. Easy to communicate and requests are granted. Was also able to check in early which is really convenient if you have an early flight. 1000000/10 experience.

很好 地理位置方便 但是就是没有电梯 搬行李有点重

One of the few places I have stayed that was better than the photos. We stayed here with two young children and it was perfect for us. Xenia's place is well located with heaps of shops and food within easy walking distance including a large shopping mall and street food options. Her place is amazingly well provisioned and had everything we needed and much more. It's very homely and comfortable and well cared for. Would recommend it without hesitation.
Great place and good value for money.
Great location. Clean bedding. Very large space. Would stay again!

Sunny was responsive, and even had a ride prepared for us arriving at the airport. It was a quick and easy check in, and the location of the Airbnb let me explore at mg leisure from a convenient place. Loved the amenities.

It was probably one of the best airbnbs we’ve had that was a studio unit. The bath tub was a great addition, the compartments and storage units are pretty sleek. The balcony is great for unwinding, pool isnt heated though but we had good experience using the gym as no one was using it.
The fridge is big and the bed is very comfortable. Internet was stable and I was able to make good use of the workstation and had several meetings with no hassle or disruptions.

The house is well-maintained, with stylish décor and a warm atmosphere that made it feel like home. The bed was comfortable, the kitchen had all the essentials, and the air conditioning worked perfectly, important for Bangkok’s heat!

Amazing house for an Amazing Value! 🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻
the location is great right by the weekend market, a quick grab/taxi there is very cheap.
the rooms are spacious and comfortable and the host is always available for questions about the house and house keeping!
10/10 will stay again if in Bangkok area!

Very nice room. Very cozy, but the location is not so good. It is close to the airport but far from the city center. Fortunately, there are local markets and convenience stores nearby, which can meet daily needs. The host is very good and responded to messages promptly and helped us solve problems.
Highly recommended for all. Good location and extremely good hospitality
Good place to stay generally
The great host with immediate response and support. The condo is very spacious and cozy. Highly recommended!

Evan's apartment is very clean and comfortable place to stay in. And if you want to have a truly local experience to start with a lovely and peaceful neighborhood, the house, the way the apartment is equipped and even a stiff mattress, which is a common thing in Asia, this is a place to go with. Spent a great week staying here!
PS: Evan, your welcome letter with a quick intro to Thai culture was very useful and interesting to read, especially for a beginner like me:)

Nice condo in a local area a little out of the way, taxis needed to get around. Safe and supermarket just below the condo. Not really a river facing view more on the side. Kinifrog is very helpful and quick to reply.

had a great time at this place, I enjoyed the views in the morning, host was very responsive and punctual replies

We enjoyed our 4-night stay in Bangkok. The check-in process was smooth and it is near the BTS which makes travelling around easy. The place is near a mosque and we are able to find halal food even though the variety is not vast. We love the concept and absolutely love the big bath tub to unwind after a long day of walking. Rachata is helpful and she puts in effort to ensure her guests had an enjoyable stay. Thank you Rachata!
Gud location and nice staffs

3일간 머물렀습니다. Siam중심부에서 대중교통으로 약 30~40분 정도 떨어진 곳에있는 한적한 마을에 있는 태국전통가옥집입니다. 집 옆에 바로 수로를 끼고있고, 근처에 전통 시장이 있으며, 평범한 태국 서민층 생활을 엿보기 최적의 장소입니다. 집도 매우 아름답고, 방도 쾌적하고 훌륭합니다. 니타야부부는 너무 친절하며, 태국 현지음식이 조식으로 제공되는데 그 맛 또한 훌륭합니다. 칭찬하고픈것들이 많은 숙소였기에 추천하고싶습니다. 단, 태국중심가 또는 카오산로드와는 거리가 좀 떨어져있으니, 이점 유의해서 예약하셨음 좋을것같습니다.

Easy to find and close by to a 7 Eleven, has everything you might need for a few days. just a note there isn't an elevator so if you have a lot of bags be prepared to carry them up a few flights of stairs.

great place to stay at Bangkok.

So convenient location and stay. There is good shopping centre with rich choice of restaurants right next to the place and seven 7 was very close. Also you can walk only mins to popular roof top bar. It was very good place. Train station was just 5 mins walk. Summer is very responsive and helpful. Thank you so much.
Be prepared to have the security officer take a copy of your passport.
Second stay with this host. Dedicated office for check in process, everything as advertised.
Happy with my month stay here, 23floor great view, big firm bed and hot shower.
周邊食肆很多，房間整潔，步行8分鐘到bts，亦有免費shuttle bus到bts，不過行路會比較方便，其他設施都很好，有泳池、spa、餐廳和健身室，只是每次沖涼熱水只得一兩分鐘，每次都要關水再開，才有返熱水，下次再會入住。

L’accès à la chambre a été difficile, nous sommes arriver tard et le code pour ouvrir le coffre n’était pas le bon, nous avons du aller à l’hôtel mais notre hôte nous a remboursé la nuit sans problème.
L’appartement était très grand, sur 2 étages avec un balcon, très agréable mais un peu bruyant avec la route passante juste en face.
Le matelas était très dur, on a l’impression de dormir sur le sol.
L’hôte est très gentil et souriant.
A very beautiful space with an equally warm and gracious host. it feels like you're living in a home - museum hybrid, with the utmost care from your host.
Great value - close to many cafes/ restaurants/711, good communication from hosts Nan and Kannika. Would stay here again!

Great flat, in an excellent location. Easy access to public transportation, right in the heart of vibrant Silom area. The flat itself is in an excellent condition and offers everything that someone could wish for, whilst visiting Bangkok. Perfectly airconditioned, I loved the mattress and the size of the bed, great washing machine for laundry. Mark has been a super nice host, with immediate response to any enquiry. I will certainly come back and stay at Mark's flat, next time im in Bangkok.
Great
Good place to spend a few days in the city. The location is great!
Great place for the airport, clean room nice staff
