The stay was nice overall. The host is professional, friendly and very helpful! Love the environment a lot! There is a local market with great food, and a BTS metro station very nearby. The best thing is you can take a free tuk tuk to these two places. Just one thing I do not enjoy that much is that there is no screens but only glass windows. I usually need fresh air in my room but if I open the windows mosquitos might get in. So the air quality in the room is a bit concerning to me. But if you are okay with using the AC all days long, I think you are good.

房间很大很漂亮，免费的早餐就在楼下，这点相当方便。
就是出行不够便捷，很难打车，离bts站走路要一公里多。
以及房间大门是有问题的！非常难锁，需要用力敲！！！
但瑕不掩瑜，房间真的很美丽
入住体验比较自由，房子不如照片显示的那么高大上但是算得上干净整洁，房东虽然不露面，但是能帮忙的都会帮忙做，交通算便利，离最近的BTS站大概五百米左右，服务设施除了7-11基本没有
Très pratique pour les transports commun, kk était très sympathique, le studio est très propre et équipé, merci beaucoup ! Je recommande vivement ;)

感谢LeFoyer为我们提供的房源，我们是看到了很多评论决定预定这里的，显然没有让我们失望，楼层很高且很安静，公寓的物业管理服务都很专业且安全，虽然短租的客人不能使用泳池和健身房，但这些对我们来说没有任何影响。
晚上的夜景很棒，可以看到日落，还可以看到再去高楼大厦里穿梭的轻轨，让整个公寓看到的画面想电影里一样的美妙。
办理入住很流畅，也很简单，公寓有自己的规则，只要你遵守规则，每个人都能够体验到宾至如归的服务体验。每天出行我们都是使用网络软件叫车，司机都能能够顺利的到达大厅门外接到我们。
房间内的设施齐全，一切都按照我们的意愿准备，放松的团队也会给我们发送一些周边游玩的攻略和介绍，谢谢🙏，我们还会再回来的。
A great place to stay.
超级棒！值得我写篇小红书攻略夸夸他，放心冲，100块以内包早餐性价比拉满！在谷歌地图看到所见即所得，环境真的和介绍一样，工作人员永远都是微笑服务，而且环境很干净！好评！属于会推荐朋友去住的那种！(靠近景点和唐人街考山路，晚上也很安静)喜欢siam 商圈的就没那么方便，但是喜欢安静老区city walk 可以考虑这附近，还靠近大皇宫和博物馆！

The house is a bit tricky to find but Chatnakorn gives clear, detailed instructions, including instructions written in Thai for taxi drivers. The location is really convenient to DMK airport, which is great if you have an early morning flight (as I did). Bangkok is a huge city with insane traffic so this is important.

Jeff is a very responsive and pleasant host.The house is always clean , room itself is very sunny and comfortable. The place is centrally located, very convenient , and the neighbourhood is very quiet and safe. I highly recommend his place and look forward to staying there again.

房间距离Asok和素坤逸车站都很近，路口晚上有夜市，非常热闹，路口也有两个7-eleven，马路对面是Terminal21，去各种景点都非常方便。
房间所在的公寓在巷子里，与闹市隔绝，很安静。
公寓有比较好的安保，需要刷卡才能进入，相对比较安全，楼顶有游泳池和健身房。
两室一厅非常大，很适合一家人出游，打扫很干净，没有出任何问题，房东沟通效率高，能及时回复疑问。
楼下到路口途中的咖啡馆google评分4.7分，连吃了三天，值得一试。

We had a wonderful stay in Bangkok. The place was compact, clean, very comfortable, and safe. The guards were also very friendly. The host was extremely accommodating, friendly, and always ready to help whenever we needed anything. They made us feel very welcome throughout our stay. The location is conveniently situated between On Nut and Bang Chak stations, and the overall atmosphere was excellent. There is also a nearby morning market at Bang Chak and an evening market at On Nut, which made the location even more convenient. We truly enjoyed our time here. Highly recommended for anyone visiting Bangkok!
Best location, beautifull departament, cool picine. Fantastic Im come back
Tolle Unterkunft und ein super Host.

I don't know where to start...
when we arrived we were warmly greeted, we barely could get out of the taxi when the host immediately took our baggage and carried it inside. he showed us around and WOW! everything was even more beautiful then in the pictures. our host gave us very good recommendations for restaurants and bars surrounding the area. our host even took us to a local restaurant by himself when we couldn't find a taxi and also took us to the airport on our last day.
if you look for a nice "time out" of reality and want to spent it with local people who are more to happy then host you, this place is the best one in and around Bangkok. I will be back 100% Thank you for everything!
Great location

Good accommodation friendly staff.
Would recommend!

Spacious place that is great for a long stay.  The location is good for Nana area with small walk to reach the main road.  The place is equipped with all what the traveller needs, especially a small family.
Nice condo , with a good Gym and 2 swimming pools. I would go back here. It was a good place to stay and no traffic noise. Internet was fast with a nice TV. Kitchen is small but okay.

This apartment was easy to find, clean and within walking distance (10 mins) to the skytrain. The bed was REALLY comfy and the furniture was spotless.
Pinyapat was a great host, gave local recommendations and was flexible with check-in/check-out.
A very easy 5 stars and I would recommend to anybody, will definitely stay again if we ever come back to Bangkok.
Thank you for hosting us 😀
The place is so nice & peaceful, we feel like at home & rest well 💯👍🏻👏🏻
great place. will be back!

Very nice and spacious.  My favorite part was the swimming pool… it’s perfect for lap swimming (25 meters) and because it is lined with black tiles, the sun keeps the water at a comfortable temperature.  The gym is also nice.  The host is very responsive and hospitable.

Je n'avais pas compris qu'il s'agissait d'un hôtel : je m'attendais à un hébergement chez un particulier. J'ai voulu arriver à pieds de la gare routière et l'itinéraire donné sur internet est faux. Je suis donc arrivée vers 22h30 trempée et l'hôtel ne m'a pas proposé ni conseillé de solution de restauration. J'aurais apprécié un accueil plus adapté à ce moment là, plus compatissant. Dès le lendemain, le personnel à l'accueil était très sympa et enjoué. Sinon le jardin est fantastique, l'emplacement est idéal dans Bangkok même à pieds et la chambre et la salle de bain sont très grandes et extrêmement propres. Je recommande cet hôtel.

Nice apartment right in Ari neighborhood which has lots of nice coffee shops and restaurants. Close to BTS. Gym and pool are nice as well. Internet is fast enough for Zoom calls. I usually stay here when I am in Bangkok. Bed and sofa are comfortable.
Everything was good and as shown
Nice building clean and quite totally recommended
Great place to stay, accessible to train station.  Shin is is a great host.

Es war von Anfang an alles super. Vom Flughafen ist es nicht allzu weit. Zur nächsten Metro Station läuft man ca 10 Minuten und hat dann jegliche Freiheiten um Unternehmungen zu machen. Sehr schönes renoviertes Haus mit jeder Menge Platz und gut ausgestattet.

We had a lovely stay at Piya's. The apartment was perfect from escaping the busy city, she answered any query we had immediately and the roof was amazing!! The AC made some strange noises but overall it wa brilliant. We will be back when next in Bangkok.

This is my second time stayed at Kevin’s listing, did not disappoint me and I would stay here again the next time I visit Bangkok. His team welcomed me upon arrival and assisted me to check in. It’s only 10 mins Grab bike to my work office somewhere in Thong Lor. There’s a 7.11 about 6 mins walk 500m away and a laundry mart next to the apartment loft. Host is very responsive and accommodating. Great value of stay and highly recommended
Alles super!! Die Aussicht vom Pool auf dem Dach ist der Wahnsinn. Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit in Bangkok, danke 🫶🏻
Clean and nice place!

I really enjoyed staying here. I think the location is excellent, and the value is great. The building and the apartment are old and definitely showing their age. This is not a modern apartment and many of the fixtures and fittings and cracked and faded.
However I didn't really care because the space is above average size for alot of Bangkok apartments and it had a nice view from the bedroom. The building also has a shop and laundry service and restaurants so it's just so convenient staying here.

Really nice hotel my room was on 20th floor which had amazing views from the small balcony. Room was clean and nice as described with small living room tv with kitchen and balcony and upstairs with double bed and tv also. Host was very responsive and made everything easy which eas appreciated. Location is good and can get to places in bangkok fairly easily with taxi. At bottom of hotel is a small 7/11 and a couple of small restaurants and a big chinese restaurant. Also has ATM on ground floor if you need to withdraw money. Has beautiful pool and bar on 37th floor and spa on 22nd floor which are really nice. Would highly recomend overall.

We had a great stay! It's a lovely and peaceful home in the midst of the busy streets of Bangkok 😊 We were welcomed with some watermelon and got offered Thai spaghetti which was very nice 💗 they are very kind and helpful people. The house is very clean and quite spacious and has everything you need 🫶🏼 I would love to be back one day!
房子在安静的巷子里，阳台很大，可观赏到美丽的城市景色。离7-11很近，但是离地铁不算近，步行需要十几分钟。感谢房东为我们提供延迟退房的帮助，房子的客厅我们很喜欢，但是床上用品的卫生稍微差点，厨房见到一只小蟑螂。希望卫生可以改进，下次有机会会想回来的
Location is good , great host , good price
The place was just like home and really appreciated Pandits thoughtful hospitality … thank you 🤩
The most STUNNING Airbnb I’ve ever seen!! Would 100% recommend staying here if you want something you’ve never seen before, perfect location nea khao san road too
交通很便利。周围可玩可吃的很多。我们到的晚，每次问事情，老板都能及时快速回答。电梯刷卡到自己楼层，很安全，下次入住还会选择。
숙소가 깔끔해서 좋았습니다. 다만, 에어컨이 시원하지 않아서 아쉬웠습니다.
Great and clean place close to night market. Easy to get everywhere and very easy communication with Peerapol. Would stay here again!

If you’re looking for a peaceful place to stay, this is a good option. Although sometimes Maps give inaccurate routes for drivers to go here, it is still recommendable since it is around the amenities. Thank you, Title and Fah for accommodating us! 🫶

A very nice and polite host first of all which is important, very responsive to anything I asked for. Any issues he was quick to help with.
Nice apartment, looks exactly like the photos. He even provided some toilet paper, drinking water and towels which not all places do so that was great.
15 mins walk to bearing BTS or 2 mins by bike or grab. Lots of restaurants and shops near by which is very handy of course.
Enjoyed my stay. Would recommend to anyone.

You can say this place is semi-hotel like serviced apartment, there is 24 hour front desk and luggage storage service (you can leave your luggage after you check out). The living room and bedroom are large just same as the picture they show. Location is good, about 5-10 mins to the main road and BTS station. There are many stores nearby (Starbucks, 7-11, bars and a great massage place in 5 mins distance). Highly recommend this apartment to anyone who are planning any holiday trip for family or groups.

appartement bien agencé dans quartier calme ; à 2 pas du métro .
Wanlapatch est très disponible et nous a aidé à booked un taxi pour l'aéroport.
merci à lui pour sa gentillesse .
The apartment in general terms is ok, comfortable and with enough space. The location is wonderful.
Eine schöne, gemütliche Unterkunft in guter Lage. Nette Gastgeber und super Frühstück:)
Amazing!! Very good value for money
Great place. Would definitely rent again when I want to get away from the noise and chaos of central BKK.
公寓很棒！跟图片上一样！地理位置非常好，步行十分钟就到centralworld，轻轨一站到siam！旁边就是轻轨站，出行也很方便！房东超级nice！真的很帅，哈哈哈！虽然不会读写中文，但是却说得一口流利的中文！沟通没有问题，非常推荐住这里！下次去曼谷也一定要再住这里

とても静かな場所だった。思ったより駅から歩くが、便利で特に困ることはない。オーナーさんはとても迅速に対応してくれて、安心して滞在できた。
次回もここを選びたい。
距离机场很近，走路十分钟就到了，房东小哥哥很贴心，我们找不到路还过来接我们，帮着拿行李箱，太感动了！

Convenient and clean, the hotel room was as pictured.
We were at the front of the building so it was quite noisy.
Would stay again for convenience
I booked this apartment for my sister and friend. They really loved it and will definitely recommend to others
I've used this place three times. Every time I used it, I was satisfied
Personale molto cordiale, siamo stati bene.
we only stayed there for 1 night but would definitely recommend

Tatiya was very welcoming and friendly, provided me with detailed food tips for this neighborhood, and her house is really beautiful, quite tastefully decorated, and clean. The five kittens are also very friendly, a local staysu that cat lovers will love!
We enjoyed our stay at Albert’s place. The staffs are friendly and helpful. My kids loved the pool.
对面有一个不错的米其林面条馆
ห้องพักสะอาด ใกล้ของกินหาของกินง่ายมากค่ะ
Good.
The staff is very friendly and has a good communication

You can't be a superhost without being a Super Host, great work Luke,
Thank you !
Great place!

Nui’s place was nice and Nui herself was very sweet and helpful. The bathroom had a terrible smell coming from the drain that had something to do with the plumbing. We would love to stay here again if it wasn’t for the bad smell. The amenities were very nice. Swimming pool was great, tv was great, there’s even a movie theater on the top floor you can plug your laptop into and have the full theater experience. The places location is about an hour from central Bangkok on public transportation but if you’re ok with that then this place is great. She also had extra batteries for the tv remote already in the unit, extra toilet paper and stuff just in case. She certainly put some thought into making this place nice. Oh also the wifi is steady and consistently fast. I work online so this is very important and it did not disappoint. Also there is a coworking space on the bottom floor which is super nice and also has fast internet.

My whole family loves the place and rooms. Location is slightly far from train stations but if you gonna go by taxi or private car it is accessible. Nearby has alot of local food and stores. And also near a massage palour that closes at 1am. Love it!
Joyce is a really nice landlord，we love the place, clean rooms, nice view, good communication with Joyce. I will recommend to my friends!
Nice room at a central location.

Very friendly and helpful group including the check-in receptionists Pink and Cat
Great location, just opp Holiday Inn express Chong Nonsi sttn. The apartment is comfortable and feel safe to stay.
地理位置很好，房主也很友善很细心，非常满意

What can we say!?
We travelled to Thailand from Scotland and after a long flight it was brilliant to be able to juno straight into the car Mickey had arranged for us included in the rental.
The apartment was just enough space for me, my husband our teenage daughter and newborn. The baby slept in the double and the teenager in the single bed.
The shower was lovely and no matter how long and often it was used in a day always had great pressure and temperature.
The air con cooled us down quickly after our trips out and we got used to the apartment and building quickly.
The pool and the facilities are honestly some of the most breathtaking I've used.the 360' pool is amazing.we used this everyday and the baby loved this. You can use from 6-10.
Would absolutely 100% recommend and return!tha k you Mickey
Alex is an incredible host!

首先：住了挺多次民宿，Tung是一个非常贴心和可爱的房东。并且他也不仅仅只是一个房东，还是我们在曼谷认识的一个好朋友，能够与我们一起快乐玩游戏以及聊天；在我们打不到车的情况会还可以帮我们叫车，最后一天还送我们到机场。
其次：Tung的房间干净整洁且安静，是让我们在外面玩累时非常期待回去安心休息的住处。浴室有很多，不必担心不够用的情况。每天免费提供的早餐不重样且有特色，还会提供免费的饮用水。
最后：感谢Tung的热心招待，这家民宿使我们对曼谷的印象深刻，如果还有机会到曼谷，将毫不犹豫再次选择。
ps：We miss you，Tung！And don't forget Black Magic.

We had a wonderful stay! The place was clean, cozy, and exactly as described. The location was convenient and made it easy for us to get around. The host was very friendly and responsive — they quickly answered all our questions and made sure we had everything we needed. We really appreciated the warm hospitality and smooth check-in process. Highly recommend this place and would definitely stay here again! 🌿✨
房间小而美，虽然距离地铁站有点远，但是能深入了解到泰国本地的生活，周围邻居非常友好。房主为我们准备了好多零食和饮料，还会给到很多旅行建议，非常周到。
Great location, easy check-in, nice staff
Cute neighborhood and amazing staff. I stayed here for work, the internet was great and there was a local coffee shop  next door I could go to every morning

Stayed there almost a week. She contacted very well before/during/after our accommodation. Flat is just in the area of social life. Max 10 min to reach whatever you want by foot. We had everything we needed in the flat. Thank you.
This place is very close to Metro Station. hardly 2 min walk. The place was clean and the owner was very cooperative too. I will highly recommend this place
特别喜欢这房子的环境，房东阿姨热情周到，带我们去市场购买食物，给旅途做了详细规划，并详细讲解，让我们之后的旅途清晰。真是宝藏房东，宝藏房源！推荐入住
Thank you Andrea for having us at your wonderful apartment.  One of the best in Bangkok for sure,.  The location is dreamy and the amenities in the building are 5 star.
首先地段非常不错，门口就有bts，走路很近，保安也非常好，安全性高，房间非常大，客厅很不错，风景也很好。就是需要爬楼梯，但是能接受，因为性价比很高。偶尔有火车的声音，早上也有鸟儿叫，空调声音在阳台有一些大，其他都非常不错，推荐！
Very good place ! We will definitly go back !

Nice bedroom located next to the historical neighborhood with all the temples and royal palace. Phil was very reactive and gave us very good indications for us to find the apartment which was not an easy task. The thing is the apartment is located in a tiny alley and is hard to find even for locals. Every time we took a tuk-tuk or a taxi they had to call Phil so he could explain how to get there.
Phil’s aunt was very welcoming. We had a little insect issue during our first night (multiple bugs appeared in the bedroom coming probably from the wood floor) and she cleaned very well the bedroom the following day and changed our sheets and towels. Good place to stay, I recommend it!

Beautiful big place. Great place for our family of 4 with two small kids. Very clean. Friendly staff. The communal kids room downstairs in the building was a hit. Walkable to restaurants and cafes. Walking to Lumpini Park and the skytrain was convenient. A bit if a far walk to the subway station but doable. Didn’t use the free shuttle to the skytrain station but this is a nice service.

Key features of the place: good location and a washing machine in the apartment.
The house is located on a quiet street in approximately 15 minutes on foot from Lumphini Park and lots of cafes and restaurants.
The host is very responsive and helpful.
The drawbacks of the place: the apartment is worn out and unfortunately it does not look as good as on the pictures any more.
One more annoying thing during our stay was a construction site right in front our windows - so it was very noisy every day starting from 8:00 AM and the balcony and windows were covered with dust.
I would not recommend the place for a long stay (we were staying for 10 days), but for 2-5 days it is totally fine.
Had a lovely stay, great location and great value / quality!
The stay was peaceful and beautiful. Host is responsive and friendly. Rooms are clean and location is clean and has a different vibe

Tanya was a great host, the place is easy to find and is close to the train station. Everything was provided including washing machine and dryer which are very suitable in thailand. Enjoyed the stay as well.

we had such a lovely stay, the house is big and comfortable, located in a quiet road near the river where you can do your gym! WiFi works perfectly and neighbours are extremely polite and lovely. 7eleven is 3 minutes away and street food is everywhere (very cheap next to the house). Iconsiam shopping center is about 10min away and the ferry to cross the river is less than 10 min away.
we would highly recommend Charin's place. xxx

Spacious, clean and well organized apartment with good wifi and an outstanding view. The host was helpful and friendly and we had everything needed for a very comfortable stay. The complex was peaceful and well maintained and the pool was lovely. The 205 (AC) bus stops just outside and finishes a few minutes walk from a blue line MRT station. There's a Foodland supermarket and a market with foodstalls 5-10 minutes walk from the apartment. This is a great airbnb rental.
Super good place... love it
Super clean and we loved the location. Perfect foe short stay
Really nice studio, very well furnished, lovely area, swimming pool on the 8th floor... I had a great time there. Thanks Annie!
It was very great
거주공간과 합꼐있어서 호텔급 서비스는 없지만 1,2주 장박관련해서는 가성비가 아주 훌륭합니다.

Beautiful room in a great location, we had a great stay! Loved the room design and the whole building is stunning. The breakfast and coffee in the morning were delicious too and everyone was so kind and helpful :) Would absolutely stay here again!

This condo is situated close by to 7 eleven downstairs as well as family mart across the road. Very convenient place as there is local restaurants a few places down. Alex is a great host, he provided me with a lot of information and he even provided snacks in the room.
ein super cooles und mit Liebe eingerichtetes Apartment. wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. mit dem Check in hat alles super einfach geklappt. Pai war schnell erreichbar. wir kommen gerne wieder :-)

Really enjoyed staying here
Supisara always responsive and willing to help
Would definitely recommend!!

High recommend to mong mama garden.She is very good landlords.Make delicious breakfast to us.Especially for my daughter's breakfast.So sweet!Mama garden has good locations.You can by tutu,by boat,by bts.If you want to anywhere mong will tell you anything &make plans.
mong的民宿真的很地道，精心准备的早餐，她会问你每日的打算，然后帮你安排好。从机场到她家约1小时，费用为450ba，mong跟司机谈好价钱。她家附近的交通很便利，可以小走一段去坐船到沙吞然后再转去你想去的地方，有大皇宫.黎明寺.卧佛寺.约15分钟，还可以去唐人街，鲜花市场，河滨夜市等，反正我觉得坐船很方便。还可以坐tutu（费用40ba）带bts站去任何地方。

Thank you to the Shoe Maker Home we had soo sosoooo much fun during pur 4 days stay in Thailand. Uncle was kind, considerate, and very friendly. The place was spotless and convenient. close to all the main attractions.
worth the booking!
夜晚周边安静的令人相当有印象的房间，让人舒服的棉麻床上用品；我们是晚上十点多到达，如果白天入住，走到房间前，你会发现你所需走的路，两边是各种小摊贩，很多食物和本地生活化的场景！空调也相当新，运行靠谱且可设置为安静模式。

Room same as pictures
condo lactation good
sky pool is awesome
thanks for host
Good
Excellent experience,definitely will chose it again

Great place if you are looking for a stay near DMK airport. A small well-equipped condo good for 1-2 people in a secure complex with lots of facilities. Super-near to BTS station. Communicative host, all issues were quickly resolved.

Der Gastgeber als auch die Location waren sehr nett und ansprechend. Dadurch, dass kaum jemand am Pool war fühlt es sich fast so an als wäre die 21 Etage ein zweites Wohnzimmer👍👍🍀.
Die Aussicht über Bangkok war einfach unglaublich schön ❤️
The place had everything we needed. Host was responsive, front desk was friendly. Both living room and bedroom have air conditioning. A lot of restaurants and cafes nearby.
Great place
숙소와 역은 10분 가량 떨어져 있습니다. 그러나 낮시간에는 숙소 전용 툭툭이 있어서 역까지 이동하는데 불편함은 없습니다. 숙소는 깨끗하고 수영장을 이용할 수 있어서 좋았습니다. 편의시설을 대부분 갖추고 있어서 불편함이 없습니다.
빠른피드백과 처리 그리고 깔끔한숙소 맘에드네요
It’s pretty good location. I felt some dark but it’s okay. Cindy helps me thank you.
Amazing stay! The location was perfect for exploring Bangkok, and the place was clean and comfortable. The host was incredibly helpful and quick to respond. Would definitely stay here again!
Sitara Place was excellent in every repect for my needs. It was clean, the people were freindly, it was well run and the location was ideal for my needs and wants.
good
住过的非常专业的民宿了，入住前房东会给你发到很多资料夹，非常实用，有交通篇、饮食篇、生活服务等等已经基本泰语发音录音，房间干净整洁，挨着地铁站，楼下就是7-11，以后度假会选择入住这里。
top
It was overall good experience
Very simple home and very hospitable host.
Our hosts were amazing!!! Definitely recommended

Jing is a dream host - attentive, kind, and welcoming. The apartment is clean and comfortable (especially beds), and perfectly located to explore the city and surrounding sites. I would highly recommend this place and definitely come back at some point.

Thank you Jing for being so great and making my first experience of Thailand really lovely.

Angela was super responsive , the place is located close to MRT and bts stations , all the malls are close by , totally recommend to stay ! I would definitely rebook again if i ll be in bangkok again .
隔壁邻居养了几只小动物，可以叫一晚上，睡眠不好的慎重考虑，我属于睡眠很好的第二天也是买了耳塞才不怎么影响，第一天没带耳塞根本没办法睡
超出你的想象，环境很好，早餐真的出乎意料，入住4天每天都是不一样的，并且真的很符合口味，房间也很干净，走路500米就有公交站，或者grab也很方便，步行1公里还有市场价格也很便宜，人也超级棒，有机会还会入住的
It was a perfect stay

Paul’s place was very well-designed by optimizing its small space. As someone who’s into architecture and interior design, exploring how smart he organized common areas in the Mezzanine floor and furnitures in my room was already an entertainment.
I personally enjoyed the whole self check-in experience where I entered some secret codes for the entrance and to obtain the room key.
It’s also located in a very strategic street in Silom area. Chong Nonsi is the closest BTS station but if you’re in the mood for some fun night strolls around the neighborhood before reaching home, I’d suggest to get off at Sala Daeng to experience LGBTQ-friendly nightlife scenery better.
What’s a bit unfortunate during my stay was some late night noises when BTS passed around that woke me up occassionally. Guess that must be the unfortunate drawback of its accessible location.
Overall, it was an architecturally-pleasing place with good value for money! Recommended for your stay in Bangkok.
房东人特别好，超级热情。而且会提前给我们住宿的注意事项，交通攻略，吃喝玩攻略，出来也有很多吃的和711很方便，基本什么时候问问题都能及时回复，只是房间比较小，但是也很划算了，我觉得还是很不错的
Good for a one night stay 10 mins from airport

The accommodation is easy to find. There are clear signs of the house name. Easy to check in just enter the code to unlock the door. 5min walk to Asiatique. The house is spacious. The first floor has a bathroom, washing machine, dryer, kitchen and dining area. The first floor has no bathtub. The second and third floors are bedrooms. There is a toy corner for children.
The bathtub is on the second floor.
Complete equipment, hair dryer, towels, hot water, cold air conditioner.
Neighborhood in quite zone accross Asiatique,can easy transfering to boat pier

Op prima locatie gelegen apartement. Oogt kleiner in werkelijkheid en was niet optimaal schoon. Ook ontbrak er het een en ander zoals servies ( ik had 1 glas en 1 mok om uit te drinken bv), een ontbijt maken was moeilijk omdat kookmateriaal schaars was, Ik kreeg 1 grote handdoek en 1 kleine met 2 gastendoeken hetgeen ik beter gewend ben.
Toch is het apartement prettig, heeft leuke slaapkamer omgeven door glas, hetgeen prettig slaapt en rustig is. Jammer is dat het vrij donker is omdat de terras ramen een verduisterings folie hebben. Niettemin, als verhuurder iets met tips doet is dit een prima locatie.

Wie auf der Karte zu sehen ist die Unterkunft in der Nähe einer der Brücken die über den Chao Phraya führt. Deshalb ost mit eher viel Verkehr zu rechnen. Bei geschlossenem Fenster mit eingeschalteter Klimaanlage ist schlafen Nachts aber kein Problem. Die Anbindung an die öffentlichen Verkehrsmittel ist sehr!!! gut. Fußläufig eine Metro Haltestelle oder etwa 5 Minuten zu Fuß bis zur Haltestelle der express line der Fähre die den chao phraya hoch oder runter fährt.
Total nett und eine Bereicherung der eigene Balkon auf dem es sich mit toller Aussicht sitzen läßt. Direkt ums eck viel Essensstände oder 7eleven.
아주~ 편하게 잘 이용하고 갑니다~^^
I really enjoyed my stay only one night but five stars all the way
不錯地點 就是房源有點舊 床單有血
Nice place to stay, accessible to everything food taxi and BTS .  Vasu is very good host and friendly  would def. stay here again next time .
Had a wonderful stay! Thank you for your hospitality!

Overall, my stay was generally positive and the apartment was comfortable. The location and overall setup were good. However, there were a few issues that affected the experience. All of the kitchen pans were non-stick but extremely scratched and basically unusable. I requested replacements, but the “new” pans provided were also heavily scratched, and no scratch-free option was offered. The bathroom had some mold, which was unpleasant. Additionally, the building’s elevator system works with a key card, and my card often didn’t work. I ended up getting stuck in the elevator several times, which was quite frustrating. With some improvements in these areas, the stay could be much better.

Sehr schönes Apartment in ruhiger Lage. Etwa 400 - 500 Meter zu einem kleinen Supermarkt und den ersten Restaurants in der Nähe. Zur nächsten BTS Station Nana sollte man ein Motorrad Taxi nehmen (nur wenige Meter von der Unterkunft entfernt) da zu Fuß doch sehr weit entfernt. Ich war mit Sicherheit nicht das letzte Mal in der Interlux Unterkunft.

Felt like home...I had a great stay in here!
Supasak is super gentle and helpful host.
Cozy room and delicious breakfast.
Highly recommend!
不錯的選擇

Nikki is a great host! She responds quickly to your queries and attend to your needs immediately. She is very friendly and had a quick good chat with her.
Her place is really clean and quiet.

The property is a newly constructed with a very clean and warm welcome staff.
great place to stay, close to platinum and pratunam
Great place!

I have been living in Southeast Asia in airbnbs for a year now and this was the worst bed yet( and trust me I always stay at the budget places)  there was a dirty towel in the bathroom, no toilet paper, no trash can in the room, and they had a scrap metal pile right outside the window that some people came and played with early in the morning although that was just chance so it probably wouldn’t happen to you.  They were working on the place painting and such so they are trying to improve it seriously that mattress was awful (completely collapsed when you sat on it a could feel every single spring)  my best advice is stay here if you have to but definitely no more than one night

Séjour paisible, enrichissant. Des hôtes accueillants, fière de vous raconter leur histoire, de vous faire visiter leur musée, de vous apprendre leur culture et valeurs ! Petit déjeuner excellent et surtout un café d’exception fait par ses soins et les nôtres !
saubere tolle Unterkunft , würde immer wieder diese Unterkunft buchen

가족 3인 이용했는데 정말 좋았습니다. 위생 청결도 신경을 많이 써서 전혀 불편함 없이 편하게 잘 지내다 왔습니다. 모든게 다 좋았구요. 다만 위치가 주택가이다보니 근접 거리에 특별히 볼거리나 마트같은건 없어요. 세븐일레븐이 도보 5분거리에 있고, 숙소 바로옆에 작지만 깨끗한 식당이 붙어있어서 거기서 아침식사 하셔도 될거 같습니다. 거실에서 넷플릭스 볼수 있는것도 좋았습니다.

The apartment was even better than expected! It is wonderful absolutely everything. Stunning views, great bed, stylish interior, comfortable check-in and check-out. I would love to stay again. Thanks!

Merci pour votre réactivité en tous points ! On se sent vraiment bien dans le logement. Moi qui avait une moto c’était un peu loin du centre et de mon travail mais c’est personnel, le condo est super. Piscine salle de sport et sauna, tout le monde est très gentil. Merci pour ce mois et à bientôt !

地理位址很好，離7-11或是Terminal21都很近～附近也很熱鬧。（但相對的若是搭車也會比較容易遇到塞車）
房源乾淨，廚房備品齊全，房東回覆速度快。主臥的床架，在翻身時容易發出聲音，同床的另一位會容易被吵醒；房間內的空調聲音較大。

We had absolutely the best time. It was such a beautiful house and setting on the canal. The breakfasts were amazing and everyone was so welcoming and helpful. We took a couple of long tail boat rides. Am sorted out these and our cab to the airport - getting up herself to help at 4am! Great street food nearby which is so cheap and delicious. We loved every minute in this magical place.
優質的體驗，熱情主動地回覆，再訪曼谷的第一選擇
SUPER PLACE!! really enjoyed my stay there!❤️
房屋很干净整齐，比住酒店更自由。尤其特别的是我们抵达时 房间已经打开空调很舒适。还有免费的洗衣机和阳台可以使用。我父母很开心。很划算。

It is a really nice and clean Appartement. Everything what is needed is there. The Instructions to find the Appartement were clear and helpful.
Im up for a next time.

家族三人で利用させてもらいました。部屋は広く綺麗で快適に過ごすことができました。
質問にもすぐに答えてくれて、安心して生活できました!
屋上から見たカウントダウンの花火は、とっても綺麗で感動しました‼️
ありがとう😆💕✨
交通方便，去哪都不远，房东很热心的解答了我的所有问题，说实话房间没有图片中那么大，但是非常干净整洁，公寓十分安全，如果是两个女孩子的话，很适合这里哦！
Eat pray love

We really enjoyed staying at Fab & Jaa's place.  It look like our grandparent 's house which bring back our old memory. We highly recommend a small group of friend 4~6 person stay at Fab house #1 . We like the outdoor environment that we can hangout with friends . Fab is very helpful .
Great apartment, very well equipped and comfortable. Helpful and polite staff. We had a great stay.
Great nice place!
It was great overall, loved the place
Pretty decent place pictures made it look a lot nicer

Everything inside matches the photos. Convenient and comfortable apartment. Good infrastructure in the condominium: washing machine, drinking water machine, gym, swimming pool. Convenient access to the center - 30 minutes by bus. Nice owner!
Easy check in, very flexible host. I would stay at Jeenie’s place again foe future travels.

Such a wonderful place!
I will definitely stay again when I come to Bangkok again

The room was as clean and wonderful as it was a year ago.
I felt completely at home.
Mr. Khomsan, thank you for your always kind response.
I would book again.
A very comfy stay here. Always recommend to other visitors and will return to this detached house again!!

I must say that Thanita is an excellent host. She was so responsive and helpful and I’m very grateful to her.
The location looks sparse when you get there but there’s a lot around. There’s a 7-11 attached to the building but there’s a very large one less than a block away. I tried to get a mani and pedi in the building place but they weren’t very receptive to letting me schedule (would say they have bookings so I said I’d take the next one because I was there for a lot of days and they just said they couldn’t) but there’s one in the next building to the right of the exit. There’s also a fantastic spa for a wonderful massage and very helpful.
The apartment wasn’t bad. No bugs. Easy to get to. Bed was comfortable. There’s a smell from the bathroom water that isn’t always there and the kitchen wasn’t as clean as I would like it to be but I’m used to super clean spots. I do a once over when I get there anyway. I did not tell her because it wasn’t that big of a deal. She’s great.
perfect place and location

Merci à l'hote, toujours très reactif !
Un joli appartement, confortable et agréable !
La vue est vraiment super
Le quartier est top, proche du BTS et de nombreux restaurants
On sait où revenir !

Patty and her husband were really helpful taking my contact details before I arrived and giving tips on where to go. They were really helpful guiding us to find the place as we took the train. We had a lovely welcome and good information about the area.
The flat was lovely, clean, well equipped. The rooftop pool was beautiful and luxurious.
We were right next to the sky train and there were a couple of shops within a 2min walk.
It was a great welcome for our first time in Bangkok!

Christophe’s condo is very comfortable to stay and well located.
Our communication was very smooth and he gave us kind attention for our concern and request.
I will recommend this place to anybody looking for the pleasant stay in Bangkok. Thank you very much!!
顶楼夜景太美啦，自己买点小酒可以跟skybar媲美，房间干净温馨，离地铁站近，还有很多好吃的，房东小哥哥小姐姐长得帅气漂亮，还很热情，非常好的体验，下次来还会继续选择这里！sooooo nice!

We've stayed here numerous times, and will return again.
This room is always clean, is in a good location, and the host is very good to deal with.
Thank you

Excellent place, really close to everything, a beautiful park close by where you can exercise, I mean definitely the place to be.  Oh and Adrian is a fantastic host. I super recommend this place and I will sure comeback.

Замечательный отель и персонал в нем! В окрестностях множество кафе с местной кухней и магазины! На крыше отеля имеется бассейн, а в лобби минимаркет и кофейный аппарат! Это pet-friendly место и вы можете прибыть со своим питомцем! Однозначно рекомендую!
Great location on a quiet street, and if you want more life Khao San Rd is walking distance. Room was clean and very comfortable. Definitely would recommend staying!
amazing stay in heart of bangkok

We had a lovely stay. The place was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. Communication with the host was smooth and easy, and check-in/check-out were straightforward. Overall a great experience—thank you for hosting us.
This was one of the most decorative places we have stayed in. Really nice touches and she left us water and snacks which is above and beyond the usual rental. We would rent from her anytime.

Photos of the place look great, but in reality it looks even better! Very clean, cozy equipped house. Since we were travelling with an infant, Prach write first and offered baby high chair and bedside panel. We found even baby utensils and dishes in kitchen.
We had very pleasant stay there, highly reccommend!
This apartment is in a great location! very close to Asiatique. Bee was super responsive and gave clear instructions for collecting key etc.. would stay here again 🙂
很好的 住宿体验！

The room was just great! We spent there a weekend because of Jatujak weekend market and it makes our stay so much more comfortable! After while day walking the Bangkok streets you can relax on the roof pool with an amazing view around!
Room is also very comfortable and cozy! We will come back for sure!

Modern electronics thru out. Elevator
system unique.
My go to place when i am in Bkk, especially when i need to be close to the airport!
Lovely accommodation, very close to various malls and public transportation. Host was super friendly too. I highly recommend this place!
Good stay
This was probably my best experience ever in an Airbnb. The price was great the apartment is super nice and the customer service I received was top notch.  Definitely recommend
地理位置相当便捷，房间设施干净整洁，房东非常友好。推荐大家来曼谷入住这间公寓入住。
Great Appartement!

Check-in: I paid for the night of 28 Nov, hoping that on the morning of 29 Nov my kids (6 months and 3 years old) would be able to check in immediately when we arrived at the hotel. Instead, we were told to wait. Even after I messaged them 30–50 minutes before arrival, we still had to wait around 10 minutes, then were asked to wait somewhere else entirely.
We were brought in secretly, sneaking through the back with one Thai staff member while another carried our suitcases through the parking area so that the building staff wouldn’t know. This was extremely uncomfortable and inappropriate.
The apartment:
The apartment is very old, dirty, and broken. It is not worth the money at all and does not look like the photos.
My feelings:
I felt terrible the entire stay. Even though I paid for the accommodation, I felt like I was doing something wrong or staying there illegally. I couldn’t even look at the staff downstairs because of how uncomfortable the situation was. I am extremely disappointe

We had a great time. Building was easy to find, instructions of receiving access very clear. Apartment looked like on photos, clean and spacious with giant window in the centre.
I recommend to go to roof top at least once to see amazing view of the town at the evening.
Great place by the river to unwind & local vibes . If you want to enjoy the other side of Bangkok this location is good for that .
Good location and excellent service. Price-quality ratio very good.
Very clean, good location with everything a few min walk away ,Friendly stuff , will be come back soon

This place was great! it fulfilled everything we were looking for on our visit to bangkok. We had a wonderful trip and the comfort of this place really helped! They provided water and some snacks as well which was very very needed!
The accommodation is in a very good condition, the host was very helpful as well, making this a good stay.

I spent one night here and I must say I enjoyed my stay very much! The host is very nice and responsive. The room is clean, well decorated, and comfortable. Condo location is easy to find and located in a walkable length from the BTS station. Would love to come back one day. Totally recommend this place!
Rien à dire, tout était parfait 👍

Tôi đến nước thailan đưa con đi du lịch lần này.lân đầu tiêu ơ đây rât tôt phong khách san sach se đep đe khoang mat ngươi tiêp tân rât nhiêt tình.
Tôi thich ngi ngơi ơ khach san nay lăm.
ơ đây rât chu đao .rât nhiêt tinh .rât ok. Đô ăn ơ khach san này rât ngon thât tuyêt vơi.

PLEASE READ MY PREVIOUS REVIEW!  We stayed with Nui for a month in March, and enjoyed the experience so much that we stayed with him again for a month in May.  We agree with all the positive comments that other guests have made regarding their stays with Nui...the neighborhood is great; the building is great; his flat is great; but best of all Nui is great!  The personal touch and professionally executed hospitality for guests is something that comes naturally for Nui.  The sincerity of his warm, helpful, friendly, incredibly thoughtful interaction with others makes him a host far beyond a mere five stars.  He is a striking example of what theThai culture is all about.  This is why both our stays with him were so special.  Staying with Nui should be equally special for you as well.  We confidently recommend him to anyone seeking what we refer to as a real “Thai experience”.

Communication with Curry is clear and fast. Apartment by self is nice with a beautiful skyline view of Bangkok. Bedding is great and everything is super clean.
Already reported in other hosts comments: kitchen utensils and tools are very limited (you can't cook except boiling water for industrial noodles) and access/rules to use elevator make you feel you are a kind of "thief" in the very place you are renting.
Anyway, good experience overall.

The place is very clean, cozy and on great location.  It was our first time in Bangkok and Gerald made it very easy for us. On our arrival he set up a ride on the way to the place. He also provide great info on how to tour around Bangkok. Thank you very much Gerald! Will definitely recommend your place and will definitely stay on your place again when you go back to Bangkok!
公寓非常宽敞，我们是2对情侣，2个洗手间很有帮助。我们可以使用屋顶泳池和健身房。房东很友善，提供贴心的指导和建议。公寓设施齐全。
Excellent stay. Very helpful host.
Great location
This is a charming place in Ekkamai district, close to BTS Ekkamai and Thonglor. Noted for nice, clean and professional manner from the host, I am thankful for them during my stay here.
房间布置的很温馨，设施也一应俱全，去拉差达夜市15分钟脚程就到了，总体非常好。就是位置有点偏，曼谷堵车非常非常严重，其实距离景点都不远，但打车的话都要1个小时才能到。没坐过地铁不知道会不会快一点。l另外如果报一日团这个位置是不包接送的

Die Unterkunft ist von der Lage perfekt gelegen, um auch während der Rushhour überall schnell mit den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln hinzukommen. Gute Restaurants und viele Einfkaufsmöglichkeiten (Central Bangrak fußläufig) in der Nähe. Das Leben in einem Reihenhaus in Bangkok ist ziemlich cool. Die Ausstattung ist wie auf den Bildern zu sehen einfach, aber gepflegt. Tolle Kommunikation mit der Gastgeberin.

Smooth check in process. Located close to the MRT station and bus stop. Amorn such a responsive and friendly host. The accomodation looks exactly like the photo, and the bathrooms are always clean! I'd definitely be back again in the future!

The room was good for the price range, and the location is excellent. However, there are two major issues that need improvement. First, there is no ventilation in the room, which makes it uncomfortable at times. Second, the water drainage in the toilet is poor—after taking a shower, it takes at least 1–2 hours for the water to fully drain.

Der Aufenthalt in dem Apartment war super. Es war alles so wie beschrieben und ich konnte meine Tage in Bangkok super nutzen. KK und Sharon waren tolle Gastgeber und habe alle Fragen schnell beantwortet. Falls ich nochmal in Bangkok sein sollte, würde ich das Apartment wieder wählen.
absolutely loved it. perfect area perfect vibe. good coffee across the street in every direction first thing in the morning
No complaints
Great communication & highly efficient host. I reported an issue with the water pressure & temperature on my first day, the host had it resolved immediately. Good overall experience, recommended.
호스트가 너무 친절해서 감동받았고, 위치도 나쁘지 않고, 숙소 내 모든 것이 깔끔해서 너무 행복했어요. 작년에 아속에 위치한 숙소를 이용했다가 내부가 너무 낡고 지저분해서 하루 밤자고 바로 근처 호텔로 옮겼었거든요. 하지만 이번 숙소는 정말 너무 좋았습니다. 강추해요~~
convenient in location and cost.
Great place, great host, simple as that. If you're in bkk, stay here!
Very nice place easy to get around.
The apartment itself was well-equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable stay, including a full facilities as listed and a cozy living area.

Apartment building was very clean and safe. Khun Nokiko room was clean, nice & lovely. I love view in the night, you can see Bangkok city from the room so so beautiful.
The location was behind Tesco Lotus. 10 min by walking to shopping mall (Central ladprao & Union mall) 10-15 min to mrt (Phaholyothin). 10 min by taxi to Jatujak.
Khun Nokiko was nice friendly person. She give me all the information about apartment and location and where I can eat a good food(It is very important).
I will 100% come back again to Khun Nokiko apartment. See you next year ^^

Aim sangat luar biasa dalam menjelaskan dan menjawab pertanyaan dengan cepat,
shopping : desember, platinum bisa berjalan kaki kira kira 12-15 menit
restoran: ada beberapa tempat makan disekitar tempat tinggal yg rekomen seperti pasta ama, b story cafe berjalan kaki kira kira 7-10 menit menit
minus: ada tamu lain yang tinggal di lantai 2, pada tengah malam jam 2 malam jalan seperti berlari sehingga menggangu tidur saya dan keluarga karena suaranya keras dan berulang terus hingga lebih dari 4 kali dan ini memang bukan salah Aim, hanya tamu yang tidak memikirkan waktu tenang tamu lain.
selain dari ini, semuanya baik
すごく良かった！
Thanks it’s ze best
The staff are  very kindly and we have a great time here.

Wie immer gut.!
Pool in Tower 5 wird saniert. Benutzt werden kann der Pool in Tower 6.
I had an amazing stay at Arisudan’s. It was exactly as listed, with a short walk to the metro station and a few shopping malls and markets 10 minutes walk. I highly recommend this Airbnb.
Very nice Airbnb ! I particularly liked the bikes that you can borrow for free and the kitchen !
Great place to stay, great location

Vielen lieben Dank Angelina
Wir waren mit Kleinkind hier und es war super. Alles vorhanden was man braucht, Lage TOP
Das Restaurant im Haus fanden wir preislich und geschmacklich wenig ansprechend.
6 liegen am Pool sind ein schlechter Scherz
Massagen in House super Preis Leistung
Personal war immer freundlich
Wir würden wieder kommen !!!
Excellent BnB with a really nice localisation in the center of Bangkok, I recommand it !

Ben's Place is located only a few steps from Silom Road. Apartment is so clean and with a fully equipped kitchenette. A quite neighborhood and you can find 711 store just right at the corner of the street. Ben is very thoughtful and friendly to his guests and make them feel at home. Highly recommended when you will visit Bangkok.
Great host and property

Sandy so good
And very fast response
Condo location just next to bts. This is big plus
a very good homely place, very peaceful. The host is very responsive and gave clear instructions.

We had a really wonderful stay. Everything was so cozy and we really loved the balcony space that was filled with succulents and cacti. Host was very responsive to any questions we had. Also, the apartment is walking distance to a variety of local shops and the MRT Bang Son station which made traveling around super easy. Will definitely come back to this place again for the next trip :)

Phòng ốc rất giống với trong ảnh và khá rộng rãi so với mình tưởng tượng. Khu vực xung quanh vô cùng thuận tiện để đi lại và khám phá ẩm thực, trung tâm thương mại. Ngoài ra điện, nước, dịch vụ được cung cấp vô cùng đầy đủ ☺️ Chúng tôi đã có một chuyến đi vui vẻ khi có một chỗ ở tuyệt vời đến vậy

This is a great place as a first time solo traveler. Great location to travel around Bangkok on BTS.  Virtually impossible to get lost as novice travelers. People and staff are peculiarly helpful with anything you need or point you in the right direction to stay independent.  Host is wonderful with right amount of text to make you feel safe.
完美的住宿！！非常喜欢这个装修风格，离地铁站也很近，最重要的是房间非常干净整洁，我们又续住了一晚！是曼谷住宿的完美选择！

Great location near Ramkhamhaeng airport link. The apartment is very clean and fully equipped with everything you might need. They really think about guest needs. And great communication. The location is about a 10 minute walk to Foodland supermarket. Highly recommend. ⭐️
位置方便，地方整潔

Best location. We stayed for a month and we’re so pleased with all the amenities nearby. There’s a weekday market with the best street food just outside and the BTS is nearby. Location is also close to many attractions.
Communication with the host is perfect. We had issues with the heater and they fixed it quickly. Any missing items like toilet rolls were also replaced fast. They even gave us an extra round of cleaning!
Only thing is that as the shophouse opens directly to the ground floor, so we sometimes
find cockroaches downstairs.
Rooftop was a big plus too even though it’s not advertised.
Great place for the price! Would 100% book again

Wij hebben een enorm fijne vakantie gehad! Het appartement is ruim en perfect voor twee personen. Ook is het makkelijk te vinden en zijn er genoeg voorzieningen in de buurt. Het appartement ligt net buiten de stad, maar er is (zoals ik al zei) veel te doen in de buurt. De host reageert super snel en staat klaar voor alle vragen! Wij zullen zeker een keer terug komen, hartelijk bedankt :)
Amazing apartment! Good location and very clean, love this so much 😍
Great place to stay with quiet and airy space. Convenient transportation, secure area. MJ responded very quickly. I hope to be able to come back here when I come to Bangkok
首先房东几乎不会给你回信息，你问他什么他也不会给你回答。其次是打扫房间催过无数次也不来，中午叫打扫房间，最后实在没办法，只能跑去前台去叫人，最后五点多才来打扫。整天我都再给房东发信息，房东已读不回。所以你来这里住宿就像一个没有人管的孩子。房间设备都是已老化。
Good area good house

Her place is exactly as in the photos and is really clean and has good amenities. It is located at such a convenient location that I had a great time exploring the area! If you enjoy walking, it is definitely walkable from Saphan Taksin back to her place. Takes about 30mins. A lot of things to sightsee on the way too :) The local market just a stone throw’s away from her place, is a great market filled with all sorts of local food to try out. Definitely a plus point if you are the adventurous kind of tourist who enjoys doing stuff different from the usual touristy things!
this place is very nice. walking distance from shop and market. host is really helpful.  easy to communicate. its suits for small family. i really love it.  sure will come again.  fully recommended.

A beautifully designed space that truly stands out. The building offers an incredible range of facilities that made our stay so much more comfortable. A big thank you to the lobby team for their excellent service
Our stay here was great! The room is perfect and Erica is so helpful!
好
goede plek alles binnen handbereik

Close to the Bts station. Just out of it.
Clean and convenient.
Very quiet.
房间性价比较高，位置较好，离唐人街比较近。房东很友好，会说中文，回复很迅速。房间很干净，没有异味，设施也很齐全。

Very clean and well kept hostel. The staff were very helpful! One of the staff gave me her personal jar of after-care cream when she saw that I had a new tattoo on my arm and I thought that was a very kind gesture. Overall I can’t recommend this hostel enough as it is very clean, organised and also very near to Phrom Phong skytrain
spacious apartment good for family, full furniture big flat screen TV and great kitchen including appliances.

Great spot and very large, multi-level property... perfect space for our 7 family members to spread out and use as a home base to explore everything that Bangkok has to offer.  Lots of outdoor patios as well which our family enjoyed, spending warm evenings outside.  Would recommend to anyone looking for an urban location with lots of space and close to walkable bars and restaurants.

This place was absolutely wonderful! The location couldn’t be better—just a short distance from Central World and other major malls, with so much to explore within walking distance. Despite being in such a vibrant area, the space itself felt incredibly peaceful and private, offering the best of both worlds.
Hooray was an exceptional host—attentive, friendly, and made sure everything was perfect for our stay. If you’re looking for a serene retreat in the heart of the city, I highly recommend this place.

Great stay overall! The host was very responsive and provided clear information from check-in to check-out, which made everything smooth and easy. The property itself is a bit old, but it’s still comfortable and well-maintained. The location is near local market and BTS station. Would happily stay here again! Thank you Victor :)
Very reaponsive. Allowed us to check in early as well! :) thank you for your hospitality and the woman who helped us when we arrived.
As advertised! Nice room, good cool AC, difficult to locate as it is tucked away.

Good location.
Bangkoks Veneccia
le logement était parfait, piscine et salle de boxe, je recommande
Good location, very close to bigc and central. the environment is very quiet
地點很方便，交通也很方便，離地鐵站只有五分鐘路程，附近也很多吃的，還有知名景點夜市.另外，遇到任何問題都可以問老板，都很友善快速的回答，有一天晚上樓下有人放很大聲音樂，沒辦法入睡，跟老闆說一聲，立刻就幫忙解決真的很感謝，下次去曼谷還是會住同一家.房間也很乾淨整潔.
Very nice place to stay, no complaints about anything!

Nat is very warm and friendly, communication is very easy, although the location is not very easy to find but patiently guide our drivers, and take the initiative to send us a taxi to the airport. The only downside was that the house was close to the intersection because we were not sleeping well and was troubled by traffic noise for one night.

Love the concept of keeping the wooden house to the house of art.
Just a bit smelly as the house is close to the river.
早餐服务特别棒 酒店位于生活区的一个地方 感受了一波曼谷人民的当地生活
Nice apartment in good location.

Verblijf was goed.
Behulpzame medewerkers en goeie restaurants op loopafstand.
Zit precies tussen 2 metrostations in, goed bereikbaar.
环境非常好，特别是卧室的夜景，巨大的落地窗可以完整的看到外面的夜景👍
Fantastic condo and area, Picha was very responsive too.
Rainy is very good host. room is very clean. everything perfect. i recommend this place
Great apartment in convenient location
Very nice apartment and good communication

Joyce’s place was wonderful for the night. It was very clean and comfortable, and it was nice to have a washing machine. Her guidebook was a gold mine and had wonderful recommendations. I used her driver (which is more of a company than a single driver), and got a wonderful tour of several key places in Bangkok while I waited to check in. The neighborhood was great, and I could not be happier with my stay.
Jack was a nice hoste! The flat and the building are amazing Near from subway station, restaurants,... Thank you for all Jack!
Was so goooooood and nice 😍

Anocha's place was a described and we enjoyed out stay there. It's just a short walk from the BTS station and thus everything is within easy reach. We didn't meet Anocha during check in and check out but everything went smoothly via prior arrangements.
Very cool place, thanks Roger!
위치도 좋고 청결하며 매우 쾌적했습니다. 수영장도 낮에는 거의 사람 없어서 혼자 쓸 수 있는 시간이 많고 변기 내려가는 수압이 아쉽긴 한데 지내다 보면 괜찮습니다. 역 바로 근처에 매일 작은 마켓 같은게 열리는데 꼬치류나 팟타이 등 종류가 다양하고 저렴해 저녁 가볍게 떼우기 좋아요! 근처에 편의점도 정말 많아요.
Great location for the people who want to experience local life!! The landlord is very kind and helpful. Thank you so much.
It is several time I rent that place and leave comments, so please refer to my previous comments. Just like the place.
入住的很满意，也非常感谢Alice的帮助。下往下回再来曼谷还可以住在这里
Very clean, the reception girl is quite pretty.

This location is perfect! So close to BTS Onnut station, and surrounded by malls, restaurants and convenience stalls. Host was very responsive and welcoming.
Highly recommended!
Super merci à chonny pour ce séjour à Bangkok !
房东人非常好，非常热情，房间非常干净整洁，位置很好，离地铁站五分钟的路程，给一个五星好评！

第一次来泰国住到了老板人超好的泰国民宿，老板得知是第一次来泰国准备了椰子和甜点。非常有特色，和之前在国内吃过的泰国甜点都不一样。房子是独栋的，和老板公用前门，但是老板很有礼貌，我们入住开始不会进到房间里。
房间里有一切必须的，洗衣机，冰箱，微波炉甚至空气炸锅，在外面买了吃的可以在房间里加热。有洗衣液可以用。客厅房间内都有空调冷气很足，老板会每三天送一次水。
老板养了几只猫猫，很可爱。偶尔会偷偷溜到后院。这个住宿是包早餐的，最重要的是我提出想和老板一起做饭之后老板每天会来后院教我做饭，而且最后一天早上开车带我转了几个本地市场，尝试各种本地小吃。老板的英文不是很好，但是很有耐心的每一句都用翻译器翻译给我。民宿附近有个 saveonego 夜市，小吃均价50泰铢，都是本地人在吃，跟着吃就对了。附近还有mega bangna大商场，似乎是曼谷最大的商场，还有宜家和均价500-600泰铢的自助餐。我们去的时候还赶上明星来站台。如果有想来泰国玩的朋友可以来这里住试试。

The apartment is beautiful, well equipped and located in trendy Sathorn. Bedrooms were spacious and the bed was very comfortable. It was very nicely decorated, felt like a hotel room. The staff of the condo were very friendly and it was a breeze to check in and check out. I recommend this if you are traveling as a family or with friends of 4. The only thing we felt was a bit odd was the apartment's layout - the staircase was situated outside. Other than that, we recommend this apartment!

I’ve stayed in this building three times with different hosts and always enjoyed it. The location is excellent, just a short walk to Nana BTS Station. There are plenty of restaurants nearby, and the area is very lively at night thanks to the clubs along the street. If you enjoy nightlife, you’ll definitely like this neighborhood.
Very good apartment. Thank you!
Totally Good, The curtains do not block the light, so you have to get up early.
好

Yefeng was an incredible host. He was proactive, responsive, friendly and helpful. His place is in the heart of BKK but tucked away in a quiet side street. Even when some lights stopped working in the apartment Yefeng fixed it the same day. Otherwise the apartment and building were amazing. Yefeng even went a ove and beyond to help organise taxis for us around Thailand. Would highly recommend!!

The room is really cozy and comfortable, and the host family are all very nice, Guang is a cute, handsome and friendly person, we all enjoyed our journey here. Here’s an important notice that they have actually 10 cats which made me really jealous haha
W’s listing is just a stone’s throw away from the BTS, allowing us to stay connected to everywhere else in Bangkok. We felt at home with the cosy and quiet setting. Thank you for having us!

Place looked exactly like the photos. Super clean place with lots of things provided for you e.g. dishes, cutleries, sponge and dish soap, scissors. We had a very comfortable stay. The location is near chatuchak, and is a 5 min walk away from a 7-11! Neighbourhood was quiet and peaceful.

Great stay. Nice view. Big comfortable king sized bed. Having a coffee maker and a clothes dryer was very nice. Heath was very responsive to any questions I had. Location is very close to BTS station. Thanks!
跟我想象中的一个样！特别喜欢 像住进一座小森林里 超级棒！希望每一个喜欢vintage和植物的女孩都去住！前台的长发男孩真的是可爱又好看！
Nice unit and a very smooth process. Host very responsive. Location fabulous. Near to everything but quiet.

Nice appartment with pool and a quiet location in Bangkok.
Room was very cleen.
I will use this option of stay for the next time too.
Good location if you don't mind been away from the tourist areas. BTS is only a 2 minute walk from the apartment which was great. The apartment is nice and quiet. I felt safe there as well.

Luke's place was great for our stay. It was very clean and comfortable. He was a great host and responded quickly to any questions we had. The place is walking distance from the metro and sky train, making it easy to get around the city. We will definitely stay at Luke's place again the next time we are in Bangkok.

The place was perfect for me and my partner to stay for four days. Clean and spacious room with all the amenities we needed. The public space was good— with a mini gym and work space.
We will come again if possible!

It was great. The instructions were clear. The air conditioning didn’t work at first, but when I contacted them, they fixed it almost immediately, which was great. I highly recommend this place for families and travelers. It’s close to 7-Eleven, which is very convenient.

Location is very private and in peaceful setting. We had our own vehicle but public transport is within reach.
The property is accessible and elderly friendly, with two bedrooms on ground floor.
Communication was spot on and host was extremely responsive.
It is a friendly neighbourhood with next door ladies being very kind. They helped us with translations and with local fruit vendors who often come to the door in their van.
房屋位置很好离景点很近，房东也很热情周到细致安排，旁边的夜市实在太棒了我们在那里度过了非常棒的几天！最后祝新年快乐🎉🎉🎉

Best stay we have had in Bangkok. Beautiful and high end apartment. Perfect for my wife and I and our three kids. Two shared a double bed and one had a camp bed to themselves. Really easy to access. Thanks for a lovely trip.
Good place tonstay
非常好的地段，方便购物
环境优美，地理位置好，交通方便，房间舒适卫生，服务人员很热情，乐于提供各种帮助。设施很人性化，网络高速信号好，窗外风景好。有特别的开床服务，房间小摆件的设计也很有特色。性价比不错，下次还要入住。

Unfortunately the air conditioning stopped working on our last day and it was impossible to sleep without. The place doesn’t match the photos. There was no art, no pillow throws, no plants, different curtains, and the couch was missing the backs and had stains. There was a small amount of human hair through the place.  I hope the air conditioning works for the next tenants!
6인 가족이 머물기에 매우 넓었고, 에어컨도 방마다 있어서 쾌적했습니다. 그리고 호스트 분께서 친절하게 소통하여 주셨습니다. 짐도 맡아주시려고 하셨습니다. 전반적으로 조용하고 편안하며 왓아룬이 가까워서 좋았던 숙소입니다.

位置：步行到BTS/7-11/商场，出行超便利
• 房间：干净整洁、床品舒服、设施齐全，空调热水都给力
• 服务：房东热情贴心，有问题秒回，还推荐本地美食
长住很安心，性价比超高，下次必回购，强烈推荐！
Maison très propre, éloigné de la ville
Cp值很高！

Excellent sejour.
Appartement tres calme.
Hote tres reactif.
洗衣机是脏的，热水壶里还有上个房客残留的水，咖啡壶没有清洗过。

Our stay with this hotel was superb. The staff were accommodating. The room that we stayed in is good for 6 persons and it  was very clean and linens smell so good. They gave us two bathrooms which is also spectacularly clean as well. Our group felt like we stayed with our family as the staff was super nice, they even gave us fruits when we had our dinner in their common area. They frequently asked us if everything is ok in our room and shared tour recommendations . The location for me is also good, there are small restaurants nearby with delicious noodle soup, bakeshop, and coffee shops. It is also near Kao San Rd just a walking distance. I definitely recommend this hotel for a group of friends or family who want to visit Bangkok.

Prae is a lovely host, very helpful, easy to book tours with and if we ever needed anything she was always there. Room is what you expect for the price, everything you need really! The drinking water was a really nice touch also!
It is very clean and close to BTS
非常好，生活也很方便，房子很干净

Great place to stay short term. I really appreciated that Chanlika picked me up from the airport even when I landed pretty late (10pm). Comfy bed, only AC was pointed at the bed, but I could change the air stream so that it worked ok in the end without giving me a sore throat. Bathroom is shared with one other room. Pillows were too high for my taste, other than that everything was perfect and I can really recommend. Super friendly hosts, thanks for having me!
Yim很耐心快速的解答我們的問題 房子很漂亮 整潔 有家具 真的跟家一樣 交通便利 樓下是花園和小烘焙店 鬧市中清靜休閒的一隅  是個很好的選擇
房東當天有事無法來，所以房東的爸爸媽媽來接我們，房東父母會說簡單的中文，很熱情的和我們介紹附近的環境，房源巷口就有7-11，走路五分鐘內即達BTS站，前往BTS的路上就有匯率很好的換匯所-SIAM EXCHANGE，有任何問題房東都很快幫我們解決，房間和照片一樣，住的很舒服。而且退房當天還很熱心主動提出送我們到MBK CENTER寄送行李。真是太感謝他了，誠心推薦這個房源給大家！
nice apartament in modern building, I could come here again

I had a wonderful time at this accommodation. It is very well located, with a beautiful view over Bangkok, and offers excellent accessibility. The host provided great tips to make the stay even more enjoyable.
Highly recommended for anyone visiting Bangkok!

Ed's place was really amazing for my group of 9 friends, plenty of rooms for us to choose, and the house is well kept and clean.
Ed and his partners are very nice host, very responsive and the instructions given are crystal clear. our check in and check out were butter smooth.
The location of the place is really nice, quiet neighborhood, with convenient store and metro station within walking distance. altought the road to the place flooded during our time there, but it didn't make us enjoy the place less.
Overall I recommend Ed's place! I will revist next time I'm in bangkok;
首先，房间干净。房间里的摆放很有感觉，四四方方，看起来很舒服。生活起来很方便。什么都有，洗衣机，厨具，冰箱，应有尽有。最后，就是房东了，真的人很好，刚到的时候，还在做卫生，不能入住，他就帮我们把行李拿到房间，我们去逛了，行李超级重，走的那天，是晚上的飞机，房东也帮我们寄存行李了，真的很感谢，下次我还会来这，旁边就是bts很方便。

hatten eine richtig schöne Woche hier
coole Wohnung mit toller Atmosphäre
Kommunikation war immer perfekt
vielen Dank für die schöne Wohnung

What can I say, this was a great place. The condo was very nice, spacious, and clean. It was well worth the money. Great location, so many friendly people. The staff was polite and professional, they came cleaned our rooms, gave us fresh towels, and bottle water. I would definitely come back and stay here again. So much to do just in the area, there is a day market right next to the condo, (great food). Nice little grocery store called the village store great for food you might miss from home.

Great stay at Pear’s place! Close to Pratunam Market, street food, massage shops, 7-Eleven, and ATMs. The place is beautiful — a hidden gem. Easy skywalk to Platinum, Central World, and Big C. Would stay again!

1. Brilliant location - so close to MRT Lumphini.
2. Great place to stay - exactly matched the description. In fact room was larger than I thought it'd be.
3. The view from the room was stunning.
4. Evan was quick to respond and helpful - best of all is his Bangkok guidebook.
Thanks Evan for the great stay!
Good place to stay

Good location that  near BTS Chitlom, 7-11, restaurants and tuk tuk. Also, can walk to many attractions. The apartment has very big space and just looks like the photos. No matter it is near BTS, but the apartment is really quiet. Very comfortable when we stay for five nights.
rien à signaler
ロケーション最高😀
best place!
Second time staying at this convenient location.  Very close to a mall.
It was dirty..someone else’s hair on the bathroom walls, it was obvious they didn’t clean between stays. Good location.
The apart locates in downtown and traffic is convenient. Rose is sooooo nice and patient.  Nice place
Very nice and modern room

We loved staying at this place, the space is beautiful, there are a lot of welcoming snacks, and as soon as you step into the apartment you can feel the beautiful chaos of bangkok with a great view of Wat Arun and the street below. It is great to go to sleep and look at Wat Arun, the location is great and safe, everything we needed was in the room, and it was very clean.

看到是中文房东的时候其实已经想定下来了 毕竟在外面有个可以问问的人感觉很不错 结果真的没选错 房东很贴心 给我发了很多攻略 周边交通还有美食等等 对我非常有用 真的是一个非常用心的房东 楼下就有711 711旁边有个房东推荐的海南鸡饭店 里面的鸡肉面很好吃 还有楼下的水果店是我每天必须光顾的 椰皇超级便宜 25B一个 每天都要喝一两个哈哈 房子离地铁站也很近 大概5-10分钟就能走到 地铁口附近就有一个夜市 感觉本地人很爱去 里面很多本地小吃 水果也是很新鲜很便宜 去各大夜市商城都都挺近的 推荐～

Highly recommend. Location is very convenient and central. Paceful apartment, while at the same time right in the action of the city. The apartment is clean, spacious & well looked after. Amenities in the building up to strong standard too.
Miu Miu was lovely from the get-go. She was organised, gave a thorough induction and ensured everything was setup appropriately for my stay. She went above and beyond to ensure I was given local recommendations. I also had a flight at an odd hour to catch. Still, Miu Miu helped faciliate here.
Un séjour inoubliable, nous reviendrons avec plaisir

Very nice location.
I like the apartment too.
Everything was great, the tenant even left coffee and drinks, the best thing is the location, because the condo is close to the center, for this price a super deal  🫶🏻
Perfekter Aufenthalt! Jefdeey war immer erreichbar und hat mir bei sämtlichen Fragen weitergeholfen. Weiter so!

Janet is a really amazing host. She is really kind and supportive, having care for guest always.
Regarding the place, the condo's manager and staffs were really kind. And, you will see Janet keeps the room clean when you enter the room. To the mrt station, it's accessible cuz there are bike-taxi drivers waiting for you by condo.
Thank you Janet!
ที่พักตรงปกไม่จกตา อยู่ใกล้ตลาดอมรพันธ์มากกกก ใกล้ม.เกษตรและ bts คุณภาพเหมาะสมกับราคาที่จ่าย ไม่แพง ผู้ให้เช่าสามารถตอบกลับได้ตลอด☺️👍

非常不错的住处，日常需要的东西都有，Pong非常热情，细心，会提前准备很多必需品，比如瓶装水，吹风机，插头和一些药之类的应急物品，

Before my flight, I was given a very detailed description of where the place is and how to get around. Once I reached Bangkok, Phil reached out to me and it was not too hard to get to the place. I stayed for 5 days 4 nights.
The place is nicely renovated and there's a steep flight of stairs so be careful when you're going up to the floors. Do check out the top floor where you can sit and enjoy the view. The room is exactly the same as the pictures. The shower is a bit slow, just have to get used to it. You have to buy your own shampoo and body soap. And also, if you need a travel adapter, Phil was able to provide one as I couldn't find one there so be prepared with one when you reached Bangkok.
The Wifi was a bit slow so don't rely too much on it but you still can use to surf the web. The host' grandma and maid are very kind people and they help to clean the place. Although I didn't really need to talk to them, if there's a need for anything, just contact Phil and he will be willing to help. I had a great and comfortable stay at 196, 4th floor. It was very near to On Lok Yun for breakfast and also a few close-by restaurants to eat noodle soup.
It's very close to the temples. So if you wish to travel to the old town of Bangkok (Grand Palace, Wat Arun, etc.) or if it's a more cultural trip, I would totally recommend this place as it's within walking distance! However, if you want to travel to other parts of town (new town, chinatown, or chatuchak market), it's quite a distance so you have to take public transport (motorbike-fastest, taxi or train).
Loved how comfortable this place is and just how convenient it is to the places I want to visit. Just one or two days is able to make me feel at home in Bangkok! Give this place a try :)

Квартира очень приятная, как на фото. Бассейн и спорт зал тоже чистые и приятные. Многие писали что хозяин дал всякие подсказки куда сходить и тд, но не мне:/ И в квартире не было многих вещей, которые я считаю минимумом: ни мусорных пакетов, ни соли, ни тряпочки на кухни, таких мелочей. Мне пришлось идти и все это покупать, а в первый день максимально не хочется этим всем заниматься конечно. И была обещана уборка раз в неделю и ее не было, хотя я прожила там 2 недели:/ Жилье находиться в отличном расположении от тц, где миллион просто кафе с едой и большой супермаркет есть с европейской едой. До метро идти минут 10. Но жить все же далековато, многие таксисты отказывались меня везти туда или наоборот найти таксиста который будет поблизости сложно. Обычно я люблю жить в отдаленных районах, ну в след раз всеже буду немного ближе селиться. Бангкок таки огромный город

A few small temples nearby including a Vishnu temple and Muslim Mosque. Street food is not abundant nearby but there is a very affordable restaurant area, convenient  storeand cafe right in the condo which some of the more fancy condos in Bangkok dont even have. Water pressure and hot water were weak. Would definitely  stay here again in the future.
Very convenient place
位置优越，周边较为方便。
地點方便 環境很好
Had a wonderful stay! Thanks

Our stay at Ananya's was very good. The apartment is well kept and perfect for what you need in Bangkok. The pool was a great thing to have considering the terrible heat!! We didn't use the kitchen since food is so great around the place. Ananya provides you with recommendations for food around and we were not disappointed! The Thai places across the street is amazing! She's a very welcoming host and makes sure you're alright all the time. We even had a blackout one day because of the rain and she reached out to us to see if everything was alright. The only drawback we found to the apartment was the location. It's quite a walk from the metro station (which you can take care of for 20 Bat at the back of a bike like Ananya suggested) but what really mattered is that you are quite far from all the attractions. Tuk tuks were a nightmare to deal with and taxi drivers are always trying to give you the trip without a meter and charge you more. We found Uber to be our best solution. If you don't mind being a bit far from the touristy places in Bangkok I would highly recommend the place! The swimming pool is so great to enjoy in the middle of the day when you can't do anything in Bangkok because of the terrible heat!
Great place to stay, top location & pool & bar were great

We loved staying in Nick and Eve's apartment! It is immaculately clean and new and has everything you might need, including a washer!
Great location right next to BTS. We stayed here two separate times during our travels around Thailand and Nick was always very responsive to our requests to book as well as any questions we had. There is also access to a pool, gym and water in the building. Will definitely stay again next time we are in town!

充满快乐的一次入住，因为这趟旅途增加了家庭成员，所以从万豪酒店换进了这栋别墅，房东和经理Morey都很友好热情，女佣也很认真的服务，提供了很多帮助；
关键别墅的位置真的太顶了，乘坐高尔夫车5分钟到EM商场，别墅周边的巷子也非常有趣，步行出门成为了一种乐趣，门口有一家很有特色的饮品店，有很多家我最爱的日本炭烤，晚上还可以在别墅顶层露台酒廊品酒雪茄，欣赏夜景，不得不说通罗区果然名不虚传，这里才是真正的曼谷，在这里的生活体验非常本土地道，难忘的体验；
起初也有些担心是否像酒店一样舒适，但我休息的非常好，枕头和床品都非常舒服，洗发和沐浴竟然都是欧舒丹的品牌，我只有在少数五星酒店遇到过这样的配置，确实颠覆了我对于民宿的概念，从别墅的细节可以看出，房东和管家都是有很高的生活品质要求，唯一的遗憾是我无法续住，因为后面的日期已经被预定，不过我已经预订了明年的假期，很期待下次的入住！

I had a great time staying in Naruephol's apartment, in the heart of Chinatown; easy access to the shopping center I'm Chinatown and super close to walk to the night street food areas. I personally love the fridge & aircon. Checkin-out were very easy. The apartment has a modern style and is super clean. I highly recommend this apartment.
Great location and well kept building. I stayed here for over a month and had minimal issues. Anything I needed addressed was attended to quickly. I would stay here again.

全新装修的中西结合全木制楼房，安静清幽小清新。房东每天准备不同的泰式早餐和水果，步行15分钟到BTS的phonimit站，屋内和房间都有咖啡茶美禄阿华田果汁随便喝。提供纸巾清洁用品，公共厨房内提供所有厨具和调料，房东人好得不要不要的英文也很好，带我们退票买机票付款。房间内是宜家家居的床，4人间是2张可拉式床很宽很软，睡8个女生也可以。旁边有火车轨道白天会吵，晚上就没有火车经过。后面有市场和食市。这么好服务还价格便宜，没话说炒鸡推荐。

This place was lovely with some great amenities! The room was lovely and well kept. It was close to a large mall with a great food hall.
Definitely would stay again! Thank you so much!
房间干净整洁，地点很方便而且周边很多小吃。靠近地铁站，方便通行
The original place was not available before I booked so Luana arranged for another place for me. It was conviniently near the BTS and I think it looked even better than the original house!
Perfect location and very helpful, whenever something came up. Definitely recommend staying here!
Awesome
I highly recommend this appartments. Very clear, speed wi fi, I like extra bonuses as tea, coffee and etc. Location is too very nice... 5/5
第有幸入住Pramote的民宿.因为是深夜到达但也及时响应.离吞武里海鲜市场开车十分钟十分便利。有机会想要多待一段时间

Stayed at Neo’s for 6 nights and it was a brilliant way to start our travels in Thailand. Everything was as described and the location was super accessible to metros to get to other parts of Bangkok. The accommodation its self was perfect for what we needed and the projector was a nice little add for when tired in the evening. Would definitely recommend for others struggling on location in Bangkok.

We loves our stay here. Ben and N’Dee were immediately responsive to our questions and the condo was immaculate and comfortable. Incredible views! Easy walk to nearby 7/11 and restaurants, as well as a a taxi stand and a lovely park. Simple check in; we used their airport pickup service and it was seamless and cheaper than the ground floor taxi line drivers. We would highly recommend and hope to stay again soon. Well done!
nice place, just needs more mirrors and proper lighting for makeup

Mr Hongyi is fantastic and very helpful with all of my inquiries! He also let us check in an hour earlier, which was very helpful! He also didn’t make a fuss when we decided to check out early to travel to the north 👏🏾
Great place, with a good gym facility right next to the airport. Highly recommend.
